| **🚨 BREAKING! BREAKING! BREAKING! 🚨** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92942?t=6&akid=20894%2E878179%2EQLUiXs) [**Trump is TAKING OVER D.C.! STATEHOOD AND STOP TRUMP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92942?t=8&akid=20894%2E878179%2EQLUiXs)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20894%2E878179%2EQLUiXs). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20894%2E878179%2EQLUiXs).**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I have some breaking news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
| This is Adam Schiff. I have some important news to share with you, team — **Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me.** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113150521/562827053/1030686737?refcode=em-8.11.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjg2OWE4MC0xMzc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1uFj3ien-froS49sNC1xXDnSl-aGoZCe5L1F4c5TWBs=) Ed Martin, if you don’t remember, was the Interim U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other — and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it. Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived “enemies” of the Trump administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs, urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than follow his unethical edicts. Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending insurrectionists who broke into the Capitol on January 6 and advancing bogus claims of election fraud. He is close friends with an avowed neo-Nazi, appearing with and praising him repeatedly. Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin’s dangerous nomination. When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed Martin to lead a “weaponization” task force at the Justice Department to go after the president’s enemies. I was at the top of the list. **And now, Ed Martin is investigating me and carrying out not just the president’s political retribution, but his own, as well. ** **[Team, this is going to get ugly. But I will not be deterred from speaking out, fighting back, and holding Trump accountable every single day. Will you have my back and split a contribution between me and DASS to help me fight back against Ed Martin and his sham investigation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113150522/562827054/1030686737?refcode=em-8.11.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjg2OWE4MC0xMzc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1uFj3ien-froS49sNC1xXDnSl-aGoZCe5L1F4c5TWBs=)** | | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113150523/562827055/-1047411325?refcode=em-8.11.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjg2OWE4MC0xMzc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1uFj3ien-froS49sNC1xXDnSl-aGoZCe5L1F4c5TWBs=)**
---
****
Thank you,
Adam Schiff
| Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the _only_ organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States.

Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. _Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters._ Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113150524/562827056/-664592562?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjg2OWE4MC0xMzc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1uFj3ien-froS49sNC1xXDnSl-aGoZCe5L1F4c5TWBs=)
---
[Donate Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113150525/562827057/-664592562?refcode=em-footer&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjg2OWE4MC0xMzc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1uFj3ien-froS49sNC1xXDnSl-aGoZCe5L1F4c5TWBs=)

| Florida has a massive crisis, Peter...and Ron DeSantis and his fellow Republicans _refuse_ to address it.

Property insurance rates are _skyrocketing_ , with some paying _four times_ the national average. But that’s not all, Peter. The folks who aren’t getting price-gouged? They’re getting their policies _canceled._

**This is a _direct_ result of years of failed leadership from Ron DeSantis and his Republican legislature. He’s _failing_ to regulate the insurance industry, _failing_ to address the climate crisis, and _failing_ to do what is right for _all_ Floridians. **

While they refuse to act, I’m committed to actually showing up. I’m here in Congress, fighting for Floridians who have been left behind, doing what I can to right that wrong and make real change. But I can’t hold this seat without your help. [Somehow, the only thing the far-right in Florida can manage to do is spend millions to unseat me. I need your help to hold them off, so please, will you donate $27 to my campaign right now so we can actually address the problems that working families face? >>](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/kuNPKh4i4d-IUV_5qykI-w~~/AAPPABA~/CX5g01-VUjgV-95dCEkyfcxW6Yu4J34N4imCMqzVR971EnyDLZY059MTkYpLMm0Giu8d4WHCUeFQIve5fOcpUZcTM6Vt083Jl-Ds9yRZrr8ctobbdPe6azpoX-QELnv7-4hlFTn57NDja1om2w09acGLIz8zrJCCQHWMuy1Zb3KfAx_LDenw3r7yPAbHiN3L-lOYSaHLUSNfVSpZ47g1DyjVVqkEGTfZbDD5KE1ggTLVad5uJGHSsE043T-nB5y-fuUpQ-mP7gdJZMTyiK1h8qx_o-WM6BScRMrXJXQr6zejWOPnFRMFgGtKoZatW6C_P-7rYpeu-kEM5Gx_EwghD4TqJR0qyumrdybZStOU06Q~) | [DONATE NOW ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/mpEsZ2yCeKVaBR3htg0RVw~~/AAPPABA~/CX5g01-VUjgV-95dCEkyfcxW6Yu4J34N4imCMqzVR971EnyDLZY059MTkYpLMm0GuAWaR9OXgQ_7DY7q8uzPeBYAtUZ2Zoy7Hwwy5cthA6s7ESpBg_LD9ycIpXX771YxOMJQV61acRPh-17Du0e7kvkT-5oUTdWiKMornxiudzB6H3--mKC60p214GMrYqbVMxx3o0XeMwNW9zNXjFjFlCgPo6nW4jaXZZfaAgrzLgWvrgBWVKbgGUgw0llIrn8H2HwiZ_SHdxDeZe5IaPNbvb5d0egXMl4oEIY76Yr_LiiZKDJbHUXBhAfgP8YhmrYufjsHnNsefx9j9P1gBDz3qP7f2nMm2ayosaIVJtwON5I~)

Peter, this is personal to DeSantis. He has taken _millions_ from the insurance industry to fund his campaigns. Obviously that’s not somebody we can trust to regulate the industry. No, he’s putting their properties first – _over_ the needs of his actual constituents and voters.

My organizing team and I are working year-round to defeat this continued failed leadership. And I’m fighting hard to stop it at the source, introducing the bills we need in Congress to help everybody.

**But I’m up against millions in special interest money, and cannot defeat it without help from the grassroots. That’s you, Peter.**
[ Can you chip in $27 before midnight to take on DeSantis' continued inaction, fight for Florida families, and keep me pushing for change in Congress? ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/kuNPKh4i4d-IUV_5qykI-w~~/AAPPABA~/CX5g01-VUjgV-95dCEkyfcxW6Yu4J34N4imCMqzVR971EnyDLZY059MTkYpLMm0Giu8d4WHCUeFQIve5fOcpUZcTM6Vt083Jl-Ds9yRZrr8ctobbdPe6azpoX-QELnv7-4hlFTn57NDja1om2w09acGLIz8zrJCCQHWMuy1Zb3KfAx_LDenw3r7yPAbHiN3L-lOYSaHLUSNfVSpZ47g1DyjVVqkEGTfZbDD5KE1ggTLVad5uJGHSsE043T-nB5y-fuUpQ-mP7gdJZMTyiK1h8qx_o-WM6BScRMrXJXQr6zejWOPnFRMFgGtKoZatW6C_P-7rYpeu-kEM5Gx_EwghD4TqJR0qyumrdybZStOU06Q~)

clean_body: | ~ | Florida has a massive crisis, Peter...and Ron DeSantis and his fellow Republicans refuse to address it. Property insurance rates are skyrocketing , with some paying four times the national average. But that’s not all, Peter. The folks who aren’t getting price-gouged? They’re getting their policies canceled. This is a direct result of years of failed leadership from Ron DeSantis and his Republican legislature. He’s failing to regulate the insurance industry, failing to address the climate crisis, and failing to do what is right for all Floridians. While they refuse to act, I’m committed to actually showing up. I’m here in Congress, fighting for Floridians who have been left behind, doing what I can to right that wrong and make real change. But I can’t hold this seat without your help. ~ | ~ Peter, this is personal to DeSantis. He has taken millions from the insurance industry to fund his campaigns. Obviously that’s not somebody we can trust to regulate the industry. No, he’s putting their properties first – over the needs of his actual constituents and voters. My organizing team and I are working year-round to defeat this continued failed leadership. And I’m fighting hard to stop it at the source, introducing the bills we need in Congress to help everybody. But I’m up against millions in special interest money, and cannot defeat it without help from the grassroots. name: Rob Bonta
subject: re: the National Guard
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250811&t=1001&akid=1909%2E1088799%2EPxI4pz ]Rob Bonta

Our trial over Trump’s illegal deployment of military
troops to the streets of Los Angeles has officially begun.

Here’s the case I’ll be laying out in court this week:

When President Trump and Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth used
federalized California National Guard troops for civilian law enforcement
in LA, they acted in violation of the Posse Comitatus Act — a federal law
enacted in 1878 that restricts the use of the military in civilian law
enforcement.

Their dangerous move had zero precedent in American history.

It pulled servicemembers away from critical work, like fighting the flow
of fentanyl into our communities and responding to wildfires. It eroded
trust between the public and our military.

They did all of this over the objections of Governor Newsom, against the
wishes of local law enforcement, and for reasons absolutely unsupported by
conditions on the ground.

And it’s not over: even now, 300 federalized California National Guard
members remain on the streets, pulled from essential missions for Trump’s
political theater.

The Trump administration will argue in this trial that there should be no
limits on what federal troops can do.

They’re wrong.

Our case will clearly demonstrate that this administration has
consistently violated the law: making direct use of military personnel to
execute the law, ordering federalized California National Guard soldiers
to participate in law enforcement operations that have nothing to do with
the military, and subjecting civilians to coercive military power.

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250811-pet/?t=1002&akid=1909%2E1088799%2EPxI4pz ]If you agree the President cannot be allowed to unlawfully deploy the
U.S. military in American cities for his own personal reasons, I’m asking
you to sign my petition today.

ADD MY NAME

Thank you for speaking out on this important issue.

More updates to come as the trial progresses.

—Rob

[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/1017?t=1003&akid=1909%2E1088799%2EPxI4pz ][IMG]

Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1004&akid=1909%2E1088799%2EPxI4pz
Update Your Information: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/
Unsubscribe: https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=1909%2E1088799%2EPxI4pz

Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
info@robbonta.com

* **TOP NEWS**

**" Texas House Speaker says state troopers are staking out the homes of missing Democrats," **Austin American-Statesman's **John C. Moritz** \-- "With the Democratic quorum break entering its second week, House Speaker **Dustin Burrows** said Monday that troopers from the Texas Department of Public Safety have been dispatched statewide to stake out the homes of the absent members in the effort to return them to the Capitol.

And the state law enforcement agency has also established a toll-free tip for the members of the public to report sightings of any Democrats who are refusing to show up in Austin but who have not joined the dozens of others who have left the state.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/7234ed5b-2c6e-47e7-afb3-48fce0b45229?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The speaker warned the financial cost to absent Democrats is rising by the day. In addition the $500 daily fines owed by the quorum breakers, House rules require absent members to repay the costs of bringing them back to Austin.

"Understand that we are keeping receipts for every gallon of gas, every mile traveled, and every hour of overtime associated with the pursuit of these missing members," said Burrows, a Lubbock Republican who is in his first term as the chamber's presiding officer.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/7234ed5b-2c6e-47e7-afb3-48fce0b45229?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Those breaking quorum will be held financially responsible for the cost they have created, not the taxpayers," he added. "To those absent members, you can go to another city, another state, even another time zone, but you cannot escape responsibility for people of Texas, eventually you will be here."

Enough Democrats are missing to stall progress on the Republican-backed congressional redistricting plan that is part of the 30-day special legislative session called by Gov. **Greg Abbott**. The maps would give Republicans five additional winnable U.S. House seats in the 2026 midterms.

Nine of the 62 House Democrats were in the chamber Monday, but the House was still short of the 100 members needed to conduct business. In all, 96 of the 150 members registered present. A 97th, Cypress Republican **Tom Oliverson** , was in the Capitol Monday but**** was not in the House for the electronic roll call.

Present members simply milled around the chamber floor for the few minutes the House was in session. Some expressed frustration that all of the items added to the special session agenda are being held up with the Aug. 19 end date looming.

"We want to do the work we were called here to do," said state Rep. **Jared Patterson** , R-Frisco. "But, obviously, that's been impossible."

State Rep.**Brian Harrison** , R-Midlothian, said his frustration level is "off the charts." But he blames Burrows and his leadership team for what he described as a timid response to the quorum break, as much as the absent Democrats.

"Not one serious punishment has been meted out," Harrison said. "No Democrat has lost their committee assignment, no Democrat has been busted from a (committee) vice chairmanship."

State Rep. **Cody Vasut** , the Angleton Republican who chairs the select House committee responsible for redistricting, said he is confident any Democrat who could be located in Texas would be delivered to the House. Democrats in other states are outside the jurisdiction of Texas law enforcement officials.

Burrows, in his remarks to the chamber, noted that several bills related to providing relief for the parts of the Hill Country devastated by the July 4 deadly flooding would be eligible for a floor debate on Tuesday, but that could only happen if enough members showed up to reach a quorum.

"These are not symbolic bills," Burrows said. "They are critical measures that would expand the powers of the Texas Division of Emergency Management to improve emergency response across the state, create the Texas Interoperability Council, which would help local governments acquire key communication equipment to better coordinate response efforts (and) assist communities with purchasing and upgrading emergency communication systems."

Democrats have said blaming them for stalling flood relief legislation is misguided. Republicans could have passed the policies mentioned by Burrows first and then turned their attention to redistricting.

"The only thing Governor Abbott seems to have on his mind is appeasing Donald Trump and continuing to use the citizens of Texas as political pawns in a reckless, partisan game," said state Rep. **Ron Reynolds** , D-Houston, in a statement Monday." * * *
* **TOP NEWS**

**" Texas House Speaker says state troopers are staking out the homes of missing Democrats," **Austin American-Statesman's **John C. Moritz** \-- "With the Democratic quorum break entering its second week, House Speaker **Dustin Burrows** said Monday that troopers from the Texas Department of Public Safety have been dispatched statewide to stake out the homes of the absent members in the effort to return them to the Capitol.

And the state law enforcement agency has also established a toll-free tip for the members of the public to report sightings of any Democrats who are refusing to show up in Austin but who have not joined the dozens of others who have left the state.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/9ca40327-83f6-458d-b538-de22729d13cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The speaker warned the financial cost to absent Democrats is rising by the day. In addition the $500 daily fines owed by the quorum breakers, House rules require absent members to repay the costs of bringing them back to Austin.

"Understand that we are keeping receipts for every gallon of gas, every mile traveled, and every hour of overtime associated with the pursuit of these missing members," said Burrows, a Lubbock Republican who is in his first term as the chamber's presiding officer.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/9ca40327-83f6-458d-b538-de22729d13cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Those breaking quorum will be held financially responsible for the cost they have created, not the taxpayers," he added. "To those absent members, you can go to another city, another state, even another time zone, but you cannot escape responsibility for people of Texas, eventually you will be here."

Enough Democrats are missing to stall progress on the Republican-backed congressional redistricting plan that is part of the 30-day special legislative session called by Gov. **Greg Abbott**. The maps would give Republicans five additional winnable U.S. House seats in the 2026 midterms.

Nine of the 62 House Democrats were in the chamber Monday, but the House was still short of the 100 members needed to conduct business. In all, 96 of the 150 members registered present. A 97th, Cypress Republican **Tom Oliverson** , was in the Capitol Monday but**** was not in the House for the electronic roll call.

Present members simply milled around the chamber floor for the few minutes the House was in session. Some expressed frustration that all of the items added to the special session agenda are being held up with the Aug. 19 end date looming.

"We want to do the work we were called here to do," said state Rep. **Jared Patterson** , R-Frisco. "But, obviously, that's been impossible."

State Rep.**Brian Harrison** , R-Midlothian, said his frustration level is "off the charts." But he blames Burrows and his leadership team for what he described as a timid response to the quorum break, as much as the absent Democrats.

"Not one serious punishment has been meted out," Harrison said. "No Democrat has lost their committee assignment, no Democrat has been busted from a (committee) vice chairmanship."

State Rep. **Cody Vasut** , the Angleton Republican who chairs the select House committee responsible for redistricting, said he is confident any Democrat who could be located in Texas would be delivered to the House. Democrats in other states are outside the jurisdiction of Texas law enforcement officials.

Burrows, in his remarks to the chamber, noted that several bills related to providing relief for the parts of the Hill Country devastated by the July 4 deadly flooding would be eligible for a floor debate on Tuesday, but that could only happen if enough members showed up to reach a quorum.

"These are not symbolic bills," Burrows said. "They are critical measures that would expand the powers of the Texas Division of Emergency Management to improve emergency response across the state, create the Texas Interoperability Council, which would help local governments acquire key communication equipment to better coordinate response efforts (and) assist communities with purchasing and upgrading emergency communication systems."

Democrats have said blaming them for stalling flood relief legislation is misguided. Republicans could have passed the policies mentioned by Burrows first and then turned their attention to redistricting.

"The only thing Governor Abbott seems to have on his mind is appeasing Donald Trump and continuing to use the citizens of Texas as political pawns in a reckless, partisan game," said state Rep. **Ron Reynolds** , D-Houston, in a statement Monday." TOP NEWS " Texas House Speaker says state troopers are staking out the homes of missing Democrats," Austin American-Statesman's John C. Moritz \-- "With the Democratic quorum break entering its second week, House Speaker Dustin Burrows said Monday that troopers from the Texas Department of Public Safety have been dispatched statewide to stake out the homes of the absent members in the effort to return them to the Capitol. And the state law enforcement agency has also established a toll-free tip for the members of the public to report sightings of any Democrats who are refusing to show up in Austin but who have not joined the dozens of others who have left the state. The speaker warned the financial cost to absent Democrats is rising by the day. In addition the $500 daily fines owed by the quorum breakers, House rules require absent members to repay the costs of bringing them back to Austin. "Understand that we are keeping receipts for every gallon of gas, every mile traveled, and every hour of overtime associated with the pursuit of these missing members," said Burrows, a Lubbock Republican who is in his first term as the chamber's presiding officer. "Those breaking quorum will be held financially responsible for the cost they have created, not the taxpayers," he added. "To those absent members, you can go to another city, another state, even another time zone, but you cannot escape responsibility for people of Texas, eventually you will be here." Enough Democrats are missing to stall progress on the Republican-backed congressional redistricting plan that is part of the 30-day special legislative session called by Gov. Greg Abbott. The maps would give Republicans five additional winnable U.S. House seats in the 2026 midterms. Nine of the 62 House Democrats were in the chamber Monday, but the House was still short of the 100 members needed to conduct business. In all, 96 of the 150 members registered present. A 97th, Cypress Republican Tom Oliverson , was in the Capitol Monday but** was not in the House for the electronic roll call. Present members simply milled around the chamber floor for the few minutes the House was in session. Some expressed frustration that all of the items added to the special session agenda are being held up with the Aug. 19 end date looming. "We want to do the work we were called here to do," said state Rep. Jared Patterson , R-Frisco. "But, obviously, that's been impossible." State Rep.Brian Harrison , R-Midlothian, said his frustration level is "off the charts." But he blames Burrows and his leadership team for what he described as a timid response to the quorum break, as much as the absent Democrats. "Not one serious punishment has been meted out," Harrison said. "No Democrat has lost their committee assignment, no Democrat has been busted from a (committee) vice chairmanship." State Rep. Cody Vasut , the Angleton Republican who chairs the select House committee responsible for redistricting, said he is confident any Democrat who could be located in Texas would be delivered to the House. Democrats in other states are outside the jurisdiction of Texas law enforcement officials. Burrows, in his remarks to the chamber, noted that several bills related to providing relief for the parts of the Hill Country devastated by the July 4 deadly flooding would be eligible for a floor debate on Tuesday, but that could only happen if enough members showed up to reach a quorum. "These are not symbolic bills," Burrows said. "They are critical measures that would expand the powers of the Texas Division of Emergency Management to improve emergency response across the state, create the Texas Interoperability Council, which would help local governments acquire key communication equipment to better coordinate response efforts (and) assist communities with purchasing and upgrading emergency communication systems." Democrats have said blaming them for stalling flood relief legislation is misguided. Republicans could have passed the policies mentioned by Burrows first and then turned their attention to redistricting. "The only thing Governor Abbott seems to have on his mind is appeasing Donald Trump and continuing to use the citizens of Texas as political pawns in a reckless, partisan game," said state Rep. Ron Reynolds , D-Houston, in a statement Monday." ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. Free subscribers will need to become paid subscribers to receive full story summaries. **“Texas House Speaker says state troopers are staking out the homes of missing Democrats,”** Austin American-Statesman's **John C. Moritz** \-- "With the Democratic quorum break entering its second week, House Speaker **Dustin Burrows** said Monday that troopers from the Texas Department of Public Safety have been dispatched statewide to stake out the homes of the absent members in the effort to return them to the Capitol.

And the state law enforcement agency has also established a toll-free tip for the members of the public to report sightings of any Democrats who are refusing to show up in Austin but who have not joined the dozens of others who have left the state.

The speaker warned the financial cost to absent Democrats is rising by the day. In addition the $500 daily fines owed by the quorum breakers, House rules require absent members to repay the costs of bringing them back to Austin.

"Understand that we are keeping receipts for every gallon of gas, every mile traveled, and every hour of overtime associated with the pursuit of these missing members," said Burrows, a Lubbock Republican who is in his first term as the chamber's presiding officer.

“Those breaking quorum will be held financially responsible for the cost they have created, not the taxpayers," he added. "To those absent members, you can go to another city, another state, even another time zone, but you cannot escape responsibility for people of Texas, eventually you will be here."

Enough Democrats are missing to stall progress on the Republican-backed congressional redistricting plan that is part of the 30-day special legislative session called by Gov. **Greg Abbott**. The maps would give Republicans five additional winnable U.S. House seats in the 2026 midterms.

Nine of the 62 House Democrats were in the chamber Monday, but the House was still short of the 100 members needed to conduct business. In all, 96 of the 150 members registered present. A 97th, Cypress Republican **Tom Oliverson** , was in the Capitol Monday but**** was not in the House for the electronic roll call.

Present members simply milled around the chamber floor for the few minutes the House was in session. Some expressed frustration that all of the items added to the special session agenda are being held up with the Aug. 19 end date looming.

"We want to do the work we were called here to do," said state Rep. **Jared Patterson** , R-Frisco. "But, obviously, that's been impossible."

State Rep.**Brian Harrison** , R-Midlothian, said his frustration level is "off the charts." But he blames Burrows and his leadership team for what he described as a timid response to the quorum break, as much as the absent Democrats.

"Not one serious punishment has been meted out," Harrison said. "No Democrat has lost their committee assignment, no Democrat has been busted from a (committee) vice chairmanship."

State Rep. **Cody Vasut** , the Angleton Republican who chairs the select House committee responsible for redistricting, said he is confident any Democrat who could be located in Texas would be delivered to the House. Democrats in other states are outside the jurisdiction of Texas law enforcement officials.

Burrows, in his remarks to the chamber, noted that several bills related to providing relief for the parts of the Hill Country devastated by the July 4 deadly flooding would be eligible for a floor debate on Tuesday, but that could only happen if enough members showed up to reach a quorum.

"These are not symbolic bills," Burrows said. "They are critical measures that would expand the powers of the Texas Division of Emergency Management to improve emergency response across the state, create the Texas Interoperability Council, which would help local governments acquire key communication equipment to better coordinate response efforts (and) assist communities with purchasing and upgrading emergency communication systems."

Democrats have said blaming them for stalling flood relief legislation is misguided. Republicans could have passed the policies mentioned by Burrows first and then turned their attention to redistricting.

"The only thing Governor Abbott seems to have on his mind is appeasing Donald Trump and continuing to use the citizens of Texas as political pawns in a reckless, partisan game," said state Rep. **Ron Reynolds** , D-Houston, in a statement Monday." Thank you for reading as a FREE subscriber. » Become a PAID subscriber for $7/mo or $70/yr and you will SAVE TIME and be BETTER INFORMED. | AUSTIN NEWSLETTER LAUNCHED Are you one of the 100,000+ subscribers to , a newsletter that delivers EVERYTHING you NEED TO KNOW about Austin? | Subscriptions are $5/mo, $50/yr or $199/lifetime here: . Read the most recent FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr | PRESENTING SPONSOR: 1440 Media Looking for unbiased, fact-based news? Join 1440 today. | Join over 4 million Americans who start their day with – your daily digest for unbiased, fact-centric news. From politics to sports, we cover it all by analyzing over 100 sources. Our concise, 5-minute read lands in your inbox each morning at no cost. Experience news without the noise; let 1440 help you make up your own mind. Sign up now and invite your friends and family to be part of the informed. | TOP NEWS “Texas House Speaker says state troopers are staking out the homes of missing Democrats,” Austin American-Statesman's John C. Moritz \-- "With the Democratic quorum break entering its second week, House Speaker Dustin Burrows said Monday that troopers from the Texas Department of Public Safety have been dispatched statewide to stake out the homes of the absent members in the effort to return them to the Capitol. And the state law enforcement agency has also established a toll-free tip for the members of the public to report sightings of any Democrats who are refusing to show up in Austin but who have not joined the dozens of others who have left the state. » The speaker warned the financial cost to absent Democrats is rising by the day. In addition the $500 daily fines owed by the quorum breakers, House rules require absent members to repay the costs of bringing them back to Austin. "Understand that we are keeping receipts for every gallon of gas, every mile traveled, and every hour of overtime associated with the pursuit of these missing members," said Burrows, a Lubbock Republican who is in his first term as the chamber's presiding officer. » “Those breaking quorum will be held financially responsible for the cost they have created, not the taxpayers," he added. "To those absent members, you can go to another city, another state, even another time zone, but you cannot escape responsibility for people of Texas, eventually you will be here." Enough Democrats are missing to stall progress on the Republican-backed congressional redistricting plan that is part of the 30-day special legislative session called by Gov. Greg Abbott. The maps would give Republicans five additional winnable U.S. House seats in the 2026 midterms. Nine of the 62 House Democrats were in the chamber Monday, but the House was still short of the 100 members needed to conduct business. In all, 96 of the 150 members registered present. A 97th, Cypress Republican Tom Oliverson , was in the Capitol Monday but was not in the House for the electronic roll call. Present members simply milled around the chamber floor for the few minutes the House was in session. Some expressed frustration that all of the items added to the special session agenda are being held up with the Aug. 19 end date looming. "We want to do the work we were called here to do," said state Rep. Jared Patterson , R-Frisco. "But, obviously, that's been impossible." State Rep.Brian Harrison , R-Midlothian, said his frustration level is "off the charts." But he blames Burrows and his leadership team for what he described as a timid response to the quorum break, as much as the absent Democrats. "Not one serious punishment has been meted out," Harrison said. "No Democrat has lost their committee assignment, no Democrat has been busted from a (committee) vice chairmanship." State Rep. Cody Vasut , the Angleton Republican who chairs the select House committee responsible for redistricting, said he is confident any Democrat who could be located in Texas would be delivered to the House. Democrats in other states are outside the jurisdiction of Texas law enforcement officials. Burrows, in his remarks to the chamber, noted that several bills related to providing relief for the parts of the Hill Country devastated by the July 4 deadly flooding would be eligible for a floor debate on Tuesday, but that could only happen if enough members showed up to reach a quorum. "These are not symbolic bills," Burrows said. "They are critical measures that would expand the powers of the Texas Division of Emergency Management to improve emergency response across the state, create the Texas Interoperability Council, which would help local governments acquire key communication equipment to better coordinate response efforts (and) assist communities with purchasing and upgrading emergency communication systems." Democrats have said blaming them for stalling flood relief legislation is misguided. Republicans could have passed the policies mentioned by Burrows first and then turned their attention to redistricting. "The only thing Governor Abbott seems to have on his mind is appeasing Donald Trump and continuing to use the citizens of Texas as political pawns in a reckless, partisan game," said state Rep. Ron Reynolds , D-Houston, in a statement Monday." ($) | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Celebrate 250 years of American valor with your free American flag
body:
For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation’s heroes.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhlv3i0i09v77vunisfpd6qtuedjqfouojiabc4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjie4o71c9h2bs)
---
Friend, For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation's heroes. Each year, we host the **National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** , bringing Americans together in a powerful display of remembrance and patriotism. We also proudly produce **" American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes,"** a nationally televised tribute to the men and women who have served across generations.

But our work goes far beyond public events. At the heart of our mission is a commitment to **preserve the stories of veterans from every era of service** -- from the final voices of World War II, to those who served in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 generation. Through these efforts, we ensure that future generations understand the cost of freedom and the courage it has taken to defend it.

This year, American Veterans Center is marking historic military milestones: the 250th anniversaries of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps...the 80th anniversary of the victories that won World War II...and key events in the Korean War 75 years ago, and the Vietnam War which ended 50 years ago this year.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl7iuc4cflt298dm6i1ajqju31jl0k1bkolsjltg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjie4o71c9h2bs)
---
**We may never have another opportunity like this to recognize their sacrifice on a national scale.**

[**To mark the occasion, I want to send you a full-size (3x5ft) American flag when you make a gift of $25, $50, $100 or more to support the American Veterans Center 's historic campaign: American Honor 2025.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhp3s8ormcesc6k07l6qnhbbj8tp0qnpu3ts3oc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjie4o71c9h2bs)
---
[ **Claim Your FREE Flag Today**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhs5oeg314bd5grgls1kted2oglq94nbebbgqcu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjie4o71c9h2bs)
---
This is one of our most ambitious efforts ever, Friend -- a national salute to those who fought to make and keep America free.

**Together, we 're capturing the stories of WWII veterans before it's too late...and preserving seldom-heard accounts from those who fought in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 wars.**

And with your gift today, I'll send you a free, full-size American flag as my thank you.

To some, it may look like just a flag.

_But to those who served, it 's a promise kept._

It flew over the beaches of Normandy.

It sailed with the Pacific fleet.

It was stitched into the sleeves of every soldier who never made it home.

**This flag reminds us of all they sacrificed, and what we 're now called to defend.**

Let it fly proudly as a reminder that freedom isn't free -- and that this generation will not forget the sacrifices of the last.

[**So please, Friend, make your gift today. Help us preserve their legacy while there's still time -- and proudly fly the flag they fought for.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za8g99qvh1k0hcvt6d21ajilc7vj5tr5ch5sudb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjie4o71c9h2bs)
---

clean_body: For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation’s heroes. | | | Friend, For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation's heroes. Each year, we host the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. , bringing Americans together in a powerful display of remembrance and patriotism. We also proudly produce " American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes," a nationally televised tribute to the men and women who have served across generations. But our work goes far beyond public events. At the heart of our mission is a commitment to preserve the stories of veterans from every era of service -- from the final voices of World War II, to those who served in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 generation. Through these efforts, we ensure that future generations understand the cost of freedom and the courage it has taken to defend it. This year, American Veterans Center is marking historic military milestones: the 250th anniversaries of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps...the 80th anniversary of the victories that won World War II...and key events in the Korean War 75 years ago, and the Vietnam War which ended 50 years ago this year. We may never have another opportunity like this to recognize their sacrifice on a national scale. This is one of our most ambitious efforts ever, Friend -- a national salute to those who fought to make and keep America free. Together, we 're capturing the stories of WWII veterans before it's too late...and preserving seldom-heard accounts from those who fought in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 wars. And with your gift today, I'll send you a free, full-size American flag as my thank you. To some, it may look like just a flag. But to those who served, it 's a promise kept. It flew over the beaches of Normandy. It sailed with the Pacific fleet. It was stitched into the sleeves of every soldier who never made it home. This flag reminds us of all they sacrificed, and what we 're now called to defend. Let it fly proudly as a reminder that freedom isn't free -- and that this generation will not forget the sacrifices of the last. Friend, throughout American history, our nation's flag has stood tall. I hope you 'll take this opportunity to receive your American flag and fly it proudly, today and every day as a symbol AND promise of freedom. Thank you for standing with America's heroes -- past, present, and future. Sincerely, Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Peter Ohtaki
subject: Dear Vladimir,
body:
Here’s the cease fire deal - it’s the best deal you’re going to get. | | | [](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=689ae1baa86755692a7c16a6&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D689ac8600eccba1ad6c441b5%26ss_email_id%3D689ae1baa86755692a7c16a6%26ss_campaign_name%3DDear%2BVladimir%252C%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-08-12T06%253A40%253A04Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_689ac8600eccba1ad6c441b5&l=en-US&s=JHQ4SalQEQ_7RlrelbFD-PKRdK8%3D)
---
|
## Dear Vladimir,
---
We’re meeting in Alaska on Friday so I want to be very clear: **Stop sending waves of drones into Ukraine** \- the killing **must stop today**. You think you’re winning a war of attrition in Ukraine — you’re not. And if you don’t change course, I’m placing **secondary sanctions and tariffs on China and India** — your biggest oil customers. Believe me, that’s going to hurt.You should’ve seen **Operation Midnight Hammer** — absolutely incredible. Our **B-2 pilots** , the best in the world, flew halfway around the planet and obliterated Fordow, Natanz, and Isfahan. Total precision. The Israelis now have complete air superiority over Iran with _American-made planes_ , of course. They also took out the **_Shahed_ drone factory you depend on**. Gone.Then I went to the **NATO meeting** — and guess what? I got the Europeans to commit to **spend 5% of GDP on defense**. That’s doubling a lot of budgets. _I Made NATO Great Again_ — and they _love me_. They’ll finally pay their fair share to support Ukraine. And I confirmed America’s commitment to Article 5 — solid as a rock. That means **NATO can now outspend you in a war of attrition** in Ukraine, and they will.
---
|
---
And by the way — pretty resourceful how the Ukrainians destroyed a third of your bomber fleet with cheap drones last month. That’s not a good sign for you.**So here’s the ceasefire deal:**
* **We’ll give Kyiv the Iron Dome** and enough Patriot anti-missile systems to stop your glide bombs, drones, and hypersonic missiles from hitting Ukrainian civilians and infrastructure. Israel’s Iron Dome intercepted 90% of incoming Iranian missiles — **NATO will enforce a no-fly zone** west of the Dnieper River to make sure nothing gets through.
* The**UK, France, and Germany will station peacekeeping troops** on the Dnieper River to guarantee current lines don’t change.
* **Ceasefire where the current lines are.** Ukraine will give up its incursion into Kursk in exchange for a **defensive perimeter around Kharkiv**.

---
|
---
Then — and only then — we can resume **doing business** , Vladimir. We can _Make Russia Great Again (MRGA)_. And America gets **rare earth minerals** in return for what we paid to support Ukraine.Think about it. It’s the best deal you’re going to get.Sincerely,Donald J. Trump, President

---

subject: Seize ALL CCP Assets NOW

body:
Take our quick poll on President Trump’s performance.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgxMl82RC1XRC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2ODYyNzMtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MTJfNkQtV0QuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjg2MjczLTI4OTkifQ/sYoizhINyUHxaOyEDAaGEw)Peter,
Go to China and try to buy land.
__See how that works out for you.__
Now, try buying land near their military bases.
**__You’d vanish without a trace.__**
But here in America?

Whoever allowed this has betrayed our country.
It’s time to **SEIZE that land** and shut this down, permanently.

name: American Action News
subject: The #1 Washing Machine Hack I Wish I Knew Sooner
body:
Tired of musty-smelling laundry? This simple washing machine hack is going viral — and for good reason. It removes hidden mold, grime, and bacteria that regular detergents miss. Thousands are using it to get fresher clothes and a healthier home in minutes. No tools, no scrubbing, just a powerful clean. Discover the #1 washer trick people wish they found sooner!

| Is Your Washing Machine Making You and Your Family Sick?
---

****
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7umtjkaadl33efqosa256lkoehf2rlhrcm9kih0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjie1oj2cjh2bs)
---
**
**

| Don't judge me, okay? But I have to be honest... I'm a 39 year old woman, and I do laundry at my mom's house. I know some people could say that I'm too old to rely on my mother to get my laundry done, but I am a single mother, and I need every bit of help I can get. Plus, when I do laundry over there, it's a great excuse to spend time with her, which she likes, too. But something strange started happening. My laundry started smelling worse and worse, like rot and mildew. And every time I washed them, they smelled worse! I asked my mom if she knew what was going on, but she just shrugged. "It's a new machine, I don't know what to tell you," she said. I decided I had to take it into my own hands, so the next time I went over there, I had a plan. I ran the machine with just bleach, thinking that it could clean the machine and kill the smell. But nope. It smelled worse somehow! I asked my mom again to do something. I told her that my kids are stinking up the place at school, and that I don't want them to get bullied. "Can't you hire a plumber or something to figure it out?" I asked. But she just shrugged, "Why don't you just do your laundry at the laundromat if you want to make such a stink about it." But going to a laundromat? Not a chance. I was going to have to find a solution on my own. Then I had a lightbulb moment: I WOULD go to the laundromat. But just for information- I would ask the workers how they clean their machines. If I cleaned my mom's machine like they did, the stinky smell would be eliminated! When I walked in, I saw a man with coveralls and a name patch, Louis. I pretended like I wanted to do laundry there, then I asked him how he kept his machines clean. "Easy! We use Splash Spotless washing machine tablets," he said. "The dissolve throughout an entire hot cycle, slowly disintegrating," "They professionally scrub every nook and cranny of the machine "It foams up, so the soap can get to the bottom of the residue, washing it away "Leaving our machines clean and smelling so fresh!" I was impressed! These [Splash Spotless](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3mrjhv36rgnfcf5ujo023s7duh7i27gmn643gb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjie1oj2cjh2bs) tablets sounded great. I asked him if he used anything else, or just Splash Spotless. "Nope, just Splash Spotless!" he told me, "We tried other cleaning solutions, but Splash Spotless is the cheapest, plus it works the best using surfactant chemistry to eliminate the root cause of stinky machines." I hadn't even thought of the root cause! I asked him why machines start stinking. "Bacteria, ma'am" Mario looked freaked out, "Or as I like to call it--"washateria." They love a damp, humid, dark place, so washing machines are the perfect place for them to set up shop. We even saw on the news a few months ago about a customer getting sick from a bacteria-filled laundromat." "But that would never happen here, since we use Splash Spotless every 30 washes," he said, proudly. "Great!" I said, and started out the door. "Where are you going!?" he said, "Are you going to grab your laundry?" I laughed, "Nope, sorry!" When I got home I looked up [Splash Spotless](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfhu98j70jjdmo1siecr44tl3q9v83ob6ma3orc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjie1oj2cjh2bs) online to check the reviews. I wanted to double check they worked before I spent my money. And holy reviews, Batman! Splash Spotless had 12,936 5 star reviews!

The truth is, not everyone can afford a new washing machine or expensive repairmen. That's why Splash Spotless works by simply dropping a tablet into your machine and pressing a button to start a cycle. While the machine runs, the tablet uses surfactant technology too slowly dissolve over the course of the cycle, sending powerful scrubbing enzymes into every nook and cranny. Then, Americans can enjoy life while [Splash Spotless](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zujop3dv8t9tb86south2qunb1t2c3in27ud47v8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjie1oj2cjh2bs) keeps your washing machine and home happy and healthy. No scrubbing needed!
## Is It Worth It?
Short answer--yes! Check out the ways that [Splash Spotless](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5qk24r78vbsvpfs8vpg3v722256go8n6nekr1rg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjie1oj2cjh2bs) saves you money:
### Splash Spotless v. A New Washing Machine
Affordable v. Expensive Easy v. complicated installation Do it yourself v. hire an expensive contractor Save the planet v. wasteful new item Guaranteed clean v. can have same problem! Just check out what these verified Splash Spotless customers have to say:
## No More Grime
"I didn't realize it, but there was a ton of grime building up in my washing machine. I found out the hard way--one of my little girls told me the other kids were making fun of her for being stinky. I was horrified! We always took good care of ourselves. When I realized the source of the stench was the washing machine, I thought we were going to have to get a new one. Luckily, our plumber is super honest and suggested Splash Spotless first. The results after just one tablet were incredible! Now, it is a part of my monthly routine."
## Grandma Stinks
"My grandma has been struggling, ever since my grandpa passed. The whole family pitches in to help, but people spend less time over there because it smelled so bad. I deep cleaned her house, and discovered that her washing machine smelled like rotten eggs. I tried scrubbing it with everything--bleach, apple cider vinegar, baking soda, comet, nothing worked. Then I saw an ad for Splash Spotless, and figured it was worth a shot, since there was a money-back guarantee. I'm so glad I did!! It works so well, and her house is totally fresh again!"
## Mold Allergy
"As someone with a lifelong mold allergy, I am always on the lookout for ways to get every single spore out of my life. I used to scrub my washing machine every week, killing my knees and triggering my allergies. Not anymore! Splash Spotless has eliminated the scrubbing and struggles--just pop it in and let it do all the work. It's eliminated the mold that hid from me, and my whole house feels fresher. Those testimonials were incredible! But I wanted to get an expert's opinion, too. Here's what Robert Jones, a doctor of toxicology, had to say: "The best way to take care of your washing machine is Splash Spotless, hands down. Did you know it works for your dishwasher, too? This is the kind of product I recommend to all my patients because it boosts your external immune system--when your home environment is clean and free of mold, bacteria, and germs, you are MUCH less prone to infections and illnesses. What makes Splash Spotless unique is its safe, natural, but powerful scrubbing enzymes, that really get into every nook and cranny of your machines, rooting out the "washateria" that can make your family sick. I highly recommend everyone protect themselves with Splash Spotless!" After reading the testimonials, and seeing what the doctor of toxicology had to say, I was starting to believe that [Splash Spotless](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3hlqclt50kb9fujr0id6ksb67atlrfnmgb40iuo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjie1oj2cjh2bs) was right for me. And when I saw that there was a money-back guarantee, I knew I had nothing to lose, and everything to gain. I ordered a Splash Spotless right away. I wasn't going to take any chances! But when I clicked on the checkout, they said they were out of stock! At this point, though, I was determined. So I checked back every day until I could place my order. I breathed a big sigh of relief as I pressed the checkout button. Splash Spotless was on its way. When it arrived, I was impressed with how small it was--could something so small really be that powerful?? When it came, I raced over to my mom's house and dropped one in her machine, and started the hot cycle. And when the cycle was over... The machine smelled so fresh! And looked so clean! The way a washing machine should be. I did a load of my laundry and when it was done, it still smelled amazing! Splash Spotless had scrubbed every inch inside of the washing machine, removing any "washteria" was gone--all the built up grime of mold, germs or bacteria had been erased by Splash Spotless. Even my mom was impressed after she did a load of laundry herself. But she said she wasn't going to be that excited unless the machine was still clean a week later. It was! Even a month later, the smell was gone, but I used another [Splash Spotless](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgcsfkt5l1u43ja7pqeu4fe5jntk62paellthtqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cjie1oj2cjh2bs) just in case. It says on the box to use once a month for best results--too easy! After I realized how amazing Splash Spotless is, I've been buying them for family and friends as an easy present--and they love it, too! I am THRILLED with Splash Spotless. It rescued me from having a stinky family--or having to go to the laundromat. Splash Spotless is currently offering a 50% off discount in recognition of World Health month, so don't wait. I ordered a 2 years supply (which actually didn't cost very much at all!)

name: The Flyover
subject: National Guard to D.C., China Tariff Paused, and Living Off-Grid
body:
President Trump on Monday placed Washington, D.C.’s police [under direct federal control](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQhZ_GdEZm-C9cRIrobpQuJRrsMUxk7JWZ3dW-fURe4dbn6Oh835-v9Qs5ctp_4UlWQl4Tva9IIlTWhMI5YdyfWLxk79zBCQXLCgZ6bSbdwOqR42ftKm8DEVBbkW3Gvpvnthmm6rBTY7zvx5acMT5sA7hxI9pwhim4DcaK7b1mpgYaYwYz1lOHGLZgqDUecAbVGfIsudR_Myc5KMRPflGpXT6raA-Rx6XaHwoWBQtu7iao93zHCpbfObKwuxQsUp7nQx85en13tMspUKHkSLvCJ2nvNAahouUohEKJ065guSSXj2oX9qr92UDXw9SZoSrWP94cI1_DqDqzn8jx_yf5lsiXhX8BAAD__w4LiN8) and deployed 800 National Guard troops in a sweeping crime crackdown.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ_GdCBj81u4WCmiy7ZbosEeYPYaOzJDUN7-iuhKeYBbTfFJ35xz_t3HO5CnsPyFDQ3PcQx47h6ZMY0BmGIAvxyQHEdn7UoBGNKopKpz2eWlGh2Qf41V5syMqFBnaMq2rvpel02XrcZ2fSt1W7sGGtWAdM71dWWradIlattmZC6b7EpVStnItugqgHmaJWrpFPRKVBIdcUzF_0iBV5z9Kz4xFTZumTcr82MX-o9Qg1DDeZ5FAtopXFioAUN-7NeF_ZVzzBFSEHo4eBs3dHRsQt8-nYVqLrLHI1kU-vb59kMsbA-gJQh9exunGC79mzGmyzb5aL_KLBn3OMl72ptWVHLZgPw7Mv9q56dR3wEAAP__FwiU0g) | |
# Tuesday, August 12, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1851, Isaac Singer patented [the Singer sewing machine](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFuhDAQheHTmI6VGYMxhYs0dJs2JRrwABMZe2Umu9rbR-QKqZ_0Se__uk935Mhp-8SDvKx5SvQ6I4lQmRIK54Rx-8ESJIdl2TmhYJlAQ1drVzcwBeT4ntoq-JUIyFTkm75rh8E01lW7X3rA1S5mtjgT9e3gTG8bF2ZrrV3CULG_NO0aaLS2ur-5FnGdV01GB8ABVKspsORy-86cZKc1vvOTym3JRxX9LvI4lflQMCoYhQ-6BgWjGVxnbadgPOnFaasPvA5QzelJSSgoGKviw-PFMfJpe9Xq7UCOf7D8q8bTw28AAAD__9V9cvU), a device that proved so successful worldwide that it made the Singer Company one of America’s first multinational corporations. It’s always a good day for nostalgia. Yesterday, we asked about your favorite childhood toy, and hundreds of you responded with anecdotes and favorites — from Barbies to Lionel trains to Easy-Bake Ovens. We loved reading them. Thank you! Today, we report on the [end of dial-up internet](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DHO4yAQxfHT4I4IxsTBBcU2dNl2S2tixvGsCEQwSZTbr7xX-Oon_fT0_3NdrsiZy_03PijIVpdCn55JhNpSULgWzPcXtiQ1revOBQXbAgbO2nhtYUnI-bu4IYWNCGgcKNjL2c3zaCc_7MFDGs15nM8zTd7cZrc58G5y07qiHZMZOBya8RasMZO5nLxD3G6bodEkwBmUM5RYajv9rVxkpy1_65vaaa2PIYdd5NnV-EtBVBDL91m7HJOCeMAKovEKorUK4u3VuVDvCiLWrD-cs-77S3Sqn6JZuk6MWb-eulN780oadaPMq66blp00YctfzUWoFRIFcWghPQ-H-3RRztwfyPn_M_lRzneAfwEAAP__b3mIvQ)—which, believe it or not, was still used by about 160,000 U.S. households. If you remember that screechy dial-up sound, please vote in our poll and share your early internet memories by replying to this email Save smarter with today's sponsor, [Raisin](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ_GdCBj81u4WCmiy7ZbosEeYPYaOzJDUN7-iuhKeYBbTfFJ35xz_t3HO5CnsPyFDQ3PcQx47h6ZMY0BmGIAvxyQHEdn7UoBGNKopKpz2eWlGh2Qf41V5syMqFBnaMq2rvpel02XrcZ2fSt1W7sGGtWAdM71dWWradIlattmZC6b7EpVStnItugqgHmaJWrpFPRKVBIdcUzF_0iBV5z9Kz4xFTZumTcr82MX-o9Qg1DDeZ5FAtopXFioAUN-7NeF_ZVzzBFSEHo4eBs3dHRsQt8-nYVqLrLHI1kU-vb59kMsbA-gJQh9exunGC79mzGmyzb5aL_KLBn3OMl72ptWVHLZgPw7Mv9q56dR3wEAAP__FwiU0g).
|
---
## Feds Take Control of DC Police
President Trump on Monday placed Washington, D.C.’s police [under direct federal control](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQhZ_GdEZm-C9cRIrobpQuJRrsMUxk7JWZ3dW-fURe4dbn6Oh835-v9Qs5ctp_4UlWQl4Tva9IIlTWhMI5YdyfWLxk79zBCQXLCgZ6bSbdwOqR42ftKm8DEVBbkW3Gvpvnthmm6rBTY7zvx5acMT5sA7hxI9pwhim4DcaK7b1mpgYaYwYz1lOHGLZgqDUecAbVGfIsudR_Myc5KMRPflGpXT6raA-Rx6XaHwoWBQtu7iao93zHCpbfObKwuxQsUp7nQx85en13tMspUKHkSLvCJ2nvNAahouUohEKJ065guSSXj2oX9qr92UDXw9SZoSrWP94cI1_DqDqzn8jx_yf5lsiXhX8BAAD__w4LiN8) and deployed 800 National Guard troops in a sweeping crime crackdown. Citing rising violence and homelessness, Trump said the move is [authorized under the Home Rule Act](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u3CAQhZ8Gd6zw-L-gSEN306a0xjDYk2CwMLsr5-kjr5QnuO050qdzvl9f8xdy4Lj-xJ108WmO9D4DlUJ5jlg4RQzrE7MryVm7ccSCeQYFnVSjrGF2yOGa28ppTwTUVKTroWunqan7sdo0Lt1irR8QFzt0fmyHwXnXe1J2WiacKtY3TY011Er1aniMLaJfvKJGOcAJRKvIcUn58TtxLBv5cKUX5YdNexX0VspxiuaHACPAxOtIZ7krAeYGCzBqFGDqWoB5nvL-J8CU_NwP6clRxsB_Oa7SWXmkwJakoyOk687-K5AfB5KjtHhwwSBt5p2kzWj_uPSOAkyVtTveHAKf_SBate7I4TOyfMvsS8O_AAAA__9m94-b) for 30 days, with the Drug Enforcement Administration chief Terry Cole taking temporary command under Attorney General Pam Bondi. Mayor Muriel Bowser called the [takeover “unsettling”](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOqzAQheGnMR2RGQyYwsVt6HLbLdHEHuJZGTsyk0R5-xX7Clsf6Ze-83Vdr8iJ8_0_7uRkK2um95FIhOqaUbhkTPcn1iAleB85o2BdQcPQatt2sAbk9FlNE9xGBNQ35LppMPPcd6NtoiM9oEfT9wCattGACZO5WboNMHdB9w27s6ZtB53Wo54u1iBut01TrwPgDMpoCiylXr4LZ4m0pU95Ub34sjfJRZHHofp_ChYFi0SKnNK5KVhi2ekEKVgOQaH2jeKjgmUwZrSjbYNvfeWdWqnP_dFyFqovyqdbwdJUFx5vTomPcVJG33fk33Qjf_rq5eAnAAD__-WKfd8) but said the city will comply, while the D.C. police union backed the decision. Trump warned New York, Chicago, and Los Angeles could face similar interventions and pledged to clear homeless camps, repair infrastructure, and target gangs.
## Steel Plant Blast Kills 1, Injures Dozens
An explosion at U.S. Steel’s Clairton Coke Works near Pittsburgh [on Monday killed one person](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unTAQhJ_GdEZm8eGncJGG7qZNiRa8wEbGJng55Lx9RF7htjPSaL7v19f4hRw4rj9xJydLGiPdOZAInWNE4RQxrBeeXpKf540jCp4jGHhp0-kKRo8cPqMtvFuIgOqCXNW-bN_XVdMVm2vnqmusBWg7Q_AyXW8nnKal6dsZCH3B7lkzXQWVMY1py84iLtNiqDYesAdlDXmWdJa_E0fZaAmf9KaznNNeBLeJHFnVPxQMCob7vst5yg_F0ysYDhbJ03Wum4LhyRUMwnuS7aP_XByjfvMsvGv2FIUXJq_p7xFS5hSzvnTWWYiCPgJGUTAUp_PHzSFwblplzbojh_9n5FsG3w7-BQAA__94MIgr), left at least one person missing, and injured dozens more. The blast, reported around 10:51 a.m., sent thick black smoke over the Monongahela Valley and prompted air-quality warnings within a one-mile radius. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DEP2yAQBeBfgzcifCaxPXjo4i1dO1qHORKqCyA4J82_r9y_0PlJn957v-7bHSPH9PiJL1ok5C3RpzGJUN0SSswJ-XFg9ZL9vj9jQsG6gYGrNpPuYfMY-bvZzi-BCGjoaOnHq53nob9N3XMZrQs3B7sd0c_Gmqv3bpjtbqewO7djF5dTM1MPvTE3M14mixhcMDQYDziDsoZ8lFwvv3NM8qTA3_ymetnzq-PlKVKaGn4oWBWs6VtykzNSsJ6wgtVMCta-V7AeTZ_7FKyFcmHSUrEU8vpInqquh3NMOmTm_InpoelP4dxiThpFF0qpffmNKaI-mm5CxLowJlGwdnXx5ROZY7uNyprHCyP_qyj_9et7gb8BAAD__6jTjqU). Emergency crews were working to rescue trapped workers as of Monday afternoon at the nation’s largest coking operation, which has faced repeated pollution violations in recent years. Officials and environmental groups are calling for a full investigation into the [cause of the disaster](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGy2yAQRb9G6tDAgkEqKNK4c9qUmjUsEgkCjbS2479_4_cLr79zz5zz5zbfMJdcl9-4kefU5kqvsxAzHXNFzq1iWR54RG4xhDVXZDxmkHARchQK5oi5vGfTR5-IgHRPXrmLmSat7Niv3karbHDaTJqCDinCZFN0eLfOGOfGPvvPmxwVKCmtdMNoENM9SdIyAk7QGUkxczuGvy1XXimVd3vSMYS29cWvzPvZ6V8dXDu4Bhw-BsMb19Y-iw6u9H8v7cytiscpTiYqIrR_uS5iL1hZKCu1AbjYYeWt9IeP-yuXkk_rOiOXDXP5ZvGPAj09fAUAAP__3Vx6LA).
## AOL Finally Shuts Down Dial-Up Service
AOL will shut down its historic [dial-up internet service Sept. 30](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DHO4yAQxfHT4I4IxsTBBcU2dNl2S2tixvGsCEQwSZTbr7xX-Oon_fT0_3NdrsiZy_03PijIVpdCn55JhNpSULgWzPcXtiQ1revOBQXbAgbO2nhtYUnI-bu4IYWNCGgcKNjL2c3zaCc_7MFDGs15nM8zTd7cZrc58G5y07qiHZMZOBya8RasMZO5nLxD3G6bodEkwBmUM5RYajv9rVxkpy1_65vaaa2PIYdd5NnV-EtBVBDL91m7HJOCeMAKovEKorUK4u3VuVDvCiLWrD-cs-77S3Sqn6JZuk6MWb-eulN780oadaPMq66blp00YctfzUWoFRIFcWghPQ-H-3RRztwfyPn_M_lRzneAfwEAAP__b3mIvQ), closing the book on one of the web’s earliest on-ramps. Once the world’s largest internet provider, AOL connected millions through phone lines, with its screeching modem tones and “You’ve Got Mail” greeting becoming part of pop culture in the ’90s. By 2023, just 1% of U.S. households—[about 163,000, many in rural areas](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3u2zAQw5_G3hRIp08PGrpkS9eOxsU6xyoUyZAvCfL2hfsK_40EAYL8_bnNN8wl18dvfFLktc2VPkchZupzRc6tYnm8sCduaVm2XJGxzyDBChmEgjlhLt_ZjCmuREB6pKi8NdOklQvjFp3TBKCDtSDhvgSVMIHVFoNZAAyMOZ5tMihQUjrpL8EgrvdVkpYJcILBSEqZW7_8bbnyRmv5tjf1y9KeY4kb834M-tcA1wGuuJ8Hzug0nfNS6FStiGN78SFS-1SRMhbx2kWuTL0SC_AWg1oDerBOTc5po7228u4XT0m7sce0f3Ip-XB-MPLxxFz-D-AfUXtH-BcAAP__Yd9-cg)—still relied on dial-up as their only way to access the Internet.

clean_body: President Trump on Monday placed Washington, D.C.’s police and deployed 800 National Guard troops in a sweeping crime crackdown. | | | | | | Tuesday, August 12, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1851, Isaac Singer patented , a device that proved so successful worldwide that it made the Singer Company one of America’s first multinational corporations. It’s always a good day for nostalgia. Yesterday, we asked about your favorite childhood toy, and hundreds of you responded with anecdotes and favorites — from Barbies to Lionel trains to Easy-Bake Ovens. We loved reading them. Thank you! Today, we report on the —which, believe it or not, was still used by about 160,000 U.S. households. If you remember that screechy dial-up sound, please vote in our poll and share your early internet memories by replying to this email Save smarter with today's sponsor, . | Feds Take Control of DC Police President Trump on Monday placed Washington, D.C.’s police and deployed 800 National Guard troops in a sweeping crime crackdown. Citing rising violence and homelessness, Trump said the move is for 30 days, with the Drug Enforcement Administration chief Terry Cole taking temporary command under Attorney General Pam Bondi. Mayor Muriel Bowser called the but said the city will comply, while the D.C. police union backed the decision. Trump warned New York, Chicago, and Los Angeles could face similar interventions and pledged to clear homeless camps, repair infrastructure, and target gangs. Steel Plant Blast Kills 1, Injures Dozens An explosion at U.S. Steel’s Clairton Coke Works near Pittsburgh , left at least one person missing, and injured dozens more. The blast, reported around 10:51 a.m., sent thick black smoke over the Monongahela Valley and prompted air-quality warnings within a one-mile radius. . Emergency crews were working to rescue trapped workers as of Monday afternoon at the nation’s largest coking operation, which has faced repeated pollution violations in recent years. Officials and environmental groups are calling for a full investigation into the . AOL Finally Shuts Down Dial-Up Service AOL will shut down its historic , closing the book on one of the web’s earliest on-ramps. Once the world’s largest internet provider, AOL connected millions through phone lines, with its screeching modem tones and “You’ve Got Mail” greeting becoming part of pop culture in the ’90s. By 2023, just 1% of U.S. households——still relied on dial-up as their only way to access the Internet. It went on for over an hour... and I started thinking the worst. Maybe a hog got him. No sound. No tracks. Just pitch black. So I called my cop neighbor and stopped by... He said, “Kill the light.” Then handed me **[THIS](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1872220/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTI/LbmNsRW04U2pOWg/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTcwJmFmZl9pZD0xMjM0JmZpbGVfaWQ9NDIxJmFmZl9zdWI9QW1lcmljYW5XYXJSb29tJmFmZl9zdWIyPTgxMjI1/gaJsXRg/s3u11b6a8b5)** ... and that’s how I found him...

This lil punk went hunting on his own... Check out what he caught... But thank God he was safe. The trick was... I could see him, but he couldn’t see me.

name: Scott Presler, Early Vote Action
subject: I’m asking for money (for a good reason)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC](https://go
body:
The Election in NJ is less than 100 days away

| | | | |
---
Dear fellow patriot,
It’s Scott Presler, writing to you from the front lines of Pennsylvania and New Jersey, where my team at Early Vote Action is rewriting the political map.
Thanks to our voter registration staff, we’ve slashed Pennsylvania’s Democratic voter lead by over 300,000 since 2020, flipping counties like Bucks and Luzerne red for President Trump in 2024. In New Jersey, we’ve cut the Dems’ advantage from over 1 million to just 834,000 - and we’re not stopping there.
**_But here’s the deal: our voter registration staff - real patriots hitting gun shows, farmers’ markets, and VFW halls - are running on fumes._**
Democrats are fighting back, pouring money into their machine to hold their ground. To keep registering new Republicans for New Jersey’s 2025 gubernatorial race and Pennsylvania’s 2026 elections,**_[we need your help to fund our staff](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aWA2/?__vbtrk=MzA5MzU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA5MzU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
**Can you sponsor a voter registration staffer today?**
Just $15 covers an hour of their work - knocking doors, signing up truckers, veterans, and hunters to secure a red wave. Every new voter we register is a step toward flipping these states for good.

[SPONSOR A VOTER REGISTRATION STAFFER](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aWA2/?__vbtrk=MzA5MzU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA5MzU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
We’re not just talking about change - we’re making it happen.
In Pennsylvania, we flipped Bucks County from a 15,000-voter Democratic lead to a 2,000-voter Republican edge.
In New Jersey, we’ve added 145,611 new GOP voters since 2021.
Friend, your support keeps this momentum alive.
Let’s make Pennsylvania the next Ohio and turn New Jersey purple in 2025. **_[If we have enough staffers, and sponsors, we can change the electorate for a generation](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aWA2/?__vbtrk=MzA5MzU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA5MzU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

I’d be honored to have your support,

**Scott Presler** Founder, Early Vote Action

# Tuesday, August 12, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1929, country singer [Alvis Edgar "Buck" Owens Jr.](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L3unDAQBPCnMR1ovXwXLtLQXdqUaLGXw8qCT9ic794-Iq_w70a_YkaaP4_5QV788fxNO5v0WcN8cI7CKfF5x9e1iLfRbiGIUI50xeSPGQHbEoZS4-zIy3duCmcWcKMu2Oi-bcaxa2EoNtOzc7YHC7atCVpYqBtGt9ZEPGpGXXhzl8GgUWvQ9VA5RG2ZBg0dctdo1QA7n8JZpY0Tfyiu8g1vPisb9kLMltIrqvqXwknhlHOubLiOdH73K3q7kUhYV9q5CudT4XRDGdbyJoXTctm_Zch8xOI07pW9iI9drxp47uTl_0b62TNvg_8CAAD__zV3ek8) was born in Sherman. He was the longtime frontman for The Buckaroos, which recorded 21 No. 1 hits on the Billboard country music chart and pioneered what came to be known as the Bakersfield sound. ## Tip Line Set Up to Report Missing Lawmakers
The Texas House convened at 1 p.m. yesterday but was yet again [short of a quorum](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGypSAMhp8GuzjAQS8WFNvY3W23dBCiMoviEjwe335HX-F2mUzyfcn_53v4tiGGbf5tVzTlM6Vhw5MiloL5LvdjjMGRW1KK0Z5kDyphGySXDXANQg7ehngNqvJm5L4TFRrx1aiuaxuuq8W0vp2cb2yn1Ch92zmHk2_8SyvNeeN1FcwN41pIIbh46dpLKRxaLXgrsVWCKY4-lJTrsmDBj6UpXumNuXZpraJZStmJvX4x2TPZn-dZ4xvzVZawzfEYx-T-3pNM9vdrTPZUbEHIOIe02Xj3E_w7Uj5WCBs8BljSQQhr2ry9YDxyTicB2YvA7wSBgNBmdytgShk8rvQsLwgPnsm-ysbvZ4gxUPvFFJ9XG-Jzc_lZ0m8j_wcAAP__XeSX7A), with 97 members present. More than fifty Democrats left the state over a week ago to block a mid-decade congressional redistricting plan. Speaker Dustin Burrows said that Department of Public Safety officers have been deployed across the state to look for absent lawmakers and are [monitoring their homes](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUD3OozAQPY3pHM1MgEDhYhu6bLslGvAQWxriLDb5uf2KaG_wdU96er9_ruOVo8b77Tev4sp7SeNdXlmlFNkO-NgnjXOeQ0qq_Mq85xLvIwE1FjqLNHqO-hnryrsJfI-VOLw0dd-3DXRVcODpLAgT1DT1NDXdhNwDoRB0jG1bRXeYQYeECHjuTp4IZ-EOoSVpazQ1iI8lbacSpMib86Kf9JTtNKe1UhdKeWRz_mVoMDTM0_-OB2toOOYYGjTNrIaGr96GtGexC0fNtiS7Cc_B_t3Ttq92SZuVeAslWM-fanP-8YqqMbcXU8Nt5ajf4PKzu56O_gUAAP__9F2AVA) in case they return. He shared a tip line phone number people can call to report the location of quorum-breaking Democrats. Burrows mentioned that a number of bills related to flood preparedness and response had been placed on [today's calendar](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3q4zAQxJ9G7mK0a_mrUHGNuSbXXmkU7SYWrC1jbb7e_kjgnuDfDcOPmWH-nudzSJK225-wstfXNc8bP4uwKh8fud8vkmKJS84i4VnCvWjaZrTYnuxwApwpJHnPriJ_sTRCxR761o1j19qhWjyPbROjo546cn2P0EDkzgYgRLrCpUr-E2YHQAALzVATIkQOA9gOuXNgnGVKmo9aF1Z-hXKVd37wUce8VuIX1b2Y5pfByeAUw540S_0F61t-GJxUMuVYDE7DCF9GeKNwfJxFVzE4_Yb_K-pF1-rwtD-TSCpdb5y9rSHJt05_dtLD478AAAD__37jelA). "_Will you be in that chair to vote for these critical disaster recovery bills, or will you be remembered as one who did not show up? The choice is yours_ ," Burrows said.
## New Laws Affecting Public School Families
Public school students and families will be affected by [several new state laws](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2upDAMhZ8mdEGxCfkpUmxDd7fdEhliLpEyMILMzczbr5iR9gW2s-yjT_7On6_xi1JO2_dvunEoz2UfN65n5lL4uMb7Y8ppPud133OmetLjLGkbUWEvlZOAY6SUX6NuYphU9NBwANtr702vXLMGpYHR90bPnWXj3WSxcxOD92rplw6bFC6YcoAACjrXRkSYmRwog2w0CK04prIfbVm58JPOJb_2Hz7aeb81Oayl3E_R_RI4CBxqrW1diK6jwIGOkubMAofLS-DA8TFTSfsmcPhoXds3Vm5c5UdY_ovJT0he8gIHdFaimixPhiQwOalV1HJaIkhrEDpL1lOk5gjxXlPO6TRWaPV9o5TfD5f_q_kn4N8AAAD__zCrkDU) as the school year begins. Among the most prominent changes is a [cellphone ban](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL-u6yAMh5-GbETg_CMDw12y9a53jBxwGiQCUaClffurtOcNzmb5Z3-yv3-3-YbOu3D_izvp_FrjHKgkTznTeZXHY_HOJLPF6D2WhI-UXZhBQMeF4hJmi86_57ayehF2lBVpOXTtOPadUNWmlRzMIHAE7JtFQKfkqIwaOsK-GZYWK6cvmFASpBSyUbUFkIZQSdED9a1krSDrcjzrvFGmF6bVv-OTztrEvfJ6y_lIrPnDYGIwlVLqsBi7litmMF3_MJh8NOgZTB8A_2mGyI8tBkp8jyfxNZrHJ-PfKY-FLxgSt_R0hhJ3gX9VXMvNKGAQwGCqTm2P4rx3qR9YK-47Ov-5Lv_O6VPD_wAAAP__uYWLwQ) for students. Several districts had already imposed restrictions on cell phone use, arguing that it reduces distractions. Schools have until Sept. 18 to implement a plan. Every public school classroom will now be required to display a 16-by-20-inch poster of the Ten Commandments, and school districts must vote on designating a time for Bible reading and prayer. Lawsuits have been filed [challenging the poster requirement](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL-OhCAQh58GOwyMIFhQXGO3115pUMaVBMUILrtvf9F7hOsm882ffL-fx_CwPvjt-W1XNPk9x2HDkgLmjMdV7ucY_JSmJcYQbEn2TNlvAzCQlGnKYXDWh88gKmdG5jpeoeFKiq5rJdPVYpCNcm6E6rhQ2HSaj51SAqWUbHZaqsqb6xjTHDhnvNG1A-ATWs1ZC9gKTgRD53M86rxgxrdNc_jEFx71FNcqmCXnPZHmi0BPoC-l1NOYLouLE-jvFQL91SLQ7_bALSeaTqQ3on92iWbc6BTX1W5uvUeCLQT66jBuLz4En1pFBHuu1of7d_5fYi8DvwEAAP__nyuBkQ), but no rulings have been issued. Public schools are also prohibited from implementing diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) programs or providing instruction on sexual orientation or gender identity. Parents must opt in for their students to receive sex education, and they can [provide input on school library catalogs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSgyAQBuCn0Q4HVlAsKK5Jl2uvdBDWyAwBR9aYvP2Nyb3BVbvFP__stz_X8WpDDOn2be9o6DnnMeFRIhLhdq7rPsXgiltyjtEexe6FQhqBg2JcMwGjtyG-Rll7M3E_iBqN6JUchk5xXS9m8JOWPUrlWgXKeuVbbd2E0M-DdLyvgznLuBYgBBetbjyAcGi14B1gJ0UlOfpAeWtoQcKnLXN85Qdujcv3OpqFaC1V-1XBpYLLcRzNnJ_QLXkvlNMZquByqj6DvSvYiWFvxgfHCu0eExXmMEa2Ljkhm2xi62ZfuP2lCvMY6s349QgxhtL1leS3uw3xfQz974UPA78BAAD__zLDiGI).

"Will you be in that chair to vote for these critical disaster recovery bills, or will you be remembered as one who did not show up? The choice is yours ," Burrows said. New Laws Affecting Public School Families Public school students and families will be affected by as the school year begins. Among the most prominent changes is a for students. Several districts had already imposed restrictions on cell phone use, arguing that it reduces distractions. Schools have until Sept. 18 to implement a plan. Every public school classroom will now be required to display a 16-by-20-inch poster of the Ten Commandments, and school districts must vote on designating a time for Bible reading and prayer. Lawsuits have been filed , but no rulings have been issued. Public schools are also prohibited from implementing diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) programs or providing instruction on sexual orientation or gender identity. subject: Milford Felon Arrested for Breaking Into a Car and Discharging a Firearm Within 500 Feet of a School
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Milford Felon Arrested for Breaking Into a Car and Discharging a Firearm Within 500 Feet of a School (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=59f4153aa5&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Seamus Othot on Aug 11, 2025 07:14 pm

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: We're in the homestretch now, and you deserve to know exactly what we're doing to flip Virginia blue.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
We have to make each day left in this campaign count.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d0ce75d-e81f-49b4-b030-05170425cdde/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

I'm the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's seat blue, and we're in the homestretch now. [Before I lay out all we're doing to win the biggest race of 2025, will you consider splitting a contribution between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to power our work?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb7a5fd4-541e-4bb4-89d7-95017a88d250/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face. _And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources._ My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here. I've given voters my word: As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington. We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward. That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills. With the days left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to: ✅ Visit every corner of Virginia. ✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks. ✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen. It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond. [Everything depends on us raising what we need from grassroots donors. So, I'm asking: will you pitch in $20 or more to my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us win on November 4th and in the years ahead?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ecbc9f0-7512-422b-9201-a6460d609b9d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
