| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd82d71b-5ef9-46a1-b47f-a9e33105a518/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Stop MAGA
subject: The Gerrymander to End All Gerrymanders
body:
We have one chance to stop this.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xXHhq1N-TRIhs2q8ySnHXSrPHmKWPI7ceBTyV6CoSuqp7hUTnNPafHEj3-e3pdMCC2UV_R9QuCUFoi4ZLSgXyi7D1Iatx8I0wOdhXMdrZ_dlm37MOfSKxJk3N-OD_FNv40mc-svQcfFBr7bDlGGj50gyQzXjhuQzagzoaskheHDV6FA3e-TUXlKXb_OUhox11Vxg8VfdndEsvXHUxcFrJNmS7ES_CtyJKA2AcVrzACQ=&c=Uk7gfC-d_y-eB8ULeyKcxukYoafjKKftY_R0Hfpml16tIZtGBp5gSQ==&ch=h74oU1q4I0pBbiRRCgrhr_mZ-pjFs4rv0B0FoEAe64oeIPFaU5MHrw==)
---
| Peter,
Picture waking up the morning after the 2026 midterms, ready to see how your community voted -- only to realize your community doesn't even exist on the map anymore.
Your district has been carved up, your neighbors split across multiple lines, your voice diluted so far it may as well be silent.
That's the future MAGA is planning for Pennsylvania if they take control of the state Supreme Court this November.
With a MAGA majority on the court, Republicans will be free to draw congressional maps that make Texas look fair. Every safe Democratic district they can reach will be dismantled. Every competitive district will be tilted deep red. And every election in Pennsylvania -- from Congress to the presidency -- will be stacked in their favor for the next decade.
This isn't speculation. We've seen this playbook before in other states, and we know exactly how it ends: fewer choices, less accountability, and a system where the people in power pick their voters instead of the other way around.
We have one chance to stop this. Three Democratic justices are up for retention this November. If we hold these seats, we keep the court and block the worst gerrymander Pennsylvania has ever seen. If we lose, the damage will be swift, severe, and nearly impossible to undo.
Defend Our Courts is sounding the alarm now, while there's still time to fight back. But we're being outspent and outnumbered. MAGA operatives are already pouring millions into this race -- quietly, hoping most voters don't even know it's happening.
[We can stop them, but only if we act today. Will you chip in $10, $25, or $50 to help us keep Pennsylvania's Supreme Court in Democratic hands and protect fair representation for millions?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xXHhq1N-TRIhs2q8ySnHXSrPHmKWPI7ceBTyV6CoSuqp7hUTnNPafHEj3-e3pdMCC2UV_R9QuCUFoi4ZLSgXyi7D1Iatx8I0wOdhXMdrZ_dlm37MOfSKxJk3N-OD_FNv40mc-svQcfFBr7bDlGGj50gyQzXjhuQzagzoaskheHDV6FA3e-TUXlKXb_OUhox11Vxg8VfdndEsvXHUxcFrJDVdgLwOxzf2EpOXqbJBNe4=&c=Uk7gfC-d_y-eB8ULeyKcxukYoafjKKftY_R0Hfpml16tIZtGBp5gSQ==&ch=h74oU1q4I0pBbiRRCgrhr_mZ-pjFs4rv0B0FoEAe64oeIPFaU5MHrw==)

clean_body: We have one chance to stop this. | | | | | == | Peter, Picture waking up the morning after the 2026 midterms, ready to see how your community voted -- only to realize your community doesn't even exist on the map anymore. Your district has been carved up, your neighbors split across multiple lines, your voice diluted so far it may as well be silent. That's the future MAGA is planning for Pennsylvania if they take control of the state Supreme Court this November. With a MAGA majority on the court, Republicans will be free to draw congressional maps that make Texas look fair. Every safe Democratic district they can reach will be dismantled. Every competitive district will be tilted deep red. And every election in Pennsylvania -- from Congress to the presidency -- will be stacked in their favor for the next decade. This isn't speculation. We've seen this playbook before in other states, and we know exactly how it ends: fewer choices, less accountability, and a system where the people in power pick their voters instead of the other way around. We have one chance to stop this. Three Democratic justices are up for retention this November. If we hold these seats, we keep the court and block the worst gerrymander Pennsylvania has ever seen. If we lose, the damage will be swift, severe, and nearly impossible to undo. Defend Our Courts is sounding the alarm now, while there's still time to fight back. But we're being outspent and outnumbered. MAGA operatives are already pouring millions into this race -- quietly, hoping most voters don't even know it's happening. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == If we don't stop this gerrymander before it starts, we'll be living with the consequences for years. Let's make sure that never happens. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | ==

# Welcome Back, Students!
---
| |
---
| As students across Texas head back to the classroom, Team TFVC is sending our **warmest wishes and most sincere prayers** for a safe, successful, and joyful school year. We know this season brings both excitement and anxiety, as families navigate paperwork, schedules, and school policies. But you can rest easy knowing that **TFVC is here** to alleviate your exemption-related stress! If you use a vaccine exemption for your child, remember: **you have rights** that schools are obligated to respect. If you encounter _any_ problems during enrollment—delays, denials, or confusing demands—please don’t hesitate to reach out. We are here to help you navigate this **unnecessarily complicated process** and ensure your child is welcomed at school just like every other young Texan. Let’s make this school year one of strength, advocacy, and connection.
**You’re not alone—Team TFVC is with you every step of the way.**

---
|

body:
Democrats have been weaponizing Civil Rights era laws to cheat for years.

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqc6cgmuvsgbk9kbk546qs77t6nn3ieto1q051sg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1i66oj2cph2bs)
Friend,

Democrats have been weaponizing Civil Rights era laws to cheat for years. Their latest stunt is no exception.

Texas Democrats fled the state in order to “break quorum” to block a vote on new Texas maps, which could give Republicans 5 more seats in the U.S. House of Representatives.

**_They flew on private jets to JB Pritzker’s Illinois, one of the most grotesquely gerrymandered states in the nation._**

_Why?_ Because the Democrats know how unpopular they are.

They know that no one really wants their ludicrous policies. They know that if districts are drawn fairly and based on an accurate count of _American citizens_ , they have no hope of regaining power.

Their ridiculous behavior is getting more and more desperate.

**Now, we must pose the same challenge to Democrats in Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire. Then, we will secure America First victories in 2026, 2028, and beyond.**

Turning Point PAC considers these 3 states as MUST-WIN battleground states.

**By supporting field offices and ramping up field operations in these states,[_you can help Turning Point PAC finish what we started_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvmqdrk0ebu7sk25gnrv99vnbertvq9ffhjit3ao_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1i66oj2cph2bs) and build the RED WALL to secure an America First future!**

Plus, when you give today, you can get a copy of my book _and_ an exclusive President Trump lithograph. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Pam Bondi has asked a corrupt official named Ed Martin to investigate me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
| | | |
---
This is Adam Schiff. I have some important news to share with you, friend:
**Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me.**
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu_hjK98iroObSdPglX9oSTnUl9QGzV6LUTChnfwVbM0O5tZ0RTChVTRE2Wy22hfDWxa8AapfQ-_dySrNGqkB86pEmlHnxoYV_wOEj6g5KMITDwkVpFgaheAzAU0oNZT-dnQugr31Kp2R4ItepmsuPX7Hajpeka6DHbZ_PO_gRo6AhrKC2GbIVr3plh7xF4YvX3KYK997KBfDjTQcQOqzQO_zRCCkhyjI0O42nmZtqluJ3BJofl00OZ0G_A2Z973rk-opw1Um57DIX28ajOBzTMnFt7MWLrxMgIllWZZGnudajyvz_eCpzCBs8dTOcJQwjle3ksbrOyfyj6NQwBWJCgN7sAOOcXtVa0S97QkHo4sw8JsuacoMFE_eBYQ-q1hcaimVhJHaHj5RVuZa0ziiYHMmdM_nvBYyMEuoqRkrwOrmHAUv7woFtW5CK6vsdHnnVnX6-5Cs9njYYbf51mS3q1kXMjKLBB7WQc2e6PthSDK8Q2Wji6Abiwc5bx9n95x16VFy5z6lwJdHKfRObUMelll6OHP2-PwyFUKSXuyr5fjg/4iz/Ff3-0OOqQLiF9r25lhUx5w/h0/h001.2FiWuwMg2BxU4YPwTvTbbRLex8ytqg99mON1e4LgJgQ)
---
Ed Martin, if you don’t remember, was the Interim U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other — and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it.
Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived “enemies” of the Trump administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs, urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than follow his unethical edicts.
Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending insurrectionists who broke into the Capitol on January 6 and advancing bogus claims of election fraud. He is close friends with an avowed neo-Nazi, appearing with and praising him repeatedly.
_Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin’s dangerous nomination._
When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed Martin to lead a “weaponization” task force at the Justice Department to go after the president’s enemies. I was at the top of the list.
**And now, Ed Martin is investigating me and carrying out not just the president’s political retribution, but his own, as well.**
[**Friend, this is going to get ugly. But I will not be deterred from speaking out, fighting back, and holding Trump accountable every single day. Will you have my back and split a contribution between me and the Nevada State Democratic Party to help me fight back against Ed Martin and his sham investigation?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu_hjK98iroObSdPglX9oSTnUl9QGzV6LUTChnfwVbM0O5tZ0RTChVTRE2Wy22hfDWxa8AapfQ-_dySrNGqkB86pEmlHnxoYV_wOEj6g5KMIb6mQYOYPciIuBI75xPQaVaw8_1MNEoiuEyhJaGI7Px7AKnEc61ypJtIDp9PRCFRC5OQmYehV_G-7pg1AdRescNEJb5Fs-vCOtF4UQgvoe6v5pGJsvl34MQrAv2MZfbVyxR9fSx7DP_gxKc7e5F7Vm5Rf_eWofx8hO4inXTnYuIbE24A7vdTARJKjy3IeI_dw07MB6ia6EE5bZ9r_998lyAl4S_am-c8OiIOgRgcqMxkU5bI8ZSO0qhnps2SPvnawCgVKnubui8Wmds3b7DVw_4CiPweewXfk5OS6IJW0gBZo29KrAAZ43YDeQXeNy3-lcpR5GeHEQjrJ_a27XLfrLQS9OAmO_W7RYYMfLQLV1jjrXB4Y_Hzp-8O4Inb1Dye4q5NA5uhRcEORN7XbSI9B-V5374lMNFpV8tSnYcfQ2fQiNWausChz-HjVhrNwxVbsvelC-lnNINqkz-Uc3QuvKs/4iz/Ff3-0OOqQLiF9r25lhUx5w/h1/h001.oOYlBIdabjcIukzAh0Xuz60Kj3-a-gIoAKqCi7ds7oY)

clean_body: | | | | This is Adam Schiff. I have some important news to share with you, friend: Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me. Ed Martin, if you don’t remember, was the Interim U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other — and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it. Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived “enemies” of the Trump administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs, urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than follow his unethical edicts. Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending insurrectionists who broke into the Capitol on January 6 and advancing bogus claims of election fraud. He is close friends with an avowed neo-Nazi, appearing with and praising him repeatedly. Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin’s dangerous nomination. When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed Martin to lead a “weaponization” task force at the Justice Department to go after the president’s enemies. I was at the top of the list. And now, Ed Martin is investigating me and carrying out not just the president’s political retribution, but his own, as well. Thank you, Adam Schiff The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. clean_body: stop MAGA Republicans from slashing our earned benefits! | = | = Trump’s allies are slashing Social Security to hand our earned benefits to billionaire donors. That’s why we’re activating Social Security Task Force Memberships for every Democrat ready to fight alongside Democrats like Elizabeth Warren, Pete Buttigieg, Bernie Sanders, and more. = = = Trump’s MAGA enablers in Congress are openly pushing plans to slash Social Security, raise the retirement age, and shred the safety net millions depend on! That’s not just cruel. It’s a betrayal of the promise our country made to seniors, veterans, and working families. So we’re building a grassroots Social Security Task Force to: ✅ Expose the GOP’s dangerous agenda ✅ Mobilize public outrage and support ✅ Protect the benefits we’ve earned from a lifetime of work = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= = = There’s no time to waste. – Democracy on the Line | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. # _Opinion:_
Congresswoman Delia Ramirez (D-IL) revealed her true allegiance during an appearance at a far-left conference in Mexico City. In Spanish she declared to the audience, "I'm a proud Guatemalan before I'm an American."
Ramirez's comment speaks volumes to the problem of those elected to represent Americans in Washington, D.C. who are far from America first. But knowing Ramirez's history, it is not surprising she has this twisted worldview.
Ramirez is the daughter of migrants who crossed into the U.S. illegally, but are now U.S. citizens. While she was born on U.S. soil, thereby making her a U.S. citizen, she decided to stay connected to legal limbo because her husband was brought to the U.S. illegally as a child: He is under the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program.
It is with this background that it is not surprising to see Ramirez proclaiming, while in Latin America, that she first identifies where her family is originally from.
Despite what liberals or non-native Spanish speakers say, the Blaze News video that went viral this past week was not mistranslated. She clearly stated her allegiance to Guatemala over the U.S. and actual Spanish speakers will agree with the translation.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/059d264b-a258-4c44-b668-5de2a8aa50d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Ramirez did not dispute the translation in her statement addressing the backlash. She deflected and did the normal Democrat fallback of "Republicans are racist!"
"Let's call it what it is: today's attacks are a weak attempt to silence my dissent and invalidate my patriotic criticism of the nativist, white supremacist, authoritarians in government. It is the definition of hypocrisy that members of Congress --who betray their oath each day they enable Trump-- are attacking me for celebrating my Guatemalan-American roots," **[claimed Ramirez.](https://substack.com/redirect/2cb38d33-feda-481e-8790-c9e3698ff363?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together with Nutrition and Healing](https://substack.com/redirect/52cf5f72-0a86-4798-a92c-96ede6f4d4ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# [Neil Armstrong's SHOCKING Apollo 11 confession](https://substack.com/redirect/52cf5f72-0a86-4798-a92c-96ede6f4d4ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/52cf5f72-0a86-4798-a92c-96ede6f4d4ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
You won't see **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/52cf5f72-0a86-4798-a92c-96ede6f4d4ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in any history book...
But after becoming the first man to set foot on the moon...
Neil Armstrong reported a **[strange encounter](https://substack.com/redirect/52cf5f72-0a86-4798-a92c-96ede6f4d4ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he had in space during a post-mission debrief.
And he wasn't the only astronaut to experience it.
NASA did their best to keep it secret...
But now, unearthed **[NASA audio](https://substack.com/redirect/52cf5f72-0a86-4798-a92c-96ede6f4d4ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is blowing the lid off of everything.
**[This official Apollo recording](https://substack.com/redirect/52cf5f72-0a86-4798-a92c-96ede6f4d4ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is only seconds long, but it will chill you to the bone.
P.S. Of all the moon landing conspiracies, **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/52cf5f72-0a86-4798-a92c-96ede6f4d4ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** could be the most incredible. Get the full truth **[HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/52cf5f72-0a86-4798-a92c-96ede6f4d4ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** now while it's still publicly available.
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/52cf5f72-0a86-4798-a92c-96ede6f4d4ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Piece continues)**
"No one questions when my white colleagues identify as Irish-American, Italian-American, or Ukrainian-American to honor their ancestry," she continued. "I've consistently expressed pride in my heritage and history - a pride also often reflected in the origin stories of my colleagues. Only those who believe America should not include the children of immigrants or be diverse would attack me - and Americans like me - for honoring my roots."
I would be remiss if I did not mention that I have yet to see any Irish-American or Italian-American members of Congress declaring they were those nationalities first before being American while in a foreign country.
Regardless, Ramirez is a prime example of someone who needs to be denaturalized and deported from the U.S., even though I don't believe such a thing would happen.
It is a glaring problem we have in the U.S. where we have people in power who actively work to undermine our country from within. We see it on a near daily basis and it is even worse when it is someone who is supposedly beholden to the American people.
What has been lost in this scandal was the setting of her remarks beyond simply being in Mexico City.
The event was the second annual Panamerican Congress, which was organized by the leader of Progressive International, a left-wing group that describes capitalism as a "virus" that must be "eradicated," in partnership with Morena, Mexico's ruling left-wing party, **[according to the Daily Caller.](https://substack.com/redirect/6e62df11-eb28-4494-a3cd-f714aa646e7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Ramirez also accused the U.S. of being "addicted to war," and prioritizing "imperialism, militarization, conquest, control, competition in its attempt at domination."
The U.S. will be in deep trouble in the long term if it can not be governed by those who put America first. Another revealing moment came from former speechwriter for President Barack Obama, Jon Favreau. In response to a post from the Department of Homeland Security, **[Favreau took issue with the department](https://substack.com/redirect/d9939f22-6509-41a1-a7a0-acc66e2dbba8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** calling for Americans to defend their culture.
"They're not even trying to pretend that immigration enforcement is about crime anymore," he said.
Like Ramirez, Favreau and many liberals simply view the U.S. as an afterthought that has no physical weight beyond their platitudes. They think anyone from anywhere can come and simply be American when being American actually means believing and upholding the founding principles. There are many cultures around the world that are happy to run counter to those principles. They say other nations can have their identity, but apparently, not the United States. This is dangerous to the future of the country and must be addressed before it is too late.
* * *

body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ebf58cb9ebf8479ba0d8ade34e05fb87&_e=YEkR7B81da1AyHC_ds3Pfk15FkpHMVdTY_IHBk7tBQnRWYXnMcRzlC8DDylM1b7PpfHwNxxK2LBfLU9PctgMKNNbAIcAO4kx-TIphUukI7okwg7DuvvNBui-rZNp2AzU2wTaExteKnypUdv_s-0fHJfZqt5nnUmINCAvaKnTnuHk93YClzy6vHQUmHGcn3dFeOLbBsY-TwIfJcry5jJnb32t3DXXIs-MIZ0Cb-cR24QBvxLMsnkVtSTkhaszSUieNPQUOeL4YpxUANiLI4QqBxaqFwmhWv1IMSyElo_tzNDH6THepSm9wdee4DCXIg9-pvcuRYs6_E7u9GKAFKpFBCIIP0lvbUiXh70e6ME-aMhz9mqDHCnWyGKHzw8yPV4cNgnlQGwPnp4fw_s4u9iC4GibWUaU0ByxAM_9EDpxIQ7HZhWTyZ76GgQAZMOarfezHMuppjCRlXqyiv5TyjtIqE8Bvr_kZLECCIQIah-2wonENPUh6rrgZTXv8gytB63WpfnCx-m2-EUfDLRhsc85_Lrou1Ycae4iLrN7TrSMe-8t0p5WNQZJGFpCwZvkmGOmMfT6AOKJU5jAN55iHEBV_XYwnO2zqNQUYr8gm2S5s_X4SSIyGJsB2yT3xZl-j2r_CE7BT-QCW3uVXmA_a6vqrw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---

clean_body: This is the situation I’m caught in: | Friend, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. | | | | | RFK Jr. just shut down a $14 billion Medicaid loophole that was funding illegal programs and benefiting non-citizens -- redirecting that money to American veterans, seniors, and working families.

We're talking cold hard cash coming right back into the pockets of the American people.

Now, radical left elites are furious. They'd rather see that money in the hands of illegals and people who hate our country.

But no one saw their next move. Immediately after RFK concluded, a coordinated campaign to REMOVE him from Trump's Cabinet was announced, threatening to undo all the reforms he's put in place.

[This fight isn't about politics -- it's about protecting our healthcare system, our borders, and our future](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ze65vrdr1mi0hd9di8fsimr0bdu7aulpje0e9f68_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1i61p72c1h2bs "This fight isn’t about politics — it’s about protecting our healthcare system, our borders, and our future")

Texas Democrats fled the state in order to “break quorum” to block a vote on new Texas maps, which could give Republicans 5 more seats in the U.S. House of Representatives.

_Why?_ Because the Democrats know how unpopular they are.

They know that no one really wants their ludicrous policies. They know that if districts are drawn fairly and based on an accurate count of _American citizens_ , they have no hope of regaining power.

Their ridiculous behavior is getting more and more desperate.

**Now, we must pose the same challenge to Democrats in Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire. Then, we will secure America First victories in 2026, 2028, and beyond.**

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. Peter, the Georgia legislature is made up of a more than 65% male majority. **That same legislature passed a dangerous abortion ban immediately after the fall of _Roe v. Wade_.** At Her Bold Move, we don’t believe male supermajorities should be passing laws about women’s bodies. That is why we are working to elect as many women as possible to the Georgia legislature.

**Which brings us to Debra Shigley, who is running for a highly FLIPPABLE seat in Georgia: State Senate District 21.**

Debra is the only Democrat in the race for an open seat against 6 Republican candidates, 5 of whom are white men – and time is running out: this special election is coming up FAST on **August 26** (!!!).

**While her opponents are focused on stripping away women’s reproductive freedoms, Debra plans to enact policies that would protect healthcare access, cut costs for families, and keep her community safe. We must do everything we can to help her win →**

[**This election is coming up in a matter of DAYS. We can change the makeup of the Georgia legislature and get one step closer to reinstating the rights of ALL Georgia women by helping Debra Shigley win this race. Will you rush a split donation of $20.25 or more between Her Bold Move and the Debra Shigley campaign today?

**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113173882/562897870/1820583561?refcode=EM_F_250812FWD_N_JZ_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjMTNmYThjLTgyNzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9YnAFhtFsCcdS4sFQ8SI-qFXOMTdkZfyPFFvw9uCnkI=)We can do this,

Jordan Zaslow
Founder & Executive Director of Her Bold Move

\----------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Hi Peter,

Georgia is going to be a key battleground state this November – most polling shows Harris only two points behind Trump (!!!). At Her Bold Move, we are focused on unseating the legislators who helped pass abortion bans at the _state level_ in states like Georgia.

**That’s why we are thrilled to be supporting Debra Shigley for the Georgia State House of Representatives.**

Debra is a mother of five, an attorney, and a former news anchor. Her opponent is an extremely conservative woman named Jan Jones, who has recently been endorsed by “Frontline Policy Action,” an organization that advocates for __biblical values__ and supports candidates that would affirm those values in office.

[**There is currently a 6-week abortion ban in place in Georgia – and Debra’s opponent helped push that ban through. We’re working to unseat as many abortion ban legislators as possible and replace them with women who will restore and defend our rights. You can support Debra’s campaign for this seat by rushing a split $20.24 or more donation today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113173883/562897871/1820583561?refcode=EM_F_250812FWD_N_JZ_90DO_5_NG_N_L2&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjMTNmYThjLTgyNzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9YnAFhtFsCcdS4sFQ8SI-qFXOMTdkZfyPFFvw9uCnkI=)

Representative Jones has not been a meaningful voice for women in Georgia – she helped pass a draconian abortion ban that criminalizes women and doctors. Georgia already has one of the highest rates of maternal mortality in the country, and now the state's failure to accept Medicaid expansion has caused numerous rural hospital closures, making access to healthcare even harder for all women. It’s clear the women of Debra’s district need a different woman to represent them in the state legislature.

**We believe Debra has what it takes to be that woman. Here’s what she had to say:**

_What alarms me—and what motivated me to run for office—is the rollback of rights and liberties. As a State Representative, I will work to restore a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions with her family and her doctor, not politicians._

The demographics have shifted in this district, and Debra’s opponent no longer truly represents the values of her constituents. You know what that means: **this Georgia district has emerged as a new _battleground._** In fact, in the 2020 election, President Biden received 46% of the vote in this district, and in the 2022 election, Sen. Warnock received 48% of the vote. Now, with higher turnout expected for the presidential election, Democrats are in a strong position to win this seat. But Debra needs our help to make it happen.

[**We need your help to unseat the lawmakers who passed abortion bans in their states. # [This #GirlDad Says Goodbye](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=170783590&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwNzgzNTkwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTUwMDcwNjksImV4cCI6MTc1NzU5OTA2OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cB7LhzXMKKSwlRGMYnBHmwwL-Y4iUboYh_Bia-i9CxM)
### My message to my daughter starting college.
| | [Patrick J. Murphy](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---
| Aug 12
---
| [](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=170783590&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwNzgzNTkwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NTAwNzA2OSwiZXhwIjoxNzU3NTk5MDY5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDM5OTEzMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0x4nNkLnGCQA7i3c6z2AX-L8M1gLkL2-oJ-RqmvIX9s&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=170783590&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwNzgzNTkwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTUwMDcwNjksImV4cCI6MTc1NzU5OTA2OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cB7LhzXMKKSwlRGMYnBHmwwL-Y4iUboYh_Bia-i9CxM&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=170783590&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwNzgzNTkwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTUwMDcwNjksImV4cCI6MTc1NzU5OTA2OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cB7LhzXMKKSwlRGMYnBHmwwL-Y4iUboYh_Bia-i9CxM)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/patrickmurphypa/p/this-girldad-says-goodbye?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

518 miles. That's how far I'll have driven by the time you read this.
518 miles down the interstate to drop off my 18-year-old daughter and best friend, Maggie Grace Murphy, at Clemson University. And that doesn't include the return trip, which will feel about five times longer.
We made the trip in two cars. In one, Maggie and her mom. In the other, me and my youngest, Jack, who took a break from his summer job scooping ice cream at the Jersey Shore to help move his sister in. Both cars were packed to the roof with dorm-room essentials from Amazon, Target, and Best Buy--basically the entire college section of America's big-box retail industry.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d9380972-414b-46bc-821e-ca81b50edb2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **As we get older, time speeds up. (FAST)**
It feels like yesterday you came into the world on a chilly Black Friday in 2006, born on the biggest shopping day of the year. Yeah, that was foreshadowing. If there's a discount code, you've probably already found it, applied it, and texted it to three friends. You were born just three weeks after I won my first congressional race.
When you were six weeks old, I held you in my arms on the House floor as I raised my right hand and was sworn in. I was 33, the youngest House Democrat in the country, thinking about the promise of a better America for you and your generation. I ran for Congress to honor the 19 brothers I lost in Iraq--but you became my new purpose, and the most important job I'll ever have: being your Girl Dad.
Life was pretty different back then.
And I'm so incredibly proud of the person you've grown into.
Before you could even speak, you were already making moves in the greatest halls of power.
You'll just have to take my word for it that baby Maggie was once cradled in Michelle Obama's arms, with Malia and Sasha beside her, watching _Ratatouille_ in the White House movie room while I was down the hall trying to look casual, watching the Super Bowl with President Obama and Attorney General Eric Holder.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/55adce26-9a80-4460-aeb9-ec904623b2fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
2009, Philadelphia
Casual, except for the giant chocolate ice cream stain you had spilled on my crisp white shirt. (Thanks, kid.) At least I came armed with a box of Philly soft pretzels--my version of diplomacy. And for the record, that was the first and last time I was ever invited to watch a game at the People's House.
## **Your Work Ethic Is Second to None**
Now's the part where I get to brag about the leader you are.
In 18 years, you've managed to do it all: National Honor Society, varsity volleyball player who helped take your team from a 4-12 freshman season to 18-6 senior year and all the way to the district finals. Student Government Executive Secretary. President of the Travis Manion Foundation club. And yes, Homecoming Queen.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/65b2d7ae-010d-4d01-88dc-2c7ca51412a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
You are beautiful inside and out, with an infectious smile and quick wit. But the best thing about you isn't on your resume--it's in your heart. You'll drop everything to help a friend or a stranger, or to stand up to a wrong, no questions asked. You're the kind of person who makes your dad feel both impossibly proud and, honestly, just a little bit lazy in comparison.
I've worn a lot of titles in my life, but "Maggie's dad" will always be the one I'm proudest of. (Don't worry, Jack--you'll get the same treatment when it's your turn as you chart your path.)
You've already signed your contract with the Air Force ROTC, following in your Uncle JJ's footsteps and potentially becoming a fourth-generation veteran in the Murphy family. You'll be up and at formation every Monday and Wednesday at 5:50 a.m., while most college kids are still tangled blissfully in their sheets, you'll be out there pushing yourself and your fellow cadets running, lifting, and training to serve. It took me until my sophomore year to commit to ROTC. You're already way ahead of where I was.
And you're not just joining the "warrior class." You're majoring in Preprofessional Health Studies, with your sights set on medicine as a doctor or physician's assistant. You've got a servant's heart and a fierce determination, and you're deadly serious about answering our nation's call.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5a8e608b-6260-4eb6-8d52-6c8588d5ee86?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you stick with it, you'll be the first medical professional in the Murphy family while serving as an Air Force medical officer. That's no small leap for the granddaughter of a Vietnam-era Navy Vet and Philly Cop, and the daughter of someone _still_ paying off his college and law school loans. (Almost across the finish line.)
When you step back to put all this in perspective, you're nothing short of extraordinary.
[Most Americans don't have a bachelor's degree](https://substack.com/redirect/73271a70-34f3-4405-bd15-e9f144e63698?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--only about 38% do. And of those, an even smaller share have chosen to serve. Maggie, your role as a woman in ROTC, pursuing the U.S. Air Force, puts you in an even rarer group. You're not just working now to be part of the 38%--you're part of the fraction of a fraction who are willing to wear the uniform and become a military officer. Carry that with pride, because you represent something far bigger than yourself.
Only about 21% of the U.S. Air Force is made up of women. You're stepping into a profession literally stacked with men--and I know you'll hold your own. You've never been afraid of a challenge, and I know you're not starting now.
You've overcome challenges time and time again with grace and grit--whether it was fighting to get into honors courses early in high school or giving up competitive dance to focus on volleyball, you've always risen to the challenge. There's a lot of excitement now as you embark on this milestone journey. But something we don't say enough: it's also okay to change your mind.
The things you think, know, and believe today might not be the same things you pursue three years from now--or five, or ten. Life has a way of surprising us, and the path you're on can take turns you never saw coming. That's just life. What matters most is how you carry yourself and how you treat the people you meet along the way. I'll be proud of you no matter where you end up.
Your Mom and I did our best to give you opportunities we never had. While our marriage didn't make it, we were always united when it came to you and your brother.
## And now for the part where I give Dad advice.
I read a lot of books and polls (too many, in fact), and it's alarming to see how upward mobility isn't a guarantee anymore. It's been for our family, but not for all. One poll that stands out is that fewer Americans believe their kids will have a better life than they did - it's now at [one of its lowest points in recent memory.](https://substack.com/redirect/2dc05860-f7aa-4145-9a45-f5bc08ab7d99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) When I was your age, most people assumed the next generation would do better as long as they worked hard; it was just baked into the idea of America. Now, that optimism has slipped away for a lot of families. Don't ever lose your sense of passion and purpose. Hope can always be renewed through hard work and serving others.
Another thing I think about:
The author and researcher Jonathan Haidt has sounded the alarm on what's happening to your "anxious generation"--how [more and more young people are reporting feeling isolated](https://substack.com/redirect/4552d2d3-0662-48c1-89ed-25afb797cfae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), anxious, even socially paralyzed. How fewer are entering the workforce right away. How screens have replaced so many of the face-to-face interactions that used to build confidence and resilience. That's not you, but it will be the reality for some of the people you meet on campus, and it's worth being aware of. I know you'll do your best to make them feel like they belong and are seen.
And yet, here you are, headed off to serve your country, study healthcare, and build bridges between people in a country that seems more divided than ever. You're living proof that hard work, grit, and a good heart still count for something.
You're only the second generation in our family to go to college. I know what a big deal that is.
Your Mom and I were first-generation college students, so we know that the friends you make in these years can change your life. We found our tribes. We know, Maggie, you'll find yours too--whether in your dorm, a sorority, or among your fellow cadets. Or, knowing you, probably all of the above.
You've always had this rare ability to bridge divides. Even your high school AP biology teacher was married to my former congressional opponent. (Yes, life is a small world like that.) The service club you led was named for a fallen Marine whose father was also my opponent. (Bucks County--what can I say? It's a purple district.) You always rise above and bring people together in the most authentic way. It's one of your many superpowers.
Where life's peculiarities usually build walls, you've built bridges. You have this way of pulling people in, making them feel like they belong, whether they're lifelong friends or total strangers. And that, more than any title or accomplishment, will carry you further than you can imagine.
President Kennedy once said,_ "Children are the living messages we send to a time we will not see."_
Today, Maggie, you give all of us hope. We know that you will carry that message of fire, kindness, and smarts onto the Clemson campus. You're living proof that a kid from Bucks County can excel, serve, and lead with love and heart.
When I look at you now, I see someone strong, determined, and radiant. A far cry from the skinny freshman with braces and a face full of acne who once dyed her beautiful blonde hair brown just to be taken seriously. (Sorry, am I embarrassing you? I'll stop. Eventually.) You've earned every win, every grade, every friendship. And now, you're flying and will continue to thrive.
So here we are. 518 miles from home. My heart feels both full and like it's missing a piece. I'm choked up writing this with tears streaming down my face. I'm trying to get it out of my system because I won't show it in public.
If I could give you one last piece of advice, it's this: find your people. Keep serving others. Stoke that firefly light of yours to keep it shining, even when the world feels dark. And call and text your Mom and Dad. Often.
The truth is, Maggie, we trust you. We've raised you to lead with grace and grit. It's the other knuckleheads we worry about. But we know you'll keep them in line.
So, go make your mark. Step onto campus with your head high, your heart open, and your sleeves rolled up, ready to work, ready to serve, ready to live the life you've been building toward since the day you were born.
The world may try to tell you who you are, but you already know. You are strong, you are kind, you are ready.
Love,
Your Bestie. Dad

clean_body: My message to my daughter starting college. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Thank you for supporting my work. If my writing resonates with you, consider . Annual paid subscribers will receive a signed copy of my 2008 memoir, My message to my daughter starting college. | | | Aug 12 | | | | | | | | | | | | 518 miles. That's how far I'll have driven by the time you read this. 518 miles down the interstate to drop off my 18-year-old daughter and best friend, Maggie Grace Murphy, at Clemson University. And that doesn't include the return trip, which will feel about five times longer. We made the trip in two cars. In one, Maggie and her mom. In the other, me and my youngest, Jack, who took a break from his summer job scooping ice cream at the Jersey Shore to help move his sister in. Both cars were packed to the roof with dorm-room essentials from Amazon, Target, and Best Buy--basically the entire college section of America's big-box retail industry. | | ---|---|--- As we get older, time speeds up. (FAST) It feels like yesterday you came into the world on a chilly Black Friday in 2006, born on the biggest shopping day of the year. Yeah, that was foreshadowing. If there's a discount code, you've probably already found it, applied it, and texted it to three friends. You were born just three weeks after I won my first congressional race. When you were six weeks old, I held you in my arms on the House floor as I raised my right hand and was sworn in. I was 33, the youngest House Democrat in the country, thinking about the promise of a better America for you and your generation. I ran for Congress to honor the 19 brothers I lost in Iraq--but you became my new purpose, and the most important job I'll ever have: being your Girl Dad. Life was pretty different back then. And I'm so incredibly proud of the person you've grown into. Before you could even speak, you were already making moves in the greatest halls of power. You'll just have to take my word for it that baby Maggie was once cradled in Michelle Obama's arms, with Malia and Sasha beside her, watching Ratatouille in the White House movie room while I was down the hall trying to look casual, watching the Super Bowl with President Obama and Attorney General Eric Holder. | | ---|---|--- 2009, Philadelphia Casual, except for the giant chocolate ice cream stain you had spilled on my crisp white shirt. (Thanks, kid.) At least I came armed with a box of Philly soft pretzels--my version of diplomacy. And for the record, that was the first and last time I was ever invited to watch a game at the People's House. Your Work Ethic Is Second to None** Now's the part where I get to brag about the leader you are. In 18 years, you've managed to do it all: National Honor Society, varsity volleyball player who helped take your team from a 4-12 freshman season to 18-6 senior year and all the way to the district finals. Student Government Executive Secretary. President of the Travis Manion Foundation club. And yes, Homecoming Queen. | | ---|---|--- You are beautiful inside and out, with an infectious smile and quick wit. But the best thing about you isn't on your resume--it's in your heart. You'll drop everything to help a friend or a stranger, or to stand up to a wrong, no questions asked. You're the kind of person who makes your dad feel both impossibly proud and, honestly, just a little bit lazy in comparison. I've worn a lot of titles in my life, but "Maggie's dad" will always be the one I'm proudest of. (Don't worry, Jack--you'll get the same treatment when it's your turn as you chart your path.) You've already signed your contract with the Air Force ROTC, following in your Uncle JJ's footsteps and potentially becoming a fourth-generation veteran in the Murphy family. You'll be up and at formation every Monday and Wednesday at 5:50 a.m., while most college kids are still tangled blissfully in their sheets, you'll be out there pushing yourself and your fellow cadets running, lifting, and training to serve. It took me until my sophomore year to commit to ROTC. You're already way ahead of where I was. And you're not just joining the "warrior class." You're majoring in Preprofessional Health Studies, with your sights set on medicine as a doctor or physician's assistant. You've got a servant's heart and a fierce determination, and you're deadly serious about answering our nation's call. | | ---|---|--- If you stick with it, you'll be the first medical professional in the Murphy family while serving as an Air Force medical officer. That's no small leap for the granddaughter of a Vietnam-era Navy Vet and Philly Cop, and the daughter of someone still paying off his college and law school loans. (Almost across the finish line.) When you step back to put all this in perspective, you're nothing short of extraordinary. about 38% do. And of those, an even smaller share have chosen to serve. Maggie, your role as a woman in ROTC, pursuing the U.S. Air Force, puts you in an even rarer group. You're not just working now to be part of the 38%--you're part of the fraction of a fraction who are willing to wear the uniform and become a military officer. Carry that with pride, because you represent something far bigger than yourself. Only about 21% of the U.S. Air Force is made up of women. You're stepping into a profession literally stacked with men--and I know you'll hold your own. You've never been afraid of a challenge, and I know you're not starting now. You've overcome challenges time and time again with grace and grit--whether it was fighting to get into honors courses early in high school or giving up competitive dance to focus on volleyball, you've always risen to the challenge. There's a lot of excitement now as you embark on this milestone journey. But something we don't say enough: it's also okay to change your mind. The things you think, know, and believe today might not be the same things you pursue three years from now--or five, or ten. Life has a way of surprising us, and the path you're on can take turns you never saw coming. That's just life. What matters most is how you carry yourself and how you treat the people you meet along the way. I'll be proud of you no matter where you end up. Your Mom and I did our best to give you opportunities we never had. While our marriage didn't make it, we were always united when it came to you and your brother. And now for the part where I give Dad advice. I read a lot of books and polls (too many, in fact), and it's alarming to see how upward mobility isn't a guarantee anymore. It's been for our family, but not for all. One poll that stands out is that fewer Americans believe their kids will have a better life than they did - it's now at When I was your age, most people assumed the next generation would do better as long as they worked hard; it was just baked into the idea of America. Now, that optimism has slipped away for a lot of families. Don't ever lose your sense of passion and purpose. Hope can always be renewed through hard work and serving others. Another thing I think about: The author and researcher Jonathan Haidt has sounded the alarm on what's happening to your "anxious generation"--how , anxious, even socially paralyzed. How fewer are entering the workforce right away. How screens have replaced so many of the face-to-face interactions that used to build confidence and resilience. That's not you, but it will be the reality for some of the people you meet on campus, and it's worth being aware of. I know you'll do your best to make them feel like they belong and are seen. And yet, here you are, headed off to serve your country, study healthcare, and build bridges between people in a country that seems more divided than ever. You're living proof that hard work, grit, and a good heart still count for something. You're only the second generation in our family to go to college. I know what a big deal that is. Your Mom and I were first-generation college students, so we know that the friends you make in these years can change your life. We found our tribes. We know, Maggie, you'll find yours too--whether in your dorm, a sorority, or among your fellow cadets. Or, knowing you, probably all of the above. You've always had this rare ability to bridge divides. Even your high school AP biology teacher was married to my former congressional opponent. (Yes, life is a small world like that.) The service club you led was named for a fallen Marine whose father was also my opponent. (Bucks County--what can I say? It's a purple district.) You always rise above and bring people together in the most authentic way. It's one of your many superpowers. Where life's peculiarities usually build walls, you've built bridges. You have this way of pulling people in, making them feel like they belong, whether they're lifelong friends or total strangers. And that, more than any title or accomplishment, will carry you further than you can imagine. President Kennedy once said, "Children are the living messages we send to a time we will not see." Today, Maggie, you give all of us hope. We know that you will carry that message of fire, kindness, and smarts onto the Clemson campus. You're living proof that a kid from Bucks County can excel, serve, and lead with love and heart. When I look at you now, I see someone strong, determined, and radiant. A far cry from the skinny freshman with braces and a face full of acne who once dyed her beautiful blonde hair brown just to be taken seriously. (Sorry, am I embarrassing you? I'll stop. Eventually.) You've earned every win, every grade, every friendship. And now, you're flying and will continue to thrive. So here we are. 518 miles from home. My heart feels both full and like it's missing a piece. I'm choked up writing this with tears streaming down my face. I'm trying to get it out of my system because I won't show it in public. If I could give you one last piece of advice, it's this: find your people. Keep serving others. Stoke that firefly light of yours to keep it shining, even when the world feels dark. And call and text your Mom and Dad. Often. The truth is, Maggie, we trust you. We've raised you to lead with grace and grit. It's the other knuckleheads we worry about. But we know you'll keep them in line. So, go make your mark. Step onto campus with your head high, your heart open, and your sleeves rolled up, ready to work, ready to serve, ready to live the life you've been building toward since the day you were born. The world may try to tell you who you are, but you already know. You are strong, you are kind, you are ready. Love, Your Bestie. name: The Democratic Party
subject: Mikie Sherrill and Abigail Spanberger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
---
Derek, Under the Trump administration, the role of governor has never been more important. Here at the DNC, we’re laser-focused on two governors’ elections happening in November: **Mikie Sherrill for New Jersey
Abigail Spanberger for Virginia
These races are not just about electing governors — they’re about protecting the rights of all New Jerseyans and Virginians and setting the tone for the 2026 midterms. But winning them both is not going to be easy. In **New Jersey** , the latest polls show Democrat Mikie Sherrill in the lead — but only by a small margin. With many voters still undecided and time running out to reach all of them, it’s going to take all hands on deck to make sure Democrats’ message is resonating with as many New Jersey voters as possible. In **Virginia** , Republicans are pulling out all the stops to defeat Democrat Abigail Spanberger. They’re working around the clock to fund her opponent, with national Republicans recently spending another $500,000 to boost Spanberger’s opponent. The truth is, these elections are going to be close. That’s why the DNC has invested over $1 million in both of these states to help Democrats register voters, train volunteers, knock doors, and _win_ up and down the ticket. If we can win in states like Virginia, New Jersey, and beyond, we’ll be sending a powerful message that voters are fed up with Trump, Republicans, and their corruption and chaos. But we can only do that if we have the resources now to fund our on-the-ground organizing work. [**So we’re asking: Can you chip in $3 today to help elect Democrats in states like New Jersey and Virginia and send the message that voters everywhere are rejecting Trump’s disastrous agenda?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250812_4280_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4280_22930333_pQGzqM&akid=4280%2E22930333%2EpQGzqM) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250812_4280_fr&refcode2=4280_22930333_pQGzqM&akid=4280%2E22930333%2EpQGzqM)**

Friend,
With less than three months to go before the special election in Texas’ 18th Congressional District, a brand-new poll shows Amanda Edwards leading the field to fill this historic seat!
This is a huge moment for our campaign! Amanda is ahead and outside the margin of error (leading by 6 points), but the race is far from over: More than a third of voters are still undecided.

name: Homophobes:
subject: They’re coming for marriage equality
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
Ten years after the Supreme Court guaranteed marriage rights to same-sex couples, conservatives are making their first formal move to tear it all down.
Kim Davis , the Kentucky county clerk who refused to issue marriage licenses to gay couples in 2015, just asked the Supreme Court to overturn Obergefell v. Hodges , the landmark decision that made marriage equality the law of the land.
Her case is backed by the same extremist movement that overturned Roe v. Wade . They want to let states ban LGBTQ+ marriages. and they’re openly saying they’ll use the same playbook they used to attack reproductive freedom.
If we don’t act now, they could strip away marriage rights for millions of Americans.
Republicans have shown us exactly what they’ll do with power: erase rights, target vulnerable communities, and roll back decades of progress. We have to meet this threat head-on.
This is why we fight. This is why we can’t sit back and “wait to see what happens.”
Chip in now to defend marriage equality [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]

Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
Let’s make it clear: marriage equality is not up for debate.
In the fight,

clean_body: [] friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin. Ten years after the Supreme Court guaranteed marriage rights to same-sex couples, conservatives are making their first formal move to tear it all down. Kim Davis , the Kentucky county clerk who refused to issue marriage licenses to gay couples in 2015, just asked the Supreme Court to overturn Obergefell v. Hodges , the landmark decision that made marriage equality the law of the land. Her case is backed by the same extremist movement that overturned Roe v. Wade . They want to let states ban LGBTQ+ marriages. and they’re openly saying they’ll use the same playbook they used to attack reproductive freedom. If we don’t act now, they could strip away marriage rights for millions of Americans. Republicans have shown us exactly what they’ll do with power: erase rights, target vulnerable communities, and roll back decades of progress. We have to meet this threat head-on. This is why we fight. This is why we can’t sit back and “wait to see what happens.” Chip in now to defend marriage equality [?] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Express Donate: $10 [] Express Donate: $25 [] Express Donate: $50 [] Express Donate: $100 [] Or, donate another amount [] Let’s make it clear: marriage equality is not up for debate. Maralee McLean lived a mother's worst nightmare: Her daughter was taken from her and put in the hands of an abuser when the court
was swayed by claims of "parental alienation syndrome." In her courageous work to defend the innocent, Maralee discovered she and
her family are far from alone.

In her book "Prosecuted but Not Silenced," she unveils a dark secret in our legal system that endangers vulnerable children.
Maralee is now the Executive Director of Moms Fight Back, a non-profit organization that works on legislation for courtroom reform
for sexually abused children. Like, subscribe and share.

Four Things That Make American Moms Powerful and Effective

American moms are an undeniable force for good in our nation. We guide the hearts of our children, providing sanity and stability
amid an unhinged culture. We might be negotiating a deal at the office, painting a school project with our child at 10 pm because
it’s due in the morning, speaking truth to power at a school board meeting, or holding a child as she cries through a hurt. Is
there anything moms don’t do?

This week, we wanted to applaud several key things that make you powerful and effective in your family, community – and in our
nation. Hats off to you, mamas!

clean_body: This week, we're sharing a mother's story of fighting to protect her daughter. We also have a blog celebrating the great things about American moms! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] August 12, 2025 • Newsletter Prosecuted but Not Silenced: A Mother's Story Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Maralee McLean lived a mother's worst nightmare: Her daughter was taken from her and put in the hands of an abuser when the court was swayed by claims of "parental alienation syndrome." In her courageous work to defend the innocent, Maralee discovered she and her family are far from alone. In her book "Prosecuted but Not Silenced," she unveils a dark secret in our legal system that endangers vulnerable children. Maralee is now the Executive Director of Moms Fight Back, a non-profit organization that works on legislation for courtroom reform for sexually abused children. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] Four Things That Make American Moms Powerful and Effective American moms are an undeniable force for good in our nation. We guide the hearts of our children, providing sanity and stability amid an unhinged culture. We might be negotiating a deal at the office, painting a school project with our child at 10 pm because it’s due in the morning, speaking truth to power at a school board meeting, or holding a child as she cries through a hurt. Is there anything moms don’t do? This week, we wanted to applaud several key things that make you powerful and effective in your family, community – and in our nation. Hats off to you, mamas! Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. Season 2 Episodes on Mondays at 10am ET View on YouTube [] View on Rumble [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: With Federal troops
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter,
**The President is taking control of the capital city — and using Federal troops to do it.**
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250812-1-f&t=1&akid=630%2E5691347%2EE36p19)
He says it’s about crime. It’s not.
(Not that he cares ... the man who pardoned a mob that sacked the U.S. Capitol on his behalf.)
No ... Like everything Trump does, it’s about _him_.
**Donald Trump is living out his strongman ruler fantasies, enabled by the sycophants and fools who surround him.**
(This is also a ploy to redirect public attention from the Epstein files with a spectacle he hopes will delight and distract MAGA true believers.)
Federal troops patrolling the nation’s capital ... brought to you by the President who envies and admires foreign dictators, with their military parades and their power to crush the opposition.
But here’s the thing — _we are the opposition, America is still a democracy, and we will not be crushed. We will summon unprecedented will and resources to win in a 2026 landslide, regain power in Congress, and end Donald Trump’s pathetic reign as a would-be King._
***
Before I was elected to the Senate, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses around the world.
Strongmen systematically dismantle the checks on their power. The national police start wearing masks. They use the spectacle of military force to intimidate their own citizens.
They do these things with emergency powers.
We must stop this slide into an un-American America. That means regaining Congressional power.
The reality is 2026 is our only chance.
And I’m the **only** Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024.
So that means I’m MAGA’s #1 target for defeat.
**Help me beat them again, just like we did in 2021.**
**[Please — this is not a drill — contribute to my campaign today.](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250812-1-f&t=2&akid=630%2E5691347%2EE36p19)**
Thank you for fighting for our Republic.
\- Jon

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=3&akid=630%2E5691347%2EE36p19) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=630%2E5691347%2EE36p19) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Mikie Sherrill HQ
subject: NEW POLL: A nail-biter in New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Peter, did you see the new poll released by Insider NJ?
Peter, did you see the new poll released by Insider NJ?
**🔵 Mikie Sherrill - 48%**
**🔴 Jack Ciattarelli - 42%**
**⚪ Undecided - 9%**
**This new poll shows Mikie’s MAGA opponent just barely trailing Mikie in the race for governor — with more than enough undecided voters to swing the result.**
**[We knew this race was going to be close, Peter, and this poll proves it. And with Ciattarelli launching one false attack after another, we have no time to waste getting Mikie’s message out. clean_body: | | Friends, We warned you yesterday that D.C. was just the beginning. Now, Trump is saying it out loud -- he wants to send the National Guard into other U.S. cities and states. This isn't about safety. It's not about "crime prevention." It's about control. | In Washington, D.C., violent crime is at a 30-year low. But that didn't stop Trump from flooding the streets with armed troops and federal agents. Now he wants to replicate that everywhere -- from big cities to small towns --testing just how far he can go before someone stops him. If he can send federal forces into one city, he can send them anywhere. And if we let him normalize it now, he 'll have the blueprint to do it again, whether it's to crush protests, intimidate voters, or silence his political opponents. This is what authoritarianism looks like in its early stages. And we are not going to sit back and watch it spread. No Dem Left Behind is organizing in every corner of the country --battleground states, rural communities, and districts the GOP thinks they've locked down. But we need you with us. If we don't fight this together, there won't be anywhere left to hide from it. In the fight, No Dem Left Behind | \--FORWARDED-- Friends, Trump just announced he is sending the National Guard into Washington, D.C. He 's federalized the police already. And now, armed federal agents from multiple agencies are patrolling the streets of our nation's capital. | They're calling it "crime prevention." But here's the truth: violent crime in D.C. is at a 30-year low. This isn 't about safety -- it's about power. Trump is testing the limits -- seeing how far he can go, how quickly he can turn the instruments of government into his own personal security force. The endgame? A dictatorship -- and a third term. And he's doing it while distracting from the Epstein scandal -- a scandal so damning that even some of his own supporters were starting to turn on him. Instead of answering questions, he's flexing his power in the streets of D.C. If he can get away with this in our nation's capital, he'll try it in every state, every city, and every rural county in America. That 's why No Dem Left Behind is going all-in nationwide -- organizing in battleground states, rural districts, and communities the GOP hopes we'll ignore. From the Midwest to the South, the Plains to the coasts -- it's all gas, no brakes to defend democracy everywhere. Trump is showing us exactly who he is and what he plans to do. We can't wait until it's too late. Sincerely, The No Dem Left Behind Team | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . name: Voter Action Project
subject: This bill was written to disenfranchise legal voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project[https://voteractionproject.org/]
The Senate is standing up to stop the SAVE Act in its tracks, folks.
Defenders of voting rights know that non-citizen voting is already illegal, extremely rare, and that this bill is written in a way that could disenfranchise millions of eligible women across the country. Here's Colorado Senator Michael Bennet:
(Image of Michael Bennet speaking on the Senate floor) [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_MB.jpg]
Opponents of voting rights in Congress -- and in the White House -- favor this bill because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come.
Please, Team, join these brave Senators today. Fuel our efforts to stop this dangerous legislation with $25 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081225_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081225_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081225_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081225_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081225_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081225_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081225_1&amount=35]
We know the SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights to be in place before the next election, folks. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law.
If you missed it: This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register, either a passport or a birth certificate that matches their current first and last name -- something millions of eligible American women don’t have. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise anywhere from 11 million to 65 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
The consequences of a bill like this passing would be simply catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081225_1&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081225_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081225_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
