If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=OEvWan9iRujnJMtXIVKNmaWSYDLQaVIWoGhdTwDwiQlwynR6Y%2B6XporUGskiauhuIQFstEmP6co8YwFjEWToI6bStx7csLMZxF2I7TmxIL9INmOVbJYfG4HdtgsLSVIwnXQ2QvmkXVdL12hlqvOiegq3gbDmdl8DgUmHUymAdpr0MNioPjB03J4XnPRhqx4f%2BTuu0r9oieiyBKFAktBQetUUX%2BgFPgYlsVFYZRMiIRrfx8rVAUT5ZehECF%2BLkcPagzjoa7x3hw8YmcMAzek9OqBU0l9dGy65fVLxvwU5V5trPfacqQ%2FJ6TtOwzgY46n0RZEq6%2BWh9kH%2F2d3zSMec3mBrPjtOZ%2FDr8hxdZWTaPz1ImaO%2F3slAmWIiEBxbw29%2FSyGxFSJ82HJd6GI1YKTCxnsHC30nSx951tRN67Vq364%3D .

I’m a former pro wheelchair basketball player, four-time Paralympian, two-time Team USA gold medalist, and Iowa State Representative who won a Trump district. **Now, I’m launching my campaign to defeat Joni Ernst and be Iowa’s defender in the U.S. Senate.** Before I explain why I’m ALL-IN on this race, you should know that experts are calling Iowa’s Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in 2026. **Control of the entire Senate could hinge on the outcome of this race.** ******[If you can, will you split a $25 donation to become a Founding Donor of my campaign and help us hit our $100,000 launch goal? Friend, I’m a straight shooter, so let’s get this out of the way: **I know taking on Joni Ernst and her band of Swamp Politicians isn’t going to be easy.**

But, I’m not a stranger to overcoming challenges and obstacles. I’m built to beat them.

I won a Trump district in the Iowa State House that I was told would be impossible for a Democrat to win. But, I knocked damn near every door in Council Bluffs and Carter Lake—in a wheelchair. Often had to get up ten to twenty stairs. Folks would ask “how the heck did you get up to my door?” I’d tell them the truth: I crawled. I won by _six_ votes.

Winning Iowa’s Senate race is another so-called “impossible” task. But, I’m confident I’ll defeat Joni Ernst because **we need leaders with grit and guts now more than ever.**

Farms and small businesses are getting crushed over a bogus trade war. Millions of seniors, disabled people, even kids, will be kicked off health care and food assistance so billionaires like Elon Musk can save a few bucks on their tax bill. Costs are out of control and getting worse. **Extremists like Joni Ernst are working harder for wealthy elites than they ever have for their constituents.**

The bottom line: Iowans deserve a Senator who’s as hard a worker and as proud a patriot as they are.

The good news is that Joni Ernst has never been more vulnerable. In fact, election forecasters have already pushed this race toward Democrats and one has Iowa ranked as Lean Republican.

This Senate race is one to watch. For that reason, it’s also on track to be one of 2026’s most expensive elections.

Beating Joni Ernst will be costly, considering she has enough megadonor cash and super PAC support to blanket the whole state of Iowa. **No donation is too small to make a difference here.**

**[I’m personally asking you to become one of the first supporters of my campaign for U.S. Senate. clean_body: | | | Hey, , my name is Josh Turek. I’m a former pro wheelchair basketball player, four-time Paralympian, two-time Team USA gold medalist, and Iowa State Representative who won a Trump district. Now, I’m launching my campaign to defeat Joni Ernst and be Iowa’s defender in the U.S. Senate. Before I explain why I’m ALL-IN on this race, you should know that experts are calling Iowa’s Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in 2026. Control of the entire Senate could hinge on the outcome of this race. **** | Friend, I’m a straight shooter, so let’s get this out of the way: I know taking on Joni Ernst and her band of Swamp Politicians isn’t going to be easy. But, I’m not a stranger to overcoming challenges and obstacles. I’m built to beat them. I won a Trump district in the Iowa State House that I was told would be impossible for a Democrat to win. But, I knocked damn near every door in Council Bluffs and Carter Lake—in a wheelchair. Often had to get up ten to twenty stairs. Folks would ask “how the heck did you get up to my door?” I’d tell them the truth: I crawled. I won by six votes. Winning Iowa’s Senate race is another so-called “impossible” task. But, I’m confident I’ll defeat Joni Ernst because we need leaders with grit and guts now more than ever. Farms and small businesses are getting crushed over a bogus trade war. Millions of seniors, disabled people, even kids, will be kicked off health care and food assistance so billionaires like Elon Musk can save a few bucks on their tax bill. Costs are out of control and getting worse. Extremists like Joni Ernst are working harder for wealthy elites than they ever have for their constituents. The bottom line: Iowans deserve a Senator who’s as hard a worker and as proud a patriot as they are. The good news is that Joni Ernst has never been more vulnerable. In fact, election forecasters have already pushed this race toward Democrats and one has Iowa ranked as Lean Republican. This Senate race is one to watch. For that reason, it’s also on track to be one of 2026’s most expensive elections. Beating Joni Ernst will be costly, considering she has enough megadonor cash and super PAC support to blanket the whole state of Iowa. No donation is too small to make a difference here. We have a ton of work to do and history to make here in Iowa. Let’s do this! Talk soon, Josh Turek elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Hans van Mol
subject: Urgent warning for you - something horrible happening in PA
body:
Heed this warning, every Democrat in the country needs to hear what’s happening on the ground in PA.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Yp0zi4FlcUznrRAHi3koYl_xv_Xms3Q2UtVBQzLlMTYfPD2XtZV-Q9N9k7_LtQwjFk9iOSkhl0bI3bXrQncYvz8t_oYk2dB7w7NKyH_Xtq51Cs8FbAoiFSw8cFB5N-8PEA0Ejf5Qrd9NvbnE6GmHGw-ibP3aTC2JwEJPuj5QCwJyUMCvOz0uJKb_SNKSmC1pj2ecrjdwZ6qsaVugVMt60vN6UXFuOHEi&c=BS8TvBVqZIA8gm-E3qsO3q-WFUjnTZtILaztMtrMmBzk-WrsinsRjA==&ch=kuzhvL9oCGtjuUwfutpm_kk7UnNI8_dpK81JQvkw2rds2jWB5tPmMg==)
---
| Peter--My name is Hans van Mol and I am the President of Pennsylvania Young Dems. Heed this warning, every Democrat in the country needs to hear what's happening on the ground in PA:
We are on the verge of losing the most consequential election for Democrats this year--the 2025 PA Supreme Court retention election.
If MAGA takes the PA Supreme Court this November it would allow Trump to:

* Gerrymander the majority of Pennsylvania's blue congressional into deep red districts

* Rig the 2026 midterms and 2028 Presidential (where Trump has flirted with running for a third term) by throwing out Democrat-leaning ballots in the most important swing state in the country

* Circumvent the PA legislature by bringing lawsuits directly to the MAGA controlled PA Supreme Court on key issues like abortion, voting rights, and corporate regulations

PA Young Dems are holding the line and are throwing everything into salvaging this but we can't keep up with the millions that MAGA is pouring into voter registration and turnout efforts. Right now, they are funneling millions into a PAC called Early Vote Action, which is run by extremist MAGA influencer Scott Presler.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Yp0zi4FlcUznrRAHi3koYl_xv_Xms3Q2UtVBQzLlMTYfPD2XtZV-Q9N9k7_LtQwjFk9iOSkhl0bI3bXrQncYvz8t_oYk2dB7w7NKyH_Xtq51Cs8FbAoiFSw8cFB5N-8PEA0Ejf5Qrd9NvbnE6GmHGw-ibP3aTC2JwEJPuj5QCwJyUMCvOz0uJKb_SNKSmC1pj2ecrjdwZ6qsaVugVMt60jFmFWDg9I0k&c=BS8TvBVqZIA8gm-E3qsO3q-WFUjnTZtILaztMtrMmBzk-WrsinsRjA==&ch=kuzhvL9oCGtjuUwfutpm_kk7UnNI8_dpK81JQvkw2rds2jWB5tPmMg==)
---
His organization is everywhere in PA, registering voters and raising awareness about the upcoming election. With the millions at Presler's disposal, he has narrowed the voter registration gap in PA. What was once a million registered Democrat lead has been narrowed to just 53,000.
That is why the PA Young Dems are working with Defend Our Courts, one of the only Dem organizations fighting alongside us to save the Pennsylvania Supreme Court. We are outnumbered and outgunned and we desperately need Democrats from all across this country to come to our aid if we want to have any hope of salvaging this election.
[Will you split a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to help the PA Young Dems and Defend Our Courts hold the line and save this critical court?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Yp0zi4FlcUznrRAHi3koYl_xv_Xms3Q2UtVBQzLlMTYfPD2XtZV-Q9N9k7_LtQwjFk9iOSkhl0bI3bXrQncYvz8t_oYk2dB7w7NKyH_Xtq51Cs8FbAoiFSw8cFB5N-8PEA0Ejf5Qrd9NvbnE6GmHGw-ibP3aTC2JwEJPuj5QCwJyUMCvOz0uJKb_SNKSmC1pj2ecrjdwZ6qsaVugVMt60qK7b21c88Zr&c=BS8TvBVqZIA8gm-E3qsO3q-WFUjnTZtILaztMtrMmBzk-WrsinsRjA==&ch=kuzhvL9oCGtjuUwfutpm_kk7UnNI8_dpK81JQvkw2rds2jWB5tPmMg==)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: It’s bleak
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:

Massive cuts are underway to end waste, fraud, and abuse within the State Department and FIRE rogue bureaucrats who are working against President Trump’s mission of an America First foreign policy. And the Democrats are SEETHING with rage! But no matter how much the Left attacks us and calls for endless hearings in the Senate, Rubio refuses to budge! His hardline policy boils down to this... ...If you are going to work on the taxpayer’s dime, then you better work – and work HARD – to benefit U.S. citizens, and NO ONE else! In keeping with that spirit, we’re asking the most politically engaged U.S. citizens like YOU to participate in our America First Survey to ensure that citizens are driving our agenda. name: GIFFORDS
subject: Gabby’s message for you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Progress is possible.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250812-1-b&t=1&akid=10770%2E3935704%2ENGnD9K)
^^ You heard it straight from Gabby: _**When people work together, progress is possible._**
[**That’s why we’re asking you to make your first contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us keep moving forward in our fight to end gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250812-1-b&t=2&akid=10770%2E3935704%2ENGnD9K)
Back when GIFFORDS was founded twelve years ago, it was considered too politically risky for elected officials to even talk about gun violence. But with the hard work we have done together to shift the narrative on guns in our country, the vast majority of Americans -- Democrats, Republicans, and independents alike -- support commonsense gun safety legislation.
Even though gun safety is popular among the general public, far too many of our elected officials are choosing to prioritize gun lobby profits and their campaign donations over our safety.
It’s up to us to work together to stop right-wing MAGA extremists from rolling back the work we’ve done to make our country safer from preventable gun violence.
[**So please, chip in to GIFFORDS PAC before our mid-quarter deadline. Remember: it’s not just you adding your $3 contribution -- it’s tens of thousands of people all pitching in to support our work to end gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250812-1-b&t=3&akid=10770%2E3935704%2ENGnD9K)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-aug25.bPjs74&amount=3&refcode=em250812-1-b&t=4&akid=10770%2E3935704%2ENGnD9K)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-aug25.bPjs74&refcode=em250812-1-b&t=5&akid=10770%2E3935704%2ENGnD9K)**
---
****
Thank you for all that you do to support our movement,
Team GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=10770%2E3935704%2ENGnD9K) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Dan Carr
subject: School Choice
body:
Mississippi Must Adopt School Choice

| |
---|---|---
|
# School Choice
### Mississippi Must Adopt School Choice
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| Aug 12
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
Mississippi stands at a critical crossroads in education. The future of our children--and by extension, the future of our state--depends on whether we choose bold reform or settle for the status quo. For far too long, too many Mississippi students have been trapped in failing schools simply because of their ZIP code. Our next governor and lieutenant governor must make school choice not just a talking point, but a reality. This is not just a political issue--it's a moral one.
Click School Choice To Finish Reading The Article:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ce52c23a-e497-43ef-9947-576211db1b41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

name: DNC Reform via Our Revolution
subject: BREAKING: We're *this close* to getting dark money out of our primaries
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

BREAKING: After relentless grassroots support from Our Revolution, the DNC
just officially announced a vote on a landmark resolution that could
finally put a stop to secret, billionaire-funded dark money buying support
in the Democratic Presidential nominating process.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33531?source=email-20250812&t=1011&akid=9162%2E5885482%2EoRbhpf ]Headline: DNC chair takes steps to restrict corporate and dark money in
2028 primaries

For years, we've seen super PACs and corporate front groups pour
undisclosed cash into elections, drowning out the voices of working people
and pushing out the progressive candidates we need. And now we have the
chance to change that, once and for all.

The DNC will vote on this resolution on August 27th, and the outcome
depends on what we do right now. We've been building towards this moment –
and now it’s going to take all of us coming together again to push it over
the finish line.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33531?source=email-20250812&t=1012&akid=9162%2E5885482%2EoRbhpf ]Will you send an URGENT message to your local and state party leaders
today? Tell them: *Stand with Our Revolution and get corporate and dark
money OUT of our primaries NOW*!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33531?source=email-20250812&t=1013&akid=9162%2E5885482%2EoRbhpf ]ADD YOUR NAME

We’ve been on the frontlines of this battle for years. Our Revolution’s
Chair, Larry Cohen and founding board member Jane Kleeb – have been
pushing for one simple, radical idea: “Voters should actually determine
who the candidates are. Not big money. Not billionaires. Voters.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33531?source=email-20250812&t=1014&akid=9162%2E5885482%2EoRbhpf ]Bernie tweet about the dangers of billionaire super PACs and how
Democrats can now lead the way towards ending Citizens United

Now, because of that work, we have a major opportunity when the DNC meets
THIS MONTH to win two reforms.

The first resolution would block dirty money interventions in our
primaries by stopping billionaire super PACs from flooding races with
attack ads and big-money endorsements to force out working-class
candidates.

But that’s not all. A charter change proposed by DNC Chair Ken Martin
would codify the no superdelegates rule that we’ve been championing since
Bernie’s run in 2016 – putting it in the charter to ensure that voters
actually get to decide our candidate, not party insiders.

Getting this far is already a victory – and we’re not stopping now. But
the establishment will likely be out in force, trying to quietly kill
these much needed reforms.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33531?source=email-20250812&t=1015&akid=9162%2E5885482%2EoRbhpf ]DNC members are already hearing from corporate lobbyists – now they
need to hear from *you*. Take 30 seconds, right now, to tell your local
and state leaders: We demand a party that fights for real people, not dark
money donors.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33531?source=email-20250812&t=1016&akid=9162%2E5885482%2EoRbhpf ]ADD YOUR NAME

Earlier this year, thanks to pressure from thousands of Our Revolution
members, the new DNC leadership committed to banning billionaire money as
a core principle. Now let’s get these key reforms over the finish line,
together.

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9162%2E5885482%2EoRbhpf ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9162%2E5885482%2EoRbhpf ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9162%2E5885482%2EoRbhpf ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9162%2E5885482%2EoRbhpf ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9162%2E5885482%2EoRbhpf ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9162%2E5885482%2EoRbhpf ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20250812.sU4aqz&t=1007&akid=9162%2E5885482%2EoRbhpf ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20250812.CYU9pQ&t=1008&akid=9162%2E5885482%2EoRbhpf ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20250812.5a_FgP&t=1009&akid=9162%2E5885482%2EoRbhpf ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20250812.lb_GMo&t=1010&akid=9162%2E5885482%2EoRbhpf ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9162%2E5885482%2EoRbhpf

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

name: Senator Rand Paul
subject: Let’s force a vote this year
body:
Sign the petition Chuck Schumer hates [unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmd5fi2bt1ih0udi9kfoe23drefhqxdknbhsrtz6pvm8kl54bwdmcl58o0uvnl8ae8ga540u6sr0ysgivi4q3iqhzn9kjgb5bzpzt4p1&__stmp=t0w0ks&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

|
Dear Concerned American,

Below are petitions I've had prepared for you to House Speaker Mike Johnson, Senate Majority Leader John Thune, your Senators, and your Congressman.

It's crucial you sign and return them at once.

You see, President Donald Trump and leaders of both Houses of Congress -- plus a record number of Congressmen and Senators -- are on record in favor of Right to Work.

Without a doubt, this is our best opportunity EVER to advance a National Right to Work law to end forced unionism in America.

A National Right to Work law would ultimately end forced unionism nationwide by removing the sections of federal labor law that give union bosses the power to force workers to pay union dues or "fees" just to get or keep a job.

**[So please sign and return your petitions immediately](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=vgytuegwx8oqp711z488ssbu0vtc23w66tm4e77ajpkofvqf9valjyq2ig92y9jf8q5u57q8gehrzd3msn03tpzi71wjoo29erkzsmi5i0la7xl2puk8sqreusb0bl3pdvl7j7dpvgcxferjhe61ji921yzrxagec29fkl8w1xd9ik2qhlk7ruu9pc1sk8jcn69sfbg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0w0ks&__onlt=h).**

You see, the union bosses, Chuck Schumer, Hakeem Jeffries, and their allies are going to use every trick in the book to kill a National Right to Work bill -- and they will try to do it as quietly as possible.

The union kingpins (and their water-carriers in Congress) can't afford the consequences of having their coercive privileges publicly debated and voted on in Congress!

They don't want the American people to know that:
---
*** Millions of workers are forced to surrender part of every paycheck to keep their jobs.

This cash funds violent "organizing" drives, provides a limousine lifestyle for union bigwigs, and finances radical causes;
*** Big Labor's power is deadly to millions of small businesses.

Big Labor politicians and Biden-stacked bureaucracies have been strangling small businesses with confiscatory taxes, destructive laws, and straitjacket regulations;
*** Forced unionism exports millions of good jobs overseas.

Productivity-killing work rules, workplace class warfare, slowdowns, "sick-outs," and strikes have all taken their crippling toll, closing the doors of many businesses -- for good; and
*** Billions of forced-dues dollars have been used to bankroll radical, Tax-and-Spend politicians like Chuck Schumer and Hakeem Jeffries, resulting in out-of-control spending and skyrocketing taxes.
**[That's why it's vital you sign and return your petitions to demonstrate to Congress and the national media the strong support for Right to Work](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=vgytuegwx8oqp711z488ssbu0vtc23w66tm4e77ajpkofvqf9valjyq2ig92y9jf8q5u57q8gehrzd3msn03tpzi71wjoo29erkzsmi5i0la7xl2puk8sqreusb0bl3pdvl7j7dpvgcxferjhe61ji921yzrxagec29fkl8w1xd9ik2qhlk7ruu9pc1sk8jcn69sfbg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0w0ks&__onlt=h).**

Of course, Big Labor allies in Congress may choose to obey the union bosses rather than the majority of their constituents.

That's their choice.

But time and again, when politicians defy the public and vote for forced unionism, they've paid the price with the end of their political careers!

So -- by all means -- let's have another vote and see which politicians want to end their careers in the next election.

**[That's why your signed petitions and financial support are so important](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=vgytuegwx8oqp711z488ssbu0vtc23w66tm4e77ajpkofvqf9valjyq2ig92y9jf8q5u57q8gehrzd3msn03tpzi71wjoo29erkzsmi5i0la7xl2puk8sqreusb0bl3pdvl7j7dpvgcxferjhe61ji921yzrxagec29fkl8w1xd9ik2qhlk7ruu9pc1sk8jcn69sfbg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0w0ks&__onlt=h).**

It's all part of the National Right to Work Committee's four-part plan to pass a National Right to Work law:
*** Run TV, radio, and newspaper ads targeting swing votes in key states and districts;
*** Contact directly by mail and email up to 10 million supporters to urge them to demand their Senators and Congressmen vote for the National Right to Work Act;
*** Brief personally the hundreds of favorable columnists, radio talk show hosts, editorial writers, and bloggers nationwide who can help mobilize public opinion; and
*** Crank up a massive, multi-faceted digital and social media campaign in the days before the vote to really make Congress feel the heat.
Of course, this whole effort will be very expensive.

An all-out media and direct-mail blitz to mobilize massive public pressure on Congress will be the key to our success.

So, to pay for the expensive ads, mailings, social media, and other efforts, it's vital you send a special contribution to the National Right to Work Committee today.

**[Will you make a generous contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or $25 to launch the next crucial phase for ultimate passage of a National Right to Work law](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=vgytuegwx8oqp711z488ssbu0vtc23w66tm4e77ajpkofvqf9valjyq2ig92y9jf8q5u57q8gehrzd3msn03tpzi71wjoo29erkzsmi5i0la7xl2puk8sqreusb0bl3pdvl7j7dpvgcxferjhe61ji921yzrxagec29fkl8w1xd9ik2qhlk7ruu9pc1sk8jcn69sfbg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0w0ks&__onlt=h)?**

The National Right to Work Committee has successfully beaten back Big Labor's forced-dues machine for decades.

And now it's critical the National Right to Work Committee has your financial support right away to put politicians' feet to the fire to bring the National Right to Work Act up for a vote.

It would be a crime to let politicians who support compulsory unionism off the hook.

Up against the forced-dues-fed, billion-dollar might of Big Labor, all you and I have on our side is truth and public opinion.

Together with the National Right to Work Committee, you can make the difference.

Unlike Big Labor, the National Right to Work Committee doesn't have (or want) the power to force anyone to pay dues.

So it has to depend on the generosity of folks like you.

Some have already sent $500, $1,000, and even more. For others, a contribution of $50 or $100 has been as much as they could afford.

**[Whatever you can do, sign and return your petitions and include your most generous contribution](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=vgytuegwx8oqp711z488ssbu0vtc23w66tm4e77ajpkofvqf9valjyq2ig92y9jf8q5u57q8gehrzd3msn03tpzi71wjoo29erkzsmi5i0la7xl2puk8sqreusb0bl3pdvl7j7dpvgcxferjhe61ji921yzrxagec29fkl8w1xd9ik2qhlk7ruu9pc1sk8jcn69sfbg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0w0ks&__onlt=h).**

Please don't make it easy for Chuck Schumer, Hakeem Jeffries, and Big Labor to destroy the National Right to Work Act.

U.S. Senator Rand Paul

clean_body: Sign the petition Chuck Schumer hates Please read the message below from our sponsor. Steve Thompson, Editor | Dear Concerned American, Below are petitions I've had prepared for you to House Speaker Mike Johnson, Senate Majority Leader John Thune, your Senators, and your Congressman. It's crucial you sign and return them at once. You see, President Donald Trump and leaders of both Houses of Congress -- plus a record number of Congressmen and Senators -- are on record in favor of Right to Work. Without a doubt, this is our best opportunity EVER to advance a National Right to Work law to end forced unionism in America. A National Right to Work law would ultimately end forced unionism nationwide by removing the sections of federal labor law that give union bosses the power to force workers to pay union dues or "fees" just to get or keep a job. . You see, the union bosses, Chuck Schumer, Hakeem Jeffries, and their allies are going to use every trick in the book to kill a National Right to Work bill -- and they will try to do it as quietly as possible. The union kingpins (and their water-carriers in Congress) can't afford the consequences of having their coercive privileges publicly debated and voted on in Congress! They don't want the American people to know that: Millions of workers are forced to surrender part of every paycheck to keep their jobs. This cash funds violent "organizing" drives, provides a limousine lifestyle for union bigwigs, and finances radical causes; Big Labor's power is deadly to millions of small businesses. Big Labor politicians and Biden-stacked bureaucracies have been strangling small businesses with confiscatory taxes, destructive laws, and straitjacket regulations; Forced unionism exports millions of good jobs overseas. Productivity-killing work rules, workplace class warfare, slowdowns, "sick-outs," and strikes have all taken their crippling toll, closing the doors of many businesses -- for good; and Billions of forced-dues dollars have been used to bankroll radical, Tax-and-Spend politicians like Chuck Schumer and Hakeem Jeffries, resulting in out-of-control spending and skyrocketing taxes. . Of course, Big Labor allies in Congress may choose to obey the union bosses rather than the majority of their constituents. That's their choice. But time and again, when politicians defy the public and vote for forced unionism, they've paid the price with the end of their political careers! So -- by all means -- let's have another vote and see which politicians want to end their careers in the next election. . It's all part of the National Right to Work Committee's four-part plan to pass a National Right to Work law: Run TV, radio, and newspaper ads targeting swing votes in key states and districts; Contact directly by mail and email up to 10 million supporters to urge them to demand their Senators and Congressmen vote for the National Right to Work Act; Brief personally the hundreds of favorable columnists, radio talk show hosts, editorial writers, and bloggers nationwide who can help mobilize public opinion; and Crank up a massive, multi-faceted digital and social media campaign in the days before the vote to really make Congress feel the heat. Of course, this whole effort will be very expensive. An all-out media and direct-mail blitz to mobilize massive public pressure on Congress will be the key to our success. So, to pay for the expensive ads, mailings, social media, and other efforts, it's vital you send a special contribution to the National Right to Work Committee today. ? The National Right to Work Committee has successfully beaten back Big Labor's forced-dues machine for decades. And now it's critical the National Right to Work Committee has your financial support right away to put politicians' feet to the fire to bring the National Right to Work Act up for a vote. It would be a crime to let politicians who support compulsory unionism off the hook. Up against the forced-dues-fed, billion-dollar might of Big Labor, all you and I have on our side is truth and public opinion. Together with the National Right to Work Committee, you can make the difference. Unlike Big Labor, the National Right to Work Committee doesn't have (or want) the power to force anyone to pay dues. So it has to depend on the generosity of folks like you. Some have already sent $500, $1,000, and even more. For others, a contribution of $50 or $100 has been as much as they could afford. . Please don't make it easy for Chuck Schumer, Hakeem Jeffries, and Big Labor to destroy the National Right to Work Act. . It's vital we force roll-call votes in this Congress. It's time to put Big Labor on the defensive. Without your help, the union bosses win by default. Please act today. U.S. Senator Rand Paul P.S. Since over 80% of Americans oppose Big Labor's forced-unionism powers, a public debate and vote on a National Right to Work law is Big Labor's (and their water-carriers' in Congress) worst nightmare! . name: Dan Goldman
subject: Donald Trump doesn’t care about you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, By now, we all know that you can’t pay any attention to what Donald Trump _says_. You must focus on what he _does_. And the Big Ugly Bill that he rammed through Congress last month will be devastating for the vast majority of American people in order to benefit a very few ultra-wealthy Americans. Over _**300,000**_ New Yorkers could lose their SNAP benefits and go hungry, and over **_one million_ New Yorkers** are estimated to lose their health care coverage. New Yorkers will face food insecurity and be denied access to life-saving health care. But does Donald Trump care? No — he’s too busy using the office of the presidency to serve himself and his billionaire buddies. Trump recently announced plans to build a $200 million dollar ballroom at the White House, where he’ll undoubtedly host his wealthiest allies. SNAP benefits average $6 per day, per person, so Trump’s gold-plated ballroom could feed those one million New Yorkers for more than one month. **And New York Republicans do not care either. ** Even after vowing to protect essential services like SNAP and Medicaid, New York Republicans once again caved to Donald Trump and sold out their own constituents. I am speaking out to make sure that every New York Republican knows that we are not fooled by their lies. They are accountable to their constituents — not Donald Trump — and we must make that known by voting them out next year. No president is above the law, and no judges should fear for their safety just because they’re doing their jobs. **The _only_ way to hold Trump accountable and put an end to this corruption is to win back New York and the House of Representatives for Democrats in 2026. name: Haley Stevens
subject: Trump officially endorsed my opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Trump knows how important MI is to the Senate

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=533%2E49239%2EkeOlZ6)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4410?t=2&akid=533%2E49239%2EkeOlZ6)
---
null, it’s Haley Stevens.
It’s official: **Donald Trump has officially endorsed my opponent, MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, in Michigan’s battleground Senate race.**
This isn’t a surprise – Rogers has spent years kissing up to Trump. MAGA megadonors even spent nearly $80 million last year trying to buy a Senate seat for Rogers. And now with Trump’s backing, we know what’s coming: a flood of GOP dark money and billionaire-funded attacks.
**We can fight back, but I need your help.** The deadline to hit our critical $100,000 mid-month fundraising goal is right around the corner, and we need the resources: _[**Will you rush $5 to help me compete against Rogers’ war chest and keep Michigan blue?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4411?t=3&akid=533%2E49239%2EkeOlZ6)_
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4412?t=4&akid=533%2E49239%2EkeOlZ6)
---
null, keeping Mike Rogers out of the Senate isn’t just about our race in Michigan. It’s about flipping the Senate blue and stopping another MAGA loyalist from rubber-stamping Trump’s chaos agenda: gutting Medicaid, raising prices with reckless tariffs, and forcing working families to pay for tax cuts for billionaires.
I’ve spent my career fighting for Michigan – from helping save 200,000 auto jobs during the Great Recession to flipping a red House seat blue and delivering real results for working people. I’m in this race because Michiganders deserve a senator who fights for them, not someone who takes orders from Donald Trump.
**Here's the truth: Polling shows****I’m the Democrat with the best chance to beat Rogers.** GOP operatives even told _The Hill_ __ that __ I’m their **_toughest_** general election opponent. But to keep this lead – and win – I cannot miss this $100,000 mid-month fundraising goal.
**[I’m personally asking, null: Will you chip in $5 before midnight to help us reach our goal, keep Michigan blue, and defeat Trump’s handpicked candidate?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4411?t=5&akid=533%2E49239%2EkeOlZ6)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4413?t=6&akid=533%2E49239%2EkeOlZ6)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4414?t=7&akid=533%2E49239%2EkeOlZ6)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4415?t=8&akid=533%2E49239%2EkeOlZ6)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4412?t=9&akid=533%2E49239%2EkeOlZ6)
---
Thanks for standing with me.

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4416?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=533%2E49239%2EkeOlZ6) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4410?t=11&akid=533%2E49239%2EkeOlZ6)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

Wow, she **WENT THERE**...
Nampa Mayor Debbie Kling [last night](https://substack.com/redirect/a2c9a0ce-4b7f-4625-8c22-5f43aa19b637?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) pulled the "you're not a real Idahoan because you haven't been here long enough" card...
Ironically, Debbie was born & raised in **Olathe, Kansas**.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f503a55c-0e68-4c20-9e96-6aac49425a9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This garbage nativist ploy didn't work in the 2022 elections, didn't work in the 2024 elections, and certainly won't work now.

name: Fariba Ansari
subject: I want to tell you a little bit about my daughter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
I’m so proud of Yassamin |
---
Hi Peter — It's Yassamin's mom, Fariba. I want to tell you a little bit about my daughter, Yassamin. [**Then, I hope you’ll consider pitching in to support her work in Washington.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113187115/562932513/2050919713?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250812_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWQ3ZTRmNi05NDc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=36EZarZJ6KvLB50haqMoawZ4LRttx7gmnTo1GyULDcs=) | [PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113187117/562932516/2050919713?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250812_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWQ3ZTRmNi05NDc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=36EZarZJ6KvLB50haqMoawZ4LRttx7gmnTo1GyULDcs=)
---
When I came to this country, I was still in high school. I fled the Islamic Republic of Iran alone and ended up thousands of miles away from my family and my home. Settling here, in a new country halfway around the world, I could have never imagined that one day my daughter would be the youngest woman serving in Congress.
**But that's Yassamin.** She's never been limited by what others imagine is possible.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113187118/562932517/1302243248?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250812_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWQ3ZTRmNi05NDc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=36EZarZJ6KvLB50haqMoawZ4LRttx7gmnTo1GyULDcs=)
In elementary school, Yassamin was so drawn to public service that she created an “unofficial student government” and would host meetings during recess... and then she _personally_ lobbied the principal until a formal student government was established the following year. She’s relentless.
In high school, she was one of the youngest organizers with the Arizona Democratic Party in our community. From her time at Stanford to her work as a senior climate policy advisor at the United Nations, Yassamin's always been a trailblazer.
So when Yassamin was elected to the Phoenix City Council in 2021 — becoming the youngest woman ever elected to the position and the first Iranian-American elected to public office in Arizona —**I can't say I was surprised.**
I knew Yassamin would do what she's always done: build coalitions, listen to real people, do her research, and fight for what's right. And that's exactly what she did.
Yassamin has never stopped working for affordable housing and healthcare, climate action, economic opportunities, and a better future for all of us. And now, in Washington, she’s fighting for everyday people and holding this administration accountable and standing up to big corporations that are hurting communities everywhere. I'm so proud to call her my daughter.
**[Peter, it would mean the world to have your support for the work she’s doing. clean_body: I’m so proud of Yassamin | Hi Peter — It's Yassamin's mom, Fariba. I want to tell you a little bit about my daughter, Yassamin. = | = When I came to this country, I was still in high school. I fled the Islamic Republic of Iran alone and ended up thousands of miles away from my family and my home. Settling here, in a new country halfway around the world, I could have never imagined that one day my daughter would be the youngest woman serving in Congress. But that's Yassamin. She's never been limited by what others imagine is possible. = In elementary school, Yassamin was so drawn to public service that she created an “unofficial student government” and would host meetings during recess... and then she personally lobbied the principal until a formal student government was established the following year. She’s relentless. In high school, she was one of the youngest organizers with the Arizona Democratic Party in our community. From her time at Stanford to her work as a senior climate policy advisor at the United Nations, Yassamin's always been a trailblazer. So when Yassamin was elected to the Phoenix City Council in 2021 — becoming the youngest woman ever elected to the position and the first Iranian-American elected to public office in Arizona —I can't say I was surprised. I knew Yassamin would do what she's always done: build coalitions, listen to real people, do her research, and fight for what's right. And that's exactly what she did. Yassamin has never stopped working for affordable housing and healthcare, climate action, economic opportunities, and a better future for all of us. And now, in Washington, she’s fighting for everyday people and holding this administration accountable and standing up to big corporations that are hurting communities everywhere. I'm so proud to call her my daughter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks, Fariba Ansari Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

body:
Van Orden is serving billionaires and party bosses — not the people who sent him to Congress. |

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113187014/562932388/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE823_20250812_VanOrdenRS_PL&sourceid=1056797&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjllMjE4MC05NDc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ojr8EjNgYE6jtbhWY7vdQC7zW3WYIIj99g-2eD-nKQY=) Peter, **Rebecca Cooke (WI-03)** is ready to flip Wisconsin's 3rd Congressional District and hold Rep. Derrick Van Orden accountable for his broken promises.

This is one of the most competitive House seats in the country, and it's going to be essential to taking back the Democratic majority in 2026. That's why we're all in — and why we're asking:

****[**Peter, will you chip in today to help elect Democratic pro-choice women like Rebecca and fight back against Republican extremism?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113187015/562932397/-877057620?refcode=WUEFE823_20250812_VanOrdenRS_PL&sourceid=1056797&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjllMjE4MC05NDc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ojr8EjNgYE6jtbhWY7vdQC7zW3WYIIj99g-2eD-nKQY=)**** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113187018/562932406/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE823_20250812_VanOrdenRS_PL&sourceid=1056797&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjllMjE4MC05NDc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ojr8EjNgYE6jtbhWY7vdQC7zW3WYIIj99g-2eD-nKQY=)

Van Orden loves to talk about being raised by a single mom on food stamps. He says that experience shaped his values. But in Congress, his record tells a different story.

He voted for a Republican budget plan that would slash nearly **$300 billion** from the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), the program formerly known as food stamps. This budget will rip food assistance away from over 114,000 veterans, seniors, and other people in Wisconsin who, _just like Derrick Van Orden's own mom_ , couldn't make ends meet without it.

**This is the worst kind of politics: Say one thing back home, vote the other way in D.C., and leave the people who elected you behind. Van Orden is siding with billionaires over Wisconsinites — and we're calling it out.**

**_Rebecca Cooke is the real deal._ **Raised on a dairy farm in Eau Claire, she knows what rural communities are up against, because she comes from one. She's running to fight for families just like hers, and she's ready to win.

If we flip WI-03, we're one step closer to taking back the House. And that starts with all of us showing up right now.
****[**Pitch in today to help elect Democratic pro-choice women who can take back the U.S. House:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113187020/562932414/-877057620?refcode=WUEFE823_20250812_VanOrdenRS_PL&sourceid=1056797&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjllMjE4MC05NDc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ojr8EjNgYE6jtbhWY7vdQC7zW3WYIIj99g-2eD-nKQY=)****

clean_body: Van Orden is serving billionaires and party bosses — not the people who sent him to Congress. | = Peter, Rebecca Cooke (WI-03) is ready to flip Wisconsin's 3rd Congressional District and hold Rep. Derrick Van Orden accountable for his broken promises. This is one of the most competitive House seats in the country, and it's going to be essential to taking back the Democratic majority in 2026. That's why we're all in — and why we're asking: **= | = Van Orden loves to talk about being raised by a single mom on food stamps. He says that experience shaped his values. But in Congress, his record tells a different story. He voted for a Republican budget plan that would slash nearly $300 billion from the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), the program formerly known as food stamps. This budget will rip food assistance away from over 114,000 veterans, seniors, and other people in Wisconsin who, just like Derrick Van Orden's own mom , couldn't make ends meet without it. This is the worst kind of politics: Say one thing back home, vote the other way in D.C., and leave the people who elected you behind. Van Orden is siding with billionaires over Wisconsinites — and we're calling it out. Rebecca Cooke is the real deal. Raised on a dairy farm in Eau Claire, she knows what rural communities are up against, because she comes from one. She's running to fight for families just like hers, and she's ready to win. If we flip WI-03, we're one step closer to taking back the House. And that starts with all of us showing up right now. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. Hello Peter,

Fraud is running rampant in Minnesota—and the people paying the price are you, your family, and every hardworking taxpayer in our state.

From massive scams in state agencies to wasteful programs with little to no oversight, millions of your tax dollars have vanished into thin air. Meanwhile, Governor Tim Walz shrugs it off and pretends it’s just the cost of doing business.

This is not the Minnesota I know. We are a state built on hard work, honesty, and accountability—not corruption and cover-ups.

**As Governor, I will:
**✅ Root out fraud in every corner of state government
✅ Create a state Inspector General empowered to crack down on fraud early.
✅ Protect YOUR tax dollars from waste and abuse

But I can’t do it alone. The political establishment and their allies in the media will do everything they can to silence us. That’s why I’m asking for your immediate help.

Chip in $25, $50, $100—or whatever you can—to fuel this fight. Together, we can clean house in St. Paul and restore integrity to our government.

name: Anika R. Page
subject: Press Release: Come & Have Lunch with a Lord!: Lord Daniel Hannan Speaking in Mississippi about “The Anglosphere Alternative”.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/hannaneventpr-12849689?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
August 12, 2025
**Come & Have Lunch with a Lord!: **Lord Daniel Hannan Speaking in Mississippi about “The Anglosphere Alternative”.
##
---
|
---
**_Lord Daniel Hannan at River Hills, Jackson, Mississippi._**
| **You are invited to have lunch with Lord Daniel Hannan, a renowned conservative thinker, author, and one of the key architects of Brexit. He will be speaking in Jackson, Mississippi on September 24, 2025, from 11:30 AM at River Hills Club in Jackson, Mississippi.**

For decades, America has been expected to lead the world and pay for the privilege. Many Americans have had enough of being taken advantage of. Lord Hannan will discuss how the U.S. can lead the world without having to pay for everything.

Lord Hannan will share his vision of what he calls “the Anglosphere alternative”, an alliance of English-speaking nations led by the United States, rooted in shared values of liberty, free markets, and self-governance.

Drawing on his extensive experience as a leading voice in the Brexit movement, Hannan will explore how the U.S. can assert global influence through cooperation with like-minded nations while avoiding the burdens of overreach.

A prolific author, Lord Hannan has inspired readers worldwide with works such as _The New Road to Serfdom_ and _Inventing Freedom: How the English-Speaking Peoples Made the Modern World_. His emphasize the unique role of the U.S. in promoting liberty and prosperity. As a key figure in securing the United Kingdom’s exit from the European Union, Hannan’s insights carry unmatched authority on issues of national sovereignty and global cooperation.

After speaking in Jackson, Hannan will be travelling to speak at Oxford, Mississippi and elsewhere, too.

Hosted by Mississippi’s free market think tank, the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, the lunch time event in Jackson will include a served lunch. Spaces are limited, and early registration is encouraged. Tickets are available now at [https://mspolicy.org/event/](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f720fc5ee2&e=5703353baa).

**Event Details:**
* **What** : A Conversation with Lord Daniel Hannan: The Anglosphere Alternative
* **When** : Wednesday, September 24, 2025, 11:30 AM – 1:00 PM
* **Where** : River Hills Club, 3600 Ridgewood Road, Jackson, MS 39211
* **Tickets** : Available at [https://mspolicy.org/event/](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=949885e254&e=5703353baa)
* **Host** : Mississippi Center for Public Policy

**About the Mississippi Center for Public Policy**
The Mississippi Center for Public Policy is an award-winning think tank dedicated to promoting individual liberty, low taxes, and light regulation. Through research and advocacy, we turn great ideas into powerful policy solutions that make a meaningful difference in Mississippi.

**About Lord Daniel Hannan**
Lord Daniel Hannan is a member of the United Kingdom’s House of Lords, a bestselling author, and a globally recognized advocate for liberty and free markets. As a leading architect of Brexit, he played a pivotal role in restoring national sovereignty to the UK. His work celebrates the principles of American exceptionalism and the shared heritage of the Anglosphere, making him a sought-after speaker on both sides of the Atlantic.
---
| **About the Mississippi Center for Public Policy:**
MCPP is Mississippi’s independent, conservative think tank dedicated to promoting free markets, limited government, and strong families. Learn more at [www.mspolicy.org](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=5d3548afe5&e=5703353baa).
---
| **_For questions or inquires, please contact_** _**Anika R. Page at office@mspolicy.org or 601-850-9317. **_
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2025 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=aec10be778) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=aec10be778).

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: PA hospitals face surprising challenges
body:
Dr. Frank Speidel | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **Predatory finance meets magical thinking at Crozer-Chester — and patients lose**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=679546ed1b&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| ''...**There seems to be a pattern**. A private equity investment (PE) firm acquires an asset, a healthcare system, worth hundreds of millions. The PE then refinances the asset in the magnitude of billions allowing the PE to reward itself in order of hundreds of millions. The asset, the healthcare system, burdened by the debt and debt service and having burned through pension funding and other obligations such as unsecured creditors, files for bankruptcy.

What can we do?

First, we need to understand how we got there. Private equity may be a convenient bogeyman to blame, **but there is more to the story**."
---
| [Read Article Here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=63647a3f2e&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read Article Here")
---
|
---
|
## About Dr. Frank Speidel:
---

clean_body: Dr. Frank Speidel | B+L Featured Columnist | | | | | | | | Predatory finance meets magical thinking at Crozer-Chester — and patients lose | | ''...There seems to be a pattern. A private equity investment (PE) firm acquires an asset, a healthcare system, worth hundreds of millions. The PE then refinances the asset in the magnitude of billions allowing the PE to reward itself in order of hundreds of millions. The asset, the healthcare system, burdened by the debt and debt service and having burned through pension funding and other obligations such as unsecured creditors, files for bankruptcy. What can we do? First, we need to understand how we got there. Private equity may be a convenient bogeyman to blame, but there is more to the story." | "Read Article Here" | | About Dr. Frank Speidel: | | Frank Speidel, MD, is a retired emergency physician, US Navy Flight Surgeon and former hospital CEO. He was EMS Medical Director for the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania and Chester County. Ramirez is a member of the House Homeland Security Committee and she said, “I’m a Guatemalan with much pride before I’m an American.” | | Remember when we successfully fought to remove Ilan Omar from the House Foreign Relations Committee for her anti-American and anti-Semitic statements? Friend, that’s why I need your help again. | First things first, if Delia Ramirez’s allegiance is to Guatemala before America, she can’t be a member of the Homeland Security Committee. name: Adam Schiff
subject: How we stop Trump -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, Adam Schiff here. It's my honor to serve as California's newest Senator and one of your DSCC Vice Chairs, fighting to flip the Senate blue.

**[In a moment, I'm going to tell you why we _must_ take back the Senate majority to stop Trump's agenda. But first, I need to ask: Will you donate $5 to the DSCC to make it happen?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21879?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250812-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250812-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20974%2E9716520%2E3rgEN1)**

Let me make this as plain as possible: **Donald Trump isn't fit to lead.**

We see it in his actions every day. Pardoning January 6th defendants on his first day in office, cutting Medicaid to pay for massive tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans, attempting to end birthright citizenship, turning his back on our allies -- **if you invented a fictional politician hellbent on harming our country, they would look exactly like Donald Trump.**

But how have Senate Republicans responded to this shocking display? With shrugs, and -- more importantly -- _votes_ to let Donald Trump have his way with our government.

**And that is exactly why we _must_ take back the Senate: Republicans will _never_ stand up to Trump, so if _anyone_ is going to stop this madness and hold him accountable, the responsibility falls to Democrats like us.**

**[DSCC leadership, myself included, is counting on this team to raise $50,000 by midnight to keep our plan to flip the Senate on track._Nothing_ could be more important in these early days. So let me personally ask you -- will you rush $5 or more immediately to help fight for a Democratic majority? >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21879?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250812-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250812-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20974%2E9716520%2E3rgEN1)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: Navy Seal Adam Schwarze
subject: She called him a "wannabe Hitler"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
This woman may not technically speak for the Democrat Party, but she has captured the essence of what her fellow members of Congress believe. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=34c7bb05a5274314b5fa853e683cc3a2&_e=GNbRLusu7tKi00igefjJsUmQP2cZV_LTI_asLliurTjvw3U4bX8FtutgmBEzitMtPTKhrsv7Y1BHTS7k7SHmC6NW8FhJydUHQDAg5S5Lgue0lea-4T0ealVCXgzfyxw9Henn-lyQ1LR4FRdLFOeKiTWInVtUvPf6eThcONr19BbtLH7iKOWhfxcTMGOfP8PFoN5PLnjb9hVz-twp06C7Ej5Ppq5OPl81GsKTE_lStKiH6fVjX2gDTChgaOgXt9CpaygvN0uMNFUWqFesLBHijQlerBGWJfy9BJg8Kq_OXWPeClpEbOzS1JvpVKscIdZnJNGio2acLjbZn1E1UD_sCDiL6djw1HZv-JsRUcu1hMDfSZJE1DqXffhj-2Rsl95oFf30m30UXpPKQrVgZ2UQF_2a_DGx8cuYV7izI1TbFIqrASVO_LKwGO8YBsN8F1-id0hz9kjg-awIsNQQV5JfiUmScBu7HmFb_x-I8TilSnco_QjqLGTFdZmh5kx-NFK--lO_Gs-uMy7PkPy_0CcUlH2RhXMh1a6OELaWUjcgaOrVQcITHSx9HclOrpc4TwDCvt898mksLMnIgcwgX63yJiEPPoizSSGs4AtSm0eYqfXXVVW0DR53tKbT3Wol0S_C568_vNKZK6KE3DuWfib_hVOVfbVCSQfLN6M6qxC0qL8QC2B3XXBz57iiowsXE9qVC756nst0gK2T4R-btxGS9gvpT_BANjb-jzhA2qzhw9xOwqceWf9uOFQisFMIEaPC)

---
Fellow Conservative,

_**“Asshole. Buffoon. Mofo. Wannabe Hitler. Gangster. Vile villain.”**_

Those are just a few words Rep. Jasmine Crockett used to describe President Trump. But let’s be honest: those insults aren’t just about him. They’re about you. About me. About anyone who leans conservative, wears a uniform, or believes in this country’s founding values.

They think we’re backward. They believe we are in the way. And worst of all, they think we’ll take it.

**As a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran, I’ve faced far worse than name-calling. I’ve deployed to over 70 countries. I’ve led warriors into battle. I’ve endured life-threatening missions.** And the most important lesson I’ve learned? Quiet professionalism always wins the day.

_[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=34c7bb05a5274314b5fa853e683cc3a2&_e=GNbRLusu7tKi00igefjJsUmQP2cZV_LTI_asLliurTjvw3U4bX8FtutgmBEzitMtPTKhrsv7Y1BHTS7k7SHmC6NW8FhJydUHQDAg5S5Lgue0lea-4T0ealVCXgzfyxw9Henn-lyQ1LR4FRdLFOeKiTWInVtUvPf6eThcONr19BbtLH7iKOWhfxcTMGOfP8PFoN5PLnjb9hVz-twp06C7Ej5Ppq5OPl81GsKTE_lStKiH6fVjX2gDTChgaOgXt9CpaygvN0uMNFUWqFesLBHijUdndLq4rtAFooz3OpduWjj2C2jDsuve20fyANMwbYa4u4rbkVwkEIKUIibjV5LIUoAqjckgvr4z-eQgA1M2i1Nw_WP1QuF-dSCBdRiotTlI-2r6BSNesxOCc4FvQ17CE8tqbImhiVbhTIwjRtMfEnuLgL63kbPSMQEzTQdELDOhfVGrCz2RxnR-Xrc14PwiQUPROkw02Y7mNKrQypc65gbvSJtylhz9sxD4KeHYuoodphMj3PBiI_6tZwQP5sGZUBCNmgVI93vawplIq9G6uc-ykBu3EYkSOlJ3PY68GnPXqVFcv-prNuIeB0dJ3MjRY6J3UwGKFL5K1Rv79wG5KueyB50CEfH85gh6INFILKBOyQWZ_rxnvSwJWCk3isvoWJWM_UYlDiezp1mhiQT4HvJsazyCPyYiyCTr-xwklQ7tKHtB2-ZBarNoI88-YoUYu06atzZlQbsu83tAsugSJtQ4IIQb2JwivoQ7L8L4WtfD)_
That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — not to yell or mock, but to**fight with discipline, humility, and relentless purpose.**

I didn’t plan on entering politics. But the more I came home from deployment, the more I saw a Minnesota I didn’t recognize. Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor — the person I’m running against — isn’t just radically out of step with our values; she embodies the same hard-left extremism that’s trying to rewrite our entire society.

While Walz called for calm in 2020, she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police. As crime soared and businesses burned, she blamed the people trying to hold the line. These are the people in charge now — and they’re not moderating.

**You can close this email and forget my name. Or you can help send the second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone trained for chaos, unafraid of the fight, and grounded in service, not ego. **

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zve7d7k2912d3bp45nubqan32v8t51fj063peqg0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1h69pr2cdh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdt3ioha8i19o7vs3nqmdtrti1hi3jgafosoqrm0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1h69pr2cdh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2dqrg4b1h6mdebd3lcqivvrsqucso367psd5gc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1h69pr2cdh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zihnc10bbcl1o8lk4ocndr6pncvdjuoui7kokar8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1h69pr2cdh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqjrkkcruj9b9h1tr70fri6gvg3qc4l8h8jkf4vo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c1h69pr2cdh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.

Sincerely,

clean_body: Please – for the sake of all our families | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue’s Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you’ve seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. name: Chris Ahuja
subject: Authoritarianism Thrives in Silence, We Won’t Be Silent
body:
Trump's "occupy and control" stops here

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=561ec3c02a&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | [Donate](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=e7f7e3c812&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| Dear Peter,**On August 11, 2025 President Trump formally announced the federal takeover of D.C.’s Metropolitan Police Department.** He deployed 800 National Guard troops and placed Attorney General Pam Bondi in charge of DC’s police force.**** The justification was “a public safety emergency” despite violent crime in D.C. being at a 30-year low.Flanked by his Secretary of Defense, Trump spoke of “roving mobs” in DC and postured about “taking our capital back.” He hinted about Chicago, New York, and other Democratic-led cities being targeted next. The White House is using Los Angeles and now DC as test cases to see how far they can go in seizing power from local leaders, defying democracy, and rolling back civil rights and civil liberties. All in the guise of chasing down violent criminals. The people of Los Angeles stand in solidarity with DC and in defense of our democracy. We recognize this authoritarian blueprint: militarize, federalize, suppress, control. **I am running for Congress because this is exactly the kind of abuse of power that must be stopped.** Public safety is built by communities, not imposed by military force. We must defend democracy in every corner of America and make sure civil liberties aren’t just preserved in courtrooms, but in the streets where people live.**Despite what the Trump administration wants you to think, we’re making progress here in L.A. and around the country. We are pushing back on this racist, classist control, and we are gaining ground.** Please make an urgent contribution now to help me stand with DC and other major U.S. cities under threat [**Chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can to help me fight for the rights and freedoms that Trump is trying to trample.**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=8b5af4178e&e=5a6ee82cdb) Join the movement in defense of our democracy. **Together, we can make sure this blueprint never becomes the law of the land.**

**In solidarity,****
**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=53b5f99f6c&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Chris Ahuja**
**Democrat for Congress, CD-32**

---
| | | | | | | | [ View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/chrisahuja/ahuja-statement-on-occupied-dc?e=5a6ee82cdb)
Christopher Ahuja for Congress * 21255 Burbank Blvd Ste 120 * Woodland Hills, CA 91367-6669 * USA

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: The GOP thinks they can ignore us
body:
It has to be America First, No Compromises!
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e21929027/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvUm1ObmZkUmRWZA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTI/LbmNsbDRHRmR5cA/qP2hpZHM9bmN2UjRTZThLc0JRejBscw/gaJtrPA/s8n329ce39b)

Patriot, this makes me sad to say, but I have to tell you the truth.****
****
******The Republican Party is turning its back on YOU - on US!**
They’re ignoring the America First movement that President Trump and I have fought for tooth and nail. It’s clear as day that the GOP has lost its spine, and I’m done with their weak, sellout ways.

It’s the GOP that keeps sending BILLIONS to foreign countries while OUR families are crushed by inflation. All while they’re dragging their feet on slashing government waste through DOGE, tackling our $34 TRILLION debt, and exposing the truth in the Epstein files. ****
**The GOP might be leaving me, but I’ll never leave YOU. Together, we can take back our party and our country.**
I’m not here to play nice with the DC swamp. I’m here to FIGHT for YOU. But I need your help to keep the heat on these spineless RINOs.
**_[Will you stand with me and chip in $25, $50, $100, or even $250 right now to send a message](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_?**
[STAND WITH MTG](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
I’m loyal to President Trump and his America First vision, but the GOP establishment is trying to sabotage us. They don’t get it - YOU do. Your donation today fuels our battle to stop foreign aid, cut bloated budgets, fix the economy, and demand transparency. **__**
**_[Patriot, let’s show the good ole boys in the Uniparty that we’re not backing down](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_!**
_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

They’re ignoring the America First movement that President Trump and I have fought for tooth and nail. It’s clear as day that the GOP has lost its spine, and I’m done with their weak, sellout ways. It’s the GOP that keeps sending BILLIONS to foreign countries while OUR families are crushed by inflation. All while they’re dragging their feet on slashing government waste through DOGE, tackling our $34 TRILLION debt, and exposing the truth in the Epstein files. ** The GOP might be leaving me, but I’ll never leave YOU. Together, we can take back our party and our country. I’m not here to play nice with the DC swamp. I’m here to FIGHT for YOU. But I need your help to keep the heat on these spineless RINOs. ? I’m loyal to President Trump and his America First vision, but the GOP establishment is trying to sabotage us. They don’t get it - YOU do. Your donation today fuels our battle to stop foreign aid, cut bloated budgets, fix the economy, and demand transparency. ! Your fellow patriot, Marjorie Taylor Greene . _
