There is a constitutional crisis, but it's not what CNN thinks it is.

**The far-Left wants the current administration to obey the dictates of federal district court judges rather than the will of a majority of the American people.**

But do federal judges control the executive branch? Does the judicial branch have the final say in determining what is or is not constitutional?

Because the far-Left has undermined informed patriotism by promoting a distorted view of our nation's history and Constitution--including the judicial branch--many Americans do not know the answers to these questions.

That's why your participation in Hillsdale College's [**National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/upnMIwlKjYpoCofE4QCkWpvOOpuf0LcOQ25iy-NVwF7wFvgqpF9OYVS0Nlk4iF-voWKjQ3XbDZ3y66DBcboosEUyefwBa9rZinctoXjnT4XA0KoF294rJWXLj9Y08jhFPttQwgjYNzoPC15EHFPWE0DLfENwjXRGvyy2j3gI_xtghymEEB6b4JnZqb_LjR06OkAvciXkFPBdnxW8zAsyj7difwKhzpUQRTHjOUVKIu1PZyQ3x3lmJUjRpNyGChCfECpcJl2EFtN5E6L7IvCmaGYOcFtQSgCkl-Imw4y7bifMWFNaRVSkricrY4ZKqvQjSaH9AygYBaO3bA-tDrFFFIDb_VWiKw47z__oGFbDFgfIukUfRNEgurC85k5cJ2PtB6Fd2YVdzTjzLwkKHa0RLFJyGJiUAwA3ve3Hsj8dEwaFXAWPBU1-Rt3Y_X5SYfvxXrtUy_1ENpnB28g9HXmtD59okQ-yparkYTbnwU2BowRIY96lCyNcFzTi42MBqGyaFMJZvoXHpw0acr0gAnH8poySR9kUE1mQLSSgf2uQmQgJwFilrNQsxla9s9cm12gZZZ35Y54kKP2OWvrhhu8zhJjQhPp2yHvPlmv5uvJuv9_2vcExmMVqWjQzNhIrcpzwPnILyd07nyTizT7NTJqB7aNgs7FRMev2SZ-baX1Q17g6K_GwtpiClo1-vcOX3lpoIqecO3Ux-uzWXWXaOzH8c1UZPfruDP8hh-IOcbBmLQ6ucLZeOF-_wMW7z_xA-9OohEGEZMijgY416qnVaXMU/IB9-ZIBG3deTn6wrvXbfTMlz1VnbVK-R/11) is urgently requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America.

You will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** using this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-the-us-judicial-branch**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/doL1ISF89opqWTaLrWg-_JgyKLcgB4ag_17whmZOhttMCmy031nGsGvhLPlKW9PYRz9iRhZhfI51CEFxhd5eKBK9Ha1l7yRIV3c_5U_UMi1qyKeB7ubcVIJQTHrUeHPNrm5ja_ijv_9NM2eWvaZMPlgoaXwQqNFl9S1DnxmX8_J9ksyoPT6NGf0Lh9NMaZeafvfDE3VD0MpJG6CgAeAA3Mk-EAqAUBJTy2E44YmHQhtAdCo77861TLVJnyXALBEZkliKMa0bi834F8Y7Jx7lhAu8t-rdnmTXHABQLaqPgZKkk1RMobHH0CyXrs15EKWzhdtxI1Ttl62m48G2USilLUPFCoNuSIKumBoMxNhQM_V-FRP8JZ-hdsWGhz9uRswZqpjD252YrCruXQwpleWvQuTRMz1uh44nxp45dc97tmTf4muf5dSSno02XsDZ8EWBq1z05Ta6hvM2flzWnmBqQsTmXwaPxW6dpFJAci3rikdBV9tzOiha-HcUiJkzWjEWD2E-r9l9VxEfhtGUVsFa8hHJaGyWKJv_6zCRbILiwv5Ehg4nn-avb2k3vcav2ZCMzUhEYmqy646g2HXTqcOmtFTLTR2xyBd4XohhNZ4aO9QpGiM4w855vkI9T4KS0qUbbYfR66nKPis6jAz2kJVJlGK6MK3-sk3SebTDTqCu2HCQF-tGwiM-BPG71eRe2T4JzbTyrRR3ZUQrmW5jweflspoZD5OV73YSLQdJMwvri08ILv6BNKBz8-Tr3T6bylhtaEoHD_WxvtO6wb0fTRde/0Nzcow62JlP6aClSL0GubzAJiyALVHbE/11)

If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Dear Friend, CNN claims, "There are warnings that the U.S. is dangerously close to a constitutional crisis." There is a constitutional crisis, but it's not what CNN thinks it is. The far-Left wants the current administration to obey the dictates of federal district court judges rather than the will of a majority of the American people. But do federal judges control the executive branch? Does the judicial branch have the final say in determining what is or is not constitutional? Because the far-Left has undermined informed patriotism by promoting a distorted view of our nation's history and Constitution--including the judicial branch--many Americans do not know the answers to these questions. That's why your participation in Hillsdale College's is urgently requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America. You will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government. You can easily complete your National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch using this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention--and for joining us in the defense of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | .

name: Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: Republicans are dodging accountability. We won’t let them.

body:
Instead of answering to voters, they’re hiding from them. |
#
---
Reps. John James and Tom Barrett — two Republicans who won close races in Michigan last year — haven’t held a single town hall during the August recess to face their constituents after voting to gut Medicaid and slash food assistance for millions of Americans. We don’t need them to explain why. They know _exactly_ how much damage their votes will cause. The bill that they proudly voted for kicks thousands of Michiganders off Medicaid, threatens rural hospitals with closure, and slashes SNAP benefits families rely on — all to pay for tax cuts for the rich. And get this: Instead of facing his constituents, **John James attended a fundraiser with the DeVos family, the very same people who stand to benefit the most from his vote.** **[We’re up against a billionaire-backed political machine doing everything it can to flip our state red. name: Suzanne Beecher
subject: The Supreme Court will hear their case. Will you help protect women’s sports?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206vyfennzfvz7e3k3tdyr5l146b3d3g4bto0leziswgdnrmaa8h0yznhaxfko1y3nognyagez6k33q1dtv&__stmp=t0w3d6&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0w3d6&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1fvcdwc1ss6gocqry0eazlymnkgksq9fek007pzjxjc0koy3fz4u21e7z5fk0yr796b8ss1pl5n22po2k652f76wd7i87263oqura3auccq363h6v1tb249rzgqkrs560uvnddb7jv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0w3d6&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0w3d6&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0w3d6&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0w3d6&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1fvcdwc1ss6gocqry0eazlymnkgksq9fek007pzjxjc0koy3fz4u21e7z5fk0yr796b8ss1pl5n22po2k652f76wd7i87263oqura3auccq363h6v1tb249rzgqkrs560uvnddb7jv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0w3d6&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0w3d6&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Unleash ICE to the full extent of the law President Trump has closed the Southern Border, but we still have most of the 8 million Biden Border Crashers (and at least 15-17 MILLION illegal aliens total)...costing taxpayers an estimated $150 BILLION dollars a year.Our hospitals are overcrowded, our public services are overextended, and millions of Americans have been replaced by illegal workers. name: Wes Moore
subject: Let me be frank about myself
body:
Your support means I can be authentic.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=447%2E1086043%2EwFS1Pp)
Did you know that this is the first office I have ever been elected to?
Peter, to be frank, I’m still more comfortable in cargo shorts than a suit. And while I can’t meet everyone who **[donates to this campaign](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250812-1?refcode=em-20250812-1&refcode2=447_1086043_wFS1Pp&akid=447%2E1086043%2EwFS1Pp)** , I wanted to share a little bit about myself with you:
🎧 I listen to Freeway and Jay-Z to get hyped up before big meetings and tough conversations.
🫢 I embarrass my kids every time I try to use their slang. (I have “no rizz.”)
⚾ I like watching the Orioles and the Ravens and cheering for Adley Rutschman and Lamar Jackson like any other Marylander.
🍝 And on the weekends I love cooking for my family. I’ll even share some table scraps with our dog, Tucker, even though my wife Dawn tells me not to.
I share all of this because our movement is powered by folks giving $5, $10, and $25 at a time. Your support means I can be the authentic leader that Maryland deserves, not the politician special interests want me to be.
**[So Peter, will you chip in today? I know how valuable your time, your energy, and your dollars are, so I’m extremely grateful for every single supporter who steps up. Here’s a custom link so I know it’s coming from you:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250812-1?refcode=em-20250812-1&refcode2=447_1086043_wFS1Pp&akid=447%2E1086043%2EwFS1Pp)**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250812-1?refcode=em-20250812-1-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250812-1?refcode=em-20250812-1&refcode2=447_1086043_wFS1Pp&akid=447%2E1086043%2EwFS1Pp)**
Since day one, grassroots support has been key to everything we do. So truly, thank you.
Elevate,
Wes
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250812-1&t=5&refcode2=447_1086043_wFS1Pp&akid=447%2E1086043%2EwFS1Pp)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=447%2E1086043%2EwFS1Pp)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=447%2E1086043%2EwFS1Pp)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: Join me TODAY in Cowpens at 4pm
body:
New podcast out tomorrow🎧

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cb6f08484fa9/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6420831?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate. [**Consider a contribution to my County Council Campaign, special election Nov 4, 2025.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b338359764&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
### Next up on the podcast: The tools in our toolbox
### How southern states are fighting back
### (launching Wednesday at noon)
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=5e656f86c0&e=edbde6c9b1)
| |
---
| [Listen Up Wednesday at Noon ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=bf097d0cb2&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| It’s all eyes on[**Texas right now as TX Democrats**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=421dbd1bbd&e=edbde6c9b1) fight the**** unprecedented mid-cycle redistricting that threatens their seats, and the democratic process in their state. And our neighbors in North Carolina know all too well what the impacts of drawing unfair maps can do, because it’s playing out in real time in their legislature and courts. This week I talk with the freshman Senator from Durham North Carolina, [Sophia Chitlik](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6bb98e026e&e=edbde6c9b1), about her first session, and the [blue print that NC Republicans](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d76bd72f14&e=edbde6c9b1) have executed to date, knowing other states can follow. Governor Newsom has threatened to neutralize any seats gained by Texas by gerrymandering California. This is a dangerous game we are playing at the peril of our nation.
[**Learn more about gerrymandering in SC on our Frogmore Stew Podcast**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6cd291fcc0&e=edbde6c9b1)**.**
---
|
---
|
# Meet me in Cowpens TODAY at 4pm
---
| Join me today, August 12 from 4-5pm at the Cowpens Library for a Town Hall ahead of the November 4 special election for County Council District 3.
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=005eb84e19&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [RSVP ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=1ad880f2a7&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
# Canvass with me on Sundays (it’s not 100 degrees!)
---
| Join me every Sunday for a neighborhood canvass to support my race for Spartanburg County Council! We’ll start at 3pm and you can register to volunteer at the link below.
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ec728847fa&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Volunteer Sundays at 3pm ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=4abe9c046d&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| [Contribute to Kathryn](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=49716b8164&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | | | |
# **Meet me in Greenville August 26**
---
| Join me, Councilwoman Lillian Brock Flemming, and Dr. Annie Andrews on August 26 at the Hughes Main Library in Greenville for the monthly GCDP meeting. Learn how you can get involved in building a stronger effort to elect more women up and down the ballot in the Upstate.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c25ac52b5e&e=edbde6c9b1)
|

|
---
| [**Senator Rodger Nutt resigns amid health diagnosis triggering special election for Spartanburg/Greer/Greenville seat**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6ff41a481f&e=edbde6c9b1)[**Suspended SC Rep RJ May resigns as he facing child pornography charges**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=2e091ae69f&e=edbde6c9b1)[**Lt. Gov Pamela Evette says we don’t need a hate crime bill in SC**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c45df85043&e=edbde6c9b1)[**Charleston lawyer enters Democratic race for Governor**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=80646775ea&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
# SPCDP Monthly Meeting September 8
---
| **Join us at the Spartanburg Community College Downtown Campus Theater at 220 East Kennedy Street on September 8 for our monthly meeting in our news space** as we hear from a panel of elected officials and strategists around the state on how we can strengthen our party. The remainder of our 2025 meetings will be held at this location September 8 | October 6 | November 10 | December 1.
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=267d718107&e=edbde6c9b1)
|
---
|
# SC Sister Senators at Wofford Sept 29
---
| Join us for the second installment of “Candid Conversations” an effort to bring together leadership from across the isle to foster civil discourse in today’s political climate. Hosted by the President’s Office at Wofford College, the SC Sister Senators who bridged together to fight for women’s rights in South Carolina, and were awarded the JFK Profile in Courage Award for their efforts, will join us for a special panel session and screening of their new documentary film on September 29 at 6pm at Wofford.
---
|
---
|
# Spartanburg County Sheriff Runoff Race August 19
---
|
---
| **Early voting for Spartanburg County Sheriff August 13-15** Early voting for Sheriff takes place August 13-15 at the Spartanburg County Administration Building on Church St, 8 AM to 5 PM. **Election day is August 19 at your regular polling place.**

---
| [Watch the Forum ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a09dbbef33&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
****Canvass with Kathryn Harvey every Sunday at 3pm**[**RSVP Here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=05b692a3d6&e=edbde6c9b1)****** August 12 Town Hall in Cowpens at 4pm- Cowpens Library **August 13: Stop the Violence Coalition Meeting** YMCA 151 Ribault Street 7pm Aug 13-15: Primary Election Runoff Early Voting County Admin Building Church St.**August 17: Pacolet Town Hall** **at Benjamin E Mays Family Center 6:30pm**[**RSVP Here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b1da79f8a0&e=edbde6c9b1)**August 18: SPCDP Town Hall @ Mt. Moriah Baptist Church 6:30-8pm**[**RSVP Here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=0b37135303&e=edbde6c9b1) Aug 19 Primary Election Runoff (7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m.)**August 21: Phone Bank Training (Virtual or In Person)**[**RSVP Here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f415443c48&e=edbde6c9b1)**August 26: GCDP monthly meeting at Hughes Main Library - Greenville****September 8: SPCDP Monthly meeting at SCC Downtown Campus****September 29: Evening with SC Sister Senators at Wofford College** October 21 - 31 Early Voting for the 2025 General Election 8:30 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily (Closed Saturday and Sunday), County Administration Building.**November 4: 2025 General Election (7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m.)**
---
|
---
|
---
| [While on recess, Timmons holds Telephone Town Hall, defends Trump playing golf and the Epstein files, listen up.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=1374b1d874&e=edbde6c9b1)[Lindsey Graham in Anderson and Spartanburg Tuesday](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ffb1380021&e=edbde6c9b1)[Pete Hegseth doesn’t want women to have the right to vote ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=eff5f160c2&e=edbde6c9b1)[Trump deploys National Guard to DC streets citing crime, when it’s at a 30 year low](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a1336c4379&e=edbde6c9b1)[Trump to meet Putin in special summit, Russia makes sudden advance on Ukraine](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=192c8ff84f&e=edbde6c9b1)[Five journalists are killed in Israeli airstrike on Gaza, worsening media death toll](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=1fa0cf2884&e=edbde6c9b1)[Pete Buttigieg thinks democrats can’t go back - Pod Save America ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=eddae40be5&e=edbde6c9b1)[JD Vance accidentally made a strong case for releasing the Epstein files ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e5f4e0fdd5&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| If you believe in the power of independent journalism and civic storytelling, take a few minutes today to support the stations that support you. We want you to visit [AdoptAStation.org](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b905e91f5e&e=edbde6c9b1) to find and support a public media station near you or in another community that needs it.
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=5fd3c349f4&e=edbde6c9b1)
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| This past week I attended the Business & Professional Women of Spartanburg meeting at the Clevedale Inn to talk about advocacy and community engagement on a local level. We were joined by our friends at the Women’s Rights and Empowerment Network.
We also knocked doors in the rain last week! My friends from Greenville made the trek before school started to help inform voters about the upcoming special election. And I enjoyed our monthly Miles with the Mayor walk with Mayor Jerome Rice around our Northside Community before we celebrated at the local farmers market. Democracy is a participatory experience, join me at [kathrynforcouncil.com](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3ab39b305b&e=edbde6c9b1).
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
|
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=56ff7fa3bc&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Share this with a friend, sign up for our newsletter using this link: https://bit.ly/KeepingUpWithKathrynHarvey](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=92e78ae086&e=edbde6c9b1)

subject: Use THIS to drop 2lbs (tonight)..
body:
Freeze away stubborn fat...

| | This weird **Ice-Water Hack** is going viral on TikTok. Because every woman who tries it ends up dropping 2lbs in 24 hours – with zero side-effects:
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21782/6374453/ba5ab3ac8d3bca22fcb986b4ee6cff847aaf46aa/1ebf1ccd0194ef52837a2f0e808beda95caed5ba)

A mom from NYC even lost 57lbs to slim down for a wedding, while ditching Ozempic! It’s backed by the latest Harvard studies. Plus, you can easily try it tonight. You just need water and a few ice cubes. [**> > Viral Ice-Water Hack Melts 57lbs.**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21782/6374453/c4be0904883b73df9aa865a2a0d51f7fadb80e72/1ebf1ccd0194ef52837a2f0e808beda95caed5ba)

name: Vince Fong
subject: Stop Newsom’s Power Grab — Defend Your District Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vince Fong for Congress
body:
Gavin Newsom and the Sacramento Democrats are at it again. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3ff172d052d3/thank-you-central-valley-your-support-means-the-world-17993838?e=affd398937)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

Newsom and the Sacramento Democrats are at it again—trying to rig the midterm elections by disregarding the California state constitution and redrawing the congressional district maps.

Everything that we have worked for—securing the border, supporting law enforcement, delivering on middle-class tax cuts—is at stake with what Newsom is trying to do.
---
| [Donate Now and Let's Stop Newsom's Map Grab! Click Here.](https://vincefong.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aff51e55a83c63a31f34a5f3e&id=fd997f86ac&e=affd398937 "Donate Now and Let's Stop Newsom's Map Grab! Click Here.")
---
| _"Gov. Newsom's proposed redistricting could put Valley Republican seats at risk” - ABC30_
* * *
_“California Republicans Rally Against Governor Newsom’s Redistricting Power Grab” - Sierra Daily News_
* * *

Make no mistake—with Newsom’s gerrymander, our Central Valley communities will end up represented by liberal elites. Newsom is shredding the constitution to silence the representation of those who disagree with him.

Newsom is always eager to use working-class Californians for photo ops, but then he turns his back and undermines them with plots like this one. This is blatant manipulation, revenge, and self-promotion from a governor who’s more focused on running for President than on fixing the mess he’s made here at home.
---
| [Help Congressman Vince Fong Protect California](https://vincefong.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aff51e55a83c63a31f34a5f3e&id=d12f5ce4fb&e=affd398937 "Help Congressman Vince Fong Protect California")
---
| **We cannot let him get away with it.** **Will you chip in $25, $50, or even $100 to help us fight back against Newsom’s gerrymandering power grab?** This is a fight for the future of California—and for the future of our nation. If Gavin Newsom succeeds here, rest assured: other blue states will follow his lead.
---
| [Donate Now To Secure Our Elections & Keep America Great!](https://vincefong.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aff51e55a83c63a31f34a5f3e&id=b92fbffb03&e=affd398937 "Donate Now To Secure Our Elections & Keep America Great!")

Hi Peter, did you see this message from George? Trump has made a habit of turning away from the truth when it doesn't suit him. He’s defunded reliable public media like _NPR_ and _PBS_ , gone after political opponents, and now he’s trying to cover up weak economic indicators by firing the Commissioner of the Bureau of Labor Statistics. Facts are facts — **working families and small businesses are feeling the impact of Trump’s reckless policies — no matter how hard he tries to silence his critics.** [But Peter, we want to hear from you. Will you share your thoughts on how Donald Trump has handled his first seven months in office?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113192422/562951535/-1405404852?source=SBD_GL_EM_POLL_081225_ApprovalFWD_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmRmYmQ3Y2QtOWQ3Ny1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wdFPMa3erGgmpdCZ0jOW2Kga3mPNtVtCrKxM5tIyYqU=&emci=67e3f21a-cd76-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6dfbd7cd-9d77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ceid=21388742) — Team Latimer

Donald Trump just can’t accept that his policies aren’t working, but hiding the facts and silencing truth tellers won’t change the results: **Small businesses and working families are paying the price.** [I want to hear from you, Peter. Donald Trump just can’t accept that his policies aren’t working, but hiding the facts and silencing truth tellers won’t change the results: Small businesses and working families are paying the price. | — George Latimer | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

name: Andrea Salinas HQ
subject: [PETITION] Save the EPA!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
We simply can’t afford to surrender in the fight against the climate crisis.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113193654/562955669/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2U4NGZkNi05ZTc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YONrxaNOwAOkkQkZfuk8vxysHn-C7Fot-sBctAg7otY=) Team, the Trump administration is charging ahead in its mission to dismantle key regulations in the U.S, _and we just got bad news for our fight against climate change:_ **_NYT: Trump EPA moves to erase regulations on greenhouse gas emissions_** **Trump’s head of the Environmental Protection Agency announced that the EPA would revoke the scientific finding that emissions from fossil fuels contribute to climate change — _effectively ending the government’s ability to fight to combat climate change._** And worse: the EPA isn’t just giving up on fighting against climate change, they’re canceling BILLIONS of dollars in grants intended to help Americans access affordable solar energy. That makes energy prices MORE expensive for hardworking families, _not less._ This is absurd. **We simply can’t afford to surrender in the fight against the climate crisis when extreme weather events, high temperatures, and wildfires are on the rise year after year.** Ending the EPA’s regulation of greenhouse gasses will put countless lives at risk — _just to fill the pockets of Donald Trump’s billionaire friends._ **We won’t let Trump sell out our futures to the fossil fuel industry.** **[If you’re with us, please, add your name to our petition demanding the EPA do its job and protect Americans from the climate crisis. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113193655/562955670/2014647144?refcode=email_081225_epa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2U4NGZkNi05ZTc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YONrxaNOwAOkkQkZfuk8vxysHn-C7Fot-sBctAg7otY=&emci=d765bd20-8877-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=e3e84fd6-9e77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ceid=5643047)** | | **[ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113193656/562955671/2014647144?refcode=email_081225_epa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2U4NGZkNi05ZTc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YONrxaNOwAOkkQkZfuk8vxysHn-C7Fot-sBctAg7otY=&emci=d765bd20-8877-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=e3e84fd6-9e77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ceid=5643047)**
---
Thank you,
Andrea Salinas HQ

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Donald Trump’s trans military ban is back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
If you’re with me, I need your support.
#
**Donald Trump's trans military ban is back.**
Thousands of qualified, brave, and battle-tested service members have been discharged — not because they failed to meet the standards, but because they dare to live openly as transgender.
These are Americans who led troops through danger, flew missions, and earned top marks from their commanders. They served our nation with distinction, and they were forced out of our military for one reason: their truth.
**Sidelining qualified patriots for who they are is not just wrong. It's un-American. And it makes our country _less safe._ [Can you pitch in $5 to help me stand up for transgender service members and all who serve?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250812-1?refcode=em20250812-2262&amount=5&refcode2=2262_21716_o0y7Pj&akid=2262%2E21716%2Eo0y7Pj)
I know exactly what Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are trying to do here.
They want to continue to divide and distract by using trans people as political pawns.
Now, they’re weakening our military in the process.
**As the only trans member in Congress, I refuse to stay silent. And if you're with me, I need your support.[Please pitch in $5 or whatever you can now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250812-1?refcode=em20250812-2262&amount=5&refcode2=2262_21716_o0y7Pj&akid=2262%2E21716%2Eo0y7Pj)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250812-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250812-2262&refcode2=2262_21716_o0y7Pj&akid=2262%2E21716%2Eo0y7Pj)**
Thank you,
Sarah

I want to ask you to join me in making a difference for our brothers and sisters in the **Democratic Republic of the Congo**. Your immediate action will save lives! Sign the petition to **END THE SILENT GENOCIDE** taking place **RIGHT NOW** in the **Democratic Republic of Congo**. Your voice will help stop this ongoing atrocity. When you sign, you will sign with original signers like **Steve Deace** , **Eric Metaxas** , **Jentezen Franklin** , **Dr. Alveda King** , myself, and many many other prominent voices who join you in saying "**WE WILL BE SILENT NO MORE** " to 3 decades of atrocity, 8 million killed, and so many displaced. **WARNING** : When you click the button to [SIGN THE PETITION](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23848147.12412.1.2edd3d23e7daa14fb8c2aeed6ee6627c), you will see a video of a young woman, a victim from eastern DRC telling her story of experience with this silent genocide. If you watch it as well, it will move you. Your immediate action will save lives! Sign the petition to **END THE SILENT GENOCIDE** taking place **RIGHT NOW** in the **Democratic Republic of Congo**. Your voice lifted, brings us one step closer to ending this ongoing atrocity.

If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23848147.12420.1.0f93b070803e85b6ea5f2c75461e2ac3)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23848147.12421.1.2edc3050875eb0e4415d61bb2305c431)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23848147.12422.1.fd206c1ed7582eca5234c644079ad26b). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23848147.12423.1.336bd4b4ae56218fe48bdb0240e81668) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23848147.12424.1.d3e71bac75c488b4077e8fa9c606cd1d) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23848147.12425.1.7c8a139ad3228b638a2151a695f8596c) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

| | | |

|
---
| | | | |
#### e-newsletter

## AUG '25
---
|
* **Taking ‘Loneliness to Light’ on the road**
* **Standing with workers: Ending the Republic Services strike**
* **Planned Parenthood closures an assault on women’s health**
* **North County Wellness Center hits milestone**
* **Are you prepared for the next disaster?**

---
| | |
---
|
# “Stanford’s announcement that it is laying off hundreds of hardworking employees is a gut punch to our local economy and to families already struggling to make ends meet”
# **\- President David Canepa**
---
| | | | **2025 Aug e-newsletter** **Are you prepared for the next disaster?**

Dear friends,

I had the honor of welcoming thousands of residents to our 21st Annual Disaster Preparedness Day at the San Mateo County Event Center Saturday, Aug. 2. To everyone who showed up, families, volunteers, first responders, and agency partners, thank you for making this day such a powerful reminder of what community truly means.

For more than two decades, this event has brought us together around a single, life-saving idea, we are stronger when we prepare together. What began as a small outreach event has grown into a major mobilization effort with over 30 hands-on workshops in multiple languages and 60+ agency partners ready to teach, support and empower you.

>From wildfires and earthquakes to tsunamis and power outages, San Mateo County has seen its share of emergencies. But year after year, we’ve also seen that the people who were prepared — who had their go bags, their family plans, their supplies — were the ones best positioned to help others.

This isn’t about panic. It’s about practical empowerment. Whether you’re just getting started or checking expiration dates in your emergency kit, updating your plan is just as important as updating your phone.

Let’s stay ready, stay safe and keep showing up for one another.

Go to [https://abc7news.com/post/bay-area-tsunami-alert-hundreds-learn-emergency-preparedness-san-mateo-county-21st-annual-event/17409481/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=6d15750fba&e=c0babbc643) to learn more about the event. **North County Wellness Center hits milestone**

The North County Wellness Center hit a significant milestone Tuesday, Aug. 5 when the final structural beam was signed by the Board of Supervisors and placed atop the $140 million clinic site at a topping off ceremony in South San Francisco.

This is more than just a building, it’s the future hub of critical county services that will provide specialty care and, for the first time, comprehensive dental services which will provide an additional 5,500 dental visits annually.

Once complete in 2027, this Wellness Center will house the Health System, Human Services Agency, Tax Collector and the District Attorney’s Office all under one roof. That means more coordinated care, streamlined services, and a more equitable experience for the people we serve.

Whether someone is navigating a health crisis, seeking housing support, or accessing justice, this center will offer compassion, dignity, and access. Thank you to our project partners, the contractors, planners, and workers who have brought us to this point.
Thank you to the county departments who envisioned a better way to serve and to the staff who will bring this space to life. And thank you to the community for your support during construction. Let today be a reminder that public infrastructure is about people and this Wellness Center is a promise to put people first.

I look forward to returning here soon to cut the ribbon and officially open the doors to better service, stronger partnerships, and healthier futures. **Planned Parenthood closures an assault on women’s health**

It is with deep concern and outrage that I share the news that two Planned Parenthood clinics in San Mateo County, in San Mateo and South San Francisco, are permanently closing due to devastating federal Medicaid cuts enacted under the latest spending bill passed by Congress.

Let’s be clear, this is not just a political maneuver, it is an assault on women’s reproductive health and on the basic principle that everyone, regardless of income, deserves access to quality care. These clinics were a lifeline for thousands of low-income and uninsured patients who relied on them for cancer screenings, contraception, STI testing and preventive health services.

In the past year alone, the five clinics now closing across Northern California served over 22,000 patients, many of whom now face uncertainty about where, or even if, they will continue to receive care. This “Big Beautiful Bill” may be a talking point in Washington, but here in San Mateo County, it’s a real crisis for our most vulnerable residents.

If the federal government won’t protect our people, San Mateo County will do everything in its power to fill the gap. Our Board of Supervisors is committed to exploring new investments in women’s health and expanding partnerships with community providers to protect essential services.

We will not stand by while access to reproductive care is ripped away. In the meantime, the Planned Parenthood clinic in Redwood City remains open and continues to provide services.

**Standing with workers: Ending the Republic Services strike**

I’m proud to share that after nearly two weeks of disruption, a tentative agreement was reached on July 18 between Republic Services and Teamsters Local 350, officially ending the sanitation workers’ strike that impacted thousands of homes and businesses across San Mateo County.

Throughout this process, I stood in solidarity with the workers who keep our communities clean, healthy, and running, often without the recognition they deserve. These men and women showed tremendous strength and unity in demanding fair wages, safe working conditions and the dignity they’ve earned on the job.

When negotiations stalled, I worked closely with both sides behind the scenes to help bring everyone back to the table. I met with union representatives and reached out directly to Republic Services leadership, urging them to recognize the critical role their frontline workers play, not just during strikes, but every single day.

The result of these efforts is a tentative agreement that reflects the values of fairness and respect that San Mateo County stands for. I want to thank everyone involved for their willingness to come together in good faith.

Now that service has resumed, we can all breathe a little easier, not just because the trash is being picked up, but because our community reaffirmed its commitment to worker justice and collective bargaining.

To the Teamsters workers I want to say your voices were heard and to our residents I want to thank you for your patience and support.

Go to [https://abc7news.com/post/trash-strike-republic-services-union-reach-deal-ending-2-week-long-resuming-garbage-pickup/17185232/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=69c2f034cf&e=c0babbc643) to learn more about the story.

**Taking ‘Loneliness to Light’ on the road**

Thank you to retired Judge Mark Forcum and residents of the Magnolia of Millbrae for inviting me to speak on my office’s “Loneliness to Light” initiative recently. Loneliness is an epidemic that impacts older adults and teens but is also a growing crisis among young men and boys.

We discussed the growing momentum to address the crisis and I want to highlight an executive order Gov. Gavin Newsom signed last week to address the suicide and loneliness crisis devastating young men and boys in California.

This is more than a mental health issue, it’s a public health emergency, and I’m proud that California is leading the way. In January 2024, I authored the first resolution in the nation declaring loneliness a public health crisis. Today, I’m drafting a new resolution to support Newsom’s bold action and bring it before the Board later this month.

Men aged 15–44 are dying by suicide at 3 to 4 times the rate of women, often in silence and isolation. This order will direct state agencies to expand mental health access, tackle stigma, and build real pathways to purpose through education, family, and work.

Our young men are disconnected from school, from jobs and from each other. Nearly 1 in 4 men under 30 report having no close friends. That’s heartbreaking and it’s deadly.

By investing in mental health services, mentorship and career pathways, we can help rebuild connection, dignity, and hope. I commend Gov. Newsom and First Partner Jennifer Siebel Newsom for recognizing this urgent crisis and taking real action. This is how we save lives and futures.

**Interns wanted to join our team ** We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=a44648e635&e=c0babbc643 "https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9?fbclid=IwAR3YFH0mH828rtAUru5EFOO9GsMCasQYe1N7AUrmwAwBf30JTtXOSeCzKjs"). You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org "mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org"). In friendship,
**DAVID J. CANEPA**
President, San Mateo County Board of Supervisors
---
| | | |
---
| _Copyright © 2025 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Supervisor David Canepa1618 Sullivan497Daly City, CA 94015
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=bfe74f95cc) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&t=b&e=c0babbc643&c=bfe74f95cc).

---
1. **Ban** all local and federal rewards for illegal aliens
2. **Shut off** income for illegal aliens through “E-Verify”
3. **Unleash **ICE to the full extent of the law

We literally cannot afford to delay.My team at **NumbersUSA **has 29 years of experience and success in harnessing the power of grassroots armies of American Patriots to defeat the open-borders activists. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: DC is the testing ground for Trump’s authoritarian power grab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Trump is using DC as a testing ground for federal control of Democratic cities. We have to fight back.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250812-5330-footer&t=1&akid=5330%2E420207%2EavhKW-)
Hi Peter, it's Pramila.
Yesterday, Donald Trump deployed the National Guard to Washington, DC, and put the city’s local police department under federal control. Under the guise of “fighting crime,” he’s militarizing the streets and sidelining local leaders.
**We need to be clear: this isn’t just about DC. Trump has openly discussed putting other large cities with Democratic leadership under federal control as well.**
With his latest actions in the nation’s capital, he’s testing how far he can push his authoritarian agenda. If we don’t fight back now, he will keep going, and no city — Seattle, Chicago, New York, Los Angeles, you name it — will be safe from this kind of federal overreach.
Throughout history across the world, we’ve seen what happens when authoritarians seize power, and we can’t let it happen here. But to fight back, I need you with me.
**Here’s what we’re doing about it:**
* We’re relentlessly calling out Trump’s abuses of power in Congress, in the press, and on social media.

* We’re preparing our communities through nationwide organizing and nonviolent resistance trainings so that we’re ready for whatever comes next.

* And we’re building a grassroots movement that’s strong enough to push back against this kind of overreach.

We’ll never stop speaking truth to power. We’ll double down on our work to organize and mobilize the grassroots. And we’ll rack up massive electoral wins for years to come.
**Trump is counting on chaos and fear to keep us quiet.** But if we show massive, unified resistance now, we can make it politically impossible for him to expand this power grab.
[**Can you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can today to help us keep organizing and fighting back against Trump’s authoritarian overreach?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250812-1?refcode=em20250812-5330&refcode2=5330_420207_avhKW-&akid=5330%2E420207%2EavhKW-)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250812-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250812-5330&refcode2=5330_420207_avhKW-&akid=5330%2E420207%2EavhKW-)**
This is the moment to prove that our democracy belongs to the people — not to Donald Trump.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250812-5330-footer&t=2&refcode2=5330_420207_avhKW-&akid=5330%2E420207%2EavhKW-)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: Trump is using DC as a testing ground for federal control of Democratic cities. We have to fight back. - Hi Peter, it's Pramila. Yesterday, Donald Trump deployed the National Guard to Washington, DC, and put the city’s local police department under federal control. Under the guise of “fighting crime,” he’s militarizing the streets and sidelining local leaders. We need to be clear: this isn’t just about DC. Trump has openly discussed putting other large cities with Democratic leadership under federal control as well. With his latest actions in the nation’s capital, he’s testing how far he can push his authoritarian agenda. If we don’t fight back now, he will keep going, and no city — Seattle, Chicago, New York, Los Angeles, you name it — will be safe from this kind of federal overreach. Throughout history across the world, we’ve seen what happens when authoritarians seize power, and we can’t let it happen here. But to fight back, I need you with me. Here’s what we’re doing about it: We’re relentlessly calling out Trump’s abuses of power in Congress, in the press, and on social media. We’re preparing our communities through nationwide organizing and nonviolent resistance trainings so that we’re ready for whatever comes next. And we’re building a grassroots movement that’s strong enough to push back against this kind of overreach. We’ll never stop speaking truth to power. We’ll double down on our work to organize and mobilize the grassroots. And we’ll rack up massive electoral wins for years to come. Trump is counting on chaos and fear to keep us quiet. But if we show massive, unified resistance now, we can make it politically impossible for him to expand this power grab. - - This is the moment to prove that our democracy belongs to the people — not to Donald Trump. In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal - | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

Team, Bringing people together to get results is what we need right now — and I believe it’s what New Mexicans deserve. As the Trump Administration tears organizations and programs down, it’s never been more important for New Mexicans to have local and federal leaders that build us up. **That’s why Martin and I are supporting Meredith Dixon as she seeks re-election in House District 20.** While some politicians cater to extreme agendas or special interests, Meredith is firmly rooted in the needs of the people of Albuquerque and all of New Mexico. Her strong track record includes passing bipartisan legislation to address the climate crisis, support New Mexico’s small businesses, invest in healthcare reform, grow the clean energy economy, and much more. We must keep her effective leadership fighting for New Mexicans. We’ve seen Meredith do great things for New Mexico. She’s exactly the kind of leader I’m proud to support, so I hope you’ll join us, friend. **Martin’s Lobo Leadership Fund has the resources to support local, pro-democracy candidates like Meredith Dixon, but we need your help. ** **[So, we’re asking: Would you split a donation between Meredith Dixon’s campaign and Martin’s Lobo Leadership Fund so we can get champions for New Mexico elected in this year’s elections and beyond.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113194627/562959577/444614604?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20250812_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjMwZDlmZC1hMTc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-g7D_AjvvE8vcPhjYGugAJYA5gCFd9xvZlPQVauIlrw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to the Lobo Leadership Fund and Martin Meredith Dixon will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113194634/562959585/444614604?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20250812_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjMwZDlmZC1hMTc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-g7D_AjvvE8vcPhjYGugAJYA5gCFd9xvZlPQVauIlrw=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump is turning the DOJ into his political attack machine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
This is Adam Schiff. I have some breaking news, Peter:

| This is Adam Schiff. I have some breaking news, Peter:

**_Fox News_ anchor Laura Ingraham broke the news last week that Trump had successfully badgered the Justice Department into targeting me with a criminal investigation. This kind of baseless abuse of the justice system is just what dictators do.**

And it is meant to distract the American people from the terrible jobs numbers that came out last week, Trump’s deepening involvement in the Epstein files mess, and his attacks on our health care.

It’s also meant to try to intimidate me or to stop me from holding Trump accountable. But I have some breaking news for them: It won’t stop me. Not for a minute.

[Trump says he'll meet Putin in Alaska next Friday](https://substack.com/redirect/634749c4-b139-414d-bb7a-f87901b1b609?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Axios
[Pirro takes aim at D.C.'s crime laws, calls them 'absurd'](https://substack.com/redirect/93afac79-9724-4c1e-92c0-7727e6d39556?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via The Washington Post
[Democrats Pledge a Gerrymander War](https://substack.com/redirect/d00afbc0-64ec-451b-8d90-ab82db5c273d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Jonathan Turley
## Top tweets...
[@seanspicer](https://substack.com/redirect/0cca4790-8f2d-449b-9aed-d1fb49385891?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Union Chairman Gregg Pemberton stated, "We stand with the President in recognizing that Washington, DC, cannot continue on this trajectory. Crime is out of control, and our officers are stretched beyond their limits"
[@seanspicer](https://substack.com/redirect/5239f157-7e64-4b45-9606-78e244183570?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): via the DC police union "The DC Police Union today acknowledges and supports the President's announcement this morning to assume temporary control of the MPD in response to the escalating crime crisis in Washington, DC. The Union agrees that crime is spiraling out of control, and immediate action is necessary to restore public safety."
## Start your day in the know
Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same [YouTube channel](https://substack.com/redirect/c0d7757d-f79c-420c-959b-f8edb57ae0f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it!
[Subscribe HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/c0d7757d-f79c-420c-959b-f8edb57ae0f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## This week on The Sean Spicer Show...
We've got a great line-up this week. Tonight we break down the DC crime crackdown with, John Lott, president of the Crime Prevention Research Cent and Gregg Pemberton. the Chairman of the DC Police Union (who is very clear about the crime issues in DC). Wednesday, I'm talking with journalist John Solomon about the latest on the Russia Hoax. Finally, on Friday we've got The Trafalgar Group's Robert Cahaly to finish the week strong with the latest polling data. Turn on notifications so you don't miss it!
## Wellness update...
If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center.
If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me!
## Trump makes DC safe again...
Washington, DC has been all over the news lately.
Not because of the latest museum exhibit or legislative news, but because of the sad state of crime in the city.
A rash of notable shootings and attacks--including a [vicious gang attack](https://substack.com/redirect/edcf74dd-ff5a-4fc1-a95b-8c9fad9c8642?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on DOGE staffer Edward Coristine (affectionately known as "Big Balls")-- has put DC in the news.
Trump has had enough.
Which is why he recently announced that he is deploying the National Guard and federalizing DC to bring order back to the capital.
I think it's a no-brainer--DC residents deserve to feel safe in their city. But so do tourists and visitors.
But the move has met with mixed reaction, with Democrats (who have been pushing for DC statehood) crying foul .
It's starting a national conversation about what needs to happen to our nation's capital.
Let's break it down. ...

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m officially in the race for U.S. Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=073125_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=073125_2]
Hi, Peter,
I’m Roy Cooper, and I am running to be the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina. I believe that our brightest days are still ahead, but we have to work together to fix what’s broken in Washington.
Politicians in DC are running up our debt, ripping away our health care, disrespecting our veterans, cutting help for the poor and putting our Medicare at risk — just to give tax breaks to the very rich. I’ve had enough.
We have to change things, but I need you with me. Together, we can win this Senate race and help Democrats take back the majority. Will you split a contribution of $20 or another amount that’s right for you between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC to get us started off strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=073125_2]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=073125_2]
These are no ordinary times, Peter . I believe elected leaders should work to create safety, prosperity and opportunity for every American. Republicans in Washington don’t seem to share that sense of duty.
When I look at what’s happening in Washington now, lawmakers are tearing down our middle class to put even more money in billionaires’ pockets. They’re cutting critical jobs at agencies that help keep our country running. Not even our National Parks or Weather Service are safe.
They’re punching down — attacking the most vulnerable among us — to make themselves seem strong. Something has to give.
There’s another path, Peter. When I was Governor of North Carolina, we expanded Medicaid. We passed pay raises for public school teachers and we built a strong economy by investing in clean energy and investing in our people.
Washington can look like this, too. It’s time to elect leaders who are ready to do the hard work of strengthening our middle class, restoring voting rights and reproductive rights, protecting our environment and ensuring every child has the excellent education they deserve.
If this is the America you believe in, this campaign is for you, Peter .
We’re in for a tough election here in North Carolina, but with the help of committed supporters, we’ve won the toughest races before. I’m grateful to have The Real Texas's support in this crucial race, and I’d like to have yours, too. Your donation today will help us take on the challenge of the most competitive Senate campaign in 2026. Please give whatever is right for you and split a donation between our team and The Real Texas today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=073125_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Roy Cooper and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=073125_2&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=073125_2&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=073125_2&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=073125_2&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=073125_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=073125_2&amount=25]
Let’s do this together,
Roy Cooper
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=073125_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=073125_2]
The Real Texas PAC
1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/Pq6mZqR8vUu32u6MFdTiQw2?unsubscribedata=HJPj089mBEjh5LQ0OPHjFdeEVSffj3d7ix5NEzvm%2Bkhl9wAGLwO2FQVXMPy%2F2wieg29izV1nLPU3PiM6j0C2ZEIpNclOZZQmZgRXkuP07HSM80J%2FHCdwGEiaF1ej8yrkWbXYDVXiOf986gFzYEM%2Fqg7pGNEMxM1s1MkzJZp3bV%2BNnnf3mSvvOL8oEpW%2BCp6B7Wvd7%2FEbKk8dL%2FBbRfbzfKmgw7nPTo6R5rX6tI%2F12uOg8oEuohvF49oMXv7lVFw6e8GqXG0maHzUCmZB0X173Fgod8dvayaUMztYcyXIeQjQhlv8jX%2Bi9Ggxu8za0vMYmTp%2BLZRl4T2RrPvGo8OKkozDd2gUq3aab%2F6aTXCM2kaMgCbKiFvSzkXhQxKrB6XSLC%2Fco7%2BshWD61NX6njCB4X%2FSFhbhWRiMcpDFIMCwWH4%3D .

# Bank of America Just Warned the Dollar Could Collapse — Here's What You Need to Know
**A hidden crisis is brewing. Here’s what you need to know to survive it.** Dear Patriot, In a chilling forecast, Bank of America has just issued a warning that every **American should take seriously** : **The U.S. dollar is on the verge of collapse.** For years, experts have quietly whispered about America’s GROWING debt, our inflation crisis, and politicians reckless spending—but now one of the biggest banks on Earth is openly sounding the alarm. Bank of America analysts predict a historic decline in the dollar’s value—**threatening your savings, retirement accounts, and the very foundation of your financial future.** And the numbers don’t lie:
* The U.S. is adding **$1 trillion in debt every 100 days**
* Global investors are fleeing the dollar in record numbers
* Confidence in America’s currency is at a **20-year low**

If the dollar crashes, everything changes. Grocery prices could skyrocket. Retirement savings could vanish. Your hard-earned wealth could evaporate overnight. But you still have time to**take control** —if you act before the collapse accelerates. That’s why many Americans are moving their money into **physical gold and precious metals** —a time-tested store of value that has survived every financial crisis in history. Protect your wealth today. name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m officially running to be the next Democratic United States Senator from North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
We’re taking back the U.S. Senate Majority.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93220?refcode=em20250812-9263&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9263%2E614464%2Ew9G2Eq)
Peter, this is Roy Cooper, and I’m reaching out with exciting news that I wanted to make sure you heard from me:
**I’m officially running to be the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina.**
We launched our campaign a couple weeks ago, and we’ve been overwhelmed by the response from Democratic supporters across the country. I never take running for office lightly, but more than ever, I _know_ that we can win together.
**[I’m grateful to have State Democrat Committee's support in these critical first few weeks, and I need yours, too. Could you split a donation between their team and our campaign for Senate right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93220?refcode=em20250812-9263&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9263%2E614464%2Ew9G2Eq)**
Here’s why we need to have you with us:
👉 North Carolina’s Senate election is set to be the most competitive of 2026 & The Hill has rated this the most likely Senate seat to flip
👉 Winning here is essential to our chances of taking back the Senate
👉 Republicans are ready to do everything possible to stop us & Donald Trump already handpicked RNC Chair Michael Whatley to run against me
**[Peter, a donation TODAY can help us prepare for Democrats’ most important Senate fight of 2026. Are you with me and State Democrat Committee in the fight? Split a contribution NOW to stand with us >>>](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93220?refcode=em20250812-9263&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9263%2E614464%2Ew9G2Eq)**

subject: The Future of The Texas Flyover
body:

# TUESDAY, AUGUST 12, 2025
---|---
**From Cole, CEO of The Flyover** Dear Texas Flyover Reader, I want to share an important update with you directly from our founder, Guy Short--a fellow Texan who has an exclusive message for our _Texas Flyover_ readers. --Cole

A powerhouse investment to fully fund the organizing we need to defeat Blakeman’s extreme agenda.
Bruce Blakeman is spending your taxpayer dollars on campaign mailers, almost daily, training his own private militia, rewarding political allies with bloated salaries, and pushing an extreme MAGA agenda that puts politics ahead of the people of Nassau County.

I’m running for County Executive because we deserve a government that invests in safe neighborhoods, affordable living, and smart fiscal management – not in armed “special deputies” who answer only to the County Executive.

**[Your commitment now – whether it’s $12, $24, or $48 a week – will power this campaign every day until November 4th.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113197134/562968315/1454987050?contactdata=N7HK88UrjutJSBIYraFaK65SiTntw/yKlIZiRIInQ7oT6qksAwcpXFjGpRur/og87bHzca7t27eff7zWcjb80xrZL2gO5mZWS8FIvstRw2U=&am=24.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTNhY2Q3MjktYTc3Ny1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v97ceNHOtA0qXCkwa5UIWksn9GSIfqhcsW4g67cb4NI=&emci=ddc91282-9b77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=a3acd729-a777-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ceid=17551891)**

**We have 12 weeks.** Let’s make each one count.

Thank you,

# Bank of America Just Warned the Dollar Could Collapse — Here's What You Need to Know
**A hidden crisis is brewing. Here’s what you need to know to survive it.** Dear Patriot, In a chilling forecast, Bank of America has just issued a warning that every **American should take seriously** : **The U.S. dollar is on the verge of collapse.** For years, experts have quietly whispered about America’s GROWING debt, our inflation crisis, and politicians reckless spending—but now one of the biggest banks on Earth is openly sounding the alarm. Bank of America analysts predict a historic decline in the dollar’s value—**threatening your savings, retirement accounts, and the very foundation of your financial future.** And the numbers don’t lie:
* The U.S. is adding **$1 trillion in debt every 100 days**
* Global investors are fleeing the dollar in record numbers
* Confidence in America’s currency is at a **20-year low**

If the dollar crashes, everything changes. Grocery prices could skyrocket. Retirement savings could vanish. Your hard-earned wealth could evaporate overnight. But you still have time to**take control** —if you act before the collapse accelerates. That’s why many Americans are moving their money into **physical gold and precious metals** —a time-tested store of value that has survived every financial crisis in history. Protect your wealth today. name: Sen. Tim Sheehy
subject: Pinned down by heavy fire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:

clean_body: This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester | Peter, TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents... No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL... This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester. I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana. Winning this race wasn’t a “gimme.” We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. That’s because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000. He threw money at anybody and everybody who’d smear my good name. It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life. Despite all the obstacles , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of one man : Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana. As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority. Steve is up for re-election in 2026. Chuck Schumer and every Democrat in the nation would love nothing more than to see Steve Daines – the Republican Senate Majority Maker! – booted from Congress. 2026 is right around the corner. Steve’s radical opponent has already told the media that every minute since 2024, she’s been building a plan to win in 2026. That means Democrats are already funneling money and resources into this race. The fight to keep this Senate seat in Republican hands will be another knock-down, drag-out fight. For America's Future, Senator Tim Sheehy (R-MT) Former Navy SEAL Purple Heart Recipient P.S. We all have Steve to thank for booting Chuck Schumer out of the Majority Leader’s chair! The radicals in the Democrat party are FUMING. They’d love nothing more than to send Steve packing for his role in producing the 2024 Republican Trifecta. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

The Ohio GOP _still_ won’t hold town halls to face the people they claim to represent. While they hide, they’re working hand-in-hand with billionaires to tear our state apart.

[**_We’re tired of being ignored, sidelined, and sold out. If you are too, chip in $5 right now to help us hold them accountable at the ballot box next year >>>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113198162/562972150/-1291811453?amount=5&refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_TownHalls_250812_t1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTdmNjNmYS1hODc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ex7VPIHswB1WV8YlPpWN-EZ6HcVZoZ_UFA3YWORt9Lc=)

So if the GOP won’t show up for Ohio, we will — at the ballot box.

[**_We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot next year who will fight for Ohio’s working families, protect our schools and healthcare, and actually show up for their constituents. That’s why our team has set a $6,000 mid-month fundraising goal — and we need to hit it fast to make sure we’re ready to respond to whatever the GOP throws at us next. We have to start by building the campaign infrastructure it’s going to take to win this race. That means grassroots donations, organizing, and showing we’re ready to fight back, no matter how they try to twist maps across the country. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = In this fight together, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . You can also =.

Fellow American,

TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents...

_No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL..._

_**This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester.**_ I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana.

Winning this race wasn’t a “gimme.” We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. _**That’s because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000**_. He threw money at anybody and everybody who’d smear my good name.

It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life.

_Despite all the obstacles_ , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of _one man_ :

**Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana.**

As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, _**but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority.**_
