clean_body: This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester | Fellow American, TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents... No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL... This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester. I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana. Winning this race wasn’t a “gimme.” We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. That’s because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000. He threw money at anybody and everybody who’d smear my good name. It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life. Despite all the obstacles , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of one man : Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana. As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority. Steve is up for re-election in 2026. Chuck Schumer and every Democrat in the nation would love nothing more than to see Steve Daines – the Republican Senate Majority Maker! – booted from Congress. 2026 is right around the corner. Steve’s radical opponent has already told the media that every minute since 2024, she’s been building a plan to win in 2026. That means Democrats are already funneling money and resources into this race. The fight to keep this Senate seat in Republican hands will be another knock-down, drag-out fight. For America's Future, Senator Tim Sheehy (R-MT) Former Navy SEAL Purple Heart Recipient P.S. We all have Steve to thank for booting Chuck Schumer out of the Majority Leader’s chair! The radicals in the Democrat party are FUMING. They’d love nothing more than to send Steve packing for his role in producing the 2024 Republican Trifecta. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

[**We’ve got to keep calling out the danger — that’s why I’m reaching out today to ask you to chip in to my campaign and Laura Friedman's to help me keep fighting back against Trump’s attacks on the rule of law.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113199118/562975424/-219103654?refcode=em-8.12.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTIyNjVhOTctYWI3Ny1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=A9LoIgCCwWaRzHOWdSMeZAasWQWtgHS8rlLInhvHeCQ=) | ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113199119/562975425/-219103654?refcode=em-8.12.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTIyNjVhOTctYWI3Ny1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=A9LoIgCCwWaRzHOWdSMeZAasWQWtgHS8rlLInhvHeCQ=)****

Recently, on the Senate floor, I laid out **ten ways Donald Trump is wrecking this country.** Every American should know that Trump is failing us by:
**10\. Undermining American innovation:** Trump is attacking our world-class research institutions and shutting out international talent, limiting our leadership in science, technology, and medicine.
**9\. Slashing food assistance:** He’s gutting the supplemental nutrition programs that keep millions of American families healthy and ensure our kids don’t go to bed hungry.
**8\. Abandoning our allies:** Trump is weakening our international partnerships, cozying up with dictators, and making America less safe.
**7\. Sabotaging renewable energy:** He’s killing clean energy projects, ceding global renewable energy leadership to China, raising utility bills, and making us more dependent on fossil fuels.
**6\. Damaging public health:** He’s slashing funding for the National Institutes of Health (NIH) and key research programs, meaning cures will be delayed, clinical trials will end, and life-saving care will be harder to access.
**5\. Crippling essential services with DOGE cuts:** From Social Security to wildfire response to public education, Trump is making major funding cuts without worrying about the impact on families, seniors, and kids across the country who will be hurt.
**4\. Tanking the economy with tariffs:** His trade wars are driving up the costs of everyday goods like clothes and groceries while alienating our allies.
**3\. Stripping away healthcare:** Under Trump’s new budget, millions of Americans will lose healthcare coverage. Many rural clinics and hospitals will be forced to close, and all of our healthcare costs will go up.
**2\. Undermining the rule of law:** Trump has been treating the Department of Justice (DOJ) as his own personal political weapon, using it to shield his allies and target his enemies.
**1\. Threatening the very idea of America:** He’s eroding the values that built this country: self-governance, equality, and the belief that no one is above the law — not even the president.
I know this is a lot. And overcoming it will be hard, especially in the near term when they control everything. But we will take back the government and put an end to this madness.
The GOP is trying to flood the zone so that we’re too overwhelmed to act. But I also know that we’re not powerless, and that we can come together, organize, mobilize, and take our country back from Trump.

clean_body: | = Team, this is Adam Schiff. Laura said I could reach out. I’m not going to sugarcoat it: We’re up against a movement that’s determined to tear down our democracy and a man in the White House who’ll do anything to expand his power. = | **= Recently, on the Senate floor, I laid out ten ways Donald Trump is wrecking this country. Every American should know that Trump is failing us by: 10\. Undermining American innovation: Trump is attacking our world-class research institutions and shutting out international talent, limiting our leadership in science, technology, and medicine. 9\. Slashing food assistance: He’s gutting the supplemental nutrition programs that keep millions of American families healthy and ensure our kids don’t go to bed hungry. 8\. Abandoning our allies: Trump is weakening our international partnerships, cozying up with dictators, and making America less safe. 7\. Sabotaging renewable energy: He’s killing clean energy projects, ceding global renewable energy leadership to China, raising utility bills, and making us more dependent on fossil fuels. 6\. Damaging public health: He’s slashing funding for the National Institutes of Health (NIH) and key research programs, meaning cures will be delayed, clinical trials will end, and life-saving care will be harder to access. 5\. Crippling essential services with DOGE cuts: From Social Security to wildfire response to public education, Trump is making major funding cuts without worrying about the impact on families, seniors, and kids across the country who will be hurt. 4\. Tanking the economy with tariffs: His trade wars are driving up the costs of everyday goods like clothes and groceries while alienating our allies. 3\. Stripping away healthcare: Under Trump’s new budget, millions of Americans will lose healthcare coverage. Many rural clinics and hospitals will be forced to close, and all of our healthcare costs will go up. 2\. Undermining the rule of law: Trump has been treating the Department of Justice (DOJ) as his own personal political weapon, using it to shield his allies and target his enemies. 1\. Threatening the very idea of America: He’s eroding the values that built this country: self-governance, equality, and the belief that no one is above the law — not even the president. I know this is a lot. And overcoming it will be hard, especially in the near term when they control everything. But we will take back the government and put an end to this madness. The GOP is trying to flood the zone so that we’re too overwhelmed to act. But I also know that we’re not powerless, and that we can come together, organize, mobilize, and take our country back from Trump. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thanks for stepping up. -Adam | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! name: Ben Young, Leaders We Deserve
subject: These young people are already making change
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
You told us who should run. Here’s what we learned.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250812-1&t=1&akid=2510%2E587540%2Ej8wrHt)
Peter,
I’m Ben Young, Recruitment Director at Leaders We Deserve.
It’s my job to research and connect with young people across the country who are ready to run for state legislative and congressional seats. I lead the efforts to identify these future leaders and make sure they have the real, tangible support they need to win.
A few weeks ago, we asked you to tell us about a young leader in your community who you think should run for office. **And you delivered.**
**We were _blown away_ by the number of responses we received. But even more than that, we were _inspired_ by the people you told us about.**
You lifted up passionate activists who led **No Kings protests** in their cities. You told us about organizers working to protect their neighbors from deportation, leaders fighting for reproductive health care access, and young educators already shaping the next generation.
We heard about **union leaders, veterans, lawyers, first-generation college students, engineers, mothers,** and even **recent high school graduates** already making waves in their communities.
The words you used to describe them say it all:
⭐ Empathetic.
⭐ Visionary.
⭐ Passionate.
⭐ Strategic.
⭐ Principled.
⭐ Energetic.
These are the kinds of leaders our country needs right now. They’re _already_ having a huge impact and with the right support, they could go even further in elected office.
We’ve been carefully reviewing each submission and have already identified a few individuals who we believe could make great Leaders We Deserve candidates. We take our time getting to know people and learning about their communities and their potential races. If we end up endorsing someone you recommended, this team will be the first to know!
We also asked you about the biggest barriers keeping young people from running for office. Here’s what we heard — loud and clear:
* **Money:** _especially raising that first $100K without establishment or institutional support_
* **Gatekeeping from party leadership:** _many told us they were discouraged by Democratic insiders or told to “wait their turn”_
* **Lack of visibility and name recognition:** _especially in rural areas or for those without legacy networks_
* **Bias and discrimination:** _especially for young leaders of color, LGBTQ+ candidates, and anyone challenging the status quo_
* **Balancing real-life responsibilities:** _like full-time jobs, caregiving, or student debt, all while trying to run a campaign_
* **Structural and systemic barriers:** _gerrymandering, super PACs, voter suppression, and entrenched incumbents holding onto power_

**These are exactly the challenges Leaders We Deserve is here to take on.**
We help candidates build strong, people-powered campaigns — from fundraising and messaging to digital organizing and coalition-building — because we believe young people are ready to lead right now.
**[Peter, can we count on you to help power this game-changing work? Make a $5 donation now to support our movement to elect bold new leaders.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250812_1_recruitment?refcode=em20250812-2510&amount=5&refcode2=2510_587540_j8wrHt&akid=2510%2E587540%2Ej8wrHt)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250812_1_recruitment?amount=5&refcode=em20250812-2510&refcode2=2510_587540_j8wrHt&akid=2510%2E587540%2Ej8wrHt)**
Thank you for being part of this movement.
The next generation is ready, and together we can help them win.
In solidarity,
Ben Young
Recruitment Director
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250812-1&t=2&refcode2=2510_587540_j8wrHt&akid=2510%2E587540%2Ej8wrHt)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2510%2E587540%2Ej8wrHt)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2510%2E587540%2Ej8wrHt)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

Friend, Want to know what everyday people are saying about Republicans’ Big Budget Betrayal bill? I recently spoke with residents in my district and here’s what they had to say:
> _"I think it’s only beautiful for the president and his friends."_ _"I think it’s the reverse Robin Hood. Take from the poor and give to the rich."_ _"It is terrible. And it doesn’t help the children."_
But, while Republicans are home on their August recess, they’re not holding town halls. They’re not speaking with their residents. They’re celebrating how their bill hands trillions of dollars in tax breaks to their billionaire and corporate donors while slashing healthcare and investing in Trump’s inhumane attack on our immigrant neighbors. [**Click here to watch this short video, then chip in to power our fight demanding a government for the many, not the wealthy few.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvclnm56LU_F3utmL79gVyEUkDy41UHws0H4n6pHH-Tzk-JohWK7sizXEDjpndix8DMFO4DyZLzJGnpG8kdCEP9un-svsAftOdNzEGYar3Bu6n4HiIXMkeivHf5_DF4GtfDye94zwNyVjbEg9x3-8qd9TxDjk7SsRITfSVrNCeZ3z5sfYMYDMTwyPBn1x6RIRG10tA1R6dwJ44HpkY5CQeuEMPIb7PRuXREKLNxAEqe2O9q99EdjFvo3fHgIO42RJV279He8M8KDK40ok7A9frWF3sepPohdbJXgIiuochHR46-BEzBkKjjAdmJtKvyBLTtJDeqwE9OJLSGGPAJPDathjcosqWiYjVs4lTm1ECUoNN2GYvBBNBPkO8wQWwqDXc6r4zVDcsjEt0tBLHia1N3W_PPWqXyrv7OlBhf8nOivQ/4iz/TaFu1dK_QjiSIQQSVS6wkw/h1/h001.Vc_IZR9XjN174CmHfZEAHg8zuJ0bFWNZVKLgho3svT4) [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvclnm56LU_F3utmL79gVyEUkDy41UHws0H4n6pHH-TzvAHCxK25nzvTMuBk4Nrr37NFzK0tAWra_W65lN2tr8CSfSpC_hV9FNzWAcVd3S19ErPDEJh_nLjl6YdSLzbQ0adV0G5-6QewaoIct4f0686ZqL_nHI7mg4bcszKSamKNQASNHgtfgTf4aDmBRS6eThS9tjedgETZyJgclviHMgZZJNnY0Cl4bkwJhXSGLyt566Ql5epZ_hy3umsfIdSH0d505VRBlsbzF8BUu6-IfE7NeSPzXjjPmymlsLg4qPUYUltZOoqu1O1QwI9g4gfBzA9rHTiMjUZfaAjeGjRXCm8xm5h2m2B75sAS049pMay28hE1yi6Tt6Kwr21nOLfIDDTJkdMZu0ksPdvLiqYlGkicYgiB91pIG9Y9HaQXjW3uA/4iz/TaFu1dK_QjiSIQQSVS6wkw/h2/h001.38a_buNUYBQu1yWFJRLbGrBgXznQv4CYTP4UYvLYm8k) | [WATCH & DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvclnm56LU_F3utmL79gVyEUkDy41UHws0H4n6pHH-TzsqoBNDhihHYgm7JYsgThp-iIj2KvOW9qWd-BfUcHRvWNJbw_dWOEeHyimA9xQZkQ0Fv084NhbWEDkzx4daTu3tJDdiwHW9vWAvcmz5q7iUOitOypw4GRw2z62DPN6Yse_PoXFtX6lMWUOuGJaTcQbAyF4D--_2QxLaWMEubzrHbx8Kw9oHRKBrU5Ru_MFlkPOGcxGHmS7GqfMwyWv3ui80vDZLwXoGiTmWgtut275pD_pCDyIk54Cxv33mXNNcB6riEsFI5oMZrmu4IGXsv-X0gWSOvmmsVSUU8MvQ-7U1jTtsNldlgqwE4eEFBOf1AOtk9pxT1E4o9f9zkNZg3pw-q_eBaQVBZOMOEdAvT5DL3VPMfUl037Ft1_6IJ2iWQxQ/4iz/TaFu1dK_QjiSIQQSVS6wkw/h3/h001.vl7z_GlxbLbWOxWy3gm9EWLRm4yL9qzsY4ucai8JxNw)

From: Rashida Tlaib
Date: Sat, Aug 9, 2025
Subject: WATCH: What my residents think about the Big Budget Betrayal
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Republicans are hoping that everyday people don’t know what’s in the Big Budget Betrayal bill. They better be ready for a rude awakening.
I recently spoke with residents in my district to hear what they had to say about this disastrous new law.
They called it _"reverse Robin Hood."_
They said, _"the billionaires need to share the wealth and stop being so greedy."_
And, when talking about how SNAP cuts are taking food from our kids, they said, _"Why wouldn't you want our kids to be the biggest and the best?"_
The cuts Republicans made are so deep that 15 million people are expected to lose their health insurance and 51,000 people will die preventable deaths each year. And why? To fund trillions of dollars in tax cuts for the rich and corporations, and power Trump’s illegal, inhumane mass deportation scheme.
Together, we’re saying hell no!
[**Click here to watch this one-minute video to hear what my residents are saying about the Big Budget Betrayal, then donate today to power our fight to undo the largest cuts to healthcare in U.S. history and undo the tax cuts that enrich billionaires at our expense.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvclnm56LU_F3utmL79gVyEUkDy41UHws0H4n6pHH-Tzk4Kw-YgF28OhLCK7ZATYAzwgvKianUfDu99peD-yTIaF05uTQDLortgp5t0mGz6AKmUVvXWGXly4P-7DLLwJx5L-WsrosNJqw7vhABeihL76S_2nBhwDzIBO-9iUeJw0YHDAzmrAQxQ-G_7R5D7Vs4E2MVbJZjErbHEcbhdVUsfV6vaCmY2SLfmYyvucW6Gbgif3XtUOeiG58sip5EFNyh4On75cHV9cGbvWO3X5OXtYhqIIyuN2lYyGnYepav81I6CxCK4wtCN4QJ_Pov-1RFIKMqt1mYWVbUfaldRwrJ78-V6iV53Hqe_3S_q2y_JGmuafZcqLI6K6YHXAWVoMqhMH0JuuAp45LYp9e23MANF2SWfaDH7BtBESJjXHYGdeQ/4iz/TaFu1dK_QjiSIQQSVS6wkw/h4/h001.RtwOYhbTXTmShEONc1dnkzKMsFi8GoFKVHPz-pb_UvA)

clean_body: This bill hands a $90,000 annual tax cut to households making over $1 million a year while working people get roughly $40. | | | Friend, Want to know what everyday people are saying about Republicans’ Big Budget Betrayal bill? I recently spoke with residents in my district and here’s what they had to say: "I think it’s only beautiful for the president and his friends." "I think it’s the reverse Robin Hood. Take from the poor and give to the rich." "It is terrible. And it doesn’t help the children." But, while Republicans are home on their August recess, they’re not holding town halls. They’re not speaking with their residents. They’re celebrating how their bill hands trillions of dollars in tax breaks to their billionaire and corporate donors while slashing healthcare and investing in Trump’s inhumane attack on our immigrant neighbors. | ** I was sent to Congress to fight for working people, vulnerable people, the aging, our kids, and our families. They want an oligarchy. We demand our multiracial democracy. With you in this fight, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib Date: Sat, Aug 9, 2025 Subject: WATCH: What my residents think about the Big Budget Betrayal To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Republicans are hoping that everyday people don’t know what’s in the Big Budget Betrayal bill. They better be ready for a rude awakening. I recently spoke with residents in my district to hear what they had to say about this disastrous new law. They called it "reverse Robin Hood." They said, "the billionaires need to share the wealth and stop being so greedy." And, when talking about how SNAP cuts are taking food from our kids, they said, "Why wouldn't you want our kids to be the biggest and the best?" The cuts Republicans made are so deep that 15 million people are expected to lose their health insurance and 51,000 people will die preventable deaths each year. And why? To fund trillions of dollars in tax cuts for the rich and corporations, and power Trump’s illegal, inhumane mass deportation scheme. Together, we’re saying hell no! This Republican bill hands a $90,000 annual tax cut to households making over $1 million a year while working people get roughly $40. Not $40 a day. $40 a year. That’s enough for a cup of coffee a month. And that’s before accounting for the impact of cuts to our healthcare and SNAP benefits. In just over six months, they have begun dismantling programs that have taken generations to build. But we won’t be silent. We will continue to organize our communities, rally in the streets, and object to Trump and the GOP’s government of, by, and for the billionaires. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Together, we will never stop demanding a democracy for the people, rather than an oligarchy for Trump and his billionaire friends. name: Tobias Read
subject: RESPONSE REQUESTED: Ban phones in public schools?
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250812em-ob2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250812em-ob2]
As Oregon’s Secretary of State and a member of the State Board of Education, I take our state’s K-12 education system extremely seriously.
As parents and educators become increasingly aware of the impact of social media and cell phone usage on students, conversations about the potential need to ban cell phone use in schools have gained momentum.
That’s why I’m reaching out today. I wanted to get your input on this critical question for the future of education and the raising of our kids. Your input is very important to me.
So let me know: Do YOU support banning cell phones in public schools? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
ANSWER NOW >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
The work to build a world-class education system for Oregon’s kids is never done.
There will always be more for us to do when it comes to building a public school system Oregon can be proud of — and I’m ready to dig in.
However, with such divisive questions facing our state over the next few years, I wanted to solicit your input on some of the most pressing issues.
So please, spare just a few seconds to let me know where you stand on the issue of cell phones in the classroom. Do you support banning them from our schools? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
ANSWER NOW >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! name: Claudia, United We Dream
subject: Exclusive Look at our 2025 East Coast Convening! 📸
body:
🗣️Resist, 🗣️Build, 🗣️Dream! | | | Peter, how did you get here? Echoed across the room, someone posed this question last month at our East Coast Membership Convening. A place where young people from all backgrounds engaged in reflection, strategy, and community — our membership convening reminded us of the power we hold when we unite to protect one another. Some of us joined this fight inspired by classmates who encouraged us to speak our minds. Others answered a knock on the door from a neighbor or friend. **Regardless of how we got here, it’s us, everyday people, who power our movement forward.** And, in this moment of escalating attacks against our immigrant neighbors, we’re the ones to build collective power and fight for a better future than the one that was handed to us. This retreat was a powerful reminder that we are not alone. Real change starts when we come together to resist, build, and dream. clean_body: 🗣️Resist, 🗣️Build, 🗣️Dream! | | | Peter, how did you get here? Echoed across the room, someone posed this question last month at our East Coast Membership Convening. A place where young people from all backgrounds engaged in reflection, strategy, and community — our membership convening reminded us of the power we hold when we unite to protect one another. Some of us joined this fight inspired by classmates who encouraged us to speak our minds. Others answered a knock on the door from a neighbor or friend. Regardless of how we got here, it’s us, everyday people, who power our movement forward. And, in this moment of escalating attacks against our immigrant neighbors, we’re the ones to build collective power and fight for a better future than the one that was handed to us. This retreat was a powerful reminder that we are not alone. Real change starts when we come together to resist, build, and dream. name: Team NDRC
subject: Why we can’t take our eyes off Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We need your help to defeat gerrymandering in Texas and nationwide
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113199760/562977786/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwZjQ4Y2RiLWFkNzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Yw7u6LiEn4sd2yaT0KT1qgSN4XaksqZ6VZRHC221lzw=&emci=43eda505-c876-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=20f48cdb-ad77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ceid=8431045)
---

**America’s Future Is Texas**
**— _The New Yorker_** Peter, There’s been a lot of talk about Texas recently. And rightfully so, because what we’re witnessing in Texas affects all of us. Anti-democracy forces have trapped us in a perpetual era of redistricting. Their latest stop is Texas, where Republicans have proposed an egregiously gerrymandered congressional map at the direction of Donald Trump. Here’s why this is so concerning: Texas’s congressional map is _already_ gerrymandered. But let’s dive into how that came to be. Texas’s population rate has been growing faster than any other state, with a good chunk of these newcomers leaning politically toward the left. So how have conservatives been able to hold on to power? **Peter, Republicans have manipulated their way into representation.** In 2003, when conservatives took over the state legislature, they rammed through a redistricting plan that carved up the state, ensuring they would hold absolute power. Politicians were able to cherry-pick the districts they would represent—instead of the other way around—and pass deeply unpopular policies on everything from abortion to voting rights, prompting other red states to follow lead. To date, the GOP has replicated this process nationwide, creating congressional districts that disenfranchise voters of their basic right to fair representation. **Put simply, when Republicans shamelessly attack the voting power of marginalized communities in Texas, it sets a national precedent. Now, if Texas moves forward with this mid-decade redraw, we know other states will follow their lead.** **The good news is that the NDRC was created for moments like these. Republicans have shown us time and time again that they will always try to build artificial power, and we have a proven strategy to deploy both offensive and defensive strategies to protect fair maps and fair representation for the short and long term.** [**But this is a tough fight and we need the full strength of this grassroots movement. Our work to protect fair maps may end up being one of the only routes we can take to save our democracy. Can you make a donation to the NDRC today to fuel this work?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113199761/562977787/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TexasLeads_email_20250812-NDRC-Tier1-TexasLeads_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250812-NDRC-Tier1-TexasLeads_&utm_campaign=TexasLeads&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwZjQ4Y2RiLWFkNzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Yw7u6LiEn4sd2yaT0KT1qgSN4XaksqZ6VZRHC221lzw=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We need your help to defeat gerrymandering in Texas and nationwide | America’s Future Is Texas — The New Yorker Peter, There’s been a lot of talk about Texas recently. And rightfully so, because what we’re witnessing in Texas affects all of us. Anti-democracy forces have trapped us in a perpetual era of redistricting. Their latest stop is Texas, where Republicans have proposed an egregiously gerrymandered congressional map at the direction of Donald Trump. Here’s why this is so concerning: Texas’s congressional map is already gerrymandered. But let’s dive into how that came to be. Texas’s population rate has been growing faster than any other state, with a good chunk of these newcomers leaning politically toward the left. So how have conservatives been able to hold on to power? Peter, Republicans have manipulated their way into representation. In 2003, when conservatives took over the state legislature, they rammed through a redistricting plan that carved up the state, ensuring they would hold absolute power. Politicians were able to cherry-pick the districts they would represent—instead of the other way around—and pass deeply unpopular policies on everything from abortion to voting rights, prompting other red states to follow lead. To date, the GOP has replicated this process nationwide, creating congressional districts that disenfranchise voters of their basic right to fair representation. Put simply, when Republicans shamelessly attack the voting power of marginalized communities in Texas, it sets a national precedent. Now, if Texas moves forward with this mid-decade redraw, we know other states will follow their lead. The good news is that the NDRC was created for moments like these. Republicans have shown us time and time again that they will always try to build artificial power, and we have a proven strategy to deploy both offensive and defensive strategies to protect fair maps and fair representation for the short and long term. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. name: Britney VanCitters
subject: Re: 🚨 TAKE ACTION: Stop the Climate Chaos Plan! 🚨
body:
Hi Peter,
We’re coming up on an important deadline, so I want to make sure you saw my last email. It’s up to us to stop the climate chaos plan and make sure that climate denial does not become the official U.S. policy. The Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) protects us from pollution that’s harmful to our bodies and planet. We can’t roll back the EPA’s standards for vehicles, power plants, and other climate-harming pollution. Please take a second to send your message now so we can stay protected tomorrow! [https://secure.everyaction.com/hEbNUE5J60izMdxOMcKbAQ2]
Take action now! [https://secure.everyaction.com/hEbNUE5J60izMdxOMcKbAQ2?contactdata=HqN614B27PKHi6d7i2PdxRgy03Gqp2O+n1d/aFHR2YYtXO/yBCmFEQHTHkNuobg9N4RfLOc9Hp1VI0djhwnN0YvIQpnesh3pAjtRAwF7yCcGRSSGJ0dU2F1p8YuGLQ5G]
If we take these proposed detrimental steps back, our health and environment will pay the price later.
DEADLINE TODAY 8/12: If you’re able to testify at the virtual public hearing for these proposed changes, the deadline to register is TODAY 8/12. Please find more information about how to register here [https://docs.google.com/document/d/17_STjcNfW7er7lR3MWrHoyx0655tVZ30XoLhJIR9Orw/edit?tab=t.0] . The hearing will take place on Zoom on August 19th and 20th, and all attendees must register.
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Britney_signature-removebg-preview.png]

OLCV Political & Organizing Director

Dear Peter,
The current administration is up to no good again, this time attacking our public health and pollution policies, and attempting to implement a climate denial plan that will roll back the Environmental Protection Agency’s (EPA) standards for vehicles, power plants, and other climate-harming pollution. Peter, [https://secure.everyaction.com/hEbNUE5J60izMdxOMcKbAQ2?contactdata=HqN614B27PKHi6d7i2PdxRgy03Gqp2O+n1d/aFHR2YYtXO/yBCmFEQHTHkNuobg9N4RfLOc9Hp1VI0djhwnN0YvIQpnesh3pAjtRAwF7yCcGRSSGJ0dU2F1p8YuGLQ5G] will you take a second to protect our health, environment, and economy? [https://secure.everyaction.com/hEbNUE5J60izMdxOMcKbAQ2]
Take action now! [https://secure.everyaction.com/hEbNUE5J60izMdxOMcKbAQ2?contactdata=HqN614B27PKHi6d7i2PdxRgy03Gqp2O+n1d/aFHR2YYtXO/yBCmFEQHTHkNuobg9N4RfLOc9Hp1VI0djhwnN0YvIQpnesh3pAjtRAwF7yCcGRSSGJ0dU2F1p8YuGLQ5G]
Donald Trump and EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin are putting forward a plan that claims climate change and the pollution that causes it pose no threat to public health or the environment. Zeldin and Trump’s Climate Chaos Plan makes climate denial official U.S. policy, and they intend to undo standards that limit pollution from cars and trucks, power plants and other sources of climate pollution. This Climate Chaos Plan is a cornerstone of Trump's Polluters' First Agenda that will do nothing to bring down costs or improve health for American families, and in fact will increase pollution that causes severe health conditions like asthma and lung cancer. It lets polluters get richer while we pay the price – with our health, our wallets, and our lives.
They will do this by eliminating the Endangerment Finding, which gives the EPA authority to regulate climate pollution. This move denies basic facts of climate change, and repeals carbon pollution and air quality protections that will increase Americans' energy costs, drive up prices on everyday goods and services, eliminate thousands of good-paying jobs, and result in tens of thousands of lost work days every year. Essentially, putting polluters and their profits over people.
Additionally, the EPA has proposed to roll back minimum federal standards for greenhouse gas emissions from motor vehicles [https://www.epa.gov/regulations-emissions-vehicles-and-engines/proposed-rule-reconsideration-2009-endangerment-finding] , increasing our risk for cancer and chronic disease, while damaging our environment and economy. Without these standards, American families will have to pay more for the next generation of cars, as they will be significantly more expensive to fuel, maintain, and repair. Not to mention, this would end the over 50 year practice of vehicle standards by the federal government.
Take action now! [https://secure.everyaction.com/hEbNUE5J60izMdxOMcKbAQ2?contactdata=HqN614B27PKHi6d7i2PdxRgy03Gqp2O+n1d/aFHR2YYtXO/yBCmFEQHTHkNuobg9N4RfLOc9Hp1VI0djhwnN0YvIQpnesh3pAjtRAwF7yCcGRSSGJ0dU2F1p8YuGLQ5G]
Please take action on this urgent matter now before the public hearings. [https://secure.everyaction.com/hEbNUE5J60izMdxOMcKbAQ2] It’s time to put the pressure on now before we pay the price with our health and environment later.
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Britney_signature-removebg-preview.png]

clean_body: Hi Peter, We’re coming up on an important deadline, so I want to make sure you saw my last email. It’s up to us to stop the climate chaos plan and make sure that climate denial does not become the official U.S. policy. The Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) protects us from pollution that’s harmful to our bodies and planet. We can’t roll back the EPA’s standards for vehicles, power plants, and other climate-harming pollution. Please take a second to send your message now so we can stay protected tomorrow! [] Take action now! [] If we take these proposed detrimental steps back, our health and environment will pay the price later. DEADLINE TODAY 8/12: If you’re able to testify at the virtual public hearing for these proposed changes, the deadline to register is TODAY 8/12. Please find more information about how to register here [] . The hearing will take place on Zoom on August 19th and 20th, and all attendees must register. Sincerely, [] Britney VanCitters (she/her) OLCV Political & Organizing Director [] Dear Peter, The current administration is up to no good again, this time attacking our public health and pollution policies, and attempting to implement a climate denial plan that will roll back the Environmental Protection Agency’s (EPA) standards for vehicles, power plants, and other climate-harming pollution. Peter, [] will you take a second to protect our health, environment, and economy? [] Take action now! [] Donald Trump and EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin are putting forward a plan that claims climate change and the pollution that causes it pose no threat to public health or the environment. Zeldin and Trump’s Climate Chaos Plan makes climate denial official U.S. policy, and they intend to undo standards that limit pollution from cars and trucks, power plants and other sources of climate pollution. This Climate Chaos Plan is a cornerstone of Trump's Polluters' First Agenda that will do nothing to bring down costs or improve health for American families, and in fact will increase pollution that causes severe health conditions like asthma and lung cancer. It lets polluters get richer while we pay the price – with our health, our wallets, and our lives. They will do this by eliminating the Endangerment Finding, which gives the EPA authority to regulate climate pollution. This move denies basic facts of climate change, and repeals carbon pollution and air quality protections that will increase Americans' energy costs, drive up prices on everyday goods and services, eliminate thousands of good-paying jobs, and result in tens of thousands of lost work days every year. Essentially, putting polluters and their profits over people. Additionally, the EPA has proposed to roll back minimum federal standards for greenhouse gas emissions from motor vehicles [] , increasing our risk for cancer and chronic disease, while damaging our environment and economy. Without these standards, American families will have to pay more for the next generation of cars, as they will be significantly more expensive to fuel, maintain, and repair. Not to mention, this would end the over 50 year practice of vehicle standards by the federal government. Take action now! [] Please take action on this urgent matter now before the public hearings. [] It’s time to put the pressure on now before we pay the price with our health and environment later. Sincerely, [] Britney VanCitters (she/her) OLCV Political & Organizing Director [] [] [] [] Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Jane Fonda
subject: The silence where songs used to be.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
I can close my eyes and still hear them.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113200761/562981482/1328794144?refcode=ea.c9756ff5-ae77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.c9756ff5-ae77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM5NzU2ZmY1LWFlNzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JUyxx1AqkqN0BFF43hx0iC1hbWdx7eFqg2fmV8xIQUA=&emci=19ac04e0-9677-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=c9756ff5-ae77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ceid=4823105)
---
I can close my eyes and still hear them. The meadowlarks, nightingales, and mourning doves... the song birds. Back then, when I was a girl in the early 1940s, you could hear their melodies clearly, wafting over the beige California hills, before there were freeways and houses covering the hills. Back then, when things weren't so great at home, I'd escape outside... the live oaks, sycamores, and bird songs brought solace, a sense that I belonged. Today, the symphony is quiet. For years I’d mourned its gradual disappearance, but it was the summer of 2018 — during the California wildfires — that the full force of what humans were doing to the natural world hit me. It was well over 105 degrees Fahrenheit in L.A. The skies were orange-brown, apocalyptic. I remember reading that birds were dropping dead out of the sky over New Mexico and Arizona. They couldn't make their normal migratory journey over the coast because of the wildfires, so they flew over the deserts instead. And they died of dehydration and exhaustion. Around that time, I read that there were almost 3 billion fewer birds in North America than there had been in 1970. My heart started to break. I thought about those birds from my childhood. I thought about all the voices that had once filled the air with such abundance, now reduced to silence. And the science backs up what I’ve been sensing. **A sweeping 2024 study identified at least 14,000 animal and plant species directly threatened by rising temperatures, intensifying storms, droughts, and other climate-related stresses.** Some, like the Spix’s macaw, are already gone, their bodies no longer able to withstand the heat, air pollution, loss of habitat and insects. The climate crisis isn’t some distant threat. It’s here, right now, reshaping the living world around us, a world that must be healthy if we humans are to survive. That's exactly why I started JanePAC. While people like Donald Trump make it easier for fossil fuel companies to poison our air, our water, and the places and species we cherish, we are supporting climate champions who will fight like hell to protect what's left and restore what we can. **We can still elect leaders who understand that saving the birds means saving ourselves. Leaders who will listen to the scientists calling for real-time monitoring of wildlife die-offs, smarter risk assessments, and policies that connect biodiversity conservation with bold climate action.** The silence where songs used to be doesn't have to be permanent. We can bring back the music, but only if each of us rolls up our sleeves, demands better, and refuses to give up on the world we love. So, roll up your sleeves with me, Jane Fonda [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113200762/562981483/2105508926?refcode=ea.c9756ff5-ae77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.c9756ff5-ae77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM5NzU2ZmY1LWFlNzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JUyxx1AqkqN0BFF43hx0iC1hbWdx7eFqg2fmV8xIQUA=) | [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113200763/562981484/2105508926?refcode=ea.c9756ff5-ae77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.c9756ff5-ae77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM5NzU2ZmY1LWFlNzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JUyxx1AqkqN0BFF43hx0iC1hbWdx7eFqg2fmV8xIQUA=)

Back then, when I was a girl in the early 1940s, you could hear their melodies clearly, wafting over the beige California hills, before there were freeways and houses covering the hills. Back then, when things weren't so great at home, I'd escape outside... the live oaks, sycamores, and bird songs brought solace, a sense that I belonged. Today, the symphony is quiet. For years I’d mourned its gradual disappearance, but it was the summer of 2018 — during the California wildfires — that the full force of what humans were doing to the natural world hit me. It was well over 105 degrees Fahrenheit in L.A. The skies were orange-brown, apocalyptic. I remember reading that birds were dropping dead out of the sky over New Mexico and Arizona. They couldn't make their normal migratory journey over the coast because of the wildfires, so they flew over the deserts instead. And they died of dehydration and exhaustion. Around that time, I read that there were almost 3 billion fewer birds in North America than there had been in 1970. My heart started to break. I thought about those birds from my childhood. I thought about all the voices that had once filled the air with such abundance, now reduced to silence. And the science backs up what I’ve been sensing. A sweeping 2024 study identified at least 14,000 animal and plant species directly threatened by rising temperatures, intensifying storms, droughts, and other climate-related stresses. Some, like the Spix’s macaw, are already gone, their bodies no longer able to withstand the heat, air pollution, loss of habitat and insects. The climate crisis isn’t some distant threat. It’s here, right now, reshaping the living world around us, a world that must be healthy if we humans are to survive. That's exactly why I started JanePAC. While people like Donald Trump make it easier for fossil fuel companies to poison our air, our water, and the places and species we cherish, we are supporting climate champions who will fight like hell to protect what's left and restore what we can. We can still elect leaders who understand that saving the birds means saving ourselves. Leaders who will listen to the scientists calling for real-time monitoring of wildlife die-offs, smarter risk assessments, and policies that connect biodiversity conservation with bold climate action. The silence where songs used to be doesn't have to be permanent. We can bring back the music, but only if each of us rolls up our sleeves, demands better, and refuses to give up on the world we love. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 8/12/2025
body:
Colorado isn’t creating jobs—it’s creating unemployment
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
I'm excited to be speaking at the CFRW CD8 District Meeting this weekend with Greeley Republican Women, Women of Weld, and Adams County Republican Women Trumpeteers! Join us at Ben's Brick Oven Pizza from 11am to 2pm this Saturday, August 16th. Can't wait to see you there! 🇺🇸
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** The Lee Fire near Meeker has scorched over 106,000 acres—now the [fifth-largest in state history](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—while Denver Mayor Mike Johnston touts falling homicide rates even as[]() [businesses flee downtown](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Kaiser has permanently [ended gender transition services for minors](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), citing medical and legal concerns, and the University of Colorado faces a [labor complaint from medical residents](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) alleging retaliation over unionization. Lawmakers are also staring down an [$800 million budget gap with no deal in sight](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), raising fears of cuts or tax hikes.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** President Trump is considering [deploying up to 1,000 National Guard troops](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to Washington, D.C., in a sweeping push to combat crime, restore order, and “liberate” the capital. In Texas, Governor Greg Abbott blasted Democrat lawmakers who [fled the state to break quorum](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—calling them “cowards” and “un-Texan”—and is pursuing legal action to vacate their seats for violating their constitutional oath.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Mike O’Donnell warns Colorado’s economy is stagnating, with job growth trailing most states and [unemployment nearly triple the national average](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—blaming heavy regulation and poor economic management. C. J. Garbo argues that [deputizing non-citizens](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) undermines sovereignty, legitimacy, and public trust, calling it a dangerous erosion of the principle that only citizens should wield state authority.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, August 12, 2025.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|

**[Colorado isn’t creating jobs—it’s creating unemployment](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MIKE O'DONNELL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_January 2023 was a changeover month of sorts in the United States because it marked a division between the taxpayer subsidized COVID economy and the less subsidized post-COVID economy._
_According to the latest U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) data, the United States added 3,149,000 jobs between January 2023 and June 2025, a 2.0 percent increase for the nation as a whole._
_Employment growth so far this century has averaged just under one percent a year, so the 2.0 percent figure is roughly on track (although preliminary July BLS data are less positive and subject to revision)._
_At the same time, unemployment increased by 1,268,000, a 22.1 percent rise. This is a less positive aspect of the economy that few seem to be talking about, even though more than seven million Americans were unemployed in June 2025._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[As businesses flee downtown Denver, Johnston points to falling homicide rate](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Denver Mayor Mike Johnston is touting a 28% drop in homicides as proof of downtown progress, but critics say it ignores surging property crime and chronic homelessness.
* Businesses continue to flee the city center, citing safety concerns, economic struggles, and declining customer traffic.
* Johnston defends his approach, claiming crime is down overall, while opponents argue the city’s broader public safety and economic health are still in crisis.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[The Dangerous Hubris of Deputizing Non-Citizens to Police Americans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* C. J. Garbo argues that granting police authority to non-citizens—such as green card holders or DACA recipients—undermines the sovereignty and legitimacy that citizenship confers in a constitutional republic.
* He warns that law enforcement power should only be entrusted to full citizens who have sworn allegiance, possess voting rights, and share mutual accountability under the Constitution.
* Garbo contends the policy disrespects immigrants who became citizens before serving, risks expanding to other civic roles, and erodes public trust by prioritizing demographics over shared constitutional values.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[The Rule 211 gamble: How two towns used Colorado law to effectively shut down an oil company’s core assets](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| STATE | AUGUST 8** _Buried wells, sworn affidavits and a state determined to make an example. This is the opening chapter of a three-part series on one oil and gas company’s final stand—and what the documents and data actually reveal. Start with the towns. Stay for the verdict._
__

**[Bled dry by the state: One oil company’s fight to survive ECMC’s war of attrition](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | AUGUST 8** _Jeffrey Kauffman stood at the edge of an excavation site—not to check production, but to explain why there wasn’t any. There was no rig, no flaring, no signs of oil moving to market. Just a fenced-off hole in the earth—and a state agency that wouldn’t let them fill it back in._
__

**[The man Polis vowed to destroy: Kevin Kauffman’s final fight for truth and legacy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | AUGUST 8** _On his 50th birthday, Kevin Kauffman stood waist-deep in the waters off Eilat, Israel. His son handed him a sealed envelope his accountant asked him to deliver on this day. He opened it, read what was inside and stood in silence._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor+Interest+%28via+Mountain+Minute%29)) or send us a message on social media to chat

name: Brigadier General James Emory Mace (Ret.), Father of Nancy Mace
subject: My daughter is in the fight of her life
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR
body:
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

Hi,

This is Brigadier General James Emory Mace, U.S. Army (Retired).
_TODAY, I WRITE TO YOU NOT AS A SOLDIER...BUT AS A FATHER._

I'm a PURPLE HEART veteran, and I’ve seen battle.

I’ve worn the uniform. I’ve buried friends who never made it home.
AND I’VE FELT THE STING OF A NATION THAT SOMETIMES FORGETS WHAT OUR
SACRIFICES WERE FOR.

_BUT MY DAUGHTER—CONGRESSWOMAN NANCY MACE—NEVER FORGOT.
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]_

Nancy was raised in the shadow of the flag. She saw the uniform. She
lived with the deployments. She knew the cost. AND INSTEAD OF RUNNING
FROM IT, SHE RAN TOWARD IT.

[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

When Nancy was 17, she dropped out of high school.

Most kids in that situation fall apart. But not Nancy. SHE PICKED
HERSELF UP, TOOK A JOB AT WAFFLE HOUSE, AND FOUGHT HER WAY BACK.

BY 21, SHE BECAME THE FIRST WOMAN TO GRADUATE FROM THE CITADEL, SOUTH
CAROLINA’S MILITARY COLLEGE. A PLACE I KNEW WELL.

[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

SUPPORT NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

NANCY THEN MADE IT TO CONGRESS, WHERE SHE REPRESENTED THE PEOPLE OF
SOUTH CAROLINA’S FIRST DISTRICT.

She’s been fighting her whole life; for herself, for her kids, for
the truth, and now...for her state.

TODAY, NANCY IS RUNNING FOR GOVERNOR OF SOUTH CAROLINA. AND JUST LIKE
SHE DID AT THE CITADEL, SHE’S MARCHING HEADFIRST INTO A BATTLE.
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

It’s hard sitting back as a father and hearing the terrible things
the media and the establishment say about her.

_BUT NANCY IS MY DAUGHTER. AND I KNOW THIS: SHE NEVER BACKS DOWN. AND
SHE NEVER STOPS FIGHTING._
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

I WANT TO ASK YOU SOMETHING FROM ONE PARENT, ONE PATRIOT, TO ANOTHER:

_WILL YOU SUPPORT MY DAUGHTER IN THE TOUGHEST BATTLE OF HER LIFE?_
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

SHE’S UP AGAINST A MACHINE THAT WANTS TO _ERASE THE VALUES OF
FAITH-BASED, SERVICE-MINDED AMERICANS WHO BELIEVE IN TRUTH, FAMILY,
AND COUNTRY._

Nancy stood up for me.

She stood up for EVERY veteran who was forgotten.

She stood up when sanctuary sheriffs released illegal alien criminals
onto South Carolina streets.

She stood up when they tried to let biological men compete in
women’s sports.

She stood up when OTHER REPUBLICANS STAYED SILENT.

AND NOW, SHE’S STANDING UP FOR YOU.

But she needs your backup.

_I MAY NOT WEAR THE UNIFORM ANYMORE, BUT I STILL BELIEVE IN ANSWERING
THE CALL._
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

Will you answer it with me today?

WHETHER IT’S $5, $10, OR $15, YOUR DONATION MEANS EVERYTHING RIGHT
NOW.
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

Nancy’s not running to make friends. _SHE’S RUNNING TO WIN._ TO
FIGHT. TO SERVE.

That’s what she learned growing up in our home.

That’s what she learned watching me go off to war.

_AND THAT’S WHAT SHE’LL CARRY WITH HER TO THE GOVERNOR’S
MANSION._

Please, on this solemn day, join me in standing with my daughter.

Yes, Nancy is a warrior. BUT SHE IS ALSO MY LITTLE GIRL—AND SHE
NEEDS YOU, PATRIOT.
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

DONATE TO NANCY'S CAMPAIGN
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

With respect,

General James Emory Mace (Ret.)

_PROUD FATHER OF NANCY MACE_

[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

$25
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=25]

$50
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=50]

$100
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active&amount=100]

OTHER AMOUNT
[https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor/8706-w-eml-purple-heart-dad-pov?utm_campaign=067000000087020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838373036&recurring=true&amount=26&utm_term=lrm-active]

HIGH SCHOOL DROPOUT. WAFFLE HOUSE WAITRESS. FIRST WOMAN TO GRADUATE
FROM THE CITADEL. SINGLE MOM. FIGHTER.

NANCY MACE WASN’T BORN INTO POWER. SHE WORKED FOR EVERY INCH OF
GROUND SHE’S GAINED.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash
browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League
connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

BY THE GRACE OF GOD, SHE TURNED THAT STRUGGLE INTO A STORY NO
POLITICIAN CAN TOUCH. She made history as the first woman to graduate
from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She
built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the
Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.

Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire
and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President
Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our
daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

SHE’S NOT HERE TO MAKE FRIENDS. SHE’S HERE TO MAKE HISTORY.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the
Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to
do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and
lead from the front.

SOUTH CAROLINA IS WORTH FIGHTING FOR. AND NANCY MACE IS JUST GETTING
STARTED.

PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186

Charleston, SC 29492

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=310627&trkid=841875127&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. SOUTH CAROLINA IS WORTH FIGHTING FOR. AND NANCY MACE IS JUST GETTING STARTED. PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186 Charleston, SC 29492

subject: They called a jeans ad “N*zi propaganda.”

body:
First: An American actress did a jeans ad. That’s it. No politics. No slogans.
Just an actress wearing jeans.

Then: The Left went berserk. Their woke activists raged online. Their
left-wing media allies piled on. Some even smeared her as a N*zi.

Why? Because the ad featured a successful woman who happens to be a registered
Republican.
Now: we need your help. If we let the far left get its way, every ad will be a
woke lecture. Enough is enough!
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/jeans-email-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_aafc_acs&utm_campaign=20250812_jeans-email_sb>

Woke propaganda is flooding our country and shaping young minds. It stops only
if we act now! The Left is enraged by President Trump and other Republicans’
efforts to strip the woke propaganda they spent BILLIONS of taxpayer dollars
pushing. Now they’re coming for the Senate, and if they win,they’ll use it to
silence conservatives, block our values, and destroy anyone who dares to think
differently.

I’m running for Senate to make sure that doesn’t happen.

I’ve fought for America in uniform. I’ve represented our nation on the world
stage. And I’m ready to fight for New Hampshire in the Senate, no matter how
ugly the Left’s attacks get.

But I can’t do it alone, Fellow American.

They’ve got Hollywood elites, liberal billionaires, and the mainstream media

Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help me fight back
and flip New Hampshire’s Senate seat RED?

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Feed Sack Dresses And Compassionate Companies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
The America that made feed sack dresses is worth fighting for.| | |
---
| | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/jFJRvgIZXmrItyNN2rcsXKjLpcsp7ckUSiW43Lzeg4L2lrz4zB89XIrbFfL2sLPURh3DrzZTWvtVaVCVyd0HzwLN308KbK5L8E6iEP-QGYfm7iM2RAwKv4krjNDqjEpcP2pst9WIcCLQHSsWpfgy-31xECVrWoix3XVWWNvLLZ1SYcCQLMQ17o7_sGwavbFva7Uo1vQnLzr0OHe-YkkkhquEGFESoxP--EXQDumosY25S813iUysFqpO9KRZicDsu6DhnfF3LW-rzjseI2ZFd9oxnTU53zmtBvp_KZSULfaxbmYbPCef4MX1d9YbL5-3MzBptE1BSt4c7pgd_4CTV8qOz_gh9ljeFqYmSmOIaacR43zaK0f1rOw6RkjVn9KTkp4DH-EDy_W38CrzAHGUwog3HCZUoMZjFaqpFS0nGpqkHL6aOh9B59WyOfbqxHMc25QyoeIy1K5pAEWe1HK3hJI28Jh3f8EL1-jCw3QhxA/hBrc8ctMwyTyCIuZeBnkfLneqpY8qdGD/11)
---
| | Peter,
---
| | America used to have companies that cared about people—not just profits. Back in the 1920s, flour and feed mills noticed poor families sewing their cloth sacks into clothing. Instead of ignoring it, they changed the fabric—printing beautiful patterns that allowed impoverished mothers across America to sew feed sack dresses their daughters could be proud to wear. That was compassion. That was customer-first thinking. That was America at its best. Now? Corporations deliver your dinner on a payment plan, design products to break, fill, and addict our kids to apps they engineered to be as addictive as possible. Then they hire big-city PR teams and lobbyists to deflect accountability. Why? Because today’s corporate giants view people as nothing more than potential profit. **[Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help take on Big Tech, Big Food, and the political establishment that protects them?](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/ltilYju7_OC4jbvRevYr51jOp2Tgs4cessRZcvZOuIjVIIfs_LgaqEVTvxSCmb9MIocmzmddydKFNP9im-lUlggxDwqnxVDXGxJdE5o7rhdDk_BPSFe9V3ct54SrGQoxyMvleWNBnHnlSurvJ3spRoSxoocCg71a4Y-E1_Jsre19rUxMHpHjC4DdokeXRtAlcuIk1veY_h6iHHZacj02uX_gEhpWV-h_rKjLlucAJkgdQjmC7i9xwab4vVkDaSUsVwAy47GMvPRT0-wcIzzMYB9fv-uwQ8J_ZnjJuu_9H1cdM332Uz9s0Jjn6XaiF37FAiJN9RxmxiUrt8-DAixHGIAZj36V6jOgTBvn2SnnvdhyuB0oUUIlhN30DXifNPRXbqWx7jx5v9lt9k_8vpO6G8ZA3pLBD_Edzjxc-AXpua4GZ0aEAe1bMUG2MklW2x11m4pX8LXyq5hMCigl9DIZa1NFUe8GGwr-x0sYcom5Tg/-LilPrxo3gFj4rsq06fgXa1PYl82d-g8/11)** We don’t have to accept this race to the bottom. We must put **Main Street over Wall Street, people over profits, and health over corporate greed**. But building that movement takes resources—and I can’t do it alone. The feed sack dress wasn’t just clothing—it was a symbol of a time when companies treated customers like neighbors, not numbers on a spreadsheet. Let’s bring that America back. [👉 **Donate now to fight for people over profits »** ](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/uv8bvGEVLqAjQ-HiyjleLnd9KqL3jqTSifi3l9uUdtZbLcGdP2b-KajWCf_oqwVVqa8C0VLZzEQtFkqBDj_Ki-kQLCm_2KF-61blOC6RttGe-9D-y4Y-LFgmKBJCEegUKUAxve1LMYfaLMt9K2-yzY7oJ32Ba9cRgIOdhKtbv7kjEAQhqM_IigtvsDz1zQpZoneJtOllVz6qRWToh9K5pY0FihFW-6o9VZqjz2jOEFiC1F3qgXL69NVBkHyzVy8YB1yjXpK0Q2-vYH5gLaLYbCiqETWcXJ6pvhSYVhYPuTPDNqCtCoAbV8Kn1ItImSZC3oteVz76UjfDJCspNtV4WDFL-fhxfW0AbmEhPHcrCptazA7wtoo9LZPcqB2Lyt7Qza6B-57vJs6fPoS9lsawaCrsFZC7_C8Vo4mSr0f8KVg0EAmMVrSZP1ET-rPmsDwNoHLn72XmMCZfW3LVMc8I1LlYkyd1eiez8PPtHFfrEg/wCEjzIkE7T_3JaGYsj2iZbElMKjhZCsx/11)

clean_body: The America that made feed sack dresses is worth fighting for.| | | | | | | Peter, | | America used to have companies that cared about people—not just profits. Back in the 1920s, flour and feed mills noticed poor families sewing their cloth sacks into clothing. Instead of ignoring it, they changed the fabric—printing beautiful patterns that allowed impoverished mothers across America to sew feed sack dresses their daughters could be proud to wear. That was compassion. That was customer-first thinking. That was America at its best. Now? Corporations deliver your dinner on a payment plan, design products to break, fill, and addict our kids to apps they engineered to be as addictive as possible. Then they hire big-city PR teams and lobbyists to deflect accountability. Why? Because today’s corporate giants view people as nothing more than potential profit. We don’t have to accept this race to the bottom. We must put Main Street over Wall Street, people over profits, and health over corporate greed. But building that movement takes resources—and I can’t do it alone. The feed sack dress wasn’t just clothing—it was a symbol of a time when companies treated customers like neighbors, not numbers on a spreadsheet. Let’s bring that America back. | | For our families, Senator Josh Hawley | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | | | | | |

name: D.C. Drama
subject: Trump’s wannabe dictator play
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
Ten years after the Supreme Court guaranteed marriage rights to same-sex couples, conservatives are making their first formal move to tear it all down.
Kim Davis , the Kentucky county clerk who refused to issue marriage licenses to gay couples in 2015, just asked the Supreme Court to overturn Obergefell v. Hodges , the landmark decision that made marriage equality the law of the land.
Her case is backed by the same extremist movement that overturned Roe v. Wade . They want to let states ban LGBTQ+ marriages. and they’re openly saying they’ll use the same playbook they used to attack reproductive freedom.
If we don’t act now, they could strip away marriage rights for millions of Americans.
Republicans have shown us exactly what they’ll do with power: erase rights, target vulnerable communities, and roll back decades of progress. We have to meet this threat head-on.
This is why we fight. This is why we can’t sit back and “wait to see what happens.”
Chip in now to defend marriage equality [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?]

clean_body: [] friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin. Ten years after the Supreme Court guaranteed marriage rights to same-sex couples, conservatives are making their first formal move to tear it all down. Kim Davis , the Kentucky county clerk who refused to issue marriage licenses to gay couples in 2015, just asked the Supreme Court to overturn Obergefell v. Hodges , the landmark decision that made marriage equality the law of the land. Her case is backed by the same extremist movement that overturned Roe v. Wade . They want to let states ban LGBTQ+ marriages. and they’re openly saying they’ll use the same playbook they used to attack reproductive freedom. If we don’t act now, they could strip away marriage rights for millions of Americans. Republicans have shown us exactly what they’ll do with power: erase rights, target vulnerable communities, and roll back decades of progress. We have to meet this threat head-on. This is why we fight. This is why we can’t sit back and “wait to see what happens.” Chip in now to defend marriage equality [?] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Express Donate: $10 [] Express Donate: $25 [] Express Donate: $50 [] Express Donate: $100 [] Or, donate another amount [] Let’s make it clear: marriage equality is not up for debate. name: Adam Schiff
subject: I have some breaking news
body:
| This is Adam Schiff. I have some important news to share with you, folks: **Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113201291/562983433/-521534794?refcode=em-8.12.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2RmZTdhOC1iMDc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ypjlHSkGxv6m1paVcsqwq9t9OdoM87gn0GeZWSjgXAM=) Ed Martin, if you don’t remember, was the Interim U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other — and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it. Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived “enemies” of the Trump administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs, urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than follow his unethical edicts. Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending insurrectionists who broke into the Capitol on January 6 and advancing bogus claims of election fraud. He is close friends with an avowed neo-Nazi, appearing with and praising him repeatedly. _Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin’s dangerous nomination. _ When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed Martin to lead a “weaponization” task force at the Justice Department to go after the president’s enemies. I was at the top of the list. And now, Ed Martin is investigating me and carrying out not just the president’s political retribution, but his own, as well. [**Folks, this is going to get ugly. But I will not be deterred from speaking out, fighting back, and holding Trump accountable every single day. name: Heartland Patriots HQ
subject: Do you think elected officials should be accountable to the same laws as everyone else?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Public service should be a sacred responsibility, not a shield from accountability.
#
We’ve got just one quick question for you today, Peter:
**Do you think elected officials should be held accountable to the same laws as everyone else?**
**[YES, THEY SHOULD BE HELD ACCOUNTABLE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/hp-accountability-survey-august25?t=1&akid=9260%2E614464%2ExedHV9)**
**[NO, THEY SHOULDN’T BE HELD ACCOUNTABLE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/hp-accountability-survey-august25?t=2&akid=9260%2E614464%2ExedHV9)**
**Public service should be a sacred responsibility, not a shield from accountability.**
But more and more often, we’re witnessing powerful elected officials and elites shamelessly dodge consequences that everyday people would face without question.
It’s a broken system. And it has caused a massive erosion of public trust in the people we have elected to represent our communities. So today, we’re asking to confirm, Peter: **Do you think elected officials should be accountable to the same laws as everyone else?**
**[YES, THEY SHOULD BE HELD ACCOUNTABLE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/hp-accountability-survey-august25?t=3&akid=9260%2E614464%2ExedHV9)**
**[NO, THEY SHOULDN’T BE HELD ACCOUNTABLE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/hp-accountability-survey-august25?t=4&akid=9260%2E614464%2ExedHV9)**
Thanks for sharing your input, Peter.
Heartland Patriots HQ

name: Wesley Bell
subject: Our public health isn't a joke.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
RFK Jr. and Trump don't care about your health. Peter,

Secretary of Health and Human Services Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is using his power to spread dangerous misinformation about vaccines and healthcare, _and I refuse to stay quiet about it._

Earlier this year I joined my colleagues in demanding answers from RFK Jr. after he downplayed the threat of a dangerous bird flu outbreak. But instead of acting on science, he decided to double down on misinformation and conspiracy theories.

_And that's only the beginning._

Since he was handed the reins to America's public health organization, RFK Jr. has cut **$500 million** in funding for mRNA vaccine research – this is the same vaccine make-up that led us to the COVID-19 vaccine, and updated vaccines for the flu and other deadly diseases. And now, he's calling for a “review” of the recommended vaccine schedule for kids, not because of science, **but because of conspiracy theories.**

Let's be clear, Peter: This isn’t just politics, it’s plain dangerous, and it will cost people their lives. Public health experts are already underfunded and stretched thin, and pulling resources and ignoring science will make it even harder to protect our families. Every child and every family — _no matter their zip code_ — deserves access to the care, treatments, and vaccines that keep us safe.

[**To keep fighting back against this extreme agenda, we need to keep our campaign strong. If you believe in science and want leaders who will fight for public health, safety, and to protect our kids, chip $5 or anything you can today ahead of our crucial mid-month fundraising deadline. | We recently hosted an enlightening and informative webinar titled **“Stem Cells Made Simple”** , where we explored the science, safety, and benefits of stem cells derived from cord blood in a way that was easy to understand. The webinar provided a clear breakdown of how stem cells work, where they come from, and how they may support regeneration, immune modulation, and improved quality of life. Whether you're new to the concept or looking to deepen your understanding, this session offered powerful insights into one of the most promising areas of integrative health. If you missed the live webinar, don’t worry, we posted the full recording for those who would like to learn more at their own pace. In the meantime, if you're interested in scheduling a one-on-one consultation to see if regenerative therapy might be right for you or a loved one, click here to learn more.

| We’re excited to announce that **tickets are officially on sale** for the **Autism Health Summit 2026** – happening **April 24–25, 2026** at the beautiful **Legacy Resort & Spa in San Diego, CA**! **Early Bird Special – Save 10%**
Register now and receive **10% off** your ticket with promo code **EarlyBird10**. This limited-time offer is valid through **Nov 1st only** , so don’t wait! You can also apply through your California Regional Center for approval. **Event Dates:**
* **Friday & Saturday, April 24–25** – Full conference with expert speakers, panels, and networking
* **Sunday, April 26** – **Optional Vendor Day** : An extra opportunity to connect with exhibitors and explore products, services, and resources that support the autism community

This one-of-a-kind, parent-driven event brings together top doctors, therapists, researchers, and educators to share the latest in integrative health, biomedical treatments, therapies, nutrition, and more. Whether you're a parent, caregiver, or healthcare professional, the Autism Health Summit is designed to inform, inspire, and empower. Don’t miss out on a transformative weekend of learning, connection, and hope.
