name: Derrick Van Orden
subject: Patty cake, patty cake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
I knew there was a lot of corruption in DC before I took office. I knew there was a lot of thumb-twiddling and lollygagging. But I didn’t know how bad it was.
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d53f6cae20ea4de1855061051a376a43&_e=Icsjx15GVhE8sjqICuTJn9VXv5zhw4GE_45CfHlDM9FIHGuGApjaT1Vc4zp1qs2x5fwYGw5YGNYGFyjkWGFFwAUb2HhPGboibELFwRa_jROThrtu-Se6Sg7UDO30xtDedv95lg18KwHQXja3gswFx8YbMdAloewU1xjf5i6WYIzom_vwOxYzIWHuGtSdekBZfspp15Esii-qgU6OASdpTOyUqrrR74jmsmbYdYJEpe1TeerteIjCbgYK_wdfI23NU2gG7HGSokAcvwzwCPzxgjS3uWKt-Kt6wUSB8bmIcaEduvMFFUeGZoH2j57U7zeZmYw0Z9rF04Oy-nqZOIkYPS8LUXSFx4D9wdLLZUPPUNqtvJkg8NTiGD-tVzpr1TlePCnflYCk66VZYQg_RQoKfYCAg3jCYra-N3t2zDv3g59wtPY0rqV2qM0Qcr0KHmBESj3Ki1AyqkxMfqzrxdzD1vEp_3GkHEkwjm2vHsDcl8ZViJumQlUbkbyOCHNFSCDCOnUjQY0cPijXpD4Oxd-HYVwRd6VXC5amadWrMm8Arum3oeRACv4GRvlknzrAge8AEkNU-z5MG169v8QtekoBwF7qEG24n8fdz5owQtfoiQVxKK99-tw83k24DkFSdJ_JxmUqNPx3b4-D9O8ccaaO9fbHP8bbcYK7R-469Q1aw7_yTc8DDqQBiMyekKiQc0tLvE0nHL6buEa8-lvwdXg-Zbp85tnpYL2N3YycZVweIRlIZN9KcwWQcZZXesym9tEo)I'm not here to play patty cake, Fellow American.
I first ran for office for the same reason that I joined the US Navy; I wanted to serve our country.And just like when I served our country as a Navy SEAL for over two decades, I have given everything I've got during my time in Congress. It's the greatest honor I have ever had and I'm so grateful to folks like you who always have my back and keep me in this fight.
Unfortunately, too many of my colleagues don't share the same sense of duty or understand the gravity of our jobs. We have been elected to govern the greatest nation in history. American taxpayers did not send their representatives to DC to line their pockets or just play patty cake!
I knew there was a lot of corruption in DC before I took office. I knew there was a lot of thumb-twiddling and lollygagging. But I didn't know how bad it was.
I can tell you from firsthand experience; DC has a lot of problems. It takes a veteran's focus and a Navy SEAL's true sense of duty to serve his country to get anything done around here.
The Left and the RINO establishment have seen that I won't play ball and let their antics slide. They know that I came to DC on a mission and they HATE it!
A Soros-backed group has already committed over a MILLION dollars toward knocking me out of this seat.On top of that, Bernie Sanders has been campaigning for my Democrat opponent. Things are looking grim.
I'm writing you today to ask for your support. Here's my call to action: [Please donate $16 or more to help me and my Team fight off Soros and Sanders so I can keep serving you in Congress.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d53f6cae20ea4de1855061051a376a43&_e=Icsjx15GVhE8sjqICuTJn9VXv5zhw4GE_45CfHlDM9FIHGuGApjaT1Vc4zp1qs2x5fwYGw5YGNYGFyjkWGFFwAUb2HhPGboibELFwRa_jROThrtu-Se6Sg7UDO30xtDedv95lg18KwHQXja3gswFx8YbMdAloewU1xjf5i6WYIzom_vwOxYzIWHuGtSdekBZfspp15Esii-qgU6OASdpTOyUqrrR74jmsmbYdYJEpe1TeerteIjCbgYK_wdfI23NU2gG7HGSokAcvwzwCPzxggnzs3GTRZrkSZjlCuJOyJlvTOaRBSPHbMexDKLDTlxUWKf4VW9wlbnEuCEvvI_T6fXL2QBOVkZFJVB9u4hRuhQiIJYUmFMAV9r2FqgMpPobXAjwn_edCszRaEFtL453oEAy1ZwaBnN1RQyF9BZLi2Mt0UjVK2bgCl-u4BQxBP_eAapZnO-ml_CIZmx48i-WMf4EKEdA69ICHqvhdXTEC8DLj26iZPamG91JaLOMcrxa_pV-jUZGCm_NEdvkeboaApxXJZinPZlxKGtAQ_y69gJvu58I8WVnxCOoWKCrwQChMvp_1zigq-IE5mC-JFes09l6HeCgKyHP7DjzJoujjdVFCrs6x7BBSrTsA_gndjQsw-sd3jFK8yb_z9Dugj5tVreZn4boRbycXzeixlm-DKAicNWYhNvjItSOdhSvjEkbO3NB3VNOiUIRhq6rtMdglKeg8PnkEdBgZgFR2pWb6HsoWBB0Bn_7WuPfM7Vl2Mzz)[DONATE $16 NOW >>

clean_body: I knew there was a lot of corruption in DC before I took office. I knew there was a lot of thumb-twiddling and lollygagging. But I didn’t know how bad it was. not here to play patty cake, Fellow American. I first ran for office for the same reason that I joined the US Navy; I wanted to serve our country.And just like when I served our country as a Navy SEAL for over two decades, I have given everything I've got during my time in Congress. It's the greatest honor I have ever had and I'm so grateful to folks like you who always have my back and keep me in this fight. Unfortunately, too many of my colleagues don't share the same sense of duty or understand the gravity of our jobs. We have been elected to govern the greatest nation in history. American taxpayers did not send their representatives to DC to line their pockets or just play patty cake! I knew there was a lot of corruption in DC before I took office. I knew there was a lot of thumb-twiddling and lollygagging. But I didn't know how bad it was. I can tell you from firsthand experience; DC has a lot of problems. It takes a veteran's focus and a Navy SEAL's true sense of duty to serve his country to get anything done around here. The Left and the RINO establishment have seen that I won't play ball and let their antics slide. They know that I came to DC on a mission and they HATE it! A Soros-backed group has already committed over a MILLION dollars toward knocking me out of this seat.On top of that, Bernie Sanders has been campaigning for my Democrat opponent. Things are looking grim. I'm writing you today to ask for your support. Here's my call to action: can't thank you enough for your prayers and support. May God bless you and may God bless our nation. -Derrick Van OrdenUS Congressman | * | "Thanks to your help, I'm able to work for you every day, but a donation of any amount will go a long way!" | | | USE OF MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY, THE DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY, OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE. | | Paid for by Van Orden for Congress | Hey, ${Recipient.FIRSTNAME}! It's Retired Navy SEAL Derrick Van Orden. I'm in the tightest race in the country and I want to make sure I can update my top supporters on where my Team and I stand. Please add my email, team@email.vanorden4congress.com, to your address book to make sure you receive important messages from me and my Team! Follow the link below to your email provider to get step by step instructions on how to add us to your address book. If you don't know how to do that, you can see how here: -, , , , Thanks so much for being on my Team! | PO Box 1836 La Crosse, WI 54602

subject: FIGHT BACK NOW: Fuel My War to Purge the Deep State and Reshape Trump's America!
body:
Are you as FURIOUS as I am? The fake news media and the corrupt deep state are in FULL PANIC MODE because I'm exposing their slimy schemes and RESHAPING President Trump's administration from the inside out!
| If this is irrelevant to you, please click **[unsubscribe here](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/Pa7VylBVdFoe4zqoK420mg)** to be removed.

[****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/cC9g78rLvqw7Ncfwyey892PA/Pa7VylBVdFoe4zqoK420mg) Dear Fellow Patriot Warriors,

**Are you as FURIOUS as I am?**

The fake news media and the corrupt deep state are in FULL PANIC MODE because **I'm exposing their slimy schemes and RESHAPING President Trump's administration from the inside out!**

That's right--outlets like **Wired** , **Politico** , **Washington Post** , and the rest of the press are screaming about how "**Laura Loomer is leading the charge to PURGE disloyal traitors "** from the National Security Council, FDA, NSA, and beyond.

**For the mainstream media, I 've become a headline of upheaval within the White House.**

For the government officials who are undermining Trump's agenda, **I 've become their biggest threat.**

But I need your help to keep researching and investigating. [**Please donate today to help me keep going.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/cC9g78rLvqw7Ncfwyey892PA/Pa7VylBVdFoe4zqoK420mg)

I've been darting around the country as my small staff continues their work. I'm meeting with sources, verifying everything, and in between, when called to the Oval Office, I fly to Washington on my dime.

This is my job. I don't have a lobbying firm backed by corporate dollars. And I'm not being sponsored by anyone but hard-working Americans like you.

I know it's a lot to ask, but I'm doing this for us . . . so our nation can be strong and the president we elected can truly Make America Great Again. [**Will you help me?**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/cC9g78rLvqw7Ncfwyey892PA/Pa7VylBVdFoe4zqoK420mg)

From blasting bureaucrats who sabotage America First to forcing out deep-state snakes, **President Trump knows I'm the tip of the spear --and he's listening to US!**

The hundreds of articles about me aren't just headlines; it's a live reporting of the **WAR that 's going on for the heart of our nation**, and **WE'RE WINNING** because of relentless fighters like YOU and me!

My explosive exposes demand non-stop digging, dangerous travel to hunt down leads, and firepower to blast the truth across X and every platform that dares to let freedom ring. **[** Without YOUR immediate support**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/cC9g78rLvqw7Ncfwyey892PA/Pa7VylBVdFoe4zqoK420mg), the enemy wins--and we CANNOT let that happen!**

**[**STAND WITH ME IN THIS BATTLE RIGHT NOW!**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/cC9g78rLvqw7Ncfwyey892PA/Pa7VylBVdFoe4zqoK420mg)**

[**Chip in**$25, $50, $100, or whatever you can muster****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/cC9g78rLvqw7Ncfwyey892PA/Pa7VylBVdFoe4zqoK420mg) to arm me with the resources to **CRUSH the corruption** , keep the purges rolling, and **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN --FOR REAL!**

**Let's RAGE against the machine TOGETHER! America First or BUST!**

Unleashed and Unapologetic,
Laura Loomer

name: Chris Pappas
subject: BREAKING: Marriage rights are under threat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
This isn’t hypothetical. It’s real – and it’s personal.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=1818%2E582294%2EsbCeqA)
A decade ago when the Supreme Court finally recognized marriage equality as the law of the land, it affirmed the dignity of countless LGBTQ+ families across America.
_Now that very ruling is under threat._
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250812_1_marriage?refcode=em20250812-1818&amount=5&refcode2=1818_582294_sbCeqA&akid=1818%2E582294%2EsbCeqA)
If the Court overturns marriage equality, loving couples could lose protections overnight. Families would be torn apart. Lives uprooted.
This isn’t hypothetical. It’s real — and it’s personal to me, my husband Vann, and so many Granite Staters.
**Elections have consequences.** The Senators we elect have a say in who sits on the Court, and those justices will shape our freedoms for generations to come.
Trump has stacked the Court with hardline conservatives — and right now extremists are determined to erase hard-won rights for LGBTQ+ families.
I can’t promise this fight will be easy or that the road ahead won’t be hard.
But I can promise you this: **I will never stop working to protect the rights and freedoms of every Granite Stater.**
[**Chip in $5 now to send me to the Senate to keep fighting for our rights.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250812_1_marriage?refcode=em20250812-1818&amount=5&refcode2=1818_582294_sbCeqA&akid=1818%2E582294%2EsbCeqA)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250812_1_marriage?amount=5&refcode=em20250812-1818&refcode2=1818_582294_sbCeqA&akid=1818%2E582294%2EsbCeqA)**
With pride and determination,
Chris Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250812-1?t=2&refcode2=1818_582294_sbCeqA&akid=1818%2E582294%2EsbCeqA)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge
body:
emergeamerica.org [emergeamerica.org]
Peter,
At the direction of Donald Trump, Texas Republicans are rushing to redraw the state’s congressional maps before the midterm elections. And Texas Democrats left the state to block a vote on these unconstitutional maps. It’s a bold move to protect democracy, and it’s the kind of leadership this moment demands.
Join Emerge on Monday, August 18th at 3:00pm ET for an “Emerge-ncy Update” virtual event to hear from Emerge alums, Texas Democratic Representative Rhetta Bowers who broke quorum and DNC Vice Chair Shasti Conrad for a strategy update on fighting back. We’ll also hear from Emerge President and CEO A’shanti F. Gholar and Emerge Texas Executive Director Becca DeFelice about Emerge’s work in this moment.

name: Local Democracy Project
subject: Trickle-down politics doesn't work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
At Local Democracy Project, we're committed to funding local races first. Here's why:
* **Trickle-down politics fails** : Investing only in state and federal races leaves local communities under-resourced and weakens long-term political power.
* **Local races matter:** Down-ballot organizing builds infrastructure, mobilizes voters, and lays the foundation for future state and federal wins.
* **The Local Democracy model:** By supporting local candidates and grassroots organizations, Local Democracy Project strengthens democracy where it’s often overlooked.
* **A long-term strategy is essential** : Republicans have built power through decades of local organizing—Democrats must do the same to rebuild our democracy.

******[We're writing more about our vision at LocalDemocracyProject.org - read the rest of this article here!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRbkFAhEzB2soq1vzyRdB1I0PGuWAW9sKQ2D-ywEpQoQRkVMTCvTVcPdLDLsGGruiLE9NKMcHmhaxpwyvFjHcTCT-eUlvXFMG-6MMZBNDBD1sUODXfSEpTrOmtYY0xXwA6uw3bCFoKQD2UV1efmF6oKiFjELc-8XmEOJq4CEJ_6Z--qMjgIRQUkJsdNxn_hYPyHmD9ZkrLjbDlqYzUX86ILAqKSLZZRlpDAedQb5hfjwLbC_ydeCFGdxreFcb5WoPWJzoWZEsF5jHdTxlOpxA6pMihuZW7ESitZ6CYAJgzaodo0UsX_t1wEFK7jGFESNUhBaVAix6fs3KELXo-CHFE1kibUcNqVBvQIkmgtV9WSq/4iz/71SBOcHKTS-3dPdIPIQWDw/h0/h001.v0k6CEYBjJZ0BvDMEn3cH94_AUX15oYLZsZA6wKYQZY)** [READ MORE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRbkFAhEzB2soq1vzyRdB1I0PGuWAW9sKQ2D-ywEpQoQRkVMTCvTVcPdLDLsGGruiLE9NKMcHmhaxpwyvFjHcTCT-eUlvXFMG-6MMZBNDBD1b2o1MXXVtU_WXBkOK9hA6LFtmn27tOCUr0CqylnuU6bw3Q_XM3LUpCza7ZTKXFefx5ZAKTqO7Uun2Zwow65j2LtRNyuP2rjQFrwk05Txoycp_CyN7EfykWpeEOQRFLrreQYK-fUn44ZGbNhHMABR5HlHzDMufSQ4GEFN5SA0btu6KVXeHGA7JzyUYofnVglUO4iLw9i6VPdiZ3u_kvtsnPfhjSN0XOZG6LfnjcrmRszxF9yu0_HF7ZoTdSF_ns9U/4iz/71SBOcHKTS-3dPdIPIQWDw/h1/h001.VLPabd6htpgmnvoLSNaClE3eKDbRwR3R8S3YTlFMf94)

Hey, it’s Sheriff Chad Bianco.

Typing this from a gas station in Fresno. I grabbed a coffee, filled the tank, and I’m headed north to Modesto.

Our campaign isn’t about press conferences or polished speeches. It’s about reaching real Californians. That’s why we’re driving town to town: San Diego, Riverside, Bakersfield, and through the Central Valley.

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Trump’s turning D.C. into a police state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Hey there -

Funny how President Trump couldn’t find the National Guard during an insurrection in our nation’s capital, but now that Washington D.C. has crime on an overall decline, he decides it’s time to flood the streets with troops and officers.

Donald Trump couldn’t care less about public safety.

Yesterday’s move was nothing more than a political stunt to distract Americans from rapidly increasing prices, a failing economy, and the Epstein files.

We will not stand by and do nothing while this President tries to turn Washington D.C. into a fascist police state and plans to do the same in other cities across the country.

If we’re going to hold Trump accountable and stop his dangerous agenda, we need to fight back now. Chip in whatever you can today to help us protect our democracy.

DEFEND DEMOCRACY » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Aug2025-FR-August-DC?&refcode=E14591-20250812-DCPoliceState-SL-Trump&amount=25]

Let’s send a clear message: we will not be intimidated, and we will never stop defending the values that make America free.

— Eric

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Guided by faith, duty, and country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for. |

---
Fellow Conservative,

I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan, and proud son of two working-class parents. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve the country I love. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate—but looking at what’s happening in our state and nation, I know I have to.

Minnesota is being led by two extreme voices: _**Governor Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—my opponent—who is somehow even more radical than her boss.**_ While our cities burned in 2020, she led the charge against law enforcement while Walz hesitated. That’s not leadership. That’s chaos.

Meanwhile, crime has increased, small businesses have struggled, and our schools fail to teach the basics. The Minnesota I grew up in—where I learned to skate, hunt, and respect my neighbors—feels like it’s slipping away.

I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday—October 2001— _**just weeks after 9/11.**_

_**I didn’t wait. I went.**_

And for the next 20+ years, I continued to serve. Not behind a desk or on cable news, but in the field—on missions that mattered, often in places you’ll never see on a map.

I don’t come from wealth or political pedigree. I come from hard work, long winters, and a deep desire to serve something bigger than myself. I earned degrees from Harvard, Johns Hopkins, and my MBA—not because I wanted to impress anyone, but because I wanted to serve better and lead smarter.

Now, I’m taking that same spirit to this campaign.
_**

[**HELP ME PROTECT THE AMERICA WE LOVE
CHIP IN $10 TODAY**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b3aa8306a96f408dabd6fae693ff2309&_e=P-DwLGWMpbWxmE3hXJQr57JhrAEiWY0v1z1bd02zuXT6zQvXR7TbwiRqk8BnPSMrvGiYb5nnxwGk95-nrvTvNtK5b2O7xl6D100rvHcibkG9uYVFsCVqmrlirORah740d8XI3G14vygTultrVVZYl8XKSjgSasOa-vCTF9EsK0vcHdUz8VjX7Kqw_DglyDrhsSO-NVKpBU3CNG6UNFo1K75v1SLA5dXt0rTGyYAQIO8_ekHKis4Z0Tzy9ZU5WWpUGyYjPCVPA2pQFSChEh4eihPR8TYtI19XMfSHcAM6s5_AbGV-gl8XQMNnL2LE_iGVMprKgL4HAK2NwHWSo03cezP3c3O3sMDXvnq3kBz6pxz62FNTnFXCpgnGo3Oo0vgX0wVW_E3_QRuU7sh4N0yPyGIpUDZq3nupbxJ9EYTIts-Omib-k7mzFyPLKSEc5WOqByWIE-GIWDPjLQJDwrfSSWK73Ntxr8t7yhsm6nq2g2ktWKIjNuDlRaf0VEbSVniqJAMuGnS73z937vdKCz7nuephLoJiDlLgs6GjrvIxGAHN4W1FxVya_vU93c_QzQoJm0Bf1K8walBY0v7KiMy92vorzNpBgfyw6rfVISGnulXifF2ldRUnNeGpjU2U5OyJfrITAAbqGkgF7vM8IF4JiMdadcpVpByJqWyoIdldq9yOhCsCNXM-WiZeJLkCvExtml-R5sA9UhFw2s2sO9kVgg23JCwTrYFi_YkdtEBTFjIlSURh2LfYnSqwlz1NhnLPh-yHoqEWBvTtKDuBcPJ2uVINlniHQchbh2z-dAO4wGc%3D)

This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential race since 1976, and, unfortunately, hasn’t had Republican representation in the Senate since 2009. **But I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for.**

And truthfully, I’m not running because I dreamed of holding office. I’m running because every time I came home from deployment, things seemed worse—more divided, less free, and further removed from the Minnesota and America I was willing to risk my life for.

We need a new kind of leadership rooted in service, not self-interest.

**If you believe in what I’m fighting for,[even $5 goes a long way.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b3aa8306a96f408dabd6fae693ff2309&_e=P-DwLGWMpbWxmE3hXJQr57JhrAEiWY0v1z1bd02zuXT6zQvXR7TbwiRqk8BnPSMrvGiYb5nnxwGk95-nrvTvNtK5b2O7xl6D100rvHcibkG9uYVFsCVqmrlirORah740d8XI3G14vygTultrVVZYl8XKSjgSasOa-vCTF9EsK0vcHdUz8VjX7Kqw_DglyDrhsSO-NVKpBU3CNG6UNFo1K75v1SLA5dXt0rTGyYAQIO8_ekHKis4Z0Tzy9ZU5WWpUGyYjPCVPA2pQFSChEh4eihPR8TYtI19XMfSHcAM6s5_lmTsdXKxdsDUT-KpPnCiy0npkkPXKtDdi70TBlz79g6-Ub4eupu9r-K360kVIpkWu2C9pPxxOLuAFWi5q08z6XSbtcO6hwWy6CozZwVritGbu9cvFY-DO_xPlmQAgVeEJmh9FHGCVAxAHeYkFUywJQpFR9FOlUkQTlcbpDnKP1RIkR51aFL-DGoMd6CezF5aSpUJrmnEPjaYGDdfsHCmmBBEzM8bTgL1h8Nosa8YR5w9lzya89YtSYfQKGpJqedWJH602__sSkOoY5qF3evep5Gv0vDzFrgMsb77_oimQQmlyAl1M_wRbvXbdmxiUsY011VsPDfH1_KEvbwCZ4wWbUTQffYpfdu_p3HB5UUW7TORRHDK8uBOLu7h7R2HWINbH5hjFwjPi_tnPaG-Do8jKQzeRJqvzSW5Z9E5FyxkjTl4E2ffPdPlOM8LP0dcyO_P3kO9luuGhN027rgvN2pXfCD6FXglbV00ZW-ii2gW6s255o9nI3uz0zKAE9rGJsOY%3D)**

If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. I just want to earn your trust in the weeks and months ahead. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, please chip in now.

Let’s take this fight to the Senate. And let’s do it together.

**You’ve done your part for this country.[Let me do mine—will you donate $15 to help?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b3aa8306a96f408dabd6fae693ff2309&_e=P-DwLGWMpbWxmE3hXJQr57JhrAEiWY0v1z1bd02zuXT6zQvXR7TbwiRqk8BnPSMrvGiYb5nnxwGk95-nrvTvNtK5b2O7xl6D100rvHcibkG9uYVFsCVqmrlirORah740d8XI3G14vygTultrVVZYl8XKSjgSasOa-vCTF9EsK0vcHdUz8VjX7Kqw_DglyDrhsSO-NVKpBU3CNG6UNFo1K75v1SLA5dXt0rTGyYAQIO8_ekHKis4Z0Tzy9ZU5WWpUGyYjPCVPA2pQFSChEh4eihPR8TYtI19XMfSHcAM6s59_q84wazKpYfQu3CKEeqWxFMR4fG69QJeAhUwmTp56apLtXLq4YnX9trw4HqpO4fCDyT1mTa97kuwrDjWkYd8j7HJhrgu_RAJHbXDGuzI6le-ciq-K2JMrdsJdk5nJEX-KAy-dB5zQaYUkZv3WIknRXk36MSzw-A365t6BDAiwNHjUrwBaWcP7ZnLYtypvuqVkTn37i-odSYbEuNSgkBFy7e9UxLp6fY2nttuI6bAsNd3Ts0Km4UYhN52YIpGCjrXqMmgJoXPuPvKwux4pWuYqCKSoCjbb1Gt-1QTABhH1sqaixmvE8LALNeRfhuTfMgfuoDkESxyN6VNha6zHMCgNLROlfXkNQA5wlzbfiYHewhKSpqvNYHIXqb91fCBTPV6kPNHnjxV6aJCtkmREtxo3ENkCA48Yuw8yqMPzC-tub8Mo4xWuTTgleEFlfYmmvbxmQz8wLl6ie2ajNK1fq3XBW5Z9XvdzOV90UnTMv4iiKbx9Y_bXozsX5P30kBDruI8%3D)**

clean_body: I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for. | Fellow Conservative, I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan, and proud son of two working-class parents. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve the country I love. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate—but looking at what’s happening in our state and nation, I know I have to. Minnesota is being led by two extreme voices: Governor Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—my opponent—who is somehow even more radical than her boss. While our cities burned in 2020, she led the charge against law enforcement while Walz hesitated. That’s not leadership. That’s chaos. Meanwhile, crime has increased, small businesses have struggled, and our schools fail to teach the basics. The Minnesota I grew up in—where I learned to skate, hunt, and respect my neighbors—feels like it’s slipping away. I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday—October 2001— just weeks after 9/11. I didn’t wait. I went. And for the next 20+ years, I continued to serve. Not behind a desk or on cable news, but in the field—on missions that mattered, often in places you’ll never see on a map. I don’t come from wealth or political pedigree. I come from hard work, long winters, and a deep desire to serve something bigger than myself. I earned degrees from Harvard, Johns Hopkins, and my MBA—not because I wanted to impress anyone, but because I wanted to serve better and lead smarter. Now, I’m taking that same spirit to this campaign. Every dollar helps build a campaign ready to fight and win. This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential race since 1976, and, unfortunately, hasn’t had Republican representation in the Senate since 2009. But I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for. And truthfully, I’m not running because I dreamed of holding office. I’m running because every time I came home from deployment, things seemed worse—more divided, less free, and further removed from the Minnesota and America I was willing to risk my life for. We need a new kind of leadership rooted in service, not self-interest. If you believe in what I’m fighting for, If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. I just want to earn your trust in the weeks and months ahead. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, please chip in now. Let’s take this fight to the Senate. And let’s do it together. You’ve done your part for this country. In liberty Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

I wrote this for you _specifically_ , Peter!

Governor Glenn Youngkin, AG Jason Miyares, and I pulled off an incredible victory in 2021. We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like _**YOU**_ , **Peter**!

I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we **COULD NOT** have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth.

I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has a _serious_ cash advantage. **Liberal groups are cutting her checks for half a _MILLION_ dollars and Hollywood Leftists are injecting her campaign coffers with unheard-of sums of money.**

name: Movement for Freedom
subject: Closer to full on fascism.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.movement4freedom.com/home [https://www.movement4freedom.com/home]
Donald Trump is expanding fascist policies by announcing this week that he intends to deploy the National Guard into Washington, D.C., and federalize the city police, the first time in history a president has invoked this provision of the Home Rule Act.
Violent crime in D.C. fell 26% last year, yet Trump is painting the city as a “situation of complete and total lawlessness” to justify seizing control of its streets.
His real goal? Expanding authoritarian power for himself and his allies, and using vulnerable populations as scapegoats to get there. He is vowing to clear homeless encampments, end sanctuary protections, and hand sweeping control of our neighborhoods to political appointees who answer only to him.
We need more electeds of good moral conscience in office who are willing and ready to stand up to what is blatantly growing fascism, like Rep. Jamie Raskin, who has pledged to introduce a measure to end Trump’s “emergency”.
But by law, Congressman Raskin must wait 48 hours. That means Trump’s power grab is moving faster than Congress can respond.
This is exactly why Movement for Freedom exists. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250812_ntlguard_act]
We don’t wait. We activate and organize in real time, taking immediate legal action for those targeted by sweeps and arrests, delivering resources to unhoused neighbors under attack, mobilizing community defense teams, and holding city officials accountable.
And with Trump’s eager authoritarian plan in play, Chicago, St. Louis, New York, and other cities across the country could easily be next.
We need you resisting with us right now. Your donation today fuels the frontline work to stop Trump’s takeover and fight for true safety rooted in justice, not occupation and oppression. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250812_ntlguard_act]

— Movement for Freedom

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I have some breaking news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me.
| This is Adam Schiff. I have some important news to share with you, team:

**Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me.**
---
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4354?t=1&akid=5587%2E196590%2E2C1h-p)
Ed Martin, if you don’t remember, was the Interim U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other — and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it.

Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived “enemies” of the Trump administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs, urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than follow his unethical edicts.

Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending insurrectionists who broke into the Capitol on January 6 and advancing bogus claims of election fraud. He is close friends with an avowed neo-Nazi, appearing with and praising him repeatedly.

_Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin’s dangerous nomination._

When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed Martin to lead a “weaponization” task force at the Justice Department to go after the president’s enemies. I was at the top of the list.

**And now, Ed Martin is investigating me and carrying out not just the president’s political retribution, but his own, as well.**

[_**Team, this is going to get ugly. But I will not be deterred from speaking out, fighting back, and holding Trump accountable every single day. Will you have my back and split a contribution between me and The Long Run to help me fight back against Ed Martin and his sham investigation?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4354?t=2&akid=5587%2E196590%2E2C1h-p)
| [DONATE ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4354?t=3&akid=5587%2E196590%2E2C1h-p)
---
Thank you,

Adam Schiff
* * *
| | [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4355?t=5&akid=5587%2E196590%2E2C1h-p)
---

name: Vincent Dixie
subject: What does your story look like?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vincent Dixie for Tennessee
body:
I want to hear from you

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/OOe6OlkHY2MQXQR8L31nCg~~/AAUS1hA~/ev4q7KBadze5-rZi97f79DJ6GTuZGAk7zr1DooQ0EHHklpKjf0hWaQL2PjzPbZGWygbDxwIZlLOaTV65WjRRIzr9s3yezyjYaYHOXbDwzBTwEgVDGYDneywPDjxp3z10GxFauzJFQIiFQEkXB3hjy98qIyLiBJopCM886mV87EM~)
| | | | Hi Peter, Growing up, I learned what “paycheck to paycheck” really meant. My mom worked for AT&T and raised me on her own. Thankfully, we were blessed with my mother’s union friends – who made sure we never missed a meal or a utility bill. Our gracious community looked out for us. I know not everyone has that same safety net. That’s one of the reasons I’m running for Congress – to protect those communities, stand up for everyday people and make sure they have the opportunity and the voice they deserve in Washington. But I don’t want this campaign to be built on my story alone – I want to hear from you: **What should be our top priority in Congress?** **[**Lowering costs** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/YufykXqj98dNML-boTc9hA~~/AAUS1hA~/ywkdUVXNhOi3ATBFXU1VRyaiiU30z0CxCg77026uXGkr9F_QvhCS-6s8oezTY4A0EJp7xo_JJr3AFoZSbPySI_-a4OF-rDtgFxDQrsKbMTxy5UZkFHxMebCIrmdSyu5rZfj44-AF_Cv0TEfzlcMtGLhYTqmi1bO53ig-CjFsIEiDsrvdRP_StDaAXnt76mWGZCmY1s-rKkEFh5fMr_Rgb5iVpR5axVORGWW6L4GVoEZanS1VXIhyKqhU8nogir9wuTshXOR-X3jvxQZAupOldCKA4ryXtLx6zT3FnabeSSY~) ** **[**Creating jobs** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/YufykXqj98dNML-boTc9hA~~/AAUS1hA~/ywkdUVXNhOi3ATBFXU1VRyaiiU30z0CxCg77026uXGkr9F_QvhCS-6s8oezTY4A0EJp7xo_JJr3AFoZSbPySI_-a4OF-rDtgFxDQrsKbMTxy5UZkFHxMebCIrmdSyu5rZfj44-AF_Cv0TEfzlcMtGLhYTqmi1bO53ig-CjFsIEiDsrvdRP_StDaAXnt76mWGZCmY1s-rKkEFh5fMr_Rgb5iVpR5axVORGWW6L4GVoEZanS1VXIhyKqhU8nogir9wuTshXOR-X3jvxQZAupOldCKA4ryXtLx6zT3FnabeSSY~) clean_body: I want to hear from you | ~ | | | | Hi Peter, Growing up, I learned what “paycheck to paycheck” really meant. My mom worked for AT&T and raised me on her own. Thankfully, we were blessed with my mother’s union friends – who made sure we never missed a meal or a utility bill. Our gracious community looked out for us. I know not everyone has that same safety net. That’s one of the reasons I’m running for Congress – to protect those communities, stand up for everyday people and make sure they have the opportunity and the voice they deserve in Washington. But I don’t want this campaign to be built on my story alone – I want to hear from you: What should be our top priority in Congress? ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ This campaign is powered by people like you. I look forward to hearing your thoughts. Vincent Dixie Vincent Dixie is a small business owner, husband, and State Representative who has passed bipartisan laws, taken on corruption, and delivered real results for Tennessee families. Now he’s running for Congress to lower costs, protect Medicare and Social Security, and finally put working people first. ** | Paid for by Vincent Dixie for Tennessee Vincent Dixie for Tennessee73 White Bridge RoadSte 103-328Nashville, TN 37205United States ~ "Website"

subject: Ken Paxton launched an investigation into Powered by People
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
On Sunday, August 3rd, Texas Democrats broke quorum and left the state to block Trump’s power grab as he tries to steal five Congressional seats in order to hold the majority in the U.S. House. This wasn’t easy. They left their families, homes and careers behind to protect the people they represent from having their voices silenced. Now, not only is Greg Abbott threatening the Democrats who walked out with fines, arrest and even removal from office, but **Attorney General Ken Paxton has launched an investigation into Powered by People for standing with Texas Democrats.** Rather than listening to the people, the Governor and the impeached Attorney General are trying to intimidate us into silence. Turns out they don’t like it when you fight back! So let’s take this fight to them. With as much as we got, for as long as it takes. The future of our country hangs in the balance. name: Personal Invite (via VPP)
subject: Sign on: Thank Gavin Newsom! >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This is your last opportunity to add your name.
| ****PERSONAL INVITATION FOR TOP DEMOCRATS**** Friends, Trump and MAGA Republicans are trying to RIG the 2026 elections by gerrymandering Texas — **_but Gavin Newsom is fighting back, and MAGA Republicans are _FURIOUS!__**

That’s why we’re rounding up signatures to STAND with Gavin Newsom in the face of MAGA attacks.

We invited every Democrat in your state to sign onto our letter to Gavin Newsom, _but we’re still waiting on you..._

So we’re extending one final personal invitation to you today, friend: [**Will you please add your name to our letter to stand with Governor Gavin Newsom, before we close it and hit send? This is your final opportunity to add your name. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92959?t=6&akid=20897%2E878179%2ERvOulm) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92959?t=7&akid=20897%2E878179%2ERvOulm)
---
Thank you,
The Voter Protection Project

**\- - - - - - - - Begin Forwarded Message - - - - - - - -**
GAVIN NEWSOM IS FIGHTING BACK 👏
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92959?t=8&akid=20897%2E878179%2ERvOulm)
Folks, this is HUGE: Trump & the GOP want to _rig the game_ so they can win in 2026, but Gavin Newsom won’t let them off the hook so easily!

**We’re thrilled that Gavin Newsom is FIGHTING BACK against MAGA gerrymandering in Texas — _but Trump & the GOP are FURIOUS._**

[**We’re URGENTLY rounding up urgent signatures to stand with Gavin Newsom in the face of MAGA attacks — Please, friend: Add your name to stand with Governor Gavin Newsom! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92959?t=9&akid=20897%2E878179%2ERvOulm)
[**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92959?t=10&akid=20897%2E878179%2ERvOulm)
---
TO: Governor Gavin Newsom
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. Dear Governor Newsom,

_Thank you so much for standing up for what’s right — even when it makes you a target for MAGA extremists!_

I refuse to sit on the sidelines while Trump attempts to STEAL the 2026 midterms.

**Thank goodness we have you leading the charge to FIGHT BACK!**

I’m doing everything in my power to protect Democrats like you who are brave enough to face Trump head-on and risk MAGA revenge.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice and WIN in 2026 »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92959?t=11&akid=20897%2E878179%2ERvOulm) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92959?t=12&akid=20897%2E878179%2ERvOulm)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92959?t=13&akid=20897%2E878179%2ERvOulm)
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20897%2E878179%2ERvOulm). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20897%2E878179%2ERvOulm).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20897%2E878179%2ERvOulm) to request fewer emails. name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Trump just signed an executive order - targeting YOU, Peter
body:
Trump has launched a direct attack on the grassroots. And if we don’t fight back now, there's no telling how far he'll take this.
Rush $7 to defend ActBlue and protect the future of small-dollar democracy: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=081225_2]
CHIP IN NOW TO DEFEND ACTBLUE AGAINST TRUMP >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=081225_2]
Imagine this:
You chip in $5 to support a pro-choice woman running for Congress. Or a first-time statehouse challenger. Or a school board candidate fighting book bans.
Now imagine the President of the United States signs an executive order to investigate — and dismantle — the platform you used to make that donation.
Not a right-wing conspiracy theory. Not a hypothetical.
That just happened.
Donald Trump is abusing executive power to go after ActBlue — the secure, trusted platform that powers nearly every grassroots Democratic campaign in the country.
He’s not targeting dark money. He’s not going after billionaire-funded super PACs. He’s coming after you — the small-dollar donors who fuel this movement.
We launched a $25,000 emergency fund to defend the platform that keeps this movement alive — but we’re still $13,000 short. And time is running out. If we don’t speak up, they’ll silence us. Chip in $7 or more to help us fight back before it’s too late: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=081225_2]

Rush $7 to defend ActBlue and protect the future of small-dollar democracy: [] CHIP IN NOW TO DEFEND ACTBLUE AGAINST TRUMP >>> [] Imagine this: You chip in $5 to support a pro-choice woman running for Congress. Or a first-time statehouse challenger. Or a school board candidate fighting book bans. Now imagine the President of the United States signs an executive order to investigate — and dismantle — the platform you used to make that donation. Not a right-wing conspiracy theory. Not a hypothetical. That just happened. Donald Trump is abusing executive power to go after ActBlue — the secure, trusted platform that powers nearly every grassroots Democratic campaign in the country. He’s not targeting dark money. He’s not going after billionaire-funded super PACs. He’s coming after you — the small-dollar donors who fuel this movement. We launched a $25,000 emergency fund to defend the platform that keeps this movement alive — but we’re still $13,000 short. And time is running out. If we don’t speak up, they’ll silence us. Chip in $7 or more to help us fight back before it’s too late: [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] [] The Real Texas PAC 1150 N Loop 1604 W Ste 108-230 San Antonio, TX 78248 United States Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. subject: My request of you:

body:
| Hi, friends, it's Colin. If you have the time, I'd love to take a minute to share the "why" behind my decision to run for Senate here in Texas. Short on time but you're already all in? [**You can use this link to chip in a split donation between me and Seth Moulton ahead of my critical fundraising deadline tonight and help power our campaign forward!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113204871/562996298/-570383128?refcode=250812_MFC_Allred_Redistricting3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmIyNjNjYi1iZDc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AgFdBUNMeG6MeLz0RFDrn8y_YbB8rwJu7tn2RNuKoUw=) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113204872/562996299/-570383128?refcode=250812_MFC_Allred_Redistricting3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmIyNjNjYi1iZDc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AgFdBUNMeG6MeLz0RFDrn8y_YbB8rwJu7tn2RNuKoUw=)**_**Why I'm running**_
I'm a 4th generation Texan, born in Dallas and raised by a single mom who was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the folks at our local YMCA, I earned a full-ride football scholarship to Baylor and went on to play in the NFL. After that, I fulfilled another dream, earning my law degree and becoming a civil rights lawyer. Then, I went on to serve in Congress and represent the community that raised me, working to create opportunity for kids and families, protect affordable health care, and bring better-paying jobs to our state. But I'm not done yet. **Senate Republicans like John Cornyn are failing us. And his GOP primary opponent Ken Paxton is no different – he has already been impeached by the Texas House for corruption and abuse of power. And they're both bowing to the whims of one man, Donald Trump, instead of listening to the millions of people they serve. Texans deserve better and I'm ready to be a voice for ALL of us.** _**A movement to build on**_
Friends, we're starting this campaign with a huge grassroots team and a lead in the first two polls. We're not starting from scratch here – we're starting out in the lead. **If we're going to win this race, it's on us to capitalize on our momentum and keep our lead all the way through Election Day.** _**My humble request of you**_
If you want to see a Democrat represent the state of Texas in the U.S. Senate, become a Founding Donor today. Texans are ready for bold new leadership, and with your help, I know we can build on the movement we created and finish what we started. [**So please, will you chip in a split donation of $10 or more and help us reach our fundraising deadline and show our strength early on? We're in the lead and have an incredible chance to win this race if people like you join us right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113204873/562996300/-570383128?refcode=250812_MFC_Allred_Redistricting3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmIyNjNjYi1iZDc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AgFdBUNMeG6MeLz0RFDrn8y_YbB8rwJu7tn2RNuKoUw=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113204874/562996301/-1643139164?refcode=250812_MFC_Allred_Redistricting3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmIyNjNjYi1iZDc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AgFdBUNMeG6MeLz0RFDrn8y_YbB8rwJu7tn2RNuKoUw=) Thank you for taking the time to read this longer email, and for being a part of our movement from day one. Let's get this done. Colin

Hi friend, 👋 I’m Jindalae – Derek Tran’s new campaign manager. I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself and tell you why I’m so proud to be joining this movement. I’ve worked on some tough campaigns. The kind where every conversation, every volunteer, and every dollar makes a real difference. And I can tell you there’s something different about this one. Derek isn’t in Congress to play political games. He’s here to fight for working people because that’s where he comes from. He’s the son of Vietnamese refugees, a veteran, and a consumer rights attorney who stood up to the powerful before he ever ran for office. He brings that same conviction to Congress every single day. Whether he’s standing up to dark money groups, voting against cruel budget cuts, or fighting to protect programs like Medicaid and SNAP – Derek shows up. He leads with courage, and he never forgets who he’s there to serve. Now I have the privilege of helping lead this campaign forward. name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: You asked, I’m answering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250812-716&t=1001&akid=723%2E251025%2E4HDbsd ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250812-716&t=1002&akid=723%2E251025%2E4HDbsd ]Abdul for US Senate

Hi Peter,

Last week, our team sent out an email asking you to send in your
questions.

We received tons of thoughtful, honest questions, and while I can’t
respond to them all today (though I wish I could), I wanted to take a
moment to answer a few directly.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250812-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250812-716&refcode2=723_251025_4HDbsd&akid=723%2E251025%2E4HDbsd ]Before we dive in, could you chip in a few bucks to fuel our campaign?
I’m not taking a single dime from corporate PACs, so everything we’re able
to do is thanks to contributions from grassroots supporters like you.

Alright, let’s get started.

Muse asked: What can the government do to lower the cost of groceries?

We can start by holding corporations accountable for price gouging. But
the deeper fix is making sure folks don’t have to work multiple jobs
just to put food on the table. That means higher wages and an economy
that works for the people who make it run, not just the wealthy few at
the top — and that means standing for the right to join or form a union.

Nicole asked: Can you share more about your vision for American
healthcare?

Absolutely. I believe that healthcare is a human right and shouldn’t be
a business. Nobody should go bankrupt trying to get healthy. That’s why
I’m fighting to guarantee healthcare for every American, from cradle to
grave, through Medicare for All.

Alden asked: Are you willing to call what is going on in Gaza a genocide?

Yes. I’m the only candidate in this race who’s not afraid to call the
senseless carnage from Netanyahu’s regime a genocide. We cannot look
away from this injustice — especially when our tax dollars help fund it.

Allison asked: What’s your policy stance regarding reproductive rights?

Every person should have the right to make personal decisions about
their healthcare, including reproductive care. I will fight to codify
the rights once protected by Roe v. Wade into federal law. No politician
belongs in the doctor’s office with you.

Eric asked: I heard you on Head in the Office, and you did a great
interview. Are there plans to get on other similar platforms?

First off, thank you! Jeremy and Gage were a pleasure to chat with. And
yes, we’re working hard to get in front of more audiences. I recently
went on Hasan Piker’s stream, and interviewed with Brian Tyler Cohen and
Breaking Points. A core focus of our campaign is to not just be present
in person, but reach people digitally too.

We’re building something real here,
Peter — a movement to stand up
to the wannabe oligarchs and politicians who’ve rigged this system against
us.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250812-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250812-716&refcode2=723_251025_4HDbsd&akid=723%2E251025%2E4HDbsd ]But to keep pushing, we need your help. Can you chip in
$10 today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250812-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250812-716&refcode2=723_251025_4HDbsd&akid=723%2E251025%2E4HDbsd ]Donate $10 ››

Thanks for being part of this,

Abdul

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Right-wing extremists are targeting marriage equality
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| We will not let the far-right roll back our hard-won progress.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4917%2E35263%2Etvehwe)
Peter, 10 years after the Supreme Court made marriage equality the law of the land in the decision _Obergefell v. Hodges_ , right-wing extremists are trying to turn back the clock. **The Supreme Court was just formally asked to take up a case that, if won, would overturn the 2015 _Obergefell_ ruling and jeopardize federal protections for same-sex marriage.** _Obergefell_ , which cemented marriage as a fundamental right for every couple, was the culmination of decades of hard work from activists fighting for equal rights. Let me tell you, Peter:**we will not let the far-right roll back our hard-won progress.** As the first openly gay Senator in our nation's history, I promise not to back down. I will keep up the fight for LGBTQ+ rights until every person can live freely, openly, and authentically. **[As I keep up the fight for LGBTQ+ rights every single day in the Senate, will you pitch in to support me in this fight?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4438?c0=stb-em-aug25.KUWn1c&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250812_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4917%2E35263%2Etvehwe)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=stb-em-aug25.L5mwgg&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250812_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4917%2E35263%2Etvehwe)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I need just a minute of your time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3a48e1074fbd4f54ae392e1ee80508fb&_e=03bFmxmrrJEoyEXWp4pcmMQXcSPlPaRXgd1icFJskb5CE17aRggwypF26J-WB_ykrGaqjRzMRez_jgkZHc33PDpqlBIxxi66phS_h4YWa-RbkHqPCsVY3lS9bhhJfzdUFdW8j_MuDlrcAtM49ONVgxOjYEzSxAr43EgriwaZyiRAdkuOvkcEuBlhYqSefJPtvr9OzwOggDOfOv4e6yKYx0Dr8_FK26KI2p19LNXpBfkzqUvq1Qxy1o3HSMkE1a1qmH9Eu07D7NxVl-na8ThahzXpDjn_z1wtcq_mpopJEeG2a7xT0iTjaCL2-hZmlOQr_GqSCxcpdaSr5p3prwfjKjE2up__ybARV4d48-pawV5BF_JB71t52clttIxiCZr6XS4N6z7L-AePlPj5OJY1sido7TWdIUvair8zA2sp0pZkUZ3SnaUkJg5YQQl2jMrEJyoC4ud3jPYUVgKlLhcyp6OfjAvASj0rQnP-oQ8WsU0crUUxa9T6w2v6ARsm0XsI02pva2sZh1wX9b5Xv07ivAnk8xCYsDViaLbhzQ5TLQ6pfES3GX75bUgg_195U6VYgXp182e4jR1lhkIU8yU2J3Cz1N2LgCknMuSK7frS15eQPeYlMVlUBb2ifLt4wQ9JtHwCmZ-vcVXXmV8CHVs8EA%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3a48e1074fbd4f54ae392e1ee80508fb&_e=03bFmxmrrJEoyEXWp4pcmMQXcSPlPaRXgd1icFJskb5CE17aRggwypF26J-WB_ykrGaqjRzMRez_jgkZHc33PDpqlBIxxi66phS_h4YWa-RbkHqPCsVY3lS9bhhJfzdUFdW8j_MuDlrcAtM49ONVgxOjYEzSxAr43EgriwaZyiRAdkuOvkcEuBlhYqSefJPtvr9OzwOggDOfOv4e6yKYx0Xrtqb2cSOMe3YJy7mX0o4vkXiYo0nW38kne4o4vHk-10NsI0BX6RPd6ou_b2HfNXgIcgoHwKd26hL7lDdFsaUB7XMZSvtciQECKFpaKMj9y7S-tu38sigePDk6tCIfVPFTKC6iYqwSezDO7lYl9z3RA_NQq725wdg5Gd0IfgXJQbHeduhhR9U-uosjBt--umz-fTsvSB8o858Fhv5Rs22wDeFS5ChiEa_oAuKe9utxa-MdozIsVW9c7SBTNqJ97Qhlfrds0fkp8awUD8Jyi8lvwcTA0fs4LNOPHPK55fKzZiTErkxLOwGPvStJsSVSXe_MAkDNdvPmJ83Pv5z_sEhOYk2pNVoxmxTbELphiew977uNtkuCJ_JPBa0xGLqkYQUDeDo9JLyXsq-2RKNlNhLoFYjbRhL8Q2_gdxlBGjFywPz2odUl0GVM7egBSlnaxQ%3D%3D)
__
---

But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3a48e1074fbd4f54ae392e1ee80508fb&_e=03bFmxmrrJEoyEXWp4pcmMQXcSPlPaRXgd1icFJskb5CE17aRggwypF26J-WB_ykrGaqjRzMRez_jgkZHc33PDpqlBIxxi66phS_h4YWa-RbkHqPCsVY3lS9bhhJfzdUFdW8j_MuDlrcAtM49ONVgxOjYEzSxAr43EgriwaZyiRAdkuOvkcEuBlhYqSefJPtvr9OzwOggDOfOv4e6yKYxwZKB_F7I4erT9Ss-jriQ-VthvIzQiVJLTNyn-xqyBRBkTS7wUFT3Uh9ZmN7IhUt6sBTfQJqclpSzAeuOHNwogdDuwzlBsQwGpoTMp8hGqKKe1aqTr_KzaNC5tRzoXWV4lVgJwmWaHxKpPx4xfI5Svsfm2PeYbMk6FFM6HMC7TSjdcVN3NkuyP63GaZEK-J_wpQ7xEAVqQPgeLGcDMq8vHjjpxlpyTsIsxUowY_D_1A-_ze8TLj79xdPArTZNhRQ1CSoLKqd6vlS5k78VMu-UoQksEltd_knO364bBuoNVzF2igg7MubhKzj1imHKyHaKmW_-TjD_abb38yaODRQFxrNQvtbH1CDNxvrFScvFIpo7x_o8FbAVzHMmdHpZoEGbjXKAOYPgSh_5ppyYTZTaNbS4IW8Mims_HQI2YlKxZ8pZpbTaYJvKnqolaL6qS66qw%3D%3D)

clean_body: This is the situation I’m caught in: | Friend, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Tony Johnson
subject: “The old flag never touched the ground.”
body:
META TAG (title): TheFederalistWire.com

@media (max-width:520px){.row-content{width:100%!important;}.column .border{display:none;}.stack .column{width:100%;display:block;}}META TAG (title): @media (max-width:520px){.row-content{width:100%!important;}.column .border{display:none;}.stack .column{width:100%;display:block;}}

Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Dear Fellow American,Fort Wagner, 1863. Bullets flying. Men falling.And in the middle of it all, William Carney—an African American Union soldier and son of slaves—carries the flag.When the color sergeant is shot down, Carney picks up the banner. He’s hit once. Then again. Then again. Then again. Bleeding and barely able to stand, he reaches his company and says one thing:“Boys, the old flag never touched the ground.”That’s what the American flag means.Sacrifice. Duty. Resolve. And the belief that this country is worth fighting for.Our free eBook, Flags of Our Fathers, tells stories like Carney’s.It also uncovers the forgotten history of the flag’s creation, design, and enduring power. It’s a tribute to the ideals we must not let die.Our team at Heritage fights every day to preserve the principles our flag represents—liberty, justice, and truth.We hope you’ll read this—and stand with us.Download your free copy now.United we stand, Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Fired up for Football season and Alabama’s future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
Just like in football, it takes a team to win, and I’d be honored if you joined mine. | [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3ab32b83c63b4b28a6d87420aa863608&_e=KmYET29upi8zxrtHELfiWuzESmkd32VjUo39pQZo4kwqMjjlGItW3d3rcyliVyIHx7zRbOzNPLc8bBVWpKI-kaMpzy8rjmXzZCN8SSS-8ra4_eAEouNqjctBU-fIPlpmD2eq95FdpJ2HhB9HRQ5XOUfTMU4dU4eh7gRqgpZaSSud6vn09lIkCS-5WkpnsC8QIsykUgJkR6dIqbS-iSWnvp74ecV7CJDHou0Scke8l_-t3NtFUHuPLpn3-waWSNUG_6H_GINikoWlwnwut8roi7CWGJGLtgLfHBHhJ2-1QmbDw2vcpz3FDgugPfvXQmQG8i-jHorNtm_oh-k3O7ycM1Fob0KzM5_ZgBGO51NjL-0ru93SLqjuGBeUDgIovcolLhR56YEl3tJiaQOzdXEJ-cU7NhyUVDimDUqJH7dq4s_RrYZWJnu5VavvxfbEQFPk8CQYFDlL6TuXIY8g2HsO68NCQXEwm15A3YIjzJ1FHUjgRbVY-p1eXiKM6WCIkIBhFp1bThEN4Z9qCYHI7Lm02e7E5Qa4sdM0V1oLc4rvZSyVJjxmfsEO-Fa_FYcsV0oO)
---

Peter,

As the first kickoff of the season approaches, I can feel the energy in the air. And **if you know me, there is nothing quite like the start of football season.**

_The roar of the crowd, the passion of the players, and the pride of representing something bigger than yourself. It’s what makes football such a powerful tradition here in Alabama._

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3ab32b83c63b4b28a6d87420aa863608&_e=KmYET29upi8zxrtHELfiWuzESmkd32VjUo39pQZo4kwqMjjlGItW3d3rcyliVyIHx7zRbOzNPLc8bBVWpKI-kaMpzy8rjmXzZCN8SSS-8ra4_eAEouNqjctBU-fIPlpmD2eq95FdpJ2HhB9HRQ5XOUfTMU4dU4eh7gRqgpZaSSud6vn09lIkCS-5WkpnsC8QXtn2SPC45irzmXnBAryUxXmcA7ED3O1UzODHNzIS0EJS2ggSRd6mnukig9j-GKrO9kAut2SIcBF637bAj--A5mE_8y9Ho8lx4nEua05TR_UXMmQteID7oYyRu9ZExeg4wm279vphajvIvzqvIHSGXsgpfEHZzR4u990aYJdyrHt42XW70TwTzR3VoVh2Wd4RCRPPlC30E_4XiQKGC43LiFLyjzfGcqjQvaHOc1Jf3-nc1MBciUbv9jDYArmvJVFyZcIGUhSRyOCOGdtTW-sQ25RstdJIcURoJRJNgxdtCEFjHR6HANrrOA3nv6EGAJUSgWAo-rJ-LJjOZJhFqHWx_N6HN1FdO0UvjwdVXbRd1HHHBdrpvXRgxUYTXMbNYX-Q)
I’ve spent much of my life on the field, leading young men to become leaders, champions, and citizens of character. This time of the year always reminds me of the values that matter most: _discipline, teamwork, resilience, and the belief that every challenge is an opportunity to win._

[**Now, I’m taking that same spirit and bringing it to a new field...our great state.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3ab32b83c63b4b28a6d87420aa863608&_e=KmYET29upi8zxrtHELfiWuzESmkd32VjUo39pQZo4kwqMjjlGItW3d3rcyliVyIHx7zRbOzNPLc8bBVWpKI-kaMpzy8rjmXzZCN8SSS-8ra4_eAEouNqjctBU-fIPlpmD2eq95FdpJ2HhB9HRQ5XOUfTMU4dU4eh7gRqgpZaSSud6vn09lIkCS-5WkpnsC8QTyPNlIPrTXr-6KFrMxNAibTF3F6gNrBDtM-Z11Uyag1RACiIItu2Br134VEp9E1lvhLl173q6iFWXoP0psoEMuH0J8NWXLXihMrYmDkEirwH4qwSG0wYEUYBLR2D-_S7wvzAKA-diOrYOVddCxIRoogu_vxO-jtKGhpbUdCAu8P0kNcQMAtJ1_6VqWAPnUrjrhpvWmEksRtq5JgtSl3ThmGl6iW_-vx2CQgGdpSN0J0VwKFejR1oZhbvo1b4Zvq9vLsLh-wBa2rqkhPqDkPr2FKgXBMbP_w0Vib5Lv4JmTQsmmhTC9F1KXQMMYIABAob_d8WBEYZR9zlTBfOvVA7vGgOYjXPM9cfa881NiAnUsrXOurgAypAbNyHvLGx73p-)

I’m running for Governor of Alabama because I believe we can win again. On the field, in the classroom, in our communities, and in our economy.

I’ve seen what strong leadership can do, and I know we can deliver results that make a difference in every Alabama family’s life.

So as we get ready to cheer on our favorite teams this fall, I hope you’ll join me in fighting for Alabama’s future. **[_Just like in football, it takes a team to win, and I’d be honored if you joined mine._ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=3ab32b83c63b4b28a6d87420aa863608&_e=KmYET29upi8zxrtHELfiWuzESmkd32VjUo39pQZo4kwqMjjlGItW3d3rcyliVyIHx7zRbOzNPLc8bBVWpKI-kaMpzy8rjmXzZCN8SSS-8ra4_eAEouNqjctBU-fIPlpmD2eq95FdpJ2HhB9HRQ5XOVYRbp7xNqleBLCFKkf90uhgOczPHzhqcXkCFUkCFbqN4PNM6iXleFLeA5AoCuqX8KLz7Uf57P39P4la7_58V4g5CmoKdI2uGfNXUKl8VMDJ6I3eXKwdodtCXrCYT1LER_Y9WQ6RVO6FDgwS9q2NsDn6sOnIz82wj-6t5CoXjwuLH0KdGf3BFro9zoxC3knK2-AznWNeTs0EHLWN8XdM08ysT95a_BYRNmJzIrfdDPbWPVnagdVMQgufsYk4NJLcHSPJSzxKEthyUcsKVBrLeFy-4YgYSw438ziK4yVA7ji9Y8zTKPQ4DrkjTm9EP1xOx-BU_yrEUQNq4jvvGfMGykBNaRnVJRri0Pud71nyX8pe2-fq1zqs1v76RtFH36RXxIT5h4K-J2ceJCXHg3lcF0H7f4Q7wh2ei8PJ2SHts9Tm)**

Coach Tuberville

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

clean_body: Just like in football, it takes a team to win, and I’d be honored if you joined mine. | Peter, As the first kickoff of the season approaches, I can feel the energy in the air. And if you know me, there is nothing quite like the start of football season. The roar of the crowd, the passion of the players, and the pride of representing something bigger than yourself. It’s what makes football such a powerful tradition here in Alabama. I’ve spent much of my life on the field, leading young men to become leaders, champions, and citizens of character. This time of the year always reminds me of the values that matter most: discipline, teamwork, resilience, and the belief that every challenge is an opportunity to win. - I’m running for Governor of Alabama because I believe we can win again. **
You may not have donated in a while. I get it. But if you ever believed in what we’ve done together — the tax cuts, the conservative judges, the border wall — **[I’m asking you to come off the sidelines for just one dollar.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8dcbf49223a342e3ba035157a99e4943&_e=5g7KyRBNx5U14-hDI8Q1vTnV0x2Ptfdl9vk57gczKF7PLqqnxX16saimqZg_0LGG5vg-SGA98xIKuq99oLePsov4huIX0hvIPk4VP_yg9QCt6a8Qn9kLpiJQMACIpCs1fQzVMEoEnMF4XhxJoi95hZTXu2xk9icEcZe-c_v2WgwyK1R3LiqhG7Y4V-7imgvjHFT4OwtrgNGiEzTAD6VJomFYPdIV0w5p_fJfND03xEQC-BLX3NyuafxpJA8QuWYxMy7NKVGTeNmgDtgeZwZY1ezLEG2oumcDbHzQcnBrwxIpBKvi5TndrvmUeALrU7oayvzvng6Uf8_f-knTueXyNQ7jKd3gyvx6KCc5-ZuuugzcIDGptUXfuvgNY-EhXBzlyiAnGa1GgtZCQA_ZIEKIB5U_5k52tTbase4uliA3Q_rjsICgHhxvFKWJQ5JmBfDnKikQx1e2pL8J0JLwczuRg7-yl-fOcNXPPRmgonfMOozllSJjp8txUpYOOv7oPO75gI851M3wZqw_22OucTKj0udxe8FlZ25hRoll9Upzqjf4d2fdywAYHLBjyBksWHjcrjiXxVJYKuqiy3yIqRrQnn8KMZtVoGJEKrlLIOb57BLMhNUt4ApXvzfvjRkTMOB7CU-KMERae__ul4sB_UgRjicKi9nmuh4GwC3c9i_B4wmEAnUuNzkjxh6lrxUYJscCMC6P6Lw9ZfoGL12iS5UDryKlkaSahz9N1GR5gFdWr5_u_1CqKl0WGIKz_IwN8bKdauIaAbMTwoprQLPPyaFDkf4F3rEUcMFFg7qotP67fnQ6MjadEaEpqpQ9Nk7VGJ7D_g8780qSeUI0QfriRA3AmIxW9frvNSc1xNOTowcGpzpt_IXUs2YDLmzRoI5hTYpE7daBJbaL5K9BPRVowJ79iQ%3D%3D) **

Because just a couple weeks ago, while you were going about your life, the Senate passed President Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” and it was signed into law just days later. We pulled an all-nighter to get it done. Why?

Because i**t locks in permanent tax relief, imposes work requirements for welfare, and invests over $170 BILLION into border security, including:**
1. $46.5 billion for the wall
2. $45 billion to expand detention facilities
3. $29.9 billion to hire 10,000 new ICE agents

This is real progress — the kind we dreamed about just a few years ago. But now the Democrats smell blood. They’re outraising us, outspending us, and targeting our Senate seats — even in red states.

**They want revenge.**

If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They’ll tear it all down.

That’s why I’m writing you — not for $10, not for $100 — just for $1. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because it’s a signal that you haven’t given up.

clean_body: We just made history, and now is not the time to let up | Fellow Conservative, I need to ask you something that might feel small — but matters a lot. Will you today to help us stop the Democrats from taking the Senate? You may not have donated in a while. I get it. But if you ever believed in what we’ve done together — the tax cuts, the conservative judges, the border wall — Because just a couple weeks ago, while you were going about your life, the Senate passed President Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” and it was signed into law just days later. We pulled an all-nighter to get it done. Why? Because it locks in permanent tax relief, imposes work requirements for welfare, and invests over $170 BILLION into border security, including: 1. $46.5 billion for the wall 2. $45 billion to expand detention facilities 3. $29.9 billion to hire 10,000 new ICE agents This is real progress — the kind we dreamed about just a few years ago. But now the Democrats smell blood. They’re outraising us, outspending us, and targeting our Senate seats — even in red states. They want revenge. If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They’ll tear it all down. That’s why I’m writing you — not for $10, not for $100 — just for $1. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because it’s a signal that you haven’t given up. Your name on our donor list tells me we’re not alone — that this still matters to you. When Republicans see 10,000 patriots step up with just one dollar, it tells our entire movement: we’re still in this fight. You stood with us once. I hope you’ll stand with us again — For America, Ted Cruz U.S. Senator - Texas | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265

# [Arctic Buffoonery: Trump's Treasonous Waltz with the Butcher of the Kremlin](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=170811286&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwODExMjg2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTUwMzQ0NzgsImV4cCI6MTc1NzYyNjQ3OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YDquIWQpC-OUlvOnVwlAbRGlw8nCXeXnSIc5tpG4P_Q)
### We may not know why or how, but Putin has always owned Trump, that much is clear
| | [DavidShuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster) and [Cliff Schecter](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge)
---
| Aug 12
---
| [](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)| | [](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge)
---|---|---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=170811286&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcwODExMjg2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NTAzNDQ3OCwiZXhwIjoxNzU3NjI2NDc4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.kH9VnW9WPiWUssAqkON0G5Mn_6EcPxiZ1YQvR1CHEvo&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
