| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ba17dcea-0b22-4553-b42f-7bb2d68fb7c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### _**Thank You For Your Support, My Friends! A[ Paid Subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/b41d659b-0509-45f2-87f9-ebe524e846b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for $1.50/Week Provides our Soundcheck Fund With Resources to Amplify Independent Creators. We Need You. Help Us Save Our Democracy**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.-8Mvla_XGDCeb9YbAfmcoGKxe1oaEXl7_Z0f3Zb-Yl0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=170811286)
**By David Shuster**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fd1f8a01-33b8-421c-b9b5-4e83204ca60a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In the August ruggedness of Anchorage Alaska, where the sun barely sets and the walruses belch in despair, Donald Trump is now planning to stage a summit so stupid, so supine, and so staggeringly servile that even the ghosts of Neville Chamberlain and Vidkun Quisling are blushing.
The Don has declared that Vladimir Putin -- murderer, marauder, and czarist thug -- deserves a personal audience with the President of the United States.
Yet, who has not been invited to this geopolitical circle jerk?
Why Volodymyr Zelensky, of course, the elected leader of the sovereign nation of Ukraine. The very country Putin seeks to pulverize, or at least use Trump as cover to carve up at this sit down of the sociopaths.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b4c7439e-085b-41d6-ad4a-9bd3798fa4a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**This is not diplomacy. It is not even buffoonery. It is straight up betrayal.**
[The idea that Trump would cradle the bloodstained hands of Putin and call it "peace" is no longer surprising](https://substack.com/redirect/b759b110-5b2d-4ef5-bd07-42e18a85794a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), just repulsive. Trump's admiration for tyrants is as compulsive as his aversion to reading.
Trump describes Putin as a "man of strength," as though the strength to bomb hospitals, kidnap children, and send your own troops into a meat grinder were qualities to be admired in a leader.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dbc25d34-a64c-4fdc-967a-07ec33e9b0eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
To Trump, [morality is a nuisance, history is a fog](https://substack.com/redirect/f2ff8430-80e4-4af4-a9de-70d4a5350f87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and truth is an inconvenience, at best. So, he cavorts with war criminals while smearing U.S. allies in Europe (and beyond) as freeloaders and fools.
The planned Alaska summit is a diplomatic gang bang with the corpse of Ukrainian independence left twitching on the ground. It is pure evil.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e2481d76-7ef6-4bcf-88da-6ee7a5cef1e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A meeting about peace that excludes Ukraine is as rational as a trial without a victim or a wedding without a bride.
The fact that Trump dares to float such a farce proves once and for all that Old Man Orange is not merely ignorant. He--like all [who worship at the altar of this cretin](https://substack.com/redirect/84cb60df-05c8-4806-b52b-ada685a38224?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--is utterly [incapable of even the slightest modicum of decency](https://substack.com/redirect/b759b110-5b2d-4ef5-bd07-42e18a85794a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Of course, this is the same flask of flaccidity who once stood on foreign soil and groveled before Putin like a mongrel before a butcher, mumbling that he - Trump - saw no reason to doubt Russia over U.S. intelligence services.
That disgrace in Helsinki was a preview; this latest charade is the encore, with all the pomp of treason and none of the subtlety.
And let's not overlook the symbolism of Alaska--a territory America once bought from the Russian tsars, now offered back to their spiritual heir as a neutral ground for "peace."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/049ef2c7-ba8f-47eb-a682-41c956ae68ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
One can almost hear the vodka-soaked cheers from the Kremlin, whose propaganda machine surely erupts in orgasmic glee at the prospect of an American president legitimizing their Ukrainian conquest with a handshake and a photo op.
The only thing missing will be a commemorative coin struck with Trump's face on one side and Putin's smirk on the other, inscribed with the motto: _In Thugs We Trust_.
To the GOP enablers who still call themselves patriots while clapping like trained seals at Trump's every depravity, [remember this. ](https://substack.com/redirect/c937ac35-6d6b-48b6-a02a-e8d7f0b726a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[What Trump is proposing is not peace--it is appeasement](https://substack.com/redirect/c937ac35-6d6b-48b6-a02a-e8d7f0b726a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)._
This is the betrayal of a fledgling Ukrainian democracy for the amusement and pride of a petulant Putin. And for the ego of demented huckster Trump, who mistakes flattery for statecraft and cowardice for cunning.
Zelensky, whose citizens have buried children shredded by Russian shrapnel, is now being asked to sit in silence while Trump and Putin "work things out." It is as though a man's house has been set aflame, and the arsonist is invited to dinner with the fire marshal--minus the victim, who is told to wait outside.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c5efa933-7859-4383-893e-9b5e6c3cf107?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What's next? A summit on sexual consent between Jeffrey Epstein and Harvey Weinstein? A pastor [who still blames Jews for Jesus' death](https://substack.com/redirect/777ad3b4-a99d-45f6-805d-6fee29423c41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the White House?..Oh, right, did that one.
[This is not leadership. It is not diplomacy. It is theater of the grotesque](https://substack.com/redirect/84cb60df-05c8-4806-b52b-ada685a38224?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), starring a deranged narcissist who still believes the world is his boardroom and democracy is a nuisance to be negotiated away.
The rightful name of this is the _**[Trump-Putin Pact](https://substack.com/redirect/770d212c-2d96-408a-8c98-4a1049b71eaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_[, a coalition of delusion and domination](https://substack.com/redirect/770d212c-2d96-408a-8c98-4a1049b71eaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), brokered not in the name of peace, but in the service of Trump's diseased vanity.
Trump's Alaska Gambit is not the bold stroke of a dealmaker. It is the craven act of a showman desperate for relevance, indifferent to democracy, and openly contemptuous of Ukrainian sovereignty.
An American state being used as a stage for this betrayal is nothing short of a disgrace.
* * *
_David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and co-host of[our weekly show (Thursdays, 2pm et, on Substack), "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter."](https://substack.com/redirect/a125da65-e56a-4cf4-9ca3-bf145a05754a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_

We may not know why or how, but Putin has always owned Trump, that much is clear | | and | Aug 12 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Thank You For Your Support, My Friends! A for $1.50/Week Provides our Soundcheck Fund With Resources to Amplify Independent Creators. We Need You. Help Us Save Our Democracy By David Shuster | | ---|---|--- In the August ruggedness of Anchorage Alaska, where the sun barely sets and the walruses belch in despair, Donald Trump is now planning to stage a summit so stupid, so supine, and so staggeringly servile that even the ghosts of Neville Chamberlain and Vidkun Quisling are blushing. The Don has declared that Vladimir Putin -- murderer, marauder, and czarist thug -- deserves a personal audience with the President of the United States. Yet, who has not been invited to this geopolitical circle jerk? Why Volodymyr Zelensky, of course, the elected leader of the sovereign nation of Ukraine. The very country Putin seeks to pulverize, or at least use Trump as cover to carve up at this sit down of the sociopaths. | | ---|---|--- This is not diplomacy. It is not even buffoonery. It is straight up betrayal. , just repulsive. Trump's admiration for tyrants is as compulsive as his aversion to reading. Trump describes Putin as a "man of strength," as though the strength to bomb hospitals, kidnap children, and send your own troops into a meat grinder were qualities to be admired in a leader. | | ---|---|--- To Trump, , and truth is an inconvenience, at best. So, he cavorts with war criminals while smearing U.S. allies in Europe (and beyond) as freeloaders and fools. The planned Alaska summit is a diplomatic gang bang with the corpse of Ukrainian independence left twitching on the ground. It is pure evil. | | ---|---|--- A meeting about peace that excludes Ukraine is as rational as a trial without a victim or a wedding without a bride. The fact that Trump dares to float such a farce proves once and for all that Old Man Orange is not merely ignorant. He--like all utterly . Of course, this is the same flask of flaccidity who once stood on foreign soil and groveled before Putin like a mongrel before a butcher, mumbling that he - Trump - saw no reason to doubt Russia over U.S. intelligence services. That disgrace in Helsinki was a preview; this latest charade is the encore, with all the pomp of treason and none of the subtlety. And let's not overlook the symbolism of Alaska--a territory America once bought from the Russian tsars, now offered back to their spiritual heir as a neutral ground for "peace." | | ---|---|--- One can almost hear the vodka-soaked cheers from the Kremlin, whose propaganda machine surely erupts in orgasmic glee at the prospect of an American president legitimizing their Ukrainian conquest with a handshake and a photo op. The only thing missing will be a commemorative coin struck with Trump's face on one side and Putin's smirk on the other, inscribed with the motto: In Thugs We Trust. To the GOP enablers who still call themselves patriots while clapping like trained seals at Trump's every depravity, . This is the betrayal of a fledgling Ukrainian democracy for the amusement and pride of a petulant Putin. And for the ego of demented huckster Trump, who mistakes flattery for statecraft and cowardice for cunning. Zelensky, whose citizens have buried children shredded by Russian shrapnel, is now being asked to sit in silence while Trump and Putin "work things out." It is as though a man's house has been set aflame, and the arsonist is invited to dinner with the fire marshal--minus the victim, who is told to wait outside. | | ---|---|--- What's next? A summit on sexual consent between Jeffrey Epstein and Harvey Weinstein? A pastor at the White House?..Oh, right, did that one. , starring a deranged narcissist who still believes the world is his boardroom and democracy is a nuisance to be negotiated away. The rightful name of this is the , brokered not in the name of peace, but in the service of Trump's diseased vanity. Trump's Alaska Gambit is not the bold stroke of a dealmaker. It is the craven act of a showman desperate for relevance, indifferent to democracy, and openly contemptuous of Ukrainian sovereignty. An American state being used as a stage for this betrayal is nothing short of a disgrace. David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and co-host of Thank You For Your Support, My Friends! A for $1.50/Week Provides our Soundcheck Fund With Resources to Amplify Independent Creators. But this won’t be easy. We need to hold key blue seats in states like Michigan, Georgia, and New Hampshire — and flip critical races in places like North Carolina and Maine.
I’ve been through tough fights before. I’ve taken on Trump and exposed his corruption. And I’ve won hard elections throughout my career.
I know how much grit and support it takes to win. And I also know we can’t afford to come up short — not with our democracy, our freedoms, and our future on the line.

name: Kim Schrier
subject: As a doctor, I have to speak out.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
It’s National Immunization Awareness Month, and I'll be blunt: [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113206567/563002673/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzNhNmNlYi1jNDc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IvwkM1Ooo5OLiRE20zjTfVPtCnP41tNx8xITf3J2O2U=&emci=f66a53e3-9c77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=2c3a6ceb-c477-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

August marks National Immunization Awareness Month, a time when health professionals help spread the word on why it’s absolutely critical for us to receive vaccines at various stages in life. We’ve heard and seen a lot lately about measles. But many people don’t know what other diseases immunizations protect us from.

Babies get protected from polio, which is still circulating elsewhere in the world. They also get several vaccines to prevent meningitis, pneumonia, sepsis, and death. There’s a vaccine that keeps young children from getting a vomiting/diarrhea illness that spreads like wildfire and used to send hundreds of thousands of US children to the ER each year, and hospitalize about 60,000 of them. Before that vaccine, parents were rehydrating themselves and their children with Pedialyte, one teaspoon at a time.

Teens get vaccines to protect them from meningitis, whooping cough, and cancers. Adults get protection from pneumonia, RSV, and shingles. By the way, when Democrats held the majority in the House, we made all vaccines free for seniors on Medicare!

Most parents today have never heard of the diseases that vaccines protect their children—and all of us—from. That is proof of their success!

It also explains some parents’ hesitancy about vaccinating. If the disease doesn’t seem like a real threat, and anti-vaccine activists are working every day to scare parents away from vaccinating their children, we end up where we are today—with measles on the rise after it was formally eradicated in the year 2000.

As a pediatrician, I’ve answered a lot of parents’ questions about vaccines. That’s my job and my pleasure. And the vast majority of those parents made the right decision to protect their children from really bad diseases.

But now we have a Secretary of Health and Human Services, RFK, Jr., spewing misinformation about vaccines and trying to convince parents that the vaccine is worse than the disease! He has brought fringe opinions right to the heart of federal public health policy, and that is dangerous.

As the Secretary of the Department of Health and Human Services, RFK Jr. has called for a review of the recommended vaccine schedule for kids, not based on science or public health guidance, but based on conspiracy theories and personal beliefs. He’s even used his power to pull $500 million in funding for mRNA vaccine research— _the breakthrough technology developed over 10 years with NIH funding that brought us two COVID-19 vaccines in less than a year._ Those vaccines saved millions of lives. And mRNA technology holds the most promise for quick vaccine development that will help us survive the next pandemic.

As a member of the Energy and Commerce Committee, I hear directly from our public health agencies about how they’re already under-resourced, overwhelmed, and stretched thin. Now, they have to worry about funding cuts and devastating research halts that could further hold us back as a nation in health and science.

Let's not sugarcoat anything: What we’re seeing from this current administration is pseudoscience and personal ideology masquerading as policy, and it will hurt ALL of us. As a doctor and as your congresswoman, I will continue to shine a bright light on these lies and set the record straight. Every child deserves access to the vaccines and treatments that keep them safe and healthy.

The challenge is breaking through all the noise and partisan games. That’s where I need your help. Keep this pediatrician in the House! Trump and RFK Jr. are pushing an agenda that ignores evidence and puts real people's lives at risk—** _and I’m using my platform to hold them accountable._**

[**I promise to always fight for you and your family’s health in Congress, and I’m ready to do my part to ensure we have a blue House that will join me in those efforts. If you're ready to stand up to extremists who only seem interested in taking us backwards, please chip in $5 right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113206568/563002674/-1487867385?refcode=em25_250812_immuni_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250812_immuni_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=2c3a6ceb-c477-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzNhNmNlYi1jNDc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IvwkM1Ooo5OLiRE20zjTfVPtCnP41tNx8xITf3J2O2U=) clean_body: It’s National Immunization Awareness Month, and I'll be blunt: Peter, August marks National Immunization Awareness Month, a time when health professionals help spread the word on why it’s absolutely critical for us to receive vaccines at various stages in life. We’ve heard and seen a lot lately about measles. But many people don’t know what other diseases immunizations protect us from. Babies get protected from polio, which is still circulating elsewhere in the world. They also get several vaccines to prevent meningitis, pneumonia, sepsis, and death. There’s a vaccine that keeps young children from getting a vomiting/diarrhea illness that spreads like wildfire and used to send hundreds of thousands of US children to the ER each year, and hospitalize about 60,000 of them. Before that vaccine, parents were rehydrating themselves and their children with Pedialyte, one teaspoon at a time. Teens get vaccines to protect them from meningitis, whooping cough, and cancers. Adults get protection from pneumonia, RSV, and shingles. By the way, when Democrats held the majority in the House, we made all vaccines free for seniors on Medicare! Most parents today have never heard of the diseases that vaccines protect their children—and all of us—from. That is proof of their success! It also explains some parents’ hesitancy about vaccinating. If the disease doesn’t seem like a real threat, and anti-vaccine activists are working every day to scare parents away from vaccinating their children, we end up where we are today—with measles on the rise after it was formally eradicated in the year 2000. As a pediatrician, I’ve answered a lot of parents’ questions about vaccines. That’s my job and my pleasure. And the vast majority of those parents made the right decision to protect their children from really bad diseases. But now we have a Secretary of Health and Human Services, RFK, Jr., spewing misinformation about vaccines and trying to convince parents that the vaccine is worse than the disease! He has brought fringe opinions right to the heart of federal public health policy, and that is dangerous. As the Secretary of the Department of Health and Human Services, RFK Jr. has called for a review of the recommended vaccine schedule for kids, not based on science or public health guidance, but based on conspiracy theories and personal beliefs. He’s even used his power to pull $500 million in funding for mRNA vaccine research— the breakthrough technology developed over 10 years with NIH funding that brought us two COVID-19 vaccines in less than a year. Those vaccines saved millions of lives. And mRNA technology holds the most promise for quick vaccine development that will help us survive the next pandemic. As a member of the Energy and Commerce Committee, I hear directly from our public health agencies about how they’re already under-resourced, overwhelmed, and stretched thin. Now, they have to worry about funding cuts and devastating research halts that could further hold us back as a nation in health and science. Let's not sugarcoat anything: What we’re seeing from this current administration is pseudoscience and personal ideology masquerading as policy, and it will hurt ALL of us. As a doctor and as your congresswoman, I will continue to shine a bright light on these lies and set the record straight. Every child deserves access to the vaccines and treatments that keep them safe and healthy. The challenge is breaking through all the noise and partisan games. That’s where I need your help. Keep this pediatrician in the House! Trump and RFK Jr. are pushing an agenda that ignores evidence and puts real people's lives at risk— and I’m using my platform to hold them accountable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. name: Tina Kotek
subject: Education can’t take a break; neither can we
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
When kids stay engaged with reading and learning all summer long, _they’re set up for success when school starts up again in the fall._ That’s why I was proud to support summer learning programs across the state, where more than 48,000 students enjoy hands-on science projects, writing instruction, and outdoor adventures that will lay the foundation for lifelong learning and put them on a pathway to success. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113206741/563003220/1976830691?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250812_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGFjNDc5YS1jNTc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=miKg2omwprfrYSJmfwedgPf-UqHn8EtwrqRlbzgsrhw=&emci=e44f8b2d-c477-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=a8ac479a-c577-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ceid=15353729) According to new research from Oregon State University, public recreation spaces like parks, hiking trails, and beaches are essential health infrastructure, similar to pharmacies or hospitals. **[Education can’t take a break; neither can we. Add your name right now and join our supporters in 18326 to help us expand learning opportunities across the state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113206742/563003221/1976830691?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250812_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGFjNDc5YS1jNTc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=miKg2omwprfrYSJmfwedgPf-UqHn8EtwrqRlbzgsrhw=&emci=e44f8b2d-c477-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=a8ac479a-c577-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ceid=15353729)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113206743/563003222/1976830691?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250812_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGFjNDc5YS1jNTc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=miKg2omwprfrYSJmfwedgPf-UqHn8EtwrqRlbzgsrhw=&emci=e44f8b2d-c477-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=a8ac479a-c577-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ceid=15353729)

I’ve seen firsthand how important it is for young minds to stay curious and challenged all year round. When kids keep reading and exploring during the summer, they return to school excited and prepared for success.
These programs are making a real difference for Oregon families, helping to close learning gaps and building a brighter future for every child. **So if you stand with us, sign on right now. **

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Your name at our Campaign HQ
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
We’re going to be adding the names of everyone who pitches in to this email to our grassroots donor wall.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3757%2E400544%2EooY_g-)
I have some exciting news:
**Yesterday we opened the doors to our official campaign headquarters in Albuquerque!** This isn’t just a place to make phone calls or plan rallies — it’s where our movement will come together to build a better future for families across New Mexico.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250812_1_officeopening?amount=5&refcode=em20250812-3757&refcode2=3757_400544_ooY_g-&akid=3757%2E400544%2EooY_g-)
And right in the heart of our office is our **Grassroots Donor Wall** , a permanent reminder that our campaign is powered by people, _not_ billionaires and political insiders. I want your name on that wall!
**We’re going to be adding the name of _everyone_ who pitches in to this email to our donor wall, no matter how big or small your donation is. [Can I count on you to pitch in today so we can put your name up there?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250812_1_officeopening?amount=5&refcode=em20250812-3757&refcode2=3757_400544_ooY_g-&akid=3757%2E400544%2EooY_g-)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250812_1_officeopening?amount=5&refcode=em20250812-3757&refcode2=3757_400544_ooY_g-&akid=3757%2E400544%2EooY_g-)**
Every volunteer, visitor, and staff member will see it and know that _you_ helped make this movement possible.
With Donald Trump and his billionaire allies already trying to buy this election, the fight ahead will be tough. But when supporters like you pitch in, we can build something they can’t match: **a people-powered campaign** that reaches every corner of New Mexico.
I’ve seen what we can accomplish when everyday people come together. So let’s get to it!
**[If you can, please make a contribution of $5 or any amount today so we can get your name on the Grassroots Donor Wall.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250812_1_officeopening?amount=5&refcode=em20250812-3757&refcode2=3757_400544_ooY_g-&akid=3757%2E400544%2EooY_g-)**
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250812-1&t=2&refcode2=3757_400544_ooY_g-&akid=3757%2E400544%2EooY_g-)**

clean_body: We’re going to be adding the names of everyone who pitches in to this email to our grassroots donor wall. - I have some exciting news: Yesterday we opened the doors to our official campaign headquarters in Albuquerque! This isn’t just a place to make phone calls or plan rallies — it’s where our movement will come together to build a better future for families across New Mexico. - And right in the heart of our office is our Grassroots Donor Wall , a permanent reminder that our campaign is powered by people, not billionaires and political insiders. I want your name on that wall! We’re going to be adding the name of everyone who pitches in to this email to our donor wall, no matter how big or small your donation is. - - Every volunteer, visitor, and staff member will see it and know that you helped make this movement possible. With Donald Trump and his billionaire allies already trying to buy this election, the fight ahead will be tough. But when supporters like you pitch in, we can build something they can’t match: a people-powered campaign that reaches every corner of New Mexico. I’ve seen what we can accomplish when everyday people come together. So let’s get to it! - Be fierce, Deb -

Dear them,
It’s Scott Presler, writing to you from the front lines of Pennsylvania and New Jersey, where my team at Early Vote Action is rewriting the political map.
Thanks to our voter registration staff, we’ve slashed Pennsylvania’s Democratic voter lead by over 300,000 since 2020, flipping counties like Bucks and Luzerne red for President Trump in 2024. In New Jersey, we’ve cut the Dems’ advantage from over 1 million to just 834,000 - and we’re not stopping there.
**_But here’s the deal: our voter registration staff - real patriots hitting gun shows, farmers’ markets, and VFW halls - are running on fumes._**
Democrats are fighting back, pouring money into their machine to hold their ground. name: NRCC HQ
subject: We’ve lost count of all the GOP leaders that have emailed you about this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Here's a list of (8) House Republicans that have emailed or texted you this year: Mike Johnson Jim Jordan Steve Scalise Tom Emmer Anna Paulina Luna Richard Hudson Derrick Van Orden Eli Crane ....and yet, no response from you. This show is brought to you by these great sponsors:
**Concerned Women For America**
Concerned Women For America focuses on seven core issues: family, sanctity of life, religious liberty, parental choice in education, fighting sexual exploitation, national sovereignty, and support for Israel. CWA knows what a woman is. CWA trains women to become grassroots leaders, speak into the culture, pray, testify, and lobby. If you donate $20 you will get CEO & President Penny Nance's new book A Woman's Guide, Seven Rules for Success in Business and Life. Head to https://concernedwomen.org/spicer/to donate today!
**Delta Rescue**
Delta Rescue is one the largest no-kill animal sanctuaries. Leo Grillo is on a mission to help all abandoned, malnourished, hurt or suffering animals. He relies solely on contributions from people like you and me. If you want to help Leo to continue his mission of running one of the best care-for-life animal sanctuaries in the country please visit Delta Rescue at: https://deltarescue.org/
President Trump declared a national emergency in our nation's capital. Like most Democratic cities, Washington D.C. has been overrun with crime, homelessness and illicit drug activity. Democrats and the fake news won't tell you this and crime reports actually look down, simply because they aren't arresting criminal when they commit dangerous crimes. Washington D.C. has a homicide rate of 27.3 per 100,000 resident, that is the fourth highest homicide rate in the country and 6 times higher than New York City, Atlanta and Compton. Washington D.C. Police Union Chairman Greg Pemberton fills us in on how dangerous the streets of D.C. are why the National Guard is necessary to restore law and order in our nation's capital. John Lott is President of the Crime Prevention Research Center, he is here to give us the actual statistics on crime not only in D.C. but around the country.
Featuring:
**Gregg Pemberton**
Chairman | Washington D.C. Police Union https://dcpoliceunion.com/
**John Lott**
President | Crime Prevention Research Center
https://crimeresearch.org/
Check out John's book More Guns, Less Crime here: https://a.co/d/7XqHWBE

name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: I still wait tables
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113207315/563005244/1219929396?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzOTk2ZWRlLWM3NzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lT0Fcpt3D_woTFbe4c4sbNA3cDN2noDiz1fsWwa0058=) | Peter, it’s Rebecca Cooke. I’m not a career politician. I grew up on a dairy farm. I’m raising two kids. And yes — I’m still working nights waiting tables while I run for Congress. **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113207316/563005245/230936046?&refcode=E14602-20250812-RebeccaCooke-Image-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzOTk2ZWRlLWM3NzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lT0Fcpt3D_woTFbe4c4sbNA3cDN2noDiz1fsWwa0058=)**_It’s not glamorous. But it’s real. And it’s why I’ll never stop fighting for families like mine._ **I came within a few points of defeating extremist Derrick van Orden, but the GOP is pouring in millions to stop me. Chris Murdock
Our Tennessee Future PAC Team

_Our Tennessee Future PAC has been established as a proactive response to the political landscape in Tennessee, which has been taken over by MAGA ideologies. This PAC is dedicated to supporting state-elected officials who represent alternative, more progressive values contrary to those of the MAGA Republicans who currently dominate the state legislature. Key strategies include voter registration drives and targeted advertising campaigns, especially in districts where MAGA-aligned candidates are entrenched or pose a strong threat in upcoming elections. By mobilizing pro-Democratic voters and enhancing electoral participation, Our Tennessee Future PAC aims to effect substantial change and balance within Tennessee's political sphere, ensuring the state's policies and leadership accurately reflect the diverse perspectives of its residents. Your donation helps us in this fight._

Louise Giuffre (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of
Justice (No. 1:25-cv-02191)).

federal court reporting that the Justice Department and the FBI
continue to search for and review records in response to Judicial

Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [600x300] [] Epstein grand jury materials won't be released after federal judge denies DOJ request to unseal [] Source: Fox News [] A federal judge has denied the Justice Department's motion to unseal grand jury materials related to the sex trafficking cases against dead trafficker Jeffrey Epstein and his longtime lover and convicted accomplice Ghislaine Maxwell. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] July 11, 2025 Judicial Watch Sues for FBI Records Regarding Jeffrey Epstein Victim Virginia Giuffre [] Judicial Watch announced it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for all interviews, conversations and other records provided to the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) by Jeffrey Epstein victim Virginia Louise Giuffre (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice (No. 1:25-cv-02191)). [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] July 09, 2025 Justice Department Tells Court It Is Reviewing FBI/DOJ Epstein Records for Possible Release [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch filed a “joint status report” on July 7 in federal court reporting that the Justice Department and the FBI continue to search for and review records in response to Judicial Watch’s FOIA lawsuit for records regarding Jeffrey Epstein. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] June 23, 2025 Judicial Watch Sues for Secret Service Cost Records for Bill Clinton’s Trips to Island Owned by Sex Offender Jeffrey Epstein [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch filed a FOIA lawsuit against the Department of Homeland Security to obtain records of all Secret Service expenses incurred to provide “security and or/other services” to former President Bill Clinton during his trips to the Caribbean island of convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. name: Christina Gagnier
subject: Far-right extremists tried to break into my home.
body:
|
#
There is no sugar-coating it, Peter: The MAGA agenda that is leading to the rise of far-right extremism in our communities is downright dangerous.

**I know this firsthand. When I was on the Chino Valley School Board, my home was nearly broken into by far-right extremists a few days before Election Day.**

They pushed into the door so violently that it almost broke down. I got the security alert and rushed home. Luckily, I was only a few minutes away and rushed back to save my two dogs – and it turns out my black lab scared them off before I returned by barking loudly and banging against the door.

Not only was I the target of a home invasion, I received constant death threats, was followed home from school board meetings, and harassed online.

**Why? Because I had the audacity to stand up for the students and families in our district.**

No matter what was thrown at me, I stood up to these bullies – even when it cost me re-election to the school board by a mere 317 votes.

I have no regrets. I took my fight nationally – helping thousands of parents fight back to protect their public schools, and now, I am running for Congress.

I am the only one in this race who has real experience standing up to the MAGA agenda. I need your support to cut through the noise and unseat Trump ally Young Kim here in CA-40.

**[Will you chip in $3 or any amount you’re comfortable with to help me flip this seat and the House majority? We must put an end to the violent extremism plaguing our communities and targeting the most vulnerable.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113207439/563005752/1631137775?refcode=em-8.12.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjY1Yzc3ZS1jODc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ja9A7rkAT5t6mu06WGhtKL0HBItPpk97qbup38673JA=)**

clean_body: | There is no sugar-coating it, Peter: The MAGA agenda that is leading to the rise of far-right extremism in our communities is downright dangerous. I know this firsthand. When I was on the Chino Valley School Board, my home was nearly broken into by far-right extremists a few days before Election Day. They pushed into the door so violently that it almost broke down. I got the security alert and rushed home. Luckily, I was only a few minutes away and rushed back to save my two dogs – and it turns out my black lab scared them off before I returned by barking loudly and banging against the door. Not only was I the target of a home invasion, I received constant death threats, was followed home from school board meetings, and harassed online. Why? Because I had the audacity to stand up for the students and families in our district. No matter what was thrown at me, I stood up to these bullies – even when it cost me re-election to the school board by a mere 317 votes. I have no regrets. I took my fight nationally – helping thousands of parents fight back to protect their public schools, and now, I am running for Congress. I am the only one in this race who has real experience standing up to the MAGA agenda. I need your support to cut through the noise and unseat Trump ally Young Kim here in CA-40. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = = Thank you, Christina | Christina Gagnier is a community leader, small business owner, former school board member, and privacy advocate defending Orange County and Inland Empire families. To support Christina's campaign = To volunteer on Christina's campaign, To receive fewer emails from Christina Gagnier's campaign, sign up for our option here. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Christina Gagnier for Congress. Christina Gagnier for Congress 14071 Peyton Drive #1323 Chino Hills, CA 91709 United States

name: Patty Murray
subject: re: Secretary 🧠🪱
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
At this rate, they may as well call it the Department of Disease – because Secretary Brainworms has singlehandedly put Americans' lives in danger.
| | |
---
Hi, Peter – Patty Murray here.

The people of Washington state sent me here to keep them and their families safe, and I take this obligation very seriously.

That's why I’m reaching out with an update on the state of our nation's health: **because so far, Donald Trump and Health and Human Services Secretary RFK Jr.'s "Make America Healthy Again" (MAHA) agenda has been about as good for public health as a cough to the face. And now TODAY, they’re submitting their big official report to Trump, but they aren’t sharing it with the rest of the public.**
He's fired:
* The entire CDC advisory board that recommends vaccines,
* Scientists who monitor bird flu,
* Food safety inspectors,
* First-rate cancer specialists, researchers, and staff at the NIH,
* The ENTIRE staff of a program that helps more than 6 million low-income people nationwide – **including 80,000 Washington state households** – afford A/C amid deadly heatwaves and heating in the dead of winter,
* And nearly 90% of the CDC’s National Institute for Occupational Safety and Health.

He's also illegally blocking or freezing tens of billions of congressionally approved dollars, and he requested hundreds of billions in budget cuts for the very agencies he oversees. He’s wreaking havoc across government:
* At the NIH,
* State and local health departments,
* For improvements to women's health care, including cancer screenings, birth control, and preventive care,
* And even resources that I passed through the bipartisan SUPPORT Act to bolster local substance use and mental health programs.

And I'd be remiss not to mention how RFK Jr.'s anti-vaccine, anti-science beliefs – or otherwise, his utter ineptitude – has infected what's left of the entire department under his purview:
* From suggesting that annual measles outbreaks are _perfectly normal_ in the 21st century – after burying a CDC report that emphasized the need for vaccines to stop the deadly disease's spread,
* To releasing the first iteration of his long-awaited "Make America Healthy Again" report, which was rife with faulty, misquoted, and in some cases, entirely**FAKE** citations.
* And, of course, his recent decision to terminate $500 million in federal investments to advance lifesaving and groundbreaking mRNA research for no reason other than baseless conspiracy theories.

He has set us back by decades for no good reason, but he’s also repeatedly demonstrated his unfitness to serve as one of the world's most powerful health officials.
For example, ahead of our Congressional hearings on the President’s budget request, he was required to send us a plan detailing how the agency was currently spending federal funding for programs working families rely on.** **

Congress writes the bills to decide how we invest taxpayer dollars each year, so we need to know how any administration is currently spending your money.

**Instead of spelling it all out, he sent us a special copy titled "Hill Version," which had more than 530 asterisks in place of funding levels.**

He gave no clear idea of how he was spending taxpayer dollars, or what programs he'd already cut and eliminated – and at that hearing, when I asked questions like _"How many NIH clinical staff have been fired?"_ – he had no answer.
**The work HHS does – or in this case, stops doing – is not some political game. It has life and death consequences. **And under the leadership of _Secretary Brainworms_ , America is now LESS healthy and LESS safe than at any other time in recent memory.
**Worst of all: thanks to Republicans' Big, Ugly Bill being passed into law, ****more than 15 million working class Americans, kids included, will lose coverage to afford health care from _actual_ medical professionals who could fix the mess this out-of-touch, snake oil salesman created. **Especially in rural America, it won't matter what kind of coverage you have if your local hospital closes because they couldn't keep the lights on without Medicaid reimbursements.
So I will keep sounding the alarm about Trump, RFK Jr., and the entire Republican Party's attacks on science and health care just to fund tax breaks for billionaires.
**And when diseases spread, more kids get sick, and providers don't have the resources to heal them, I will make sure _everyone_ knows that any backslide in public health is the direct result of their reckless actions.**
Peter, I hope you’ll stay with me in this fight to hold the administration accountable, whether by calling my office or your representatives, volunteering in your community,**[or chipping in $5 or any amount to help me keep up this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113207565/563006228/-145648726?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk518-fr-nd&recurring=0&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWM2NGQzYy1jOTc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3zekudFmr0haLVB67jlDx69HhoXJYzonvsysuqnYLeE=)**
Thank you for reading, and for all that you do.

Patty Murray
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/q9iNeaDCVUi-n6xIKf7j9g2?unsubscribedata=nVhTW8szkrcoLl3J8p%2FbqzmskLCHftFT7mv0nZCP5%2Bn88iDrAuFJPxY7Js3NJYY6L%2Fh9IL4mIpvVUVHxNdoNqkXy0MQKOgGSxviAl2erGvS6uumYUWqTTyBPAb7Xk0BtWtKFZOaWi65yKimPBhgS7I9mW947%2FERHgujod6VncqY%2BnMOpY0Ae2sNOS23zvUFoHmkGd6R5kYhJhUAzFfYuwYyERwnvQQHVX8Y6HcEaSqMHdo7TkHMQxZK5rjQkosCOFRYcWP1upkBzOodkRnhr1EPmStOVA4HZgu1RUPTQs9eFzV8W5PQ6ckw4tJydCLyFMnN0rFB%2B0z8oU8NBlUJ54fVFwvA40B4RM7d6tjn27E6sPQN5MzTRFOjp3vJpw%2BO2%2Fdueih4Jciy9Fb7j7zy2jrmxzGP%2F9GquSkN4DGyyT9V9Xv24nuHyme7SaplJa1OG) People for Patty Murray
PO BOX 3662
Seattle, WA 98124
United States | | PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Delia Ramirez
subject: We don’t stand for xenophobia and racism
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250812-1472-foote&t=1001&akid=1472%2E342411%2EdQwsJO ]Squad Victory Fund

Hi Peter, it’s
Delia Ramirez.

Last week, an acknowledgement I made of my Guatemalan roots was twisted
into a false narrative. My words have been weaponized not only by
conservatives — but even by the Department of Homeland Security.

Let me be clear: These attacks are rooted in xenophobia and racism.

I am proud to be a Guatemalan American. This is a ridiculous attack meant
only to rile the far-right with false narratives and dangerous precedents.
I, alongside Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida, will not stand for
this. [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250812-split-movement.GcjX3L&refcode=em20250812-1472&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1472%2E342411%2EdQwsJO ]Will you split a donation with The Squad Victory Fund and I to
fight back and show that progressives like us can’t be silenced by
Republican extremists?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250812-split-movement.GcjX3L&refcode=em20250812-1472&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1472%2E342411%2EdQwsJO ]Contribute ››

As I have continued to push back against this administration, the
far-right has called for me to be removed from my committees, stripped of
my citizenship, and deported.

But here’s the truth: even though the far right is threatened by my very
existence, I will not be silenced.

As a proud daughter of immigrants, my entire life and political work has
been about uplifting working class people of every background. From
advocating for housing as a human right to healthcare for all, I’m
fighting for all communities. The Squad is too.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250812-split-movement.GcjX3L&refcode=em20250812-1472&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1472%2E342411%2EdQwsJO ]When the right wing seeks to divide us using race, ethnicity, and the
roots we hold dear, we will always fight back. So will you split a
donation between myself and The Squad Victory Fund today as we continue to
fight against these hateful attacks and support the inclusive vision of
America we’re building together?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250812-split-movement.GcjX3L&refcode=em20250812-1472&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1472%2E342411%2EdQwsJO ]Donate

This country, and we all, are at our best when we live into our values as
a multiracial and multicultural democracy where our mosaic of cultures
represent something new and uniquely American. It’s something we should be
intensely proud of and work tirelessly to defend.

Together, we will keep speaking the truth — proudly.

In Solidarity,

Delia

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1472%2E342411%2EdQwsJO

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

"It's the 4th most dangerous city in the country in terms of murders... Do you still think its safe?" Miller asked one protester, screaming into a bullhorn.
"It's SAFE!!!" she fired back.
**[Watch the fiery confrontation here:](https://substack.com/redirect/7b70da7a-3196-402f-a986-5ca594c6491f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

[ Click to Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7b70da7a-3196-402f-a986-5ca594c6491f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Washington D.C had **[27.3 murders per 100,000 residents](https://substack.com/redirect/2c927434-6ba8-4067-9e25-c70f31fb34cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in 2024, according to a public safety report from RIT. That makes it the 4th most dangerous city in the nation, and roughly 6x more dangerous than NYC.

Dear Reader,
You won't see **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/c5a48253-bb39-4bd9-b750-e873950a0a65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in any history book...
But after becoming the first man to set foot on the moon...
Neil Armstrong reported a **[strange encounter](https://substack.com/redirect/c5a48253-bb39-4bd9-b750-e873950a0a65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he had in space during a post-mission debrief.
And he wasn't the only astronaut to experience it.
NASA did their best to keep it secret...
But now, unearthed **[NASA audio](https://substack.com/redirect/c5a48253-bb39-4bd9-b750-e873950a0a65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is blowing the lid off of everything.
**[This official Apollo recording](https://substack.com/redirect/c5a48253-bb39-4bd9-b750-e873950a0a65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is only seconds long, but it will chill you to the bone.
P.S. name: Team Jena
subject: We’re building the biggest coalition in the race for Attorney General
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250812-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250812-email]
Peter,
The momentum is building.
Recently, 40 more leaders and organizations from across Colorado and the nation announced their endorsement of Jena Griswold for Attorney General, including:
* Congressman Jamie Raskin
* Senate President James Coleman
* Former U.S. Senator Tim Wirth
* Former State Representatives Leslie Herod & Karen Middleton
* Plumbers Local #3 and Progressive Democrats of America–Colorado
See what some of them had to say:
“Throughout her impressive and productive career, Jena Griswold has defended strong democracy, survived one right-wing attack after another and fought like a tiger for the public interest. She has a zeal for justice and the rule of law and never backs down to bullies. She’s tough as nails and that’s what we need in these times of official lawlessness and cruelty.”
— Congressman Jamie Raskin
“I’m proud to endorse my friend Jena Griswold for Colorado Attorney General. As Secretary of State, Jena has protected our voting rights. She’s fought for working families and a brighter future for all Coloradans. As Attorney General, Jena will continue that fight, protect our communities, and stand up for justice and fairness across our state.”
— Senate President James Coleman
With more than 180 endorsements, a record-breaking fundraising quarter, and polls showing Jena leading her closest opponent by 34 points, this campaign is in the strongest position to win. But we’re not taking anything for granted.
We need to show this coalition—and our opponents—that our grassroots movement is unstoppable.
Can you rush a contribution of $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help keep up our momentum? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250812-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250812-email&amount=10&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250812-email&amount=25&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250812-email&amount=50&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250812-email&amount=100&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250812-email&amount=250&express_lane=true] ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250812-email&]
With your help, we can turn this surge of endorsements into the voter outreach and organizing power it will take to win in November.
Let’s do this – together.
Thank you,
Team Jena
P.S. See the full list of endorsements here! [https://www.jenaforcolorado.com/endorsements]

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: school is back in session…and so are high costs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
School is back in session soon, and as a mom of two young boys, I know what this time of year looks like for families across West Michigan: notebooks, pencils, backpacks, new shoes, all the little things that add up fast.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113207760/563006997/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-08-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTIxZTU0MS1jYTc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n5ZQ6VoCi8krx0GHp8Di-T77Y1ldkbm3w4eCVdjnZJ8=)
---
| School is back in session soon, and as a mom of two young boys, I know what this time of year looks like for families across West Michigan: notebooks, pencils, backpacks, new shoes, all the little things that add up fast.

This year, prices are even higher. Trump's tariffs are making the back-to-school season more expensive, and families are paying the price.

I see it in the checkout line, I hear it from other parents. I know that when costs go up, it’s not just a budgeting issue, it’s a question of whether your kids go into the classroom feeling confident and prepared.

While prices for basic supplies skyrocket, I'm laser-focused on lowering costs for West Michiganders so folks don't have to struggle to get by.

**But I can’t do it alone. National Republicans are zeroing in on competitive districts in Michigan, and I need your help to fight back.[_Protecting this district and supporting Democrats in key battleground districts in our state is key. If you have the capacity, can I count on your support with a $10 contribution to our campaign?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113207761/563006998/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-08-12_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTIxZTU0MS1jYTc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n5ZQ6VoCi8krx0GHp8Di-T77Y1ldkbm3w4eCVdjnZJ8=)**

clean_body: School is back in session soon, and as a mom of two young boys, I know what this time of year looks like for families across West Michigan: notebooks, pencils, backpacks, new shoes, all the little things that add up fast. | = | School is back in session soon, and as a mom of two young boys, I know what this time of year looks like for families across West Michigan: notebooks, pencils, backpacks, new shoes, all the little things that add up fast. This year, prices are even higher. Trump's tariffs are making the back-to-school season more expensive, and families are paying the price. I see it in the checkout line, I hear it from other parents. I know that when costs go up, it’s not just a budgeting issue, it’s a question of whether your kids go into the classroom feeling confident and prepared. While prices for basic supplies skyrocket, I'm laser-focused on lowering costs for West Michiganders so folks don't have to struggle to get by. But I can’t do it alone. National Republicans are zeroing in on competitive districts in Michigan, and I need your help to fight back.= | | | = | = | = | = | = Grateful to have your support, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . Hello Peter, What an honor it is to have so many folks believe in our campaign. I can’t say this often enough, but I’ll say it again today: Thank you. I know that this campaign for the U.S. Senate, like every race I’ve run before, is only possible because of the countless people who join us in fighting for this state and our country. In the two weeks since we launched our campaign, more than 37,000 people have stepped up to invest in our work and help us win the fights ahead. I am grateful to everyone who has already contributed, but I want to do more than tell you that over email. This week I began randomly calling some of our grassroots donors and really enjoyed talking with you. I’d like to thank even more of you personally by giving you a call in the next week or so. Our team will pick a few names from among our grassroots donors, and maybe you could be among them. All you need to do is use this link to donate **$1 or more** and leave your name and phone number. Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

I wrote this for you _specifically_ , Fellow American!

Governor Glenn Youngkin, AG Jason Miyares, and I pulled off an incredible victory in 2021. We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like _**YOU**_ , **Fellow American**!

I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we **COULD NOT** have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth.

I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has a _serious_ cash advantage. **Liberal groups are cutting her checks for half a _MILLION_ dollars and Hollywood Leftists are injecting her campaign coffers with unheard-of sums of money.**
---
**Listen Fellow American, I don 't have liberal groups and Hollywood Democrats propping up my campaign. __I 'm 100% relying on support from grassroots patriots like YOU!__ **

Governor Glenn Youngkin, AG Jason Miyares, and I pulled off an incredible victory in 2021. We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like YOU , Fellow American! I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we COULD NOT have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth. I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has a serious cash advantage. Listen Fellow American, I don 't have liberal groups and Hollywood Democrats propping up my campaign. I 'm 100% relying on support from grassroots patriots like YOU! I can't tell you how much I appreciate having you on my team. Together, we will defend our home and ensure our country remains a bastion of conservatism and a land of opportunity! body:

subject: Nothing comes close
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=603%2E181023%2EQK1fYw)
Hi there — this is Jocelyn.
Over the weekend, I attended a blueberry festival, and it reminded me of all of the sweet things I love about our great state. Blueberries are high on that list 🫐, but nothing comes close to the people who make our communities run strong.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250812_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=603%2E181023%2EQK1fYw)
From the farmers growing the blueberries, to the small business owners who sell them, to the families who buy the treats for their kids — I’m running to make sure we can all live and thrive in Michigan.
Just making ends meet isn’t enough. Michiganders deserve _more_ than just the bare minimum.
As governor, I’ll continue doing everything in my power to make life a lot easier (and a little sweeter) for everyone. That means transparent leadership, good education and childcare, safe schools and neighborhoods, and making Michigan the best state to call home and raise a family.
[**That’s what I’m fighting for. If you’re with me, can you make a donation to my campaign today?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250812_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=603%2E181023%2EQK1fYw)

This is Adam Schiff. I have some important news to share with you, Peter:

**Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me.** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113207946/563007450/-1492877668?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250812_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyNmM5ZmVkLWNhNzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PZMUajJlo_zdLu8u9jM2O7XhT9jCQbK2hqjTJvx0W-g=)** | **[DONATE $7 →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113207947/563007451/-1492877668?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250812_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyNmM5ZmVkLWNhNzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PZMUajJlo_zdLu8u9jM2O7XhT9jCQbK2hqjTJvx0W-g=)**
---
Ed Martin, if you don’t remember, was the Interim U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other — and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it.

Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived “enemies” of the Trump administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs, urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than follow his unethical edicts.

Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending insurrectionists who broke into the Capitol on January 6 and advancing bogus claims of election fraud. He is close friends with an avowed neo-Nazi, appearing with and praising him repeatedly.

_Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin’s dangerous nomination._

When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed Martin to lead a “weaponization” task force at the Justice Department to go after the president’s enemies. I was at the top of the list.

**And now, Ed Martin is investigating me and carrying out not just the president’s political retribution, but his own, as well.**

**[Peter, this is going to get ugly. But I will not be deterred from speaking out, fighting back, and holding Trump accountable every single day. Will you have my back and split a contribution between me and Democracy On The Line to help me fight back against Ed Martin and his sham investigation?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113207948/563007452/-1492877668?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250812_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyNmM5ZmVkLWNhNzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PZMUajJlo_zdLu8u9jM2O7XhT9jCQbK2hqjTJvx0W-g=)**

name: Indiana Democrats
subject: Stop the GOP Police State
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, At 10:00 a.m. on Monday, Donald Trump announced an unprecedented and dangerous move: he is federalizing the D.C. Police and deploying the National Guard—against the will of our elected leaders and the people of Washington, D.C. DC Democrats are fighting back—through legal action, organizing, and national advocacy. But this fight will be long and expensive, and we need every Democrat who believes in self-governance to step up right now. If you make a contribution today, it will be split between the Indiana Democratic Party and the Washington D.C Democratic Party to push back against Trump’s authoritarian power grab, and ensure that the voices of **700,000 DC residents** are heard loud and clear. **[[Rush a Donation to Help D.C. and IN Dems]](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113208041/563007771/-896664473?refcode=250812dc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDM2NDU2NS1jYjc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6-fch8NinYJRa-KwvH9Bg13c4QQWGPIxy95IhNp_oh0=)** Trump claims this stunt is about crime, but, according to the U.S. Department of Justice, violent crime in DC is at a **30-year low**. This isn’t about safety—it’s about seizing power in the nation’s capital and sending a chilling message to other cities across the country. **The dangerous power grab isn’t just happening in D.C.** Indiana Gov. Mike Braun recently floated a [police takeover in Indianapolis](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113208043/563007775/-989567496?refcode=250812dc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDM2NDU2NS1jYjc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6-fch8NinYJRa-KwvH9Bg13c4QQWGPIxy95IhNp_oh0=&emci=1e7f9f57-ca77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=20364565-cb77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535) and Republican legislators have filed bills seeking to [remove our capital city’s duly elected prosecutor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113208045/563007777/-312727710?refcode=250812dc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDM2NDU2NS1jYjc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6-fch8NinYJRa-KwvH9Bg13c4QQWGPIxy95IhNp_oh0=&emci=1e7f9f57-ca77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=20364565-cb77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535) **[[Rush a Donation to Help D.C. and IN Dems]](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113208047/563007779/-896664473?refcode=250812dc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDM2NDU2NS1jYjc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6-fch8NinYJRa-KwvH9Bg13c4QQWGPIxy95IhNp_oh0=)** Trump’s dangerous behavior is trickling down to state and local Republicans. This is exactly the fight for democracy we’ve been warning about for years. If we all act together, we can stop this blatant attack on our freedoms and show Trump—and his enablers—that we will never surrender our rights. In solidarity, **Indiana Democrats**

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: An appalling attack on free press
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Five Palestinian journalists with the Al Jazeera network were assassinated in targeted Israeli airstrikes in Gaza on Sunday.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1757%2E791427%2ElT4myN)

Friend — This is yet another appalling attack on the free press.
Five Palestinian journalists with the Al Jazeera network were assassinated in targeted Israeli airstrikes in Gaza on Sunday.
That means at least 242 Palestinian journalists in Gaza have now been killed by Israel since October 7, 2023.
According to an analysis by the Watson Institute, Israel has killed more journalists in the last two years than were killed in the U.S. Civil War, World Wars I and II, the Korean War, the Vietnam War, the wars in Yugoslavia, and the war in Afghanistan, **combined.**
It’s another statistic that proves the depravity and inhumanity of Israel’s assault on Gaza. And behind those statistics are people — brave, selfless people who did their duty to provide information about the Gaza genocide to the world, knowing full well that they would be marked for assassination by the Israeli military.
**The killing of journalists is a war crime.** It is a violation of international law, and we have a responsibility to stop these war crimes from continuing.
But when the United Nations and the International Court of Justice seek consequences and accountability for Israeli war criminals like Benjamin Netanyahu and his top officials, the United States steps in to act as a shield.
That’s why I’ve been leading the charge in Congress to change the status quo on America’s role in the Gaza genocide and Israel’s occupation.
We’ve seen leaders across the spectrum come together to demand a surge in humanitarian aid. We’ve seen Democrats in the Senate vote against more military aid for Israel. _**We have to keep pushing, for the people of Gaza and their futures.**_
**[Friend, I'm asking you to join me today in pressuring my colleagues in Congress to take action to protect journalists in Gaza, end all military aid to Israel, and seek accountability and justice for war crimes. Add your name to my petition today and join our pro-peace movement that grows every day.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-gaza-journalists/?source=em250812-1-180&akid=1757%2E791427%2ElT4myN)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-gaza-journalists/?source=em250812-1-180&akid=1757%2E791427%2ElT4myN)**
No matter the conflict, journalists should always be off-limits. Israel’s deliberate targeting of the press proves their disregard for international law and basic decency. We must act.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1757%2E791427%2ElT4myN)**. clean_body: Five Palestinian journalists with the Al Jazeera network were assassinated in targeted Israeli airstrikes in Gaza on Sunday. Friend — This is yet another appalling attack on the free press. Five Palestinian journalists with the Al Jazeera network were assassinated in targeted Israeli airstrikes in Gaza on Sunday. That means at least 242 Palestinian journalists in Gaza have now been killed by Israel since October 7, 2023. According to an analysis by the Watson Institute, Israel has killed more journalists in the last two years than were killed in the U.S. Civil War, World Wars I and II, the Korean War, the Vietnam War, the wars in Yugoslavia, and the war in Afghanistan, combined. It’s another statistic that proves the depravity and inhumanity of Israel’s assault on Gaza. And behind those statistics are people — brave, selfless people who did their duty to provide information about the Gaza genocide to the world, knowing full well that they would be marked for assassination by the Israeli military. The killing of journalists is a war crime. It is a violation of international law, and we have a responsibility to stop these war crimes from continuing. But when the United Nations and the International Court of Justice seek consequences and accountability for Israeli war criminals like Benjamin Netanyahu and his top officials, the United States steps in to act as a shield. That’s why I’ve been leading the charge in Congress to change the status quo on America’s role in the Gaza genocide and Israel’s occupation. We’ve seen leaders across the spectrum come together to demand a surge in humanitarian aid. We’ve seen Democrats in the Senate vote against more military aid for Israel. We have to keep pushing, for the people of Gaza and their futures. No matter the conflict, journalists should always be off-limits. Israel’s deliberate targeting of the press proves their disregard for international law and basic decency. We must act. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: America First War Room
subject: Please help me find my dog... He looks like this (Picture inside)
body:
---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e40981094/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvOFNhcjd3czk1cA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTI/LbmNsR0xkU0RLdw/qP2hpZHM9bmNRb0xTV2dMc1lNOGVscw/gaJvAWw/s3g96f251e5)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | | My dog ran off in the middle of the night. I chased him through the woods with a flashlight, but every time he saw the light, he’d bolt. To him, it was just a game of chase. It went on for over an hour... and I started thinking the worst. Maybe a hog got him. No sound. No tracks. Just pitch black. So I called my cop neighbor and stopped by... He said, “Kill the light.” Then handed me **[THIS](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e40981094/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTI/LbmNsR0xkU0RLdw/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTcwJmFmZl9pZD0xMjM0JmZpbGVfaWQ9NDIxJmFmZl9zdWI9QW1lcmljYW5XYXJSb29tJmFmZl9zdWIyPTgxMjI1/gaJvAWw/s4kc8efd553)** ... and that’s how I found him...

This lil punk went hunting on his own... Check out what he caught... But thank God he was safe. The trick was... I could see him, but he couldn’t see me.

This is what you need! **[>> Here’s what I used to track him in complete darkness <<](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e40981094/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTI/LbmNsR0xkU0RLdw/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTcwJmFmZl9pZD0xMjM0JmZpbGVfaWQ9NDIxJmFmZl9zdWI9QW1lcmljYW5XYXJSb29tJmFmZl9zdWIyPTgxMjI1/gaJvAWw/s4kc8efd553)
**
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e40981094/VaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5rcy5wcmltYWwtcXVpY2suY29tL2FmZl9j/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTI/LbmNsR0xkU0RLdw/qP29mZmVyX2lkPTcwJmFmZl9pZD0xMjM0JmZpbGVfaWQ9NDIxJmFmZl9zdWI9QW1lcmljYW5XYXJSb29tJmFmZl9zdWIyPTgxMjI1/gaJvAWw/s4kc8efd553) ~ MCG Tactical

body:
This message is long but important.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113208279/563008732/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-08-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjI2ODRlNy1jYjc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G0B07Uxk5nvMQhKPNtyrcmDd7bCvANHajloBkkaH3ps=)

| Peter,

I know the headlines are constant. The attacks feel nonstop. And if you’re feeling overwhelmed, or like one more political email might push you over the edge, I get it.

But I want to be honest about why these emails matter.
---
| [GIVE NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113208280/563008733/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-08-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjI2ODRlNy1jYjc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G0B07Uxk5nvMQhKPNtyrcmDd7bCvANHajloBkkaH3ps=)
