Right now, Republicans have complete control of the federal government: the White House, the Senate and the House. They’ve already passed devastating budget cuts, slashing Medicaid, school funding and food assistance. And they’re just getting started... Unless Democrats take back the House next November, we have limited ways to fight back.

**Winning the House won’t undo all of the damage. But it will give us the power to block the next wave of cruelty, hold hearings, shine a light on corruption and finally go on offense again.**

I represent the only toss-up seat in New York and one of the most competitive in the country. If we lose it, we are all but guaranteed to lose our shot at taking back the House. I’m not going to let that happen and I know you won’t either.

That’s why we send these emails. That’s why we ask for your support. Because without grassroots donors, this campaign doesn’t stand a chance against the record-breaking Republican fundraising numbers.

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Update from Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=eHot1C17LjLqd2vgoqK22foUTs9xGsIQ2zQSFxaY7JNWzWtkuQTqVJnsYOz35v8qRlCLDTJE3VgzDBHNFkN6iW%2FhrCIGuokPM1YF5zyP6yGe45wDsQ4QWmMvU7p49ZZtn9n7rrxyjiUcBgvJkIXYPXT4ZO6eYaBsFFOpZj5dQsJor2M7QmWZBvuHeOLz30Vj4vV5si7TcpkeieeeKafpWcbfRb8ZN%2Fir4F55zThACAkcwtxsinTvM4EAH1l57Lva5ZFTX7wc5rAqxMbWqUKGGhr15488jzUjvVZwMQOCyy3gNLhMMdL5yY2Nc%2F3AA69gpmHmyYV9ImmEAI8Fsj%2FuOAFANat12X11yyjmNk6FTT%2FrHqDhRlWB1WxXeboOvkipUzg01IU7p%2BE6%2BPQmgeR93QsqUg8pI9sO85sw7gSoxGxXiAfuXZ96I3PiNGxIB%2BU6)
---
| |
---
Peter,

Republicans in Texas know they’re in trouble. They’ve seen the polls — and they understand that if elections are fair, Democrats will win back control of Congress.

By redrawing congressional maps in their favor, _they’re trying to lock in control no matter how voters feel about their disastrous agenda._ This isn’t about representing the people. It’s about protecting their own political careers.

But we can stop them. Democrats in the Texas legislature have left their state to prevent a vote on the Republican maps from occurring. They are sacrificing time with their families and the careers to help save our democracy and **they need our help.**

**That’s why I’m asking you to chip in to support the Texas Democrats in this redistricting fight.** [Today I am asking you to chip in not for my campaign, for the the Texas Democrats making a stand to prevent Republican gerrymandering:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113208444/563009279/1074094429?source=EM_NBI_SM_20250812_FR_Txredistricting_0_6MO_Seth_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTkyMGU1NC1jZDc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMoblvb5-QPXPzlKz9A8Nf69DQmtudWZyadG_fqQDko=&emci=95c8904d-cd77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=3a920e54-cd77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ceid=15384964) | | [SUPPORT THEM HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113208445/563009284/1074094429?source=EM_NBI_SM_20250812_FR_Txredistricting_0_6MO_Seth_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTkyMGU1NC1jZDc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMoblvb5-QPXPzlKz9A8Nf69DQmtudWZyadG_fqQDko=&emci=95c8904d-cd77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=3a920e54-cd77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ceid=15384964)

The right to choose our leaders — _not have them choose us_ — is the foundation of our democracy. The moment we let politicians redraw the rules to serve themselves, that foundation starts to crack.

Republicans are betting that these new maps will protect them. Let’s prove them wrong.

— Seth

| | **_Meet Russell:_** Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper.

| | Peter, this is Jonathan Jackson’s Finance Team,

The truth is: you probably receive dozens of political emails every day asking you to chip in.

But here at Jonathan Jackson for Congress, your grassroots support is the fuel for our fight to help take on MAGA Republicans, fight for working families, and fight back against Trump’s extremist agenda.

[If you’re short on time and that’s all you needed to know – can you chip in $7 to help us continue our fight to protect IL-01 and Americans across the country?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqs0lPWYSA7o2JXf90izLjoA-_1LqGlPtoUnhA1VQ7xueOz-fwNLJeqPFxcR6jwTE0N4GJ8b8KZYk6dggWSfs4NpMcMJ0kvJYjPwiJG-cyiL_m7DMlhIlJh9theVcVN0Cq_K-RPHO215pYsY27ktCf8nZ3v4R3NaUgqPpAORc01mFoPk2d_ExQL39ikx6RswGyXT1LC0hVMdEBWbcj5J-tO9jabfFW84OhnsIS51PZsNUPufqVe0UIcd7tFXrpSqabM_zw6yziXXIcxw2nVO854kPIHS9YHbm-mi8q9h0t0f1TtxBpz3FOqrt_4RVsel78C0c_842xVskXi3oPIHwAvjG-DxCByDoL4pEy7KqGlMV-ouArsAfsMkPo_mrIFtDQM/4iz/SoFWg7dASQiisI0rugw9QA/h1/h001.njsG8JU8rawUKV3xWaJQ6Gs3H0xP4LWFOLInKQCMg_k) Your support is more crucial than ever, Peter, and Jonathan understands that making the choice to donate is not easy. _But_ here are three great reasons to chip in and help fight with us to demand a people-powered government.
1. Jonathan is one of the loudest voices in Congress, standing up to Trump’s authoritarian agenda and fighting for real accountability by our government.

2. Every day, Jonathan is fighting to make sure the voices of the Illinois 1st district are heard and protected against MAGA attacks on our community.

3. The future of our democracy is at stake, but with your help, we can continue our fight to protect the rights of people in our community and across the country. [So we’re asking, can you chip in $7 (or whatever you can) to help fuel our fight in Washington?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqs0lPWYSA7o2JXf90izLjoA-_1LqGlPtoUnhA1VQ7xueOz-fwNLJeqPFxcR6jwTE0N4GJ8b8KZYk6dggWSfs4NpMcMJ0kvJYjPwiJG-cyiL_mXZdiKHoApyycEbGTpw9X8o4piPIq9u0mYOx7RNJwlwsJlwW35-IVxXV7-jRh2nVRa-xjUVHG1MssIfsJf-jFV4R30XHV3bvon02Bxp3pvYWjr2vrmXMo-izySdodL7TZk_j7h_sRL9Ipra2f7J_I_1Dx-Eky4V1mtAWI2uFyoVz0rmceBT4AN_hZoD8c-h7T1OStHTsOlkj4Au_in4JuG3qxzc0_05TKcKnaXIX2XjR2EwMveKkOOQzZzIs8UGDQEVLAUSHGIq1EASVi99f3U/4iz/SoFWg7dASQiisI0rugw9QA/h2/h001.rTCY3bLHJAGWfF5Z4WNooPFV2-12ft4NnoQta5vtVj4)

clean_body: Your grassroots support is the fuel to our fight to help take on MAGA Republicans | | If you’d like to unsubscribe, . | | Peter, this is Jonathan Jackson’s Finance Team, The truth is: you probably receive dozens of political emails every day asking you to chip in. But here at Jonathan Jackson for Congress, your grassroots support is the fuel for our fight to help take on MAGA Republicans, fight for working families, and fight back against Trump’s extremist agenda. Your support is more crucial than ever, Peter, and Jonathan understands that making the choice to donate is not easy. But here are three great reasons to chip in and help fight with us to demand a people-powered government. 1. Jonathan is one of the loudest voices in Congress, standing up to Trump’s authoritarian agenda and fighting for real accountability by our government. 2. Every day, Jonathan is fighting to make sure the voices of the Illinois 1st district are heard and protected against MAGA attacks on our community. 3. The future of our democracy is at stake, but with your help, we can continue our fight to protect the rights of people in our community and across the country. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | ---|--- | | Thank you for your support, Finance Team via Jonathan Jackson * | Paid for by Jackson for Congress Jonathan Jackson for Congress 1030 15th St NW, #404 Washington, DC 20005 United States If you need to unsubscribe, you can | | Sent via . name: GOTV PAC
subject: Help us run ads against the TX gerrymander scheme!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Greg Abbott isn’t just trying to gerrymander Texas; he’s going for the kill shot. He’s threatening to redraw the maps again and wipe out 10 Democratic seats in Congress. That would leave the entire state with just two.
It’s obscene. It’s undemocratic. And it might be a massive mistake...
BUT here’s the thing: when you get too greedy, you “dummymander.” You stretch your lines so far that you create more competitive districts. And that’s where we come in.
GOTV PAC will be blasting ads into Texas’s most competitive House districts this week -- exposing Abbott’s BS and telling voters exactly what’s going on. And we’re not stopping there. Texas is home to our most flippable U.S. Senate seat in 2026, and if we start now, we can take it.
Abbott’s playing with fire. Let’s make sure he gets burned.
Chip in $15, $25, or whatever you can right now so we can crank up our ad buys and flood the airwaves with the truth. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08122025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=Email08122025] DONATE $29 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=Email08122025]

Custom Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08122025]
Every dollar we raise today goes straight into taking Abbott’s reckless power grab and turning it into a Democratic win.
– GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08122025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08122025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

| | Friend, As of today, the Free State of Florida has a new Lieutenant Governor, the “Chuck Norris of Florida Politics.” **Senator Jay Collins** served **23 years in the U.S. Army, including as a Green Beret**. He put his life on the line for freedom. In civilian life, he’s kept fighting for our values:

| |
* **Stopped the Chinese Communist Party** from buying land, and obtaining state contracts in Florida

* **Mandated instruction on the evils of communism** so the next generation knows the truth about tyranny

* **Fought for parental rights** and full transparency in our schools

* **Created the Florida Veterans’ History Program** and expanded workforce transition for service-disabled Floridians

* Delivered **benefits and infrastructure wins** for veterans and their families

And he lives his values, too. He’s celebrating 25 years of marriage to Layla (also a retired veteran), raising two boys, and serving faithfully at Grace Family Church.

subject: This Saturday – National Redistricting Day of Action!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
The Texas House Democrats are denying quorum to stop the Trump takeover of Texas and block his attempt to rig the 2026 midterm elections.
This isn’t just about redistricting or one state’s politics. It’s about the future of our democracy. Congressional Republicans can’t win with their unpopular policies and their failure to deliver on key campaign promises. (Grocery prices are up by three percent since last year, and tariffs are driving costs up even more.) So, President Trump has demanded that Governor Abbott and Texas Republicans discriminate against Black, Latino, and Asian voters by eliminating the districts of the representatives they have elected to Congress. We’re not going to let that happen.
This Saturday is a National Day of Action. Here’s how you can help:
1. Attend the Fight The Trump Takeover Rally in Austin, Texas!
https://www.mobilize.us/fightthetrumptakeover/event/824964 [https://www.mobilize.us/fightthetrumptakeover/event/824964]
SIGN UP! [https://www.mobilize.us/fightthetrumptakeover/event/824964]
2. Phonebank with Team Lizzie to Fight The Trump Takeover!
This Saturday, Team Lizzie will host a phonebank at our campaign HQ in Houston to call voters and let them know what's happening! We'll encourage them to join the fight against this anti-democratic Trump takeover.
WHEN
Saturday, August 16, 2025
1 P.M. - 4 P.M.
WHERE
Team Lizzie Campaign HQ
Sign up to phonebank here: https://www.mobilize.us/fightthetrumptakeover/event/827410/ [https://www.mobilize.us/fightthetrumptakeover/event/827410/]
PHONEBANK! [https://www.mobilize.us/fightthetrumptakeover/event/827410/]
3. Forward This Email!
You can also help by forwarding this email to other people who care about protecting our democracy and encouraging them to join in the Day of Action wherever they are .
Team Lizzie and Texas Democrats are taking a stand to protect Texans, Americans, and democracy itself. We will continue to fight the Trump Texas Takeover, and are grateful to be in the fight with you.
Thanks and we hope to see you there!
Team Lizzie
P.S. There are buses going to Austin. Reply to this email if you need transportation on Saturday!

name: AOTL
subject: A victory for voting rights in Alabama
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We win this fight state by state, district by district.
|
---

Peter,
We’ve got some good news to share: A federal three-judge panel just ruled that Alabama must use a fair map that includes two Black-opportunity districts in the state.
This map was redrawn after a previous, gerrymandered map was found to be in violation of the Voting Rights Act in 2023. And this bipartisan-appointed panel of judges just upheld it once again, ordering Alabama to use this fair map until 2030.
It’s also a meaningful victory for Black Alabamians, who now have the opportunity to elect candidates of their choice in two congressional districts. It’s a major win for all who care about fair maps and equal access to the ballot. And it’s a resounding reminder of exactly why we fight.
We win the fight for fair maps state by state, district by district — and by never, ever giving up. **[The power of voters is still under attack right now in several states across the country — make a donation to fund AOTL’s fight against those who want to undermine our democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113209389/563012832/174172392?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_ALWinRR_email_20250812-AOTL-Tier1-ALWinRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250812-AOTL-Tier1-ALWinRR_&utm_campaign=ALWinRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4MDc1YzE4LWQwNzctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qH2dSnsyFMfiq8o3-p-0JJ-RCy9Fzhk4B2gcZ3gyg1U=)**

This victory comes at a moment when some state lawmakers, with pressure from the Trump Administration, are taking unprecedented steps to redraw their congressional maps mid-decade — a sinister effort to pull off extreme gerrymanders to lock in unearned, unchecked power.
This victory is a sign that the rule of law and fairness can prevail.
The American people are with us: According to a new poll, 76% of Americans view gerrymandering as unfair. That’s why it’s essential that we continue to call out these extremist power grabs and hold politicians accountable for trying to rig the rules of the game.
Here’s the thing: even in Alabama, this fight isn’t over. We expect the state to appeal, and it’ll be on the fair maps movement to be ready to respond if a future court ruling changes the map — and keep fighting for the basic principles that our democracy was founded on. **Our strategy works if every one of us pitches in and does our part. And with attacks rising by the day, that fight takes enormous resources.**

clean_body: We win this fight state by state, district by district. | Peter, We’ve got some good news to share: A federal three-judge panel just ruled that Alabama must use a fair map that includes two Black-opportunity districts in the state. This map was redrawn after a previous, gerrymandered map was found to be in violation of the Voting Rights Act in 2023. And this bipartisan-appointed panel of judges just upheld it once again, ordering Alabama to use this fair map until 2030. It’s also a meaningful victory for Black Alabamians, who now have the opportunity to elect candidates of their choice in two congressional districts. It’s a major win for all who care about fair maps and equal access to the ballot. And it’s a resounding reminder of exactly why we fight. We win the fight for fair maps state by state, district by district — and by never, ever giving up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = This victory comes at a moment when some state lawmakers, with pressure from the Trump Administration, are taking unprecedented steps to redraw their congressional maps mid-decade — a sinister effort to pull off extreme gerrymanders to lock in unearned, unchecked power. This victory is a sign that the rule of law and fairness can prevail. The American people are with us: According to a new poll, 76% of Americans view gerrymandering as unfair. That’s why it’s essential that we continue to call out these extremist power grabs and hold politicians accountable for trying to rig the rules of the game. Here’s the thing: even in Alabama, this fight isn’t over. We expect the state to appeal, and it’ll be on the fair maps movement to be ready to respond if a future court ruling changes the map — and keep fighting for the basic principles that our democracy was founded on. Our strategy works if every one of us pitches in and does our part. And with attacks rising by the day, that fight takes enormous resources. = Thank you for supporting our fight in this critical moment, All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Hey folks,
Stephen Smith is back in the hot seat with me for another chaotic, unmissable round of _Hack vs. Hunk_ -- and this one's got everything: wild rumors, viral tweets, South Park deep cuts, and a gut-punch conversation about the Supreme Court coming for marriage equality. We laugh, we rant, we connect the dots on the high-stakes moves happening right now -- and if you care about justice, this is essential viewing.
Here's where to jump in:
* **00:02:29** - Breaking down the swirling rumor about Ghislaine Maxwell's alleged work release -- and why Trumpworld's Epstein connections still stink to high heaven.
* **00:10:02** - Stephen's monastery tweet goes mega-viral (123k likes!) -- and what it says about excess men, history, and political instability.
* **00:22:26** - A brutally funny (and sweaty) detour into New Orleans, history, and why "sold down the river" hits different after 100° heat with 90% humidity.
* **00:27:02** - Faith, hypocrisy, and the MAGA war on Catholics -- plus Mike's Piers Morgan smackdown over a Black lesbian Jesus.
* **00:30:59** - The raw, personal fear and anger over SCOTUS targeting gay marriage -- and why the fight ahead mirrors the post-Dobbs playbook.

This conversation swings from laugh-out-loud absurdity to the kind of urgent, heart-on-sleeve truth you don't hear anywhere else. If you believe in equality -- if you believe in not giving an inch to the forces of cruelty -- this is a must-watch.

--Mike

name: VoteVets
subject: Quick Reaction Force?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
American Troops deployed on American soil against American citizens at the order of the President of the United States.
#
In the Military, a quick reaction force (QRF) is a pre-staged element of personnel ready to respond at a moment’s notice to a number of situations.
Most MAGA types heard about QRFs in the news at some point and never forgot it. It’s a very real thing, but it’s also the kind of acronym politicians (especially ones who never served) use to sound tough.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.hEpWPc&refcode=em250812-1-60&t=1&akid=34522%2E3013755%2Ex07ruH)
Turns out Trump and Pete Hegseth are setting up a “Domestic Civil Disturbance Quick Reaction Force” of hundreds of National Guard Troops who will be on standby to respond to events in U.S. cities in less than an hour.
What that actually means is that Trump is putting together a standing army that he will use to attack protesters in Democratically held cities and states. American Troops deployed on American soil against American citizens at the order of the President of the United States.
He fired senior officers he viewed as disloyal. He fired civilian leaders that wouldn’t swear an oath to him. He’s purging the ranks of anyone he deems unworthy. He’s federalized National Guard Troops and Marines and deployed them against U.S. citizens. Now, he’s putting together his own personal army for whatever purpose he wants.
The most powerful Military in history is being bent to serve the political interests of one man. That brings degradation of trust between the Armed Forces and the public, deep damage to civilian oversight of the Military, and serious risk to the American people — both in and out of uniform.
It’s unnecessary, hugely wasteful, and extremely dangerous.
This kind of thing is hard to take. But it is also a reminder of the importance of our work.
VoteVets is actively working on outreach to Veterans, the very people we need speaking out against these un-American actions. We are taking the fight to Trump in every possible arena. And we need your help.
**[Please, make a donation to VoteVets if you can, if you understand the importance of this moment, and the value of the work we do with your support.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.hEpWPc&refcode=em250812-1-60&t=2&akid=34522%2E3013755%2Ex07ruH)

body:
The Tea Party Patriots are pressuring senators to pass the SAVE Act. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113209651/563013670/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250812_T1_SAVEActUpdate_v1s2&utm_source=bsc_emm_ffa_20250812_t1_saveactupdate_v1s2&utm_campaign=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Y1ZGU0Yy1kMTc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jwr_GgR5jprkAKddAHG53J3EvRV1FG4K3rcJHRvmahg=&emci=7bf5de4c-d177-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=83f5de4c-d177-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ceid=1037277)

| | Team, with the SAVE Act already having passed the House and now looming in the Senate, a far-right activist group just launched a new pressure campaign to try to ram through this massive voter suppression bill. **The Tea Party Patriots are stoking discredited myths about non-citizen voting to rally their base of far-right activists to pressure Senators — especially those facing reelection — to pass this bill.** This kind of pressure can be effective as we saw when the President and his allies pushed some Republican lawmakers to drop their reelection bids over the recent government spending bill. **Fair Fight Action is exposing the SAVE Act’s true, voter-suppressing consequences.** If signed into law, the SAVE Act could disenfranchise tens of millions of Americans, disproportionately impacting low-income Americans, seniors, rural voters, and people of color. We’re not letting that happen. We have already mobilized over 200,000 Americans to contact their U.S. Senators and demand a NO vote on the SAVE Act — and we can’t let up now. [**Sign up to text bank with Fair Fight Action this Friday, August 15, at 1:30pm ET. No experience is required! We’ll hold a virtual training at the beginning then text voters in key states to pressure their Senators to vote NO on the SAVE Act. Sign up today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113209652/563013671/-435181213?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250812_T1_SAVEActUpdate_v1s2&utm_source=bsc_emm_ffa_20250812_t1_saveactupdate_v1s2&utm_campaign=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Y1ZGU0Yy1kMTc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jwr_GgR5jprkAKddAHG53J3EvRV1FG4K3rcJHRvmahg=&emci=7bf5de4c-d177-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=83f5de4c-d177-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ceid=1037277) The Tea Party Patriots have been around since Barack Obama’s presidency, and they got their first big break with a massive fear-mongering pressure campaign against the Affordable Care Act. They also pitched in funding for the rally that led to the January 6 insurrection. That rally was about overturning a fair election and silencing the voice of the people, so it’s no surprise that the Tea Party Patriots are attempting to do that once more with the SAVE Act. **The SAVE Act is a key part of the far-right’s national voter suppression playbook ahead of the 2026 midterm elections.** While the Tea Party Patriots organize volunteers and plan rallies to shore up support for massive voter suppression, Fair Fight Action is fighting back. We’re setting the record straight against the false, harmful narrative around non-citizen voting. We’re pushing for legislation that breaks down barriers to the ballot box. And we’re mobilizing Americans to contact their Senators and demand that they oppose bills like the SAVE Act. [**If you’re with us, will you join Fair Fight Action’s virtual text bank on Friday, August 15, at 1:30pm ET? The SAVE Act is a key part of the far-right’s national voter suppression playbook ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. While the Tea Party Patriots organize volunteers and plan rallies to shore up support for massive voter suppression, Fair Fight Action is fighting back. We’re setting the record straight against the false, harmful narrative around non-citizen voting. We’re pushing for legislation that breaks down barriers to the ballot box. And we’re mobilizing Americans to contact their Senators and demand that they oppose bills like the SAVE Act. | In Solidarity, The Fair Fight Action Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. name: Tim Kaine
subject: The Trump Administration destroyed 500 tons of food for starving children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Derek, here’s something you may not have heard about in the news, but is worth your time:
Last month, the Trump Administration ordered 500 tons of emergency food – enough to feed 27,000 starving children for a month – to be incinerated.
U.S. taxpayers had already paid for these resources. But instead of sending this nutritious food to kids who desperately needed it, the Administration locked it in a USAID warehouse, knowingly let it expire, and then got rid of it.
This is the chaos and cruelty of this Administration.
It gets worse: Back in March, after the U.S. government was put on notice that this food was set to expire, the U.N. World Food Programme reached out and said that if the U.S. wasn’t going to distribute it, they would. The Administration declined.
What does this say about us as a nation? And on a more mundane level, why is it a good and efficient use of resources to burn this food instead of distributing it?
Now, when I asked Deputy Secretary of State for Management and Resources Michael Rigas about this during a committee hearing, he pointed out that the U.S. is still the largest giver of aid in the world.
That’s true. But sometimes a specific detail really exposes the soul.
To me, this choice to withhold nutritious food that could have helped 27,000 kids is a detail that exposes the soul of this Administration.
So when I fight back against them, when I reach out to you about how to help and get involved – I hope we’ll all remember this.
We must ALL work together to push against the chaos, the cruelty, and the calculated incompetence of this Administration and fight for something better in our future.
Thanks for being here.
-Tim Kaine

name: Marissa, Team MAHA
subject: We’d do anything for our kids.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Future Prosperity Initiative
body:
But....

| [Unsubscribe](http://links.futureprosperityinitiative.co/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f00dcde1db774f098464bf29925dbc77&_s=98f68818f9b04a318e15369bbb4d6928&_t=NEkrhVQPr0mziajXrNaplggFH1Sdt5FM1MFzH1mwnLKuerGnP7FlfyKRmCNy00xVVvQhBNLPbQviDSjDtUoJonqQnbNG-PMTw0o2KXcQMpUI45V-wnSRVDNQsAqZNnaR) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.futureprosperityinitiative.co/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f00dcde1db774f098464bf29925dbc77&_s=98f68818f9b04a318e15369bbb4d6928&_t=NEkrhVQPr0mziajXrNaplggFH1Sdt5FM1MFzH1mwnLKuerGnP7FlfyKRmCNy00xVVvQhBNLPbQviDSjDtUoJonqQnbNG-PMTw0o2KXcQMpUI45V-wnSRVDNQsAqZNnaR)

---
Peter,

Kids... You feed them, tuck them in at night, pay for their school, and do everything in your power to give them the best.

Then... they shove it in your face, start being moody, waving their hands around and cursing the day you brought them into the world.

Now... President Trump just gave us the greatest gift we could have wished for. He's re-enacting the Presidential Fitness test, and maybe after the kids are done sweating it out on the field, they'll have a little bit more appreciation for what we've given them.

We love our kids; they're America's future, but it feels good knowing they will be doing something productive and not destroying their brain cells scrolling through TikTok.

President Trump needs to know we appreciate what he's doing, he CARES ABOUT US, OUR FAMILIES, AND AMERICA!

**[If we could trouble you for a few seconds and ask you to sign our THANK YOU LETTER to President Trump, please do so below!](http://links.futureprosperityinitiative.co/u/click?_t=f00dcde1db774f098464bf29925dbc77&_m=98f68818f9b04a318e15369bbb4d6928&_e=v659RAtf6mITXlRqhuxa3xBdz0vLDDg_FMQRPtHcqpZOo37ZnJ6HRUjkGw26u64z6DdpKqApiudUVMve_4Vks_VWDIF-ziEOU7JJAULFwLICyDI1nSCtd3kzR3CBN84vSv2lRy5JKogQ2c5qqe1-E7FrgcYqI5CfzstXygQgYOF-cbajhM5Z3Sno2RRoItSu7BWgeHkqF8wOPnH79qrMMVp-xWelSh_W-TDS5J7rBsIumutVipGWCK4BuwnLsLyrOGdYXx9i3OQKdR36SzyXn2fe7TldzZdsdJJms9n5ISsayxn7cuGNFQqjcFBHwQuOHTJ_0oGE97esIjnNfbOyxDfRcRibVUHCo3I2MMaBu4byGityogwDWgRWHxVHcS4c1npUTe7r9Dm-cC5Nan6H606VpCq5v83GVpkPhWLcGmEyTOSETprQKeJNaT8hOoikC6BSK9aH_N1tqtHRN-yHyO6S_8L82fBzzMIjg6mtIJVB4PL_v1ON7wCnbxlnxNHToBK3USNebLfzIcw3eqCorXFuKmniwQRrshn4sra2PEQ%3D)**

name: Naomi at Grijalva HQ
subject: 🌍 Protect what you love with Adelita! 🤩🌳
disclaimer_text: Paid for by La Gente for Grijalva_
body:
6 Weekends left🚨, Will you join us this weekend?☺️

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7e126a914a4b/weekend-of-action-for-adelita-10308810?e=f7c3700ccb)
---

| | | | |
# LET’S HIT THE STREETS!
Adelita for Congress Newsletter
---
| Hi Peter,
There are just **six weekends left** until the general election. That means it’s time to double down—and this **Saturday, August 16th** we’re inviting you to join our _**Enviro’s for Adelita Canvass 🌳✨**_****
With everything happening at the federal level, our environment—and our future—are on the line. There is no Planet B. This is our only home. **Adelita is ready to fight for our environment and our communities in Congress, but first, we need to show up for her.** That starts with us—knocking on doors, talking to voters, and making sure they show up to vote in the general election. Change only happens when we all show up—and it begins with **you.**
**Like recycling, small acts create big change.** Every door knocked, every conversation, every voter reminded—it all adds up.
We’ll see you on Saturday!☺️
---
| **Here’s what’s happening this week:****Canvassing Door to Door!** Help us go door-to-door and connect with voters face-to-face. We have our **Tucson** canvass this weekend**&** **Meet n Greet** Join us Saturday afternoon in **Patagonia, AZ** for a Meet n Greet!🤩 **See Below for more details!**
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=a76e7cf5fb&e=f7c3700ccb)
| **Saturday Canvass in Tucson** Saturday, August 16th @ 8:30 AM2720 E Broadway Blvd. Tucson, AZ
---
| [RSVP to Tucson Canvasses!](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=1106a45e16&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=0fed1a51e4&e=f7c3700ccb)
| **MEET N GREET in PATAGONIA****JOIN US** Saturday, August 16th @ 5:30PM
---
| [RSVP to MEET N GREET!](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=3f2ea01fb0&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
| For a smoother experience, please**download MiniVAN ahead of your canvass**. [Here](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=cfc54e0c9b&e=f7c3700ccb) is a guide if you need any help. MiniVAN is the program we use to share your list of doors to knock and where we log responses. **Download links** : MiniVAN for [iPhone](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=f7712139af&e=f7c3700ccb) and [Android](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=4a11c9aa66&e=f7c3700ccb).
---
| Will you be joining us this weekend? 🤩
Let’s keep up the momentum, keep showing up for each other, and make history — together.**If you have any questions, please reach out to us, at** : **volunteer@adelitaforcongress.com**
**For People. For Planet. For Adelita,****Naomi De La Rosa Arellano**

Like recycling, small acts create big change. Every door knocked, every conversation, every voter reminded—it all adds up. We’ll see you on Saturday!☺️ | Here’s what’s happening this week:**Canvassing Door to Door! Help us go door-to-door and connect with voters face-to-face. We have our Tucson canvass this weekend& Meet n Greet Join us Saturday afternoon in Patagonia, AZ for a Meet n Greet!🤩 See Below for more details! | | | | | | | | | | | Saturday Canvass in Tucson Saturday, August 16th @ 8:30 AM2720 E Broadway Blvd. Tucson, AZ | | MEET N GREET in PATAGONIAJOIN US Saturday, August 16th @ 5:30PM | | For a smoother experience, pleasedownload MiniVAN ahead of your canvass. is a guide if you need any help. MiniVAN is the program we use to share your list of doors to knock and where we log responses. Download links : MiniVAN for and . | Will you be joining us this weekend? 🤩 Let’s keep up the momentum, keep showing up for each other, and make history — together.If you have any questions, please reach out to us, at : volunteer@adelitaforcongress.com For People. For Planet. For Adelita,Naomi De La Rosa Arellano | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by La Gente for Grijalva Our mailing address is: P.O. Box 129, Tucson, AZ, 85702 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or |

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: What can kids do to help make the world fair for everyone?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
A question Alexandria got at a town hall in a Republican district.
#
At their town hall in Republican Elise Stefanik's district, Alexandria and Rep. Paul Tonko took questions from the audience.
One young lady asked: **What can kids do to help make the world fair for everyone?**
We thought you'd like to see Alexandria's answer:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250812-video.Vq74bz&refcode=em20250812-9536-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9536%2E2526796%2EdGLVrQ)
Here's to building a fairer, better world for each and every one of us.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

Working people — of all ages — are coming together to fight for the future of our democracy.
We’re hoping to hold more town halls soon, to meet with and organize communities in red, blue, and purple districts across the country.
[Will you make a $5 contribution today to help us add more stops soon? Every dollar helps us reach the communities that need it most.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250812-video.Vq74bz&refcode=em20250812-9536-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9536%2E2526796%2EdGLVrQ)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Trump watched his goons beat cops on Jan. 6 and NEVER called up the National Guard
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
They set up a gallows on Capitol Hill. They smashed their way through the doors, broke windows, beat cops, smeared sh*t on walls, and pissed in closets.
#

I’ve had just about enough of this.
I was on the House floor on January 6th while Trump’s people were trying to pound down the door. They set up a gallows on Capitol Hill. They smashed their way through the doors, broke windows, beat cops, smeared sh*t on walls, and pissed in closets.
We all watched thousands of Trump’s people spray bear mace on law enforcement officers, punch them, spit on them, pull them to the ground and kick them. Even beat them with the American flag. My friends, people like Capitol Police Officer Aquiliano Gonell, have permanent injuries from what Trump’s people did to them that day. Several of those officers took their own lives.
At no point did Trump lift a finger to stop any of it.
1600+ of his people were moving through the courts, receiving due process and being held responsible for their crimes. Trump pardoned every single one of them.
Trump said he couldn’t mobilize the Guard to defend the Capitol. He said only Speaker Pelosi could do it. I watched for months as thousands and thousands of his supporters swore up and down that the president couldn’t mobilize the National Guard like that.
I campaigned against people like Kari Lake, who apologized for the rioters who broke the law that day and went on to call it an inside job. Blamed the people who were in the Capitol for what Trump caused, undermined the investigations, and worked to prevent him from being impeached.
To sit through all of that and watch Trump federalize the California National Guard, deploy U.S. Marines to LA, and now send the DC Guard out on the street makes my blood boil.
He’s trying to distract us, yes. He’s trying to keep people distracted from everything he’s doing to the economy, his tax cuts for billionaires. He wants people to forget about Epstein and the Mount Everest sized pile of evidence against him. That’s all true.
But it’s also Trump taking power because he can. Because he likes dictators, and because he wants to be one.
We’ve got to stop this guy, hold him accountable, and make sure he’s run out of office with his tail between his legs.
It’s going to take a massive amount of work, and I’m ready to do it.
But I can’t without your help.
[**So, if you’re still with me, please: Make a donation to my campaign.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug25.JsYhtJ&refcode=em250812-1-160&t=1&akid=3936%2E734936%2E844dXy)
[DONATE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug25.JsYhtJ&refcode=em250812-1-160&t=2&akid=3936%2E734936%2E844dXy)
Thank you.
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Katie has what a Beverly Hills billionaire can’t buy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40006%2E3422442%2E9GcPfx)
Peter,
There are more than a dozen candidates running to be California’s next Governor, and in a crowded field in a large state, it takes serious resources to break ahead.
Katie Porter is building her campaign thanks to grassroots supporters. Meanwhile, our opponent Stephen Cloobeck is a Beverly Hills billionaire trying to use his personal fortune to buy the governor’s office. He just launched a massive $1.4 MILLION ad blitz–a nearly unheard of move this far out from Election Day–to give himself a head start.
And instead of winning people over with ideas, he’s resorting to personal attacks against Katie Porter, belittling her experience in the classroom.
**[If you want to help elect Katie as California’s next governor and defeat Stephen Cloobeck, chip in $5 to our campaign today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250812_1_ak?refcode=em20250812-40006&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40006_3422442_9GcPfx&akid=40006%2E3422442%2E9GcPfx)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250812_1_ak?refcode=em20250812-40006&refcode2=40006_3422442_9GcPfx&akid=40006%2E3422442%2E9GcPfx)
California’s next governor must be serious about bringing down costs, building an economy that works for everyone, and standing up to Trump’s attacks. Katie’s track record in Congress and her work helping Californians across the state means _she’ll be ready on day one._
With so much at stake, we can’t afford to let Cloobeck or any other out-of-touch billionaire buy this race.
**[Will you rush a donation of $5 or more to help Katie Porter become California’s next governor? We know that Porter Supporters can help us maintain our lead and keep Cloobeck, or any other billionaire, from trying to buy this race.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250812_1_ak?refcode=em20250812-40006&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40006_3422442_9GcPfx&akid=40006%2E3422442%2E9GcPfx)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250812_1_ak?refcode=em20250812-40006&refcode2=40006_3422442_9GcPfx&akid=40006%2E3422442%2E9GcPfx)
Thank you,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250812-40006&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=40006_3422442_9GcPfx&akid=40006%2E3422442%2E9GcPfx)**

Let’s recap:

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113210000/563015067/1435897075?refcode=email_081225_climate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODAxNDVmNy1kNTc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KP4uHOC28B6DqFU8noCJFixwNoaV0I75dkr9KSIQlFg=&emci=87a77b1e-cc77-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=580145f7-d577-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&ceid=7280715) Folks, it’s beginning to seem like the Trump administration has fully surrendered in the fight against climate change. Let’s recap: **FIRST:** Trump’s implemented sweeping cuts across the federal government, crippling agencies integral for climate research, like the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA). **THEN:** Republicans rammed Trump’s Big Ugly Betrayal Bill through Congress — axing climate investments and eliminating countless clean energy jobs. **NOW:** **Trump’s EPA just announced plans to end regulation of greenhouse gases — _stripping the federal government of its most powerful tool to fight the climate crisis._** Listen, climate change is real, and we’re already seeing the effects in our daily lives. We’ve seen higher temperatures, increased drought, and more extreme weather devastating our communities. Abandoning science in this fight isn’t just a catastrophic blunder — _it’s putting millions of American lives at risk._ As Colorado’s Senator, John helped pass one of the largest investments to fight the climate crisis.**But with Trump and the Republicans hell-bent on rolling back all of the progress we’ve made, it’s time to make a stand. ****[Please, can you chip in any amount today and help send a message that we won’t let the Trump administration sell out our futures to oil and gas?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113210001/563015068/1506335976?refcode=email_081225_climate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODAxNDVmNy1kNTc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KP4uHOC28B6DqFU8noCJFixwNoaV0I75dkr9KSIQlFg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113210002/563015069/1506335976?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_081225_climate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODAxNDVmNy1kNTc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KP4uHOC28B6DqFU8noCJFixwNoaV0I75dkr9KSIQlFg=)

subject: Zoe Lofgren is a fighter, and we need her in Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
We need to stand up to Trump’s lies.| |
---
| | Dear Peter – it’s Congressman Bennie Thompson.
---
| | I was proud to serve on the January 6th Committee with Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren.

After the violent attacks on the Capitol, our Committee worked diligently to uncover the threats to our democracy and deliver justice.

Since that day, Donald Trump has never stopped undermining the rule of law, degrading our democracy, eroding our Constitution, or lying about the work of our Committee.

In the face of Trump’s lawless contempt for our justice system and our democracy, Zoe Lofgren has led the resistance, fighting to uphold our Constitution and stop Republicans’ far-right policies.

__[_**Peter, will you join me in supporting Zoe’s re-election campaign by making a donation today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113210008/563015104/-1467160713?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-08-12_J6C_BEN_ES-28770&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGI4YjM2MS1kNjc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Atj6Dxkr5LpxYDZyGUw4GLiz47g-ZqeCT9Cwj12plg=)

Trump is a criminal who is determined to undermine our democracy — from attempting to overturn the results of the 2020 election, to pardoning January 6th, 2021 rioters, to threatening to jail Zoe and me along with the other former members of our Select Committee.

Now, Trump’s Justice Department hired a January 6th rioter who encouraged the murder of police officers.

**This is an insult to every honorable law enforcement officer in our country, and to our democracy itself.**

Zoe and I are outraged, but this follows the same dishonorable playbook Trump has followed his entire time in office — so the fight continues.

But I need your help today to ensure we don’t lose Zoe’s principled voice in Congress, Peter. clean_body: We need to stand up to Trump’s lies.| | | | Dear Peter – it’s Congressman Bennie Thompson. | | I was proud to serve on the January 6th Committee with Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren. After the violent attacks on the Capitol, our Committee worked diligently to uncover the threats to our democracy and deliver justice. Since that day, Donald Trump has never stopped undermining the rule of law, degrading our democracy, eroding our Constitution, or lying about the work of our Committee. In the face of Trump’s lawless contempt for our justice system and our democracy, Zoe Lofgren has led the resistance, fighting to uphold our Constitution and stop Republicans’ far-right policies. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: = = = Trump is a criminal who is determined to undermine our democracy — from attempting to overturn the results of the 2020 election, to pardoning January 6th, 2021 rioters, to threatening to jail Zoe and me along with the other former members of our Select Committee. Now, Trump’s Justice Department hired a January 6th rioter who encouraged the murder of police officers. This is an insult to every honorable law enforcement officer in our country, and to our democracy itself. Zoe and I are outraged, but this follows the same dishonorable playbook Trump has followed his entire time in office — so the fight continues. But I need your help today to ensure we don’t lose Zoe’s principled voice in Congress, Peter. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Congressman Bennie Thompson | | Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. This is Adam Schiff. I have some important news to share with you, Peter: **Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113210035/563015189/-1739144450?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_081225_SCHIFFSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzk2ODA4NS1kNjc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4KCcYemANNSff7HBSjlRk2s8OuT0w_t3XQQl51Gl_kY=) Ed Martin, if you don’t remember, was the Interim U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other — and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it. Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived “enemies” of the Trump administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs, urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than follow his unethical edicts. Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending insurrectionists who broke into the Capitol on January 6 and advancing bogus claims of election fraud. He is close friends with an avowed neo-Nazi, appearing with and praising him repeatedly. _Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin’s dangerous nomination._ When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed Martin to lead a “weaponization” task force at the Justice Department to go after the president’s enemies. I was at the top of the list. **And now, Ed Martin is investigating me and carrying out not just the president’s political retribution, but his own, as well.** [Peter, this is going to get ugly. But I will not be deterred from speaking out, fighting back, and holding Trump accountable every single day. Will you have my back and split a contribution between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia to help me fight back against Ed Martin and his sham investigation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113210036/563015190/-1739144450?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_081225_SCHIFFSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzk2ODA4NS1kNjc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4KCcYemANNSff7HBSjlRk2s8OuT0w_t3XQQl51Gl_kY=) | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113210037/563015191/-1739144450?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_081225_SCHIFFSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzk2ODA4NS1kNjc3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4KCcYemANNSff7HBSjlRk2s8OuT0w_t3XQQl51Gl_kY=)**

I have some important news to share with you, Peter: Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me. = Ed Martin, if you don’t remember, was the Interim U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other — and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it. Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived “enemies” of the Trump administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs, urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than follow his unethical edicts. Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending insurrectionists who broke into the Capitol on January 6 and advancing bogus claims of election fraud. He is close friends with an avowed neo-Nazi, appearing with and praising him repeatedly. Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin’s dangerous nomination. When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed Martin to lead a “weaponization” task force at the Justice Department to go after the president’s enemies. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: ICE agents are getting their student loan debt forgiven
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Donald Trump is offering student loan forgiveness to new members of ICE —
his racist, fascist American Gestapo — while making it harder for people
he deems enemies to escape crushing debt.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250812-signup-cancelstudentdebt/?source=em20250812-36924&akid=36924%2E1203867%2Es0Sb1T ]The Intercept_: Guess Who’s Eligible for Student Loan Forgiveness: New
ICE Agents

In a ploy to recruit new agents to the recently superfunded ICE, Trump is
dangling enticing benefits like student loan forgiveness. But at the same
time, his administration is attacking the Public Service Loan Forgiveness
program, a financial lifeline for public servants who spend years serving
their communities.

Republicans have spent years attacking Justice Democrats in Congress for
fighting to cancel student debt. But now, they’re ready to forgive loans
if it helps them strengthen the very agency that rips apart families and
terrorizes immigrant communities.

They’re using the cost of education as a weapon to punish political
opponents and reward enforcers of their far-right agenda.

But it doesn’t have to be this way. We can’t let Republicans cherry-pick
who deserves relief while millions are trapped under the loans they took
just to get a job. We need to cancel student loan debt for everyone.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250812-signup-cancelstudentdebt/?source=em20250812-36924&akid=36924%2E1203867%2Es0Sb1T ]Add your name now to demand they cancel all student loan debt.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250812-signup-cancelstudentdebt/?source=em20250812-36924&akid=36924%2E1203867%2Es0Sb1T ]Sign the Petition

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36924%2E1203867%2Es0Sb1T

name: The Democrats
subject: re: Texas updates
body:
---
Derek, If you’re looking for a way to make an impact _right now_ , we’re here to tell you this is it. Let us explain: Democrats are fighting a major battle in Texas — and the outcome will directly impact all of us for years to come. **Right now, Republicans are blatantly trying to steal _five_ Democratic seats in Texas. And, if they succeed, it will be that much easier for the GOP to hold Congress in 2026 and beyond.** That’s why Republicans are laser-focused on this fight, and we need to be, too. Texas Democrats have left the state to prevent a vote on the rigged map. But now, the state’s Republicans are threatening to _remove and arrest_ Democrats who are blocking their gerrymandered map. The DNC has activated over 30,000 volunteers to contact Texas voters and let them know what’s at stake right now. We’ve sent tens of thousands of messages recruiting Texans to attend hearings on this issue. **We’re fighting fire with fire, because if Republicans succeed, the consequences could be disastrous for people all over the country.** **[But we’ll need your help to do it. If you’re looking for a way to make an impact right now in this important moment, this is your opportunity. Can you split a $10 contribution now between the Texas Democratic Party and the DNC to help power our work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-tx-split?refcode=em_20250812_4271_fr&amount=10&refcode2=4271_22930333_6HONo9&akid=4271%2E22930333%2E6HONo9)**

name: Jay Jones
subject: this shouldn’t be a hot take
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]
Hey, Jay Jones here. I’ll keep this short.
My opponent, Jason Miyares, just announced that he’s taking the stage with Attorney General Pam Bondi – one of Donald Trump’s closest confidants in his authoritarian push for power.
But to invite Pam Bondi – the same person who refuses to release the Epstein files – to a conference on ending human trafficking is insulting.
It raises serious questions, too – as Virginia’s top legal officer, does Miyares stand on the side of transparency? Or will he cozy up to members of Donald Trump’s inner circle as they continue to bury the Epstein files?
Look, it shouldn’t be a hot take when I say that Virginia’s Attorney General shouldn’t be cozying up to members of one of the most corrupt administrations in history.
I’m running to restore Virginians’ confidence in the AG’s office, but I need your help. Will you give any amount you can spare to help us win this election in less than three months? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]

subject: Cowards
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I’m furious, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to take on Trump and his Republican loyalists.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4915%2E35263%2E3ih-cR)
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-craig.XwkA4Y&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250812_PM2_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4915%2E35263%2E3ih-cR) Peter, I'm furious. I’ve had to fight my whole life — from growing up in a mobile home park, to working my way through college, to flipping a GOP-held Congressional seat. **Damn, if we don’t have a fight on our hands right now.** **[I’m running for U.S. Senate to be the fighter Minnesotans need, and I’m personally asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin before midnight.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4438?c0=stb-em-craig.VHzI8K&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250812_PM2_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4915%2E35263%2E3ih-cR)** Let me break it down: 🔴 There’s chaos and corruption coming out of Washington — crashing down on all of us, every day. 🔴 The president is running roughshod over the middle class — working overtime for the drug companies, billionaires and special interests. 🔴 And a cowardly Republican Party is rolling over and letting it all happen. I’m furious, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to take on Trump and his Republican loyalists, root out the corruption that’s plaguing Washington for far too long and be the voice Minnesotans need. **[I wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t so urgent: Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Tammy before midnight?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-craig.XwkA4Y&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250812_PM2_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4915%2E35263%2E3ih-cR)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Angie Craig and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-craig.J6t6Ye&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250812_PM2_V1_S1&t=7&akid=4915%2E35263%2E3ih-cR)

clean_body: | I’m furious, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to take on Trump and his Republican loyalists. Peter, I'm furious. I’ve had to fight my whole life — from growing up in a mobile home park, to working my way through college, to flipping a GOP-held Congressional seat. Damn, if we don’t have a fight on our hands right now. Let me break it down: 🔴 There’s chaos and corruption coming out of Washington — crashing down on all of us, every day. 🔴 The president is running roughshod over the middle class — working overtime for the drug companies, billionaires and special interests. 🔴 And a cowardly Republican Party is rolling over and letting it all happen. I’m furious, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to take on Trump and his Republican loyalists, root out the corruption that’s plaguing Washington for far too long and be the voice Minnesotans need.
